Matthew1:1 Takerada u tsombor u Yesu Kristu Wan u Davidi, wan u Aberaham la." 
Matthew1:2 Aberaham mar Isaka; Isaka mar Yakob; Yakob mar Yuda kua anmgbianev nav; 
Matthew1:3 Yuda mar Perishi man Sera a Tamar; Perishi mar Heseron mar Aram; 
Matthew1:4 Aram mar Aminadabi; Aminadabi mar Nashon; Nashon mar Salmon; 
Matthew1:5 Salmon mar Boashi a Rahabi; Boashi mar Obedi a Rutu; Obedi mar Yese; 
Matthew1:6 Yese mar tor Davidi; Davidi mar Solomon a kwase u Uria la; 
Matthew1:7 Solomon mar Rehobiam; Rehobiam mar Abiya; Abiya mar Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa mar Yoshafati; Yoshafati mar Yoram; Yoram mar Ushia; 
Matthew1:9 Ushia mar Yotam; Yotam mar Ahashi; Ahashi mar Hesekia; 
Matthew1:10 Hesekia mar Manase; Manase mar Amon; Amon mar Yoshia; 
Matthew1:11 Yoshia mar Yekonia kua anngôôv nav, ka sha ayange a i kura ve i yem a ve hen Babilon je la." 
Matthew1:12 Ayange a i kura ve i yem a ve hen Babilon la nga kar kera yô; Yekonia mar Shealtiel; Shealtiel mar Serubabel; 
Matthew1:13 Serubabel mar Abiudi; Abiudi mar Eliakim; Eliakim mar Asor; 
Matthew1:14 Asor mar Sadoki; Sadoki mar Akim; Akim mar Eliudi; 
Matthew1:15 Eliudi mar Eliasar; Eliasar mar Matan; Matan mar Yakob; 
Matthew1:16 Yakob mar Yosev, nom u Maria, ka Maria u a mar Yesu u i yilan Un er Kristu la." 
Matthew1:17 Kohol ikov ne cii, hii hen Aberaham zan zan ar hen Davidi yô, ka pue kar inyiin, gema hii di hen Davidi ar sha mkor u i kura ve i yem a ve hen Babilon la kpaa, ka ikov pue kar inyiin je, man shi hii di sha mkor u i kura ve i yem a ve hen Babilon la zan zan ar hen Kristu kpaa shi ka ikov pue kar inyiin je." 
Matthew1:18 Mmar u Kristu yô, kape a lu ne: Zum u Yosev lu sôôr ngô Na, Maria, man er ve lu a zua ga je tsô, i nenge un a iyav sha Icighan Jijingi." 
Matthew1:19 Nom na Yosev, er a lu or u jighjigh man shi er lu un ka nan un kunya ken igbar kpaa ga yô, a wa ken ishima er una de un myer." 
Matthew1:20 Kpa ngur henen sha akaa ne nahan yô, ortyom u Ter va ande her a na ken mnya, kaa er: We, Yosev, wan u Davidi, de cie u eren kwase wou Maria ne ga, gadia kwagh u a jil un ken iyol la, ka u sha Icighan Jijingi je." 
Matthew1:21 Una mar wan u nomso; ú ii Un iti wer, Yesu; gadia ka Un Una yima nongoior Na sha asorabo a ve ye." 
Matthew1:22 Akaa ne cii er sha u kwagh u Ter ôr sha ikev i profeti la, a̱ kure sha mi vough, er:" 
Matthew1:23 Iniunkwase ia wa iyav, ia mar wan u nomso; á yila Un iti er Emanuel, inja na yô er, Aôndo ngu a vese." 
Matthew1:24 Tsô Yosev nderen yô, a er er ortyom u Ter kaa un nahan, a er kwase na;" 
Matthew1:25 kpa mayange yav a na ga, zan zan a kar maren wan u nomso; a ii Un iti er Yesu." 
Matthew2:1 Tsô er i mar Yesu ken Betelehem u ken tar u Yudia sha ayange a tor Herode yô, mbafankwagh due vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh la, va ken Yerusalem," 
Matthew2:2 ve pine er: Tor u Mbayuda u i mar Un ne, ka han A lu? Gadia se nenge ishan Na sha ityoughkitaregh, man se ve ser, sé va civir Un ye." 
Matthew2:3 Tor Herode ongo nahan yô, ishima ta un kwe, kua ior mba ken Yerusalem cii a na imôngo." 
Matthew2:4 Tsô er a kohol upristi mba tamen cii kua mbangeren mba nongoior la yô, a pine ve hen ape á mar Kristu yô." 
Matthew2:5 Ve kaa a na er: Ka ken Betelehem u ken tar u Yudia, gadia kape profeti nger je la er:" 
Matthew2:6 We, Betelehem, tar u Yuda, mayange je u lu u gban ijime ken mbahemenev mba Yuda ga; gadia ka ken we je man Orhemen Una due, u Una kuran nongoior Wan Iserael ye." 
Matthew2:7 Tsô Herode yila mbafankwagh mbala ken myer pine ve vighe vighe sha u ma un fe shighe u ishan la i ande yô. 
Matthew2:8 Tsô a na ve gbenda u zan hen Betelehem, a kaa er: Za nen za time nen sha kwagh u Wanikundan la doo doo; nea zua a Na yô, va ôrom nen, sha er mo kpaa me za, me za civir Un yô." 
Matthew2:9 Mba ongo imo i tor nahan yô, ve gba yemen. Yô, ishan i ve nenge a mi sha ityoughkitaregh la, lu zan ve sha hemen zan zan i za tile sha hen ijir i Wanikundan la lu la." 
Matthew2:10 Mba nengen a ishan la yô, ve ember kpen kpen." 
Matthew2:11 Tsô ve za nyôr ken iyou la, ve nenge a Wanikundan la a ngô Na Maria, ve gure inya ve civir Un, ve gema ve sagh ikav vev, ve na Un iwua: zenaria man kwaghhumandoon man mire." 
Matthew2:12 Kpa Aôndo wa ve kwagh ken mnyam ma cien er, ve̱ de kera hidi hen Herode ga, nahan ve mough, ve kar gbenda ugen, ve yem tar ve." 
Matthew2:13 Tsô mba yemen kera yô, ortyom u Ter va ande hen Yosev ken mnyam ma ciem, kaa er: Mough, tôô Wan ne kua ngô Na, yevese yem ken Igipiti, za lu ker zan zan Mo man Me kaa u ye; gadia Herode una ker Wanikundan ne a ku." 
Matthew2:14 Tsô a maa a mough je, a tôô Wanikundan la kua ngô Na tugh, a yem ken Igipiti;" 
Matthew2:15 a za lu keela zan zan Herode kar kpen, sha er kwagh u Ter lu kaa sha ikev i profeti la a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, er: Ka ken Igipiti man M yila Wan Wam ye." 
Matthew2:16 Tsô Herode nengen er mbafankwagh mbala bume un a bume yô, ishima vihi un tsung, a tindi er, i̱ za wua mbayevnomso mba ve lu ken Betelehem kua ken ityar i i kase un la ca ca, hii sha mba ve lu anyom ahar kua mba ve yen nahan kpaa, sha inja i shighe u a time vighe vighe hen mbafankwagh la." 
Matthew2:17 Nahan zum la kwagh u profeti Yeremia lu ôron la, kure sha mi vough, ape a kaa er:" 
Matthew2:18 I ungwa imo ken Rama, mliam ma haan man mzungu tsung! Rahel ngu vaan ônov nav, a rumun er i̱ sur un ishima ga, sha ci u ve kera lu ga yô." 
Matthew2:19 Kpa Herode va kpe kera yô, ortyom u Ter za ande hen Yosev ken mnyam ma cien ken Igipiti," 
Matthew2:20 kaa er: Mough sha, tôô Wanakiriki ne man ngô Na, yem ken tar u Iserael gadia mba ve lu keren Wan ne a ku yô, ve kpe kera ve." 
Matthew2:21 Tsô a mough, a tôô Wan la man ngô na, a va nyôr ken tar u Iserael." 
Matthew2:22 Kpa ongo er Arekilau tema tor ken tar u Yudia sha ityough ki ter na, Herode yô, a cia u zan ker; shi i wa un kwagh ken mnyam ma cien, nahan a kar a za nyôr ken tiôn u Galilia," 
Matthew2:23 a za a za tema ken gar ugen u i yilan er Nasareti la, sha u kwagh u uprofeti lu ve kaa la, a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, er: Á yila Un er Ornasareti." 
Matthew3:1 Sha ayange la Yohane u eren batisema va, lu ôron kwaghaôndo ken taaikôngo u Yudia," 
Matthew3:2 lu kaan er: Gema nen asema, gadia tartor u Sha mgbôghom ve." 
Matthew3:3 Gadia ka un u profeti Yesaia lu ôron kwagh na er: Imo i oryilan ken taaikôngo er: Sôr nen gbenda u Ter, kôôm nen igbenda Na jighilaa." 
Matthew3:4 Yohane ne yô, ikondo na lu i sha aive a rakumi, man shi a zer kwange u ikôv shin iwenge; kwaghyan na gema lu mbaahungwa man shi iyough i ken toho." 
Matthew3:5 Nahan Yerusalem man Yudia cii man ikasentar u ifi u Yordan cii kpaa, ve due, ve za her a na;" 
Matthew3:6 a er ve batisema shin ifi u Yordan, ve lu pasen asorabo a ve." 
Matthew3:7 Tsô er a nenge a Mbafarishi kua Mbasadushi kpishi lu van hen batisema ne yô, a kaa a ve er: Ne ônov mba igbindev mban, ka an man nan we ne kwagh er né yevese iyugh i i lu van la ase?" 
Matthew3:8 Yô, ume nen ase ityamegh ki ki kom mgemshima yô;" 
Matthew3:9 man shi de kera henen nen ayol a en ner, se mba a ter wase Aberaham ga; gadia m ngu kaan ne mer, awen ne je kpaa Aôndo Una fatyô u geman a̱ hingir ônov mba Aberaham." 
Matthew3:10 Hegen je kpaa i ver ijembe hen misekon; hanma kon u u um ityamegh ki injaagh ga yô, á gber u kera, á kende ken usu." 
Matthew3:11 Mo yô, m ngu eren ne batisema sha mnger u sha mgemshima tsô, kpa Un u A lu van mo ken ijime la, A hembam agee, akôvangahar a Na tsô kpaa, m kuma u me tôô a ga; Wen yô, Una er ne batisema sha Icighan Jijingi man sha usu kpaa;" 
Matthew3:12 tser ngu sha uwegh Nagh, Una ese vande Na tsembelee, Una kohol uwua Na, una za ombo sha una, kpa akoo yô, Una nande sha usu u pirin mayange ga." 
Matthew3:13 Tsô Yesu mough sha Galilia, za shin ifi u Yordan hen Yohane sha u a̱ er Un batisema yô." 
Matthew3:14 Kpa Yohane venda a Na, a kaa er: Ka mo man i gbem u ma m zough a batisema hen a We ye, man We, U gem U ve her a mo?" 
Matthew3:15 Kpa Yesu gema kaa a na er: Kpa hegen yô, gba rumun tsô, gadia kape i doo u sé kure perapera cii vough je ne. Tsô a rumun a Na." 
Matthew3:16 Tsô er i er Yesu batisema kera yô, A due shin mnger fese, maa i bugh Sha man A nenge a Jijingi u Aôndo lu senen er ikungugh nahan, va tema sha a Na." 
Matthew3:17 Imo due Sha, kaa er; Ngun ka Wan Wam u ishima ishima, u i doom a na yum yô." 
Matthew4:1 Zum la Jijingi yem a Yesu ken taaikôngo, sha u diabolo a̱ za mee Un yô." 
Matthew4:2 Er A hôr kwaghyan ayange akunduahar man aime akunduahar yô, ken masejime ijen kôr Un." 
Matthew4:3 Tsô ormee va her a Na, kaa a Na er: Aluer Wea lu Wan u Aôndo je yô, kaa awen ne a̱ hingir bredi." 
Matthew4:4 Kpa A bugh zwa A kaa er: I nger er: Ka sha bredi tseegh or á lu uma ga, kpa ka sha hanma kwaghôron u a dugh sha zwa u Aôndo yô." 
Matthew4:5 Tsô diabolo yem a Na hen icighangar, za ver Un sha ityough ki tempel je," 
Matthew4:6 kaa a Na er: Aluer Wea lu Wan u Aôndo je yô, gba ase iyol You shin inya, gadia i nger er: Una wa mbatyomov nav kwagh sha a We, sha er U̱ de te nguhar sha iwen ga yô." 
Matthew4:7 Yesu gema kaa a na er: Yô, i shi i nger er: De karen Ter, Aôndo wou, ga." 
Matthew4:8 Shi diabolo yem a Na sha gôgôwo u taven tsung, tese Un ityartor i sha won cii kua icivir i i," 
Matthew4:9 tsô a kaa a na er: Akaa ne cii me na U, aluer Wea gure inya, Wea civir mo yô." 
Matthew4:10 Tsô Yesu gema kaa a na er: Yem kera, Satan, gadia i nger er: Civir Ter, Aôndo wou, ka Un tseegh er Un tom ye." 
Matthew4:11 Tsô diabolo mough hen Na kera; tsô mbatyomov mba Shaav va, va wase Un." 
Matthew4:12 Tsô ongo er i wa Yohane ken gaadi yô, a hide ken Galilia;" 
Matthew4:13 A mough ken Nasareti, A va A va tema ken Kapernahum u shin kpe u zegemnger, ken tar u Sebulon man Nafetali," 
Matthew4:14 sha er kwagh u profeti Yesaia lu kaa la, a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, er:" 
Matthew4:15 Tar u Sebulon man tar u Nafetali, sha gbenda u zegemnger u peren Yordan la, Galilia u akuraior." 
Matthew4:16 Nongoior u u tem ken ime yô, ve nenge a iwanger i vesen, man mba ve tem ken tar kua mure u kuugh yô, iwanger due ta sha a ve." 
Matthew4:17 Hen shighe la je Yesu hii u ôron kwaghaôndo, gba kaan er: Gema nen asema, gadia tartor u Sha mgbôghom ve." 
Matthew4:18 Ngur teran hen kpe u zegemnger u Galilia yô, A nenge a anngôôv uhar, lu Shimon u i yilan er, Peteru la, man shi anngô na Anderia, ve lu haan ukper shi zegemnger, gadia ve lu mbakôron ishu." 
Matthew4:19 A kaa a ve er: Va, dondon nen sha a Mo, Me gema ne, né hingir mbakôronior." 
Matthew4:20 Nahan ve undu ukper vev fese, ve dondo sha a Na." 
Matthew4:21 Karen heera yemen ken hemen yô, A shi A nenge a ior mbagenev uhar, lu anngôôv, ka Yakobu wan u Sebedeu man anngô na Yohane, ve lu ken tsô a ter ve Sebedeu imôngo, ve lu cingen ukper vev. A yila ve." 
Matthew4:22 Nahan ve undu tso kua ter ve fese, ve dondo sha a Na." 
Matthew4:23 Tsô Yesu zende ken tar u Galilia cii, lu tesen ken ushinagoge vev, lu ôron Loho u Dedoo u tartor, lu been ior hanma injauange man shi hanma mtseenem kpaa." 
Matthew4:24 Gwa Na samber ken tar u Shiria cii, tsô ve va Un a mba ve lu dedoo ga la cii, lu mba angev atô kposo kposo man mnyoonom kôr ve yô, mbalun a ujijingi mba bov man mbagbanikungu man mbakpenalegh; A bee ve mbu cii." 
Matthew4:25 Ikpelaior kpishi i ken Galilia man Dekapoli man Yerusalem kua ken Yudia man shi yande Yordan kpaa, dondo sha a Na." 
Matthew5:1 Tsô nengen a ikpelaior yô, A unde sha uwo; tem sha her yô, mbahenen Nav va her a Na." 
Matthew5:2 Tsô A bugh zwa Na, A gba tesen ve, kaan er:" 
Matthew5:3 Saan mba ve lu mbaibanave ken jijingi la iyol, gadia tartor u Sha ka u ve je." 
Matthew5:4 Saan mba ve zungu la iyol, gadia á sur ve asema." 
Matthew5:5 Saan mba ve lu a ishima i legh legh la iyol, gadia tar ua lu dyako ve je." 
Matthew5:6 Saan mba ijen i ker ve, man imura kpaa, sha kwagh u perapera la iyol, gadia vea ide." 
Matthew5:7 Saan mba ve zungu mhôônom la iyol, gadia á zungwe ve mhôônom." 
Matthew5:8 Saan mba ve lu asema wang la iyol, gadia vea nenge a Aôndo." 
Matthew5:9 Saan mba ve ker num la iyol, gadia á yila ve er, ônov mba Aôndo." 
Matthew5:10 Saan mba i eren ve ican sha ci u kwagh u perapera la iyol, gadia tartor u Sha ka u ve je." 
Matthew5:11 Saan ne iyol zum u ka a heen ne, a tôvon ne a ican, man a teren ne sha hanma inja i ifer sha aie, sha ci Wam yô," 
Matthew5:12 ember nen, i̱ saan ne ken ishima tsung, gadia injar yen vese Sha, gadia kape ve tôv uprofeti mba ve vande a ven la a ican je la." 
Matthew5:13 Ne mba bar u tar; kpa aluer bar una kera nyoho ga yô, ka sha nyi je á sôr unu? Una kera lu a inja sha ma kwagh je ga, á gba haan kera tsô, ior á ndyar angahar." 
Matthew5:14 Ne mba iwanger i tar. Gar u i maa un sha igungu, lu myer ga." 
Matthew5:15 Man mba te imenger mba cirin kapu sha mi ga, kpa ka i ver sha daar u pendan imenger sha mi, nahan i wanger mba ve lu ken iyou la cii je." 
Matthew5:16 Kape ne kpaa iwanger yen i̱ wanger sha ishigh ki iorough la, sha u ve̱ nenge aeren a en a dedoo man ve̱ civir Ter wen u A lu Sha yô." 
Matthew5:17 De henen nen ner, M va sha u bunden atindiakaa kua uprofeti ga, M va sha u bunden a bunde ga, kpa ka u eren sha mi vough." 
Matthew5:18 Gadia mimi je M kaan ne ne, zan zan Sha man tar kpaa vea kar kera je, kpa mayange ishangekwagh môm shin anikav môm tsô kpaa una kough ken atindiakaa kera ga, zan zan akaa cii aa kure sha mi vough." 
Matthew5:19 Nahan yô, hanma or u nana sagh u môm ken atindiakaa a hemban ndahar ne man nana gema á tese ior nahan kpaa yô, á yila nan er or u hemban gban ijime cii sha tartor u Sha; kpa hanmô u nana eren sha mi, shi nana tesen nahan kpaa yô, á yila nan er or u vesen sha tartor u Sha." 
Matthew5:20 Gadia M ngu kaan ne Mer, saa di perapera wen una hemba u mbangeren man Mbafarishi la, gayô, nyôron yen sha tartor u Sha mayange ga." 
Matthew5:21 Ne ungwa i kaa a mbayiase er: De woo or ga, man anti or u nana wua or yô, nana kuma u á ôr nan ijir." 
Matthew5:22 Kpa Mo yô, M kaan ne Mer: Hanma or u nana yuwe a anngô u nan yô, nan kuma u á ôr nan ijir ve; man shi hanma or u nana kaa a anngô u nan er, Raka, yô, nan kuma u á ôr nan ijir sha ijirtamen ve; man shi hanma or u nana kaa er, we, ibumeor, yô, nan kuma mtsaha u ken gehena u yeghen usu la ve." 
Matthew5:23 Nahan yô, aluer wea va a iwua you u va nan sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, man wea umbur her er kwagh a zua anngôu a we yô," 
Matthew5:24 undu iwua you her hen kpe atseegh la, za vande himen a anngôu la, man ú hide, ú va na iwua you ye." 
Matthew5:25 De num a or u yilan we ijir la fese, zum u wea lu vea na sha gbenda je yô; sha u or u yilan we ijir la a̱ de za naan we sha ikev i orjir man orjir la a̱ geman we a̱ naan sha ikev i dugwer er a̱ gbihi u ken gaadi ga." 
Matthew5:26 Mimi je M kaan we, mayange ú due ker ga, saa ú kimbi, anini môm tsô kpaa una kera shi ga." 
Matthew5:27 Ne ungwa er i kaa er: De eren idya ga. 
Matthew5:28 Kpa Mo yô, M kaan ne ner hanma or u nana kenger kwase sha u nana tôm un yô, nan er idya a na ken ishima je ve." 
Matthew5:29 Man aluer ishe you i ken iyan ia na u anzughul yô, dugh i, ta kera; gadia á lu u guda u ilyeegh you i môm ki saa a u ma i gbihi iyol you jimin ken gehena la." 
Matthew5:30 Man shi aluer uwegh ough ku yanegh kua na u anzughul yô, tôndo ku, ta kera, gadia á lu u guda u ilyeegh you i môm ki saa, a u iyol you jimin ma i nyer ken gehena la." 
Matthew5:31 Man shi i kaa kpaa er, hanma or u nana pav a kwase u nan yô, nana̱ na un takerada u mpav." 
Matthew5:32 Mo yô, M kaan ne Mer: Hanma or u nana pav a kwase u nan, á lu sha ityôikaa i idya ga yô, nan ngu nan un sha u a̱ hingir idyakwase; man shi hanma or u nana er un u i pav a na la yô, nan kpaa nan er idya je ve." 
Matthew5:33 Man shi ne ungwa i kaa a mbayiase er: De bumun sha aie ga, kpa er sha abumun a ou a u bum a Ter la vough." 
Matthew5:34 Kpa Mo yô, M kaan ne Mer: De bumun nen mayange ga: shin Sha ga, gadia ka ikônough ki Aôndo ki torough je;" 
Matthew5:35 shin tar kpaa ga, gadia ka kwagh Na u pendan angahar sha mi je la; shin Yerusalem kpaa ga, gadia ka gar u Zegetor je;" 
Matthew5:36 man shi de bumun sha ityough you kpaa ga, gadia gwarce môm tsô kpaa u fatyô u geman un hingir u pupuu shin u il ga." 
Matthew5:37 Kpa kwaghôron wen yô, “Een” wen a̱ lu “een” heregh, man “ei” wen kpaa, a̱ lu “ei” heregh. Kwagh u una seer sha mban yô, ka u a dugh ken ifer je la." 
Matthew5:38 Ne ungwa i kaa er: Ishe sha ishe, inyigh sha inyi;" 
Matthew5:39 kpa Mo yô, M kaan ne Mer: De hendan nen a or u ifer ga; kpa hanma or u nana ta u sambe sha hengegh ku yanegh yô, gema nan kugenegh kpaa." 
Matthew5:40 Man aluer a lu or ka za yilan we ijir ngohol we riga yô, de nan nana̱ tôô ikondo you i cirin iyol kpaa." 
Matthew5:41 Man shi hanma or u nana kighir we er u̱ zende mail môm yô, za a nan zan zan uhar je." 
Matthew5:42 Or a sôn u kwagh yô, na nan, man a sar or ka pwaren kwagh her a we kpaa, de geman nan ijime ga." 
Matthew5:43 Ne ungwa i kaa er: Doo a or u nan we ndor a we yô, gema kôr orihom wou ihom." 
Matthew5:44 Kpa Mo yô, M kaan ne Mer: Doo nen a mbaihomov enev, man shi eren nen msen sha ci u mba ve tev ne a ican yô;" 
Matthew5:45 sha er né lu ônov mba Ter wen u A lu Sha yô, gadia ka A er iyange Na i̱ due i̱ ta sha mbaaferev kua mbamimi kpaa, man ka A nôô ura sha mbaperapera man mba ve lu mba perapera ga kpaa." 
Matthew5:46 Gadia aluer ka mba ne doo ve ishima la tsô vea doo ne ishima yô, ka nyi injar ne lu a mini? Mbangoholkpandegh kpaa kape ve eren je la gaa?" 
Matthew5:47 Man aluer nea sughun anmgbianev enev tseegh yô, ka nyi ne eren i hemban mbagenev a mini? Atôatyev kpaa kape a eren je la gaa?" 
Matthew5:48 Nahan yô, lu nen vough er Ter wen u Sha A lu vough nahan." 
Matthew6:1 Ver nen ishima sha perapera wen la, de eren nen un sha ishigh ki iorough i̱ lu sha ci u ve̱ nenge ga; á lu nahan yô, ne kera mba a injar hen Ter wen u A lu Sha la ga." 
Matthew6:2 Nahan shighe u wea eren iwua yô, de tôngon korough sha hemen wou, er mbaatsereghev ve eren ken ushinagoge kua sha igbenda sha u vea zua a icivir hen ior la nahan ga. Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, ve ngohol injar ve kera ve." 
Matthew6:3 Kpa shighe u wea eren iwua yô, de rumun uwegh ough ku imesegh ku̱ fan kwagh u ku yanegh ku eren la ga;" 
Matthew6:4 sha er iwua you i̱ lu ken myer yô, man Teru u A nengen ken myer la, Una na u injar you yô." 
Matthew6:5 Man shighe u wea eren msen yô, de luun er mbaatsereghev nahan ga; gadia ka i doo ve u tilen eren msen ken ushinagoge man sha akahar a akômaigbinda sha u ior ve̱ nenge a ve yô. Mimi je M kaan ne ne, ve ngohol injar ve kera ve." 
Matthew6:6 Kpa we, shighe u wea eren msen yô, nyôr ken iyou you i ken iuv, u wuhe hunda kera yô, sôn Teru u A lu ken myer la; Una ungwa imo you." 
Matthew6:7 Sha msen u eren la kpaa, de zeren nen kimbir gbilin gbilin er atôatyev a eren nahan la ga, gadia mba henen er ka sha kwaghôron ve yum la man á ungwa ve ye." 
Matthew6:8 Yô, de luun nen er ve nahan ga; gadia Ter wen fa kwagh u a gbe ne je er ne lu a sôn Un ga yô." 
Matthew6:9 Yô, eren nen msen nahan, ner: Ter wase u Sha, i̱ tsegha iti You," 
Matthew6:10 tartor Wou u̱ va, i̱ er ishima You shin tar kpaa vough er i eren i Sha nahan;" 
Matthew6:11 na se kwaghyan wase nyian u a lu sha ci u ayange ayange la; 
Matthew6:12 man de se anzô ase di er se kpaa se deen mba ve gbe anzô hen vese la nahan; 
Matthew6:13 man shi de ze a vese hen ape imeen i lu ga, kpa yima se sha ifer. (Gadia tartor ka u Wou kua agee man icivir kpaa, gbem sha won. Amen)" 
Matthew6:14 Gadia aluer nea deen ior akaabo a ve yô, Ter wen u Sha di kpaa Una de ne." 
Matthew6:15 Kpa aluer nea deen ior akaabo a ve ga yô, Ter wen di kpaa Una de ne akaabo a en ga." 
Matthew6:16 Man shighe u nea hôron kwaghyan yô, de luun nen zunguluu er mbaatsereghev nahan ga; gadia ka ve vihi ishiv vev sha u ior ve̱ nenge er ve her kwaghyan yô. Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, ve ngohol injar ve kera ve." 
Matthew6:17 Kpa we yô, shighe u wea hôron kwaghyan la, shighe mkurem sha ityou, ôô ishigh you," 
Matthew6:18 sha u ior ve̱ de kaven er u lu hôron kwaghyan ga, saa di Teru u A lu ken myer la; man Teru u A nengen ken myer la, Una na u injar ken igbar." 
Matthew6:19 De koson nen akaa a injaa sha ci wen shin tar ne hen ape ivina kua nduran ve vihin kwagh kera, mbaiv kpaa ka ve time ve iin ne ga;" 
Matthew6:20 kpa koson nen akaa a injaa sha ci wen Sha, ape ivina shin nduran ve vihin kwagh ga, mbaiv kpaa ve iin ga la." 
Matthew6:21 Gadia ape kwaghinjaa wou a lu yô, ka her man ishima you kpaa ia lu ye." 
Matthew6:22 Imenger i iyolough ka ishe; nahan aluer ishe you ia lu dedoo yô, iyol you cii kpaa ia iv a iwanger." 
Matthew6:23 Kpa aluer ishe you ia lu i ifer yô, iyol you cii kpaa ia iv a ime. Nahan yô, aluer iwanger i i lu ken a we la ia lu ime yô, ime la, ia kehe tsô!" 
Matthew6:24 Or môm môm ngu u nana fatyô u eren uter uhar tom ga; gadia nana kôr ugen ihom, ugen á doo nan ishima, shin nana var ken ugen, nana laha ugen. Ne fatyô u eren Aôndo tom kua inyaregh kpaa ga." 
Matthew6:25 Ka nahan man M kaan ne ye Mer, asema, a̱ de nyian ne sha ci u uma, wen, sha kwagh u né ya man sha kwagh u né ma, shin sha ci u iyol yen, sha kwagh u né zer la, ga. Uma hemba kwaghyan gaa, man iyol kpaa i hemba akondo gaa?" 
Matthew6:26 Nenge nen inyon i sha, ngi lee ga, ngi sondo kpaa ga, ngi ombon sha iuna kpaa ga; nahan kpaa Ter wen u Sha la koson i. Ne ne hemba i inja tsung je gaa?" 
Matthew6:27 Ka an wen je sha ishima i nyian i nan la, nana fatyô u seer ishiva i môm sha ityaven i nan ase?" 
Matthew6:28 Inja na nan man asema a nyian ne sha kwagh u akondo? Nenge nen er ityombo i ken toho i vesen yô; ngi eren tom ga, mou kpaa ngi te ga." 
Matthew6:29 Kpa M kaan ne ne, Solomon a iengem na cii je kpaa, mayange haa akondo er mô ve môm nahan ga." 
Matthew6:30 Yô, aluer Aôndo Una wuhan ahu a ken toho iyol doo doo nahan, a a lu uma nyian, kper a haa ken atse la, man hire ne mba ne lu a anjighjigh u nan nee?" 
Matthew6:31 Nahan yô, asema a̱ de nyian ne, kaan ner ner: Sé ya nyi? Shin: Sé ma nyi? Shin Sé zer nyi? ga." 
Matthew6:32 Gadia akaa ne cii atôatyev nga keren a, kpa Ter wen u Sha fa er kwagh a gbe ne sha akaa ne cii yô." 
Matthew6:33 Kpa vande keren nen tartor Na man perapera Na, man akaa ne cii á seer ne a ye." 
Matthew6:34 Nahan yô, asema a̱ de nyian ne sha kwagh u kper ga, gadia kper una gba nôngon sha kwagh na iyol na tsô; hanma iyange zayol u i lu a mi la, kuma i." 
Matthew7:1 De gbe nan nen or ibo gagh ga, er ne kpaa á na ne ibo gagh ga yô." 
Matthew7:2 Gadia imbajir i ne er ne, ka i á ôr ne ye; man ikaren i ne karen a mi ne kpaa, shi ka sha i je á kar ne mi ye." 
Matthew7:3 Inja na nan man u nengen anivurkon u a lu anmgbian wou ken ishe, kpa gungurkon u u lu ken ishe you yô, u we u iko ga?" 
Matthew7:4 Shin ú er nan man ú kaa a anmgbian wou wer: De, m̱ dugh u anivurkon ken ishe, man nenge, gungurkon u gem u lu u ken ishee?" 
Matthew7:5 We, orimangeregh ne, vande dughun gungurkon ken ishe you kera, nahan man u nenge dedoo sha u ú za dugh anivurkon la ken ishe i anmgbian wou kera ye." 
Matthew7:6 De ne nen iwa icighankwagh ga, man shi de gbihin nen igo utagbede enev sha ishi ga, sha u i̱ de ndyaren angahar sha mi, i̱ gema i̱ vihin ne iyol ga yô." 
Matthew7:7 Sôn nen, á na ne; ker nen, né zua a mi; mande nen uwegh sha katsor á bugh ne." 
Matthew7:8 Gadia hanmô u nan sen yô, nan ngohol; u nan keren kpaa, nan zough a mi; u nan manden uwegh kpaa á bugh nan." 
Matthew7:9 Ka an or je nan lu ken a ven u aluer wan u nan á sôn nan bredi, nana gema á na un iwen ase?" 
Matthew7:10 Shin una sôn ishu yô, nana gema á na un iyô ase?" 
Matthew7:11 Aluer ne mba ne lu mbaaferev je kpaa ne fa u nan ônov enev uiwua mba dedoo yô, man hire Ter wen u A lu Sha Una kera na mba ve sen Un, akaa a dedoo ga yee?" 
Matthew7:12 Akaa cii a i sar ne ka ior ve̱ er ne yô, ne kpaa er nen ve di nahan je, gadia ka atindiakaa kua uprofeti je la." 
Matthew7:13 Nyôr nen hen hunda u hogholoo, gadia gbenda u zan ken mtim la gbangese, ngu bele bele kpaa, man ior mba ve nyer her yô, ve ngee tsô." 
Matthew7:14 Gadia hunda hoghor, gbenda kpaa imbishi u u ze sha uma la, mbazuan a mi mba kpeghee tsô." 
Matthew7:15 Kura nen ayol a en sha uprofeti mba aiev mba ve ve her a ven a akôv a iyôngo iyol, kpa ken atô ve yô, gema ka ugbaseela mba huav je." 
Matthew7:16 Ka sha atam a ve man né fa ve ye. Mba zer wain sha usaa, shin mba zer tur sha ishishagh ase?" 
Matthew7:17 Kape hanma kon u injaa u um atam a injaa je la; kpa kon u bo yô, ngu um di atam a bo je." 
Matthew7:18 Kon u injaa ngu fetyô u umen atam a bo ga; kon u bo di kpaa ngu fetyô u umen atam a injaa ga. 
Matthew7:19 Hanma kon u u um atam a injaa ga yô, ka i gber kera, i gbihi ken usu." 
Matthew7:20 Nahan yô, ka sha atam a ve man né fa ve ye." 
Matthew7:21 Ka hanma or u nana kaa a Mo er, Tere! Tere! man nana nyôr sha tartor u Sha ga, saa u nan eren ishima i Terem u A lu Sha yô." 
Matthew7:22 Sha iyange la ior kpishi vea kaa a Mo er: Tere! Tere! Ka ken iti You man se lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti gaa? Man ka ken iti You se lu dughun ujijingi mba bov gaa? Man shi ka ken iti You se lu eren akaa a ageegh kpishi kpaa gaa? 
Matthew7:23 Tsô Me kaa a ve Mer: Mayange je M ngu a fa ne ga, yem nen heen kera, ne mbavendan atindi mban." 
Matthew7:24 Hanma or u nan ongo akaaôron Am ne man nan eren sha a yô, á kar nan sha orfankwagh u nan maa iyou i nan sha vande." 
Matthew7:25 Ura nôô, uikuwan sen, ahumbeura ta sha iyou la, kpa i gba ga, sha ci u i we i imagh sha vande yô." 
Matthew7:26 Man shi hanmô u nan ongo akaaôron Am ne, man nan eren sha a ga yô, á kar nan sha ibumeor u nan maa iyou i nan sha waarawa yô." 
Matthew7:27 Ura nôô, uikuwan sen, ahumbeura ta sha iyou la, mgbegha i, i gba; mgbe u i kaa kpee!" 
Matthew7:28 Tsô er Yesu been akaaôron ne yô, kpiligh ikpelaior iyol a ityesen Na;" 
Matthew7:29 gadia A tese ve er ka or u lun a tahav nahan, lu er mbangeren vev ga." 
Matthew8:1 Tsô hongo sha uwo la yô, ikpilaior kpishi dondo sha a Na." 
Matthew8:2 Orimande va her a Na, va gure Un inya, kaa er: Tere, aluer Wea rumun yô, U fatyô u wanger mo." 
Matthew8:3 Nahan A naregh uwegh, A bende un iyol, A kaa er: M rumun, i̱ wanger we, fese nahan imande na wanger un." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu kaa a na er: Ver ishima, de kaan ma or ga, kpa yem za tese pristi iyol you, man na nagh ku Mose lu kaa la, i̱ lu ve mpase." 
Matthew8:5 Tsô Yesu nyer ken Kapernahum yô, torutya ugen va her a Na, va zamber a Na," 
Matthew8:6 kaa er: Tere, wanakiriki wam ngu yaven inya ken ya a angev mbu kpen alegh, ka nyoon un tsung." 
Matthew8:7 A kaa a na er: Me va, Me va bee un." 
Matthew8:8 Kpa torutya la gema kaa er: Tere, m kuma u Ú nyôr hen haav av ga, kpa ôr a ôr kwagh tsô, á wanger wanakiriki wam iyol je." 
Matthew8:9 Gadia mo kpaa m ngu or u m lu sha ikev i mbagenev, man m gema m ngu a mbautyav sha ikev; man ka mea kaa a ugen mer: Za, kpa nan za je; mea kaa a ugen mer: Va, shi nan va je; mea kaa a wanakiriki wam mer: Er nahan, nan er je." 
Matthew8:10 Tsô Yesu ongo nahan yô, kpiligh Un iyol, A kaa a mba ve lu van Un ijime la er: Ka mimi je M kaan ne ye, ken Mbaiserael je kpaa mayange M ngu a zua a jighjigh u nan u vesen nahan ga." 
Matthew8:11 Man shi M ngu kaan ne Mer, ior kpishi mba ken ityoughkitaregh man shin ityôtar kpaa, vea va, vea va tema a Aberaham man Isaka man Yakob ken tartor u Sha imôngo," 
Matthew8:12 kpa á gema á dugh ônov mba tartor á haa ve ken ime i ken won la; mliam maa lu keregh kua anyi a yan kpaa. 
Matthew8:13 Tsô Yesu kaa a torutya la er: Yem tsô, i̱ er u er u ne jighjigh nahan la je. Wanakiriki la kpaa, wanger un iyol hen shighe la je." 
Matthew8:14 Tsô Yesu nyer ken ya u Peteru yô, A nenge ngôkem u Peteru lu yaven a angev mbu iyolhian." 
Matthew8:15 A kôr un sha uwe, tsô iyolhian la de un; nahan a mough sha, a gba gilim sha ci Na." 
Matthew8:16 Tsô iyange i been yô, ve va Un a ior kpishi mba ve lu a ujijingi mba bov yô; A dugh ujijingi mba bov kera sha kwaghôron Na, man mba ve lu dedoo ga la cii A bee ve angev;" 
Matthew8:17 sha er kwagh u profeti Yesaia lu kaa la, a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, er: Un iyol Na ngohol ukorkor asev, A tôô angev asev kpaa." 
Matthew8:18 Tsô er Yesu nenge ikpelaior kpishi kase Un, nahan yô, A kaa er, i̱ per yande la." 
Matthew8:19 Tsô orngeren ugen va her a Na, va kaa a Na er: Ortesen, Wea za han han kpaa, me zaan a We heregh je." 
Matthew8:20 Yesu gema kaa a na er: Atsôngo nga a ijô, inyon i sha ngi a aya, kpa Wan u or yô, ngu ape suur ityough ga." 
Matthew8:21 Ugen u ken mbahenen Nav kaa a Na er: Tere, nam ian, m̱ za m za ii terem ve." 
Matthew8:22 Kpa Yesu kaa a na er: Dondo sha a Mo, de mbakpenev ve̱ ii mbakpenev vev." 
Matthew8:23 Tsô, nyer ken tso yô, mbahenen Nav dondo Un." 
Matthew8:24 Yô, zegeuraahumbe gba hiar shin zegemnger bughupupu zan zan agôndoamnger haa shin tso; kpa Un lu yaven." 
Matthew8:25 Tsô ve va nder Un, ve kaa er: Tere, yima se, se mba saan!" 
Matthew8:26 A kaa a ve er: Ka nyi ne cie, ne mba ne lu a anjighjigh u nan kpeghee ne? Tsô A mough, A yange ahumbe man zegemnger, maa hingir ving ci ca cii." 
Matthew8:27 Cier ior iyol, ve kaa er: Ka nyi Or ne man ahumbe kua zegemnger je kpaa ve ongo Unu?" 
Matthew8:28 Tsô mba peren yande la ken tar u Mbagadara yô, ior uhar mba lun a ujijingi mba bov due ken iwar va kohol Un, lu mbavihinkwagh je cier iyol, or kera cihin karen hen gbenda la ga." 
Matthew8:29 Tsô ve genger amo, ve kaa er: Ka nyi i zough se a We, Yesu, Wan u Aôndo? U va heen sha u Ú va er se ican, er shighe kpaa a lu a kuma ga nee?" 
Matthew8:30 Yô, ikpelaigo lu yan inyarev, anigbar a ve." 
Matthew8:31 Ujijingi mba bov zamber a Na kaa er: Aluer U dugh se kera yô, rumun se, se̱ za nyôr ken ikpelaigo la." 
Matthew8:32 A kaa a ve er: Gba zan nen tsô. Nahan ve due, ve za nyôr ken igo la; man nenge ikpelaigo la cii hembe ayem sen shin ijem, guusu shin zegemnger, saa mnger." 
Matthew8:33 Mbakuran i yevese, nyôr ken gar, za ôr akaa la cii, kua kwagh u a er mba ve lu a ujijingi mba bov mbala kpaa." 
Matthew8:34 Tsô gar la cii due za kohol Yesu; mba nengen a Na yô, ve zamber a Na er A̱ due ken tar ve kera." 
Matthew9:1 Tsô A nyôr ken tso, A per, A va ken gar Na." 
Matthew9:2 Tsô i va Un a or u kpen alegh, lu yaven sha gambe. Man er Yesu nenge jighjigh ve u nan yô, A kaa a or u kpen alegh la er: Taver ishima wan Wam, i de u asorabo a ou." 
Matthew9:3 Yô, mbagenev ken mbangeren gba kaan ken asema er: Or ne ngu tuhwan Aôndo." 
Matthew9:4 Man er Yesu fa mbamhen vev yô, A kaa er: Ka nyi ne henen kwagh u bo ken asema a ene?" 
Matthew9:5 Gadia ka nyi i hembe lun uwer ga u ma i kaa er: I de u asorabo a ou; shin u ma i kaa er: Mough yem ase? 
Matthew9:6 Kpa sha u né fa er Wan u or A lu a tahav mbu den ior asorabo sha won yô, nahan A gema a kaa a or u kpen alegh la er: Mough, tôô gambe wou, yem hen ya wou." 
Matthew9:7 Tsô a mough, a yem hen ya na." 
Matthew9:8 Er ikpelaior nenge nahan yô, cier i iyol, i gba civir Aôndo u A ne ior imbautaha ne nahan yô." 
Matthew9:9 Tsô Yesu moughon heera kera yô, A nenge a orgen, iti na er Mateu, tema hen iyou i ngohol kpandegh; A kaa a na er: Dondo sha a Mo. Tsô a mough a dondo sha a Na." 
Matthew9:10 Er Yesu tem kwaghyan ken ya yô, mbangoholkpandegh kpishi man mbaasorabo va, va tema kwaghyan a Yesu imôngo kua mbahenen Nav." 
Matthew9:11 Mbafarishi mba nengen nahan yô, ve kaa a mbahenen Nav er: Inja na nan man Ortesen wen a ye kwagh a mbangoholkpandegh man mbaasorabo imôngo?" 
Matthew9:12 Man er Yesu ungwa nahan yô, A kaa er: Ka mbadedoo kwagh a gbe ve a ortwer ga, saa mba angev mbu ker ve la tseegh." 
Matthew9:13 Kpa yem nen za hen nen inja i kwagh ne: Mo yô, ka mhôônom ma zungwen ma doom ye, ka nagh ku nan ga; gadia M va sha u Me yilan mbaperapera ga, kpa ka mbaasorabo." 
Matthew9:14 Tsô mbahenen mba Yohane va her a Na, va kaa er: Inja na nan man se kua Mbafarishi, se her kwaghyan kpa mbahenen Ou yô, ve her kwaghyan ga?" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu kaa a ve er: Mbayaren iniongo i kwasehe vea fatyô, u zungwen zum u orkwasehe a lu a ve imôngo laa? Kpa ayange nga van a á tôô ve orkwasehe kera; ka zum la man vea hôr kwaghyan ye." 
Matthew9:16 Man shi ma or ngu u nana cir bamberikondo u he sha ikondo i tse ga, gadia kwagh u i cingi i a mi la una gema a pande ikondo i tse la kera; nahan ihura ia seer a seer." 
Matthew9:17 Man shi mba hee zar u wain u he ken akpaakôvough a tse ga, gadia á er nahan yô, akpa la aa pav, zar u wain ua haa kera, akpa la kpaa aa saa ishe. Kpa mba hee zar u wain u he ken akpa a he, nahan ve uhar cii vea lu her dedoo." 
Matthew9:18 Ngur ôron ve kwagh ne nahan yô, nenge, orvesen ugen va gure Un inya, kaa er: Wan wam u kwase ka hegen a kpe ye, kpa va, va penda uwegh Ough sha a na, tsô una war." 
Matthew9:19 Yesu mough, za a na ityô, Un kua mbahenen Nav." 
Matthew9:20 Yô, kwase ugen u duen awambe anyom pue kar ahar, va Un ken ijime, va bende mkaikondo Na;" 
Matthew9:21 gadia lu kaan ken ishima er: Aluer mea bende a bende ikondo Na tsô kpaa, á wanger mo iyol." 
Matthew9:22 Kpa Yesu gem, nengen a na yô, A kaa er: Wankwase, taver ishima; jighjigh wou u nan war u ve. Hii hen shighe la je wanger kwase la iyol." 
Matthew9:23 Tsô Yesu va nyer ken iyou i orvesen la, nengen a mbatôngonamar man ikpelaior lu zenden sha yô," 
Matthew9:24 A kaa a ve er: Hide nen ijime, gadia wankwase ne kpe ga, ngu yaven a yav. Nahan ve se Un ibumegh." 
Matthew9:25 Man er i dugh ikpelaior kera yô, A nyôr A kôr un sha uwe; tsô wankwase mough." 
Matthew9:26 Gwa u kwagh la gema samber ken tar la cii. 
Matthew9:27 Tsô Yesu moughon heera kera yô, mbaapirashe uhar va dondo sha a Na, lu genger amo, kaan er: Zungwe se mhôônom, Wan u Davidi!" 
Matthew9:28 Tsô za nyer ken iyou yô, mbaapirashe mbala va her a Na. Yesu kaa a ve er: Ne na jighjigh ner, Me fatyô u eren kwagh nee? Ve rumun er: Een, Tere!" 
Matthew9:29 Tsô A bende ve ave sha ashe, A kaa er: I̱ er ne vough er ne ne jighjigh nahan." 
Matthew9:30 Ashe ve maa bugh. Kpa Yesu ta ve icin er: Ver nen ishima, or môm nana̱ de fe kwagh ne ga." 
Matthew9:31 Kpa er ve due yô, ve gba pasen Un ken tar la cii." 
Matthew9:32 Mba ngur duen yô, nenge, i va Un a orgen u kondon iker u a lu a jijingi u bo." 
Matthew9:33 Er i dugh jijingi u bo kera yô, orkondoniker la gema gba lamen. Tsô kpiligh ikpelaior la iyol, ve kaa er: Mayange mba a nenge a imbakwagh ne ken Iserael ga." 
Matthew9:34 Kpa Mbafarishi kaa er: Ka sha tor u ujijingi mba bov man A dughun ujijingi mba bov kera ye. 
Matthew9:35 Tsô Yesu zende ken agar a vesen kua ken angarev mba kiriki la cii, lu tesen ken ushinagoge vev, lu ôron Loho u Dedoo u tartor, lu been hanma inja i uange man i mkpeyolga kpaa." 
Matthew9:36 Man er A nenge a ikpelaior yô, mhôônom kôr Un a ve tsung, sha ci u i tumbul a ve, ve sambe wuee er iyôngo i i lu a orkuran i ga nahan." 
Matthew9:37 Tsô A kaa a mbahenen Nav er: Sunda ngee je, kpa mbasundan yô, mba di kpeghee tsô." 
Matthew9:38 Nahan yô, sôn nen Ter u sunda, A tindi mbatomov ken sunda Na." 
Matthew10:1 Tsô A yila mbahenen Nav mba pue kar uhar mbala, man A na ve ujijingi mba hôngorouv er ve̱ dugh ve, man shi ve̱ bee hanma inja uange man hanma inja i mkpeyolga kpaa." 
Matthew10:2 Ati a mbaapostoli mba pue kar uhar mbala yô, ka a ne: u hiihii lu Shimon u i yilan er Peteru la, man anngô na Yohane;" 
Matthew10:3 man Filibu kua Bartolomeu; man Toma man Mateu, orngoholkpandegh la, kua Yakobu, wan u Alefeu, man Tadeu;" 
Matthew10:4 man Shimon, or u Kana, man Yuda u Isekarioti la." 
Matthew10:5 Mban ka mba pue kar uhar mba Yesu tindi ve, man A wa ve kwagh A kaa er: De kahan zaan nen sha gbenda u hen atôatyev ga, man shi de nyer nen ken ma gar u Mbasamaria kpaa ga." 
Matthew10:6 Kpa guda yô, za nen hen iyôngo i hen ya u Iserael i i saa la tsô." 
Matthew10:7 Za, za ôr nen kwaghaôndo, kaan nen ner: Tartor u Sha mgbôghom ve." 
Matthew10:8 Bee nen mba ve lu dedoo ga la angev; nder nen mbakpenev; wanger nen mbaamandev; dugh ujijingi mba bov. Ne ngohol gbilin, na nen di gbilin kpaa." 
Matthew10:9 De luun nen a zenaria shin azurfa shin togula ken akpa a inyar a en ga," 
Matthew10:10 shin akpa sha ci u zende kpaa ga, gadia or u eren tom kuma u á na nan kwaghyan u nan." 
Matthew10:11 Man shi hanma gar shin angar u kiriki u nea nyôr yô, ker nen or u injaa keregh, tsa nen her zan zan né kar duen." 
Matthew10:12 Nea nyôr ken ya yô, sugh nen ya la." 
Matthew10:13 Aluer ya la una lu a inja yô, bem wen a̱ lu sha a na; man una lu a inja ga yô, bem wen a̱ hide sha a ven." 
Matthew10:14 Man aluer ma or nana rumun ne ga, man shi nana ungwa akaaôron a en kpaa ga yô, shighe u nea duen hen ya la shin hen gar la yô, kure nen ihundu i shin angahar a en." 
Matthew10:15 Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, sha iyange i ijirigh yô, guda Sodom man Gomora a gar la." 
Matthew10:16 Nenge, M ngu tindin ne er iyôngo ken atô u ugbaseela nahan; yô, lu nen mbafankwagh er iyô nahan man wang er mkungum nahan." 
Matthew10:17 Kura nen ayol a en sha ior; gadia vea kôr ne vea za na hen mbamkohol mba mbaajiriv, man vea gbidye ne ken ushinagoge vev kpaa;" 
Matthew10:18 je yô, á va a ven sha ishigh ki ugomna man utor kpaa sha ci Wam, sha er i̱ hingir mpase her a ve man her atôatyev kpaa yô." 
Matthew10:19 Kpa shighe u vea za a ven nahan yô, asema a̱ de nyian ne sha kwagh u né kaa ga, gadia hen shighe la je á na ne kwagh u né ôr yô." 
Matthew10:20 Gadia ka ne ne ôron kwagh ga, kpa ka Jijingi u Ter wen A ôron kwagh ken a ven ye." 
Matthew10:21 Anngô ugen una na anngô na ugen ken ku, ter ugen di kpaa una na wan na nahan; ônov vea hendan a mbamaren vev, vea na á wua ve." 
Matthew10:22 Ior cii vea kôr ne ihom sha ci u iti Yam; kpa u nana taver ishima zan zan mkur yô, ka nan nana war ye." 
Matthew10:23 Man er vea tôv ne a ican ken gar ngun yô, yevese, yem nen ken ugen; gadia mimi je M ngu kaan ne, er ne lu a zende sha agar a Iserael cii ga je tsô, Wan u or Una va." 
Matthew10:24 Orhenen hembe ortesen na ga; wanakiriki kpaa hembe ter na ga. 
Matthew10:25 Orhenen nana hingir er ortesen u nan nahan yô, kuma; man wanakiriki kpaa nana hingir er ter u nan nahan yô, kuma. Aluer i yila orya er, Belesebu yô, man hire mba ken ya naa?" 
Matthew10:26 Nahan yô, de cie nen ve ga, gadia ma kwagh ngu u i cir man á de pasen un ga, man kwagh ngu u i yer man á de fan kpaa ga." 
Matthew10:27 Kwagh u M kaa ne ken ime, ôr nen ken igbar; man kwagh u ne ongo ken ato ivarivase yô, yôô nen di un sha ityoriyoughough." 
Matthew10:28 Man de cie nen mba ve woo iyol tseegh, kpa ve fetyô u wuan uma ga la ze; guda cia nen Un u A fetyô u timin uma kua iyol cii ken gehena." 
Matthew10:29 Mba teen mbaatsator uhar sha toro gaa? Nahan kpaa mô ve môm tsô kpaa una gba gban shin inya ga saa Ter wen Una fa. 
Matthew10:30 Zan zan ice yen i sha ityou kpaa, i ôr i cii." 
Matthew10:31 Nahan yô, de cie nen ga; mbaatsator kpishi kpaa ne hemba ve." 
Matthew10:32 Nahan hanma or u nana pasen Mo sha ishigh ki iorough yô, ka nan je Me pase nan sha ishigh ki Terem u A lu Sha kpaa ye." 
Matthew10:33 Kpa hanma or u nana nyiman Mo sha ishigh ki iorough yô, ka di nan je Me nyiman nan sha ishigh ki Terem u A lu Sha kpaa ye." 
Matthew10:34 De henen nen ner, M va sha u van a bem sha won ga; M va sha u van a bem ga, kpa ka ishôm." 
Matthew10:35 Gadia M va sha u nan mpav her atô u or a ter u nan, man wankwase kpaa a ngô u nan, wankem di a ngôkem u nan." 
Matthew10:36 Man mba ken ya u or vea gema vea lu mbaihomov mba nan je. 
Matthew10:37 Or u ter u nan shin ngô u nan a hembe doon nan ishima a Mo yô, nan kumam ga; man shi or u wan u nan u nomso shin u kwase a hembe doon nan ishima a Mo yô, nan kumam ga;" 
Matthew10:38 man u nan tee terankon u nan, nan dondon sha a Mo ga yô, nan kumam ga." 
Matthew10:39 U nan zough a uma u nan yô, una saa nan a saa; man or u uma u nan a saa sha ci Wam yô, nana zua a zua a mi." 
Matthew10:40 U nan rumun ne yô, ka Mo, nan rumun ye; man u nan rumun Mo yô, nan ngu rumun Un u A tindim la." 
Matthew10:41 U nan rumun profeti sha ci u i lu profeti je yô, nana ngohol injar i profeti je; u nan rumun orperapera sha ci u i lu orperapera yô, nana ngohol injar i orperapera je." 
Matthew10:42 Man hanma or u nana na u môm ken mbakiriki mban iyongo i mngerem ma ndôhôr tseegh, sha ci u i lu orhenen yô, mimi je M kaa ne, injar i nan ia bunde nan je ga." 
Matthew11:1 Tsô er Yesu wa mbahenen Nav mba pue kar uhar mbala kwagh been yô, A mough heregh kera, sha u za tesen man u ôron kwaghaôndo ken agar a ve yô." 
Matthew11:2 Yô, er Yohane ungwa akaa a Kristu A eren la ken gaadi yô, a tindi mbahenen nav" 
Matthew11:3 ve za pine Un er: Ka We Un u U lu van ne, shin se ver ishima sha ugenee?" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu gema kaa a ve er: Yem, za ôr nen Yohane akaa a ne ongo man a ne nenge yô;" 
Matthew11:5 mbaapirashe mba nengen kera, man mbasombon mba zenden, wanger mbaamandev iyol, mbakondonato mba ungwan; mba nderen mbakpenev, man mba ôron mbaatsanev Loho u Dedoo." 
Matthew11:6 Man or u nana nôngo gbev ken a Mo ga yô, á saan nan iyol." 
Matthew11:7 Tsô mbala mba yemen kera yô, Yesu hii u ôron ikpelaior kwagh u Yohane, A kaa er; Ne za ken taaikôngo ner, né za nenge nyi? Ka ijinga i ahumbe a tenger a mi la shinii?" 
Matthew11:8 Man ne za ner, né nenge nyi? Ka or u haan akondo a ver vere? Yô, nenge, mba ve hee akondo a ver ver yô, mba ken uya mba utor." 
Matthew11:9 Kpa ne za sha u za nengen nyi? Ka profeti? Een, M ngu kaan ne, a hemba profeti kpaa." 
Matthew11:10 Gadia ka un je i nger kwagh na er: Nenge, M ngu tindin ortyom Wam sha ishigh You; u una sôr U gbenda sha hemen yô." 
Matthew11:11 Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, mba kasev ve mar ve cii, or môm je mough u nan hembe Yohane u eren batisema icivir ga; nahan kpaa, or u ken tartor u Sha u nan hembe gban ijime la nan hemba un." 
Matthew11:12 Hii sha ayange a Yohane u eren batisema zan zan hegen ne, mba eren a tartor u Sha sha igosor; mbaeren kwagh sha igosor kpaa mba ngohol u sha agee." 
Matthew11:13 Gadia uprofeti cii man atindi ôr kwaghôron u profeti zan zan ar hen Yohane. 
Matthew11:14 Man a lu ne ka ne rumun yô, ngun ka Eliya u a lu van je ne." 
Matthew11:15 U nan lu a ato a ungwan yô, nana̱ ungwa." 
Matthew11:16 Man ka sha nyi je Me kar kov ne a mini? Ngu er mbayev mba ve tem sha ityembekasua, ve yer mbakwav vev," 
Matthew11:17 ve kaan er: Se tôngo ne imar, kpa ne vine amar ga; se gber kwelegh, kpa ne ta ave vanger ga." 
Matthew11:18 Gadia Yohane va, lu yan kwagh ga, lu man kwagh kpaa ga, kpa mba kaan er: Ngu a jijingi u bo." 
Matthew11:19 Wan u or va, ye kwagh shi me kwagh, kpa mba kaan er: Nenge, or u kumbur hua sha kwaghyan, man or u eren hua sha msôr, ka huror u mbangoholkpandegh kua u mbaasorabo. Kpa mfe zua a ishô sha aeren a na ve." 
Matthew11:20 Tsô a hii u kôhôn agar ne ashe a A hembe eren ityom i ageegh ker la, sha ci u ve gem asema ga yô." 
Matthew11:21 A kaa er: We Korashin, kwagh á tser u, we Betesaida, kwagh á tser u; gadia a lu ken Tiru man Shidon man a er akaa a ageegh a i er ken a ven nahan ne yô, ma ve zamber ma ve hee ajav iyol kua mtwem ngise je." 
Matthew11:22 Kpa M ngu kaan ne, sha iyange ijir yô, guda Tiru man Shidon a ven." 
Matthew11:23 Man we Kapernahum, á kende u sha aôndo jee? ka shin Hade ú za ye; gadia a lu ken Sodom man a er ityom i ageegh er i er ken a we nahan ne yô, ma a lu her zan zan nyian ne." 
Matthew11:24 Kpa M ngu kaan ne, sha iyange i ijir yô, guda tar u Sodom a we." 
Matthew11:25 Hen shighe la Yesu gema kaa er: M ngu sughun We, Tere, Ter u Sha man tar, sha er U yer mbafankwagh man mbakavenkwagh akaa ne, kpa U gem U pase anikundanev a yô." 
Matthew11:26 Een, Tere! Kape i doo U ken ishima je la." 
Matthew11:27 Akaa cii Terem gema a, wam sha ikev, man shi ma or fa Wan ga, saa Ter tseegh, man shi ma or fa Ter kpaa ga, saa Wan, man shi hanmô u Wan A we ishima u pasen nan yô." 
Matthew11:28 Va nen her a Mo, ne mba i ver ne iyol cii, ikav mbi yoho ne kpaa, Mo me na ne mmem." 
Matthew11:29 Tôô nen igbur Yam sha ayol a en, va hen nen kwagh sha ikev Yam, gadia M ngu ishima legh legh, man M kehen ityough kpaa ga, tsô né zua a mmem ken asema a en;" 
Matthew11:30 gadia igbur Yam leghem man ikav Yav kpaa peese. 
Matthew12:1 Hen shighe la Yesu lu zenden karen ker atô u sule u alakema sha iyange i memen; ijen kôr mbahenen Nav; tsô ve gba kever asagher, yan." 
Matthew12:2 Man er Mbafarishi nenge kwagh la yô, ve kaa a Na er: Nenge, mbahenen Ou mba eren kwagh u i rumun er i̱ er sha iyange i memen ga yô." 
Matthew12:3 Kpa A kaa a ve er: Ne ôr kwagh u Davidi lu er shighe u ijen kôr un kua mba ve lu a na imôngo la gaa," 
Matthew12:4 er a nyôr ken iyou i Aôndo, a ya ubredi mba sha ishi mba i rumun er un kua mba ve lu a na ityô la ve̱ ya ga, saa upristi tseegh la gaa?" 
Matthew12:5 Sha iyange i memen upristi mba ken tempel ka ve vihi iyange i memen, kpa ve lu a ishô, ne mba a ôr kwagh ne ken atindi nahan gaa?" 
Matthew12:6 Kpa M ngu kaan ne, u A hembe tempel icivir ngu heen." 
Matthew12:7 Man aluer nea fe inja i kwagh ne er: Ka mhôônom ma zungwen ma doom ye, ka nagh ku nan ga, yô, ma ne ne mbalun a ibo ga la ibo dang nahan ga;" 
Matthew12:8 gadia Wan u or ka Ter u iyange i memen je. 
Matthew12:9 Tsô A mough heregh A nyôr ken shinagoge ve. 
Matthew12:10 Yô, orgen lu her nan uma uwegh; ve pine Un sha u zuan a ityôikaa i vea haa Un ibo yô, ve kaa er: I rumun u i̱ been angev sha iyange i memene?" 
Matthew12:11 Kpa A kaa a ve er: Ka hanmô wen nana lu a waniyôngo, man aluer una gba shin ihungwa sha iyange i memen yô, nana kôr un, nana dugh sha ga?" 
Matthew12:12 Or hemba waniyôngo inja kpishi gaa? Nahan i rumun u eren kwagh u doon sha iyange i memen je. 
Matthew12:13 Tsô A gema A kaa a or la er: Naregh uwegh ough kura. A naregh; tsô ku hingir dedoo er kugenegh kura nahan. 
Matthew12:14 Nahan Mbafarishi due, gba tumen idyu sha a Na, er vea er man vea wua Un yô." 
Matthew12:15 Man er Yesu kav nahan yô, A mough heregh kera; ior kpishi dondo sha a Na; A bee ve angev cii;" 
Matthew12:16 man A ta ve icin er, ve̱ de pasen Un ken igbar ga;" 
Matthew12:17 sha er kwagh u profeti Yesaia lu kaa la a̱ kure sha mi vough yô, er:" 
Matthew12:18 Nenge Wanakiriki Wam u M tsough Un, u ishima ishima, u ishima i doom a Na yum yô, Me ver Jijingi Wam sha a Na, Una yôô ijir her akuraior." 
Matthew12:19 Una er num ga, ayôôso kpaa Una yôôso ga; ma or nana ungwa imo Na sha gbenda kpaa ga." 
Matthew12:20 Ijinga i hemben Una sombo i ga; mou u imenger u yughur mnyim kpaa, Una pir ga, zan zan Una za a ijir hemen, á ar sha mhembe." 
Matthew12:21 Ka sha iti Na je man akuraior aa veren ishima á keghen ye. 
Matthew12:22 Tsô i va Un a orgen u nan lu a jijingi u bo, nan pir ashe, nan kondo iker kpaa. A bee nan angev mbula; tsô orkondoniker la ôr kwagh, shi gba nengen kera kpaa." 
Matthew12:23 Kpiligh ikpelaior cii iyol, ve kaa er: Ngun ka Wan u Davidi ne gaa?" 
Matthew12:24 Kpa Mbafarishi mba ongo nahan yô, ve kaa er: Un gbe dughun ujijingi mba bov kera ga, saa di sha Belesebu, tor u ujijingi mba bov la." 
Matthew12:25 Man er A fa mbamhen vev yô, A kaa a ve er: Hanma tartor u u pav sha ihom yô, á tim u kera. Man shi hanma gar shin hanma ya u a pav sha ihom yô, una lu ga." 
Matthew12:26 Man aluer Satan una dughun Satan kera yô, a pav iyol na ve; yô, á er nan man tartor na ua shi á luu?" 
Matthew12:27 Man aluer Mo M dughun ujijingi mba bov kera sha Belesebu yô, ônov enev di ka sha an ve dughun ve kera? Ka nahan man vea lu mbaôron ne ijir ye." 
Matthew12:28 Kpa aluer ka sha Jijingi u Aôndo man M dughun ujijingi mba bov kera yô, tartor u Aôndo va hen a ven je ve." 
Matthew12:29 Shin á er nan man or á fatyô u nyôron ken ya u ortaveryol, nana kura un inyaregh, saa nana vande kangen ortaveryol la, man nana mase kuran ikav mbi ken ya na la, gaa?" 
Matthew12:30 U nan lu nongo a Mo ga yô, nan ngu ihom a Mo, man u nan kohol a Mo ga yô, nan ngu saren a sar." 
Matthew12:31 Kape i lu man M kaan ne Mer: Hanma isholibo man hanma ityuhwanev kpaa á de ior; kpa ityuhwanev mbi i toho Jijingi yô,á de ior mayange ga." 
Matthew12:32 Man shi hanma or u nana ôr kwagh sha Wan u or geseghee kpaa á de nan kwagh la; kpa hanma or u nana ôr kwagh geseghee sha Icighan Jijingi yô, á de nan kwagh la mayange ga, sha ayange ne kua a a lu van ken hemen la kpaa." 
Matthew12:33 Gema nen kon u̱ lu u dedoo, atam a u kpaa a̱ lu a dedoo; gayô, gema nen kon u̱ lu u bo, atam a u kpaa a̱ lu a bo; gadia ka sha atam a kon man i fe u min ye." 
Matthew12:34 Ne ônov mba igbindev, á er nan man ne mba ne lu mbaaferev, né ôr akaa a doono? Gadia ka sha m-iv u ken ishima man zwa u er kwagh ye." 
Matthew12:35 Orinjaa ka nan due a akaa a dedoo ken kwagh u ikoogh u ken ishima la je; orbo ka nan due di a akaabo ken kwagh u bo u ken ishima la je. 
Matthew12:36 Kpa M ngu kaan ne: Hanma kwaghôron u dang u ior ve er, á pine ve kwagh sha mi sha iyange i ijir, vea ôr je." 
Matthew12:37 Gadia ka sha akaaôron a ou kpaa á kure kwagh wou á na u ibo kpaa ye. 
Matthew12:38 Tsô mbagenev ken mbangeren man Mbafarishi gema kaa a Na er: Ortesen, sar se pe ma U er ivande ma se nenge." 
Matthew12:39 Kpa A gema A kaa a ve er: Kov u idya ne ngu keren ivande, kpa á na u ivande ga, saa di ivande i profeti Yona tsô." 
Matthew12:40 Gadia er Yona lu ken iyav mbu zegeishu ayange atar man aime atar nahan, kape Wan u or kpaa Una tsa shin semanyaagh ayange atar man aime atar je la." 
Matthew12:41 Ior mba ken Nineve vea nder a kov ne imôngo sha iyange i ijir, vea na u ibo; gadia lu ve gema asema sha kwaghaôndo u ôron u Yona; yô, nenge, u A hembe Yona icivir Ngun heen ne." 
Matthew12:42 Torkwase u ken imbusutariyan una nder a kov ne sha iyange i ijir, man una na u ibo; gadia a due ken akighir a tar, a va sha u ungwan mfe u Solomon. Yô, nenge, u A hembe Solomon icivir Ngun heen ne." 
Matthew12:43 Kpa jijingi u hôngorough ka una due ken or yô, a karen ken ajir a mngerem ma lu ga, a keren mmem, kpa a zua a min ga." 
Matthew12:44 Nahan a kaan er: Me hire hen ya wam ape m dugh la. Una va aren yô, a kohol i liang, i ese, i sôr doo doo kpaa." 
Matthew12:45 Tsô a yem a za kua a ujijingi mbagenev utaankaruhar mba ve hembe un ifer yô, ve nyôr ve tema keregh; man mlu u masetyô u or la a hemba gban kera a u hiihii la. Kape kwagh u kov u ifer ne kpaa una lu la." 
Matthew12:46 Er lu ôron kwagh a ikpelaior ave la yô, ngô na kua anngôôv Nav ve tile lu ken won, lu ve ka ôron kwagh a Na." 
Matthew12:47 Orgen kaa a Na er: Nenge, ngôu kua anngôôv Ou ve tile ken won, ka ve ka ôron kwagh a We." 
Matthew12:48 Kpa A gema A kaa a or u a kaa Un loho la er: Ka an nan lu ngômô? Man ka unô ve lu anngôôv ava? 
Matthew12:49 A gema A vishigh uwegh sha mbahenen Nav, A kaa er: Nenge ngôm kua anngôôv Av mban." 
Matthew12:50 Gadia hanma or u nan eren ishima i Terem u A lu Sha yô, ka nan je nan lu anngôm u nomso man anngôm u kwase man ngôm kpaa ye." 
Matthew13:1 Sha iyange la je Yesu due ken iyou, za tema hen kpezegemnger." 
Matthew13:2 Ikpelaior kpishi kohol her a Na; nahan A nyôr A tema shin tsô. Ikpelaior cii yô, gema tile sha kpe." 
Matthew13:3 Nahan A ôr ve akaa kpishi sha anzaakaa, A kaa er: Ortanivor due sha u za tan ivor." 
Matthew13:4 Ngur tan yô, ivor igen haa sha kpegbenda; inyon va, sange i, ya." 
Matthew13:5 Igen haa sha ikuu, ape i zough a inya kpishi ga yô; fese nahan i mende sha ci u inya i civir her ga yô." 
Matthew13:6 Er iyange due yô, oo ta i, i uma sha ci u i lu a mise ga yô." 
Matthew13:7 Igen haa ken usaa; usaa vese imbishi i. 
Matthew13:8 Igen haa ken inya i dedoo; via, iyiagh hemba ivor la kwa akunduataan, igen akunduatar, igen ikundugber." 
Matthew13:9 Or u nan lu a ato a ungwan yô, nana̱ ungwa." 
Matthew13:10 Tsô mbahenen Nav va, pine Un er: Inja na nan man U er ve kwagh sha anzaakaa?" 
Matthew13:11 A gema A kaa a ve er: Ne yô, i na ne sha u ne̱ fa akaa a myer a tartor u Sha, kpa ve yô, i na ve ga." 
Matthew13:12 Gadia hanma or u nan lu a kwagh yô, ka nan á seer nan nana gema nana lu a mi kpishi ye; kpa hanmô u nan lu a kwagh ga yô, ka nan man á ngohol nan kwagh u nan lu a mi la kpaa ye." 
Matthew13:13 Ka sha ci u nahan man M er ve kwagh sha anzaakaa ye, gadia shin er ve nengen nahan kpaa mba nengen ga, man er ve ongo nahan kpaa mba ungwan ga, mba kaven kpaa ga." 
Matthew13:14 Nahan kwagh u profeti Yesaia lu ôr la kure sha a ve vough er: M-ongo yô, né ungwa, kpa á wanger ne je ga. Mnenge kpaa né nenge, kpa né kav je ga." 
Matthew13:15 Gadia ishima i nongoior ne cighir, ato a ve kpaa nga ongo dedoo ga; ve kusu ashe a ve kpaa, sha u vea nenge sha ashe a ve ga; man vea ungwa sha ato a ve kpaa ga, vea kav ken asema a ve ga, vea shi vea gema man Mo Me bee ve angev ga." 
Matthew13:16 Kpa ne yô, saan ashe a en iyol, gadia nga nengen, ato a en kpaa saan a iyol gadia nga ungwan." 
Matthew13:17 Gadia mimi je M kaan ne ne, lu sar uprofeti man mbaperapera kpishi u ma ve nenge akaa a ne nenge ne, kpa ve nenge a mi ga, shi u ma ve ongo akaa a ne ongo ne, kpa ve ungwa a ga." 
Matthew13:18 Nahan ne yô, ungwa nen injakwagh i ortanivor ne:" 
Matthew13:19 Hanma or u ka nana̱ ungwa kwaghôron u tartor man nana̱ kav ga yô, or u ifer a va, a va tsuwe kwagh u i lee ken ishima i nan la kera; ka u i te ivor hen a nan sha kpegbenda je la." 
Matthew13:20 U i te ivor hen a nan sha ikuu yô, ka u ka nan ungwa kwaghôron, nan ngohol fese saan saan je la;" 
Matthew13:21 kpa nan lu a mise ken iyol i nan ga, nan taver ishima ica i gba ga; kpa er mkighir u sha ican shin mtev u sha ican una moughon a nan sha ci u kwaghôron la yô, nan nôngo gbev fese je." 
Matthew13:22 Man u i te ivor i nan ken usaa yô, ka u ka nan ungwa kwaghôron la kpa anzughul a tar ne a nyian ishima man icugh i inyar ve va imbishi kwaghôron la, a kera ume atam ga." 
Matthew13:23 U i te ivor hen a nan hen inya i dedoo yô, ka u ka nan ungwa kwaghôron, nan kav un; ka nan je ka nan ume atam nan tser ye; ugen kwa akunduataan, ugen akunduatar, ugen yô, ikundugber." 
Matthew13:24 Shi A va ve a injakwagh igen, A kaa er: Tartor u Sha ngu er or u nan lee ivor i dedoo ken sule u nan." 
Matthew13:25 Kpa zum u ior lu yaven yô, orihom u nan za va, va lôô ivor i bo ker atô u uwua, tsô a yem." 
Matthew13:26 Kpa er iyiagh mende vese, man ki hiin u maren yô, ivor i bo la kpaa gema due ken igbar." 
Matthew13:27 Nahan mbashiren mba orsule la va, va kaa a na er: Tere, ka ivor i dedoo yan u lôô ken sule wou gaa, man ka han u zough a ivor i bo nee?" 
Matthew13:28 A kaa a ve er: Ka ma orihom nan er nahan ye. Tsô mbashiren mbala kaa a na er: Nahan ka u ka se̱ za wuhe i se̱ kura kera? 
Matthew13:29 Kpa a kaa er: Ei, alaghga né za wuhen ivor i bo la yô, né wuhe i a uwua imôngo." 
Matthew13:30 Yô, de nen i cii, i̱ vese imôngo zan zan shighe u sundan; man sha shighe u sundan yô, me kaa a mbasundan mer: Vande sangen nen ivor i bo la kera man kange nen aile aile sha u za nanden; kpa gema kohol nen uwua, za ombom sha wuna." 
Matthew13:31 Shi A va ve a injakwagh igen, A kaa er: Tartor u Sha ngu er ishange i masetadi i or nan tee nan za lee ken sule u nan yô." 
Matthew13:32 I yô, i hemba ndahar a asangeakaa agen cii je; kpa er ka ia mende a vese yô, i hemba aveghem a uyia i̱ hingir kon je, inyon i sha i va, i va wa aya sha agbaa a na." 
Matthew13:33 Shi A ôr ve injakwagh igen er: Tartor u Sha ngu er kwa u kwase ka nan tôô, nan wa ken mwem ma ma kom uikaren utar zan zan u zende sha mi cii je." 
Matthew13:34 Akaa angan cii Yesu ôr ikpelaior sha anzaakaa, gbaa ôron ve ma kwagh ga, saa sha injakwagh;" 
Matthew13:35 sha u kwagh u i ôr sha ikev i profeti Yesaia la yô, a̱ kure sha mi vough, er: Me bugh zwa Wam Me ôr anzaakaa. Me pase akaa a a lu myer er i gba tar je la." 
Matthew13:36 Tsô A na ikpelaior gbenda A za nyôr ken ya, Nahan mbahenen Nav va her a Na, ve kaa er: Pase se inja i kwagh u ivor i bo i ken sule la." 
Matthew13:37 Nahan A gema A kaa er: Or u lôôn ivor i dedoo la, ka Wan u or je la." 
Matthew13:38 Sule la yô, ka tar; ivor i dedoo la yô, ka ônov mba tartor; ivor i bo la gema ka ônov mba iferor." 
Matthew13:39 Orihom u a lee i la yô, ka diabolo; sunda la yô, ka mkurtar; mbasundan mbala yô, ka mbatyomov mba Shaav." 
Matthew13:40 Er ka i kohol ivor i bo la, i nande sha usu nahan, kape á er sha iyange i mkurtar je la." 
Matthew13:41 Wan u or Una tindi mbatyomov Nav, man atôakaa a nan gbev mbu nôngon ci ca, man mbavendan atindi kpaa vea kura ve ken tartor Na kera," 
Matthew13:42 vea haa ken igyamusu; keregh la mliam maa lu kua anyi a yan. 
Matthew13:43 Shighe la mbaperapera vea engem er ka iyange nahan sha tartor u Ter ve. U nan lu a ato a ungwan yô, nana̱ ungwa." 
Matthew13:44 Tartor u Sha ngu er kwagh u injaa u i yer ken sule ugen, u or za zua a mi, maa nan gem nan yer; sha iember i nan la nan gema nan za tee akaa a nan lu a mi la cii, nan za yam sule la." 
Matthew13:45 Shi tartor u Sha ngu er or u teen kasua, keren utagbede mba dedoo." 
Matthew13:46 Er nan za zua a tagbede môm u lun ishe kpishi yô, nan yem nan za tee akaa a nan lu a mi la cii, nan za yam un." 
Matthew13:47 Man shi tartor u Sha ngu er kper u kpelan a kpela u i hee shin zegemnger, a kohol ishu atô kposo kposo." 
Matthew13:48 Ivin yô, ior ve urugh ve due a mi sha kpetar, ve tema ve kohol i dedoo la, ve haa ken uika, kpa i bo la yô, ve haa kera." 
Matthew13:49 Kape á lu sha mkurtar je la. Mbatyomov vea due, vea sange mbaaferev ken mbaperapera kera;" 
Matthew13:50 vea haa ve ken igyamusu, keregh la mliam maa lu kua anyi a yan kpaa." 
Matthew13:51 Ne kav akaa angan cii kpa? Ve rumun a Na er: Een! 
Matthew13:52 Tsô A kaa a ve er: Kape i lu man hanma orngeren u nan hingir orhenen ken tartor u Sha yô, nan ngu er orya nahan u ka nan dughun akaa a he man a tse ken iyou i nan i koson akaa a injaa la." 
Matthew13:53 Tsô Yesu, er A kure kwaghôron u sha anzaakaa ne yô, A mough heregh kera." 
Matthew13:54 Va nyer ken gar Na yô, A tese ve ken shinagoge ve, tsô kpiligh ve iyol, ve kaa er: Ka han Or ne A zough a mfe ne man ityom i ageegh ne?" 
Matthew13:55 Ngun ka Wan u orgbanakaa ne gaa? Mba yer ngô Na er, Maria; anngôôv Nav yô, ka Yakobu man Yosev man Shimon man Yuda gaa?" 
Matthew13:56 Anngôôv Nav mba kasev kpaa mba a vese heen cii gaa? Yô, ka han je Or ne A za zough a akaa angan cii ase?" 
Matthew13:57 Nahan anzughul lu ve ken ishima sha kwagh Na. Tsô Yesu kaa a ve er: Profeti de lun a icivir ga, saa ken gar u nan man hen ya u nan tsô." 
Matthew13:58 Nahan A kera er akaa a ageegh kpishi keregh ga sha ci u mban u jighjigh ve u nan. 
Matthew14:1 Hen shighe la Herode u tetera ungwa gwa u Yesu. 
Matthew14:2 Tsô a kaa a mbayev nav er: Ngun ka Yohane u eren batisema; a nder shin mbakpenev, ka sha ci u nahan man akaa a ageegh ne a eren ken a Na ye." 
Matthew14:3 Gadia Herode lu kôr Yohane, kange, wa ken gaadi sha kwagh u Herodia, kwase u anngô na Filibu." 
Matthew14:4 Gadia Yohane kaa a na er: U ngu a na nahan ka sha mi ga. 
Matthew14:5 Nahan lu un ka wuan un kpa a cia ikpelaior, gadia ve fa er a lu profeti je yô." 
Matthew14:6 Kpa sha iyange i umbur mmar u Herode la, wan u Herodia u kwase va vine amar sha ishiv vev, nahan doo Herode." 
Matthew14:7 Tsô a maa a tôndo zwa sha mbum je er, una na un hanma kwagh u una sôn yô." 
Matthew14:8 Yô, er ngô na vande wan un kwagh kera yô, a kaa er: Nam ityough ki Yohane u eren batisema shin gbande heen je." 
Matthew14:9 Nahan ishima vihi tor kpishi; kpa sha ci u mbum na la, man sha ci u mba ve tem hen kwaghyan la yô, a kaa er, i̱ gba nan un tsô." 
Matthew14:10 Tsô a tindi, i za gber Yohane ityough ken gaadi." 
Matthew14:11 I va a ityough nagh shin gbande, i va na wankwase la; wen gema za a mi hen ngô na." 
Matthew14:12 Tsô mbahenen nav va, va tôô gundu na, za ii, nahan ve yem ve za kaa Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Er Yesu ungwa nahan yô, A nyôr shin tsô, A mough her kera A za hen ijir igen henpe or lu ga, Un tswen. Man er ikpelaior ungwa nahan yô, ve due ken agar, ve za a Na ityô sha angahar." 
Matthew14:14 Tsô Yesu dugh yô, A nenge a ikpelaior kpishi; nahan mhôônom kôr Un a ve, A bee mbauangev vev angev." 
Matthew14:15 Tsô iyange i been yô, mbahenen Nav va her a Na, va kaa er: Or ngu hen ijiir ne ga, man shighe kpaa kar hegen; yô, na ikpelaior gbenda ve yem ken angarev ve za yam kwaghyan." 
Matthew14:16 Kpa Yesu kaa a ve er: Ve̱ de ze ga; ne, na nen ve kwagh ve̱ ya." 
Matthew14:17 Kpa ve kaa a Na er: Se mba a ubredi utaan man ishu ihiar heen tsô. 
Matthew14:18 A kaa a ve er: Va nen a mi her a Mo. 
Matthew14:19 A yôô er, ikpelaior i̱ haa inya sha adeghatoho. Tsô a A tôô ubredi utaan man ishu ihiar la, kenden ashe sha yô, A sugh, maa A coon ubredi mbala A na mbahenen, mbahenen gema na ikpelaior." 
Matthew14:20 Ve cii ve ya, kuma ve; ve kohol avur a a shi yô, iv akese pue kar ahar." 
Matthew14:21 Mba ve ya yô, nomso lu er dubu utaan nahan, i wa kasev kua mbayev ker ga." 
Matthew14:22 Fese nahan a tolough a mbahenen Nav er ve̱ nyôr shin tsô, ve̱ hira hemen ve̱ per yande la; Wen iyol Na yô, Una na ior gbenda ve̱ yem ve." 
Matthew14:23 Ne ikpelaior gbenda kera yô, A unde sha uwo, Un tswen, sha u za eren msen. Iyange i mir yô, lu her tswen." 
Matthew14:24 Man tso la lu zan ken atô u zegemnger, mngerem lu kpianger a na sha ci u ahumbe lu van ve sha hemen yô." 
Matthew14:25 Ka kom er ahwa atar a utu nahan yô, Yesu va her a ve, lu zenden sha kwavmnger." 
Matthew14:26 Er mbahenen nenge a Na lu zenden sha kwav u zegemnger yô, cier ve iyol, ve kaa er: Ka ormbakuv! Tsô ve genger amo sha mcie." 
Matthew14:27 Kpa Yesu ôr kwagh a ve, kaa er: Taver nen ishima, ka Mo, de kera cie nen ga." 
Matthew14:28 Peteru gema kaa a Na er: Tere, a lu We yô, kaam m̱ va her a We sha kwavmnger." 
Matthew14:29 A kaa er: Va! Tsô Peteru due shin tsô, gba zenden sha kwavmnger zan hen Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kpa nengen ahumbe nga taver yô, a cia; gbe miren yô, a genger imo, a kaa er: Tere, yimam!" 
Matthew14:31 Fese nahan Yesu naregh uwegh Nagh, kôr un, kaa a na er: We u u lu a anjighjigh u nan kpeghee ne, ka nyi u te akperana?" 
Matthew14:32 Mba nyer ken tso yô, ahumbe de." 
Matthew14:33 Mba ve lu ken tso la, ve gure ve civir Un, ve kaa er: Mimi je U ngu Wan u Aôndo." 
Matthew14:34 Mba peren yande la yô, ve ar sha tar u Genesareti." 
Matthew14:35 Man er ior mba ken ijiir la kav Un yô, ve tindi hen tar u u kase her la cii ve va a mba ve lu dedoo ga la cii her a Na." 
Matthew14:36 Ve zamber a Na er, A̱ rumun ve, ve̱ bende mkaikondo Na tsô. Mba ve bende cii yô, angev bee ve." 
Matthew15:1 Tsô Mbafarishi man mbangeren due ken Yerusalem va hen Yesu, ve kaa er:" 
Matthew15:2 Ka nyi mbahenen Ou ve undu aeren a mbayiase, gadia mba ee ave a ve shighe u ka vea yaan kwaghyan la ga." 
Matthew15:3 Kpa A gema A kaa a ve er: Man ka nyi ne kpaa ne peren tindi u Aôndo sha aeren a en laa? 
Matthew15:4 Gadia Aôndo kaa er: Civir teru man ngôu; man u nana tuhwa ter shin ngô yô, nana kpe keng." 
Matthew15:5 Kpa ne yô, ne mba kaan ner: Hanma or u nana kaa a ter u nan shin ngô u u nan er: Kwagh u ma u zough a iwasen sha mi her a mo yô, ka nagh ku i na Aôndo;" 
Matthew15:6 nahan nan kera civir ter u nan shin ngô u nan ga. Nahan yô, ne gema kwaghôron u Aôndo hingir gbilin sha aeren a en je ve." 
Matthew15:7 Ne mbaimangerev, kwagh u Yesaia tsengaôron sha a ven yô, ka vough je, er lu kaa er:" 
Matthew15:8 Nongoior ne ngu civir Mo sha ityumbujôôgh ve tseegh, kpa ishima ve yô, ngi ica a Mo je." 
Matthew15:9 Nahan ka gbilin tsô ve civir Mo, sha ci u ityesen i ve tesen la ka atindi a ior tsô." 
Matthew15:10 Tsô a yila ikpelaior her a Na A kaa a ve er: Ver nen ato her a Mo man shi kav nen kpaa. 
Matthew15:11 Ka kwagh u a nyer or ken zwa man a ne nan kera lu wang ga ze. Kpa ka kwagh u a dugh ken zwa, ka a na or nan kera lu wang ga ye." 
Matthew15:12 Tsô mbahenen Nav va her a Na, va kaa a Na er: U fa er Mbafarishi ve ongo kwaghôron ne nahan, asema a vihi ve kpa?" 
Matthew15:13 Kpa A gema A kaa er: Hanma kwagh u i lu Terem u Sha a môôr ga yô, á wuhe un kera." 
Matthew15:14 De nen ve kera; ka mbaapirashe shi mba hemen mbaapirashe gbenda. Aluer orapirashe nana kôr orapirashe ugen aga yô, ve uhar cii vea gba shin akpa." 
Matthew15:15 Tsô Peteru gema kaa a Na er: Pase se injakwagh ne. 
Matthew15:16 Kpa Yesu kaa er: Ne je kpaa, ne mba a mkav gaa?" 
Matthew15:17 Ne mba a fa er hanma kwagh u a nyer ken zwa, ka a sen shin uya, i za due a mi ken won je gaa?" 
Matthew15:18 Kpaa akaa a a dugh ken zwa yô, ka ken ishima a dugh ye, ka a je, a ne or nan kera lu wang ga ye." 
Matthew15:19 Gadia ka ken ishima man aferakaa a henen kua iwooor man idya man iv man mbampase mba sha aie man ityuhwanev ve dugh ye. 
Matthew15:20 Ka ve ve ne or nan kera lu wang ga ye; kpa u ôôn ave ga, yan kwagh yô, gem or nan lu wang ga ze." 
Matthew15:21 Tsô Yesu mough heregh, gba yemen ken tar u Tiru man Shidon." 
Matthew15:22 Tsô kwase ugen u ken Kanaan u a lu ken iningirtar la, a genger imo, a kaa er: Zungwem mhôônom Tere, We Wan u Davidi, jijingi u bo ngu eren wan wam u kwase ican tsung." 
Matthew15:23 Kpa A bugh un zwa sha ma kwagh môm ga. Mbahenen Nav va, va zamber a Na er: Shi na un gbenda, gadia ngu vaan, van a vese ityô." 
Matthew15:24 Kpa A gema A kaa er: Ka hen iyôngo i hen ya u Iserael i i saa la tseegh i tindim ye. 
Matthew15:25 Kpa kwase la va, gure civir Un, kaa er: Tere, shi wasem yôô!" 
Matthew15:26 Kpa A gema A kaa er: Doo u tôôn kwaghyan u uôn, kenden aniwaav ga." 
Matthew15:27 Kpa a kaa er: Een, Tere, aniwaav kpaa mba ye avur a akaayan a sha tebul u uter vev a a hee inya la." 
Matthew15:28 Tsô Yesu gema kaa a na er: Kwase, jighjigh wou vese tsô; yô, i̱ er u er i sar u nahan la vough. Wan na u kwase la angev maa bee un hen shighe la je." 
Matthew15:29 Tsô Yesu mough keela, gba teran hen zegemnger u Galilia; za unde sha uwo, A tema sha her." 
Matthew15:30 Tsô ikpelaior va her a Na, ve lu a mbasombon man mbakeer man mbaapirashe man mbakondonaker, man mbagenev kpaa kpishi, ve va ver ve hen ikum Na nahan A war ve;" 
Matthew15:31 kpiligh ikpelaior iyol, er ve nenge mbakondonaker lu lamen, mbakeer hingir dedoo, mbasombon lu zenden, mbaapirashe lu nengen; tsô ve gba civir Aôndo u Iserael." 
Matthew15:32 Tsô Yesu yila mbahenen Nav her a Na kaa a ve er: Mhôônom kôrom a ikpelaior ne, gadia mba a Mo ityô ka ayange atar je ne, man kwagh u vea ya kpaa, mba a min ga: yô, sarem pe nan ve gbenda ijen ga, sha u ve̱ de za vôron sha gbenda ga yô." 
Matthew15:33 Mbahenen kaa a Na er: Ka han man sé za zua a kwaghyan kpishi ken toho ne, ve una kuma imbaikpelaior ne nahana?" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu pine ve er: Ne mba a ubredi u me? Ve kaa er: Mba utaankaruhar kua ishu i kiriki kpeghee tsô. 
Matthew15:35 Tsô A yôô ikpelaior haa inya. 
Matthew15:36 A tôô ubredi mba utaankaruhar kua anishuuv mbala, sughun yô, A coon, A na mbahenen; mbahenen di gema na ikpelaior." 
Matthew15:37 Ve cii ve ya kuma ve; ve kohol avur a a neer la iv akese ataankarahar 
Matthew15:38 Mba ve ya yô, nomso lu dubu unyiin, i wa kasev man mbayev ker ga." 
Matthew15:39 Tsô A na ikpelaior gbenda; maa A nyôr ken tso, A va ken tar u Magadan." 
Matthew16:1 Tsô Mbafarishi man Mbasadushi va her a Na, lu va karen Un, ve pine Un er ma A tese ve ivande i Sha." 
Matthew16:2 Kpa A gema A kaa a ve er: [Iyange ka ia bee yô, ne kaa ner: Ura ua nôô, gadia nyian sha." 
Matthew16:3 A lu pepe yô, ne kaan ner: Nyian Aôndo kohol ura gadia nyian sha man abeen due. Ne mba kaven akaa a sha kwavaôndo, kpa ne mba fetyô u kaven uivande mba ve tesen mlu u ashighe gaa?]." 
Matthew16:4 Kov u ifer u idya ngu keren ivande kpa á na u ma ivande ga, saa di ivande i Yona tsô. Tsô A undu ve A yem." 
Matthew16:5 Er mbahenen Nav per yem yande la yô, hungul ve ve tôô bredi ga." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu kaa a ve er: Ver nen ishima, kura nen ayol sha kwa u Mbafarishi man Mbasadushi." 
Matthew16:7 Nahan ve gba henen ayol a ve er: Ka sha ci u se tee bredi ga yôô? 
Matthew16:8 Tsô er Yesu kav nahan yô, A kaa er: Ne mba ne lu a anjighjigh u nan kpeghee ne, ka nyi ne henen ayol a en ner, ne mba a bredi ga?" 
Matthew16:9 Ne mba a kav gaa? Man m-umbur kpaa ne kera umbur gaa? Ubredi utaan mba i na ior dubu utaan la, lu akese a me ne kuraa?" 
Matthew16:10 Man ubredi mba utaankaruhar mba i na ior dubu unyiin la, lu akese a me ne kuraa?" 
Matthew16:11 Ka kwagh u bredi M er ne ga, man er nan ne kav ga nahana? Kpa kura nen ayol sha kwa u Mbafarishi man Mbasadushi." 
Matthew16:12 Nahan ve kav er i kera lu kwa u bredi man A lu kaan a ve er ve kura ayol sha min ga yô, kpa lu sha ityesen i Mbafarishi man Mbasadushi la." 
Matthew16:13 Tsô zum u Yesu va ken tar u Sesaria Filipi yô, A pine mbahenen Nav er: Ior mba kaan er, Wan u or, ka ana?" 
Matthew16:14 Ve kaa er: Mbagenev mba kaan er: Ka Yohane u eren batisema, mbagenev yô, er: Ka Eliya; man mbagenev di er: Ka Yeremia; gayô, ka mô gen ken uprofeti." 
Matthew16:15 A kaa a ve er: Tsô ne yô, ne mba kaan ner, Mo M ngu ana?" 
Matthew16:16 Shimon Peteru gema kaa er: We U ngu Kristu Wan u Aôndo u uma. 
Matthew16:17 Yesu gema kaa a na er: Saan we iyol Shimon, wan u Yona, gadia ka or nan pase u nahan ga, kpa ka Terem u A lu Sha la." 
Matthew16:18 Man M ngu kaan we Mer: We u ngu Peteru; ka sha vande ne je Me maa nongo Wam ye, ihinda i Hade ia hemba u agee ga." 
Matthew16:19 Man shi Me na u uishindan mba tartor u Sha; hanma kwagh u wea kange shin tar ne yô, una lu uikangen Sha, man hanma kwagh u wea sagh un shin tar ne yô, á sagh un Sha kpaa." 
Matthew16:20 Tsô A ta mbahenen Nav icin er ve̱ de kera kaan man or er Un lu Kristu ga. 
Matthew16:21 Hii hen shighe la je, Yesu hii u pasen mbahenen Nav er, ka u Una za hen Yerusalem keng je yô, Una ya ican sha akaa kpishi sha ikev i mbatamen man upristi mba tamen kua mbangeren man á wua Un, kpa sha iyange i sha utar la á nder Un." 
Matthew16:22 Kpa Peteru ta ibalegh a Na, gba zôhôn a Na, kaan er: Aôndo A̱ bunde kwagh la, Tere, a̱ de tseren We ga." 
Matthew16:23 Kpa A gema ashe a kaa a Peteru er: Hirem ken ijime kera, Satan, u ngum kwagh u nan gbev mbu nôngon, gadia u we iko sha akaa a a lu a Aôndo ga, saa a ior tsô." 
Matthew16:24 Tsô Yesu kaa a mbahenen Nav er: Aluer anti or a sar nan pe van a mo ityô yô, nana̱ nyiman iyol i nan, nana̱ tôô terankon u nan, nana̱ dondo sha a Mo." 
Matthew16:25 Gadia hanma or u i sar nan pe yiman uma u nan yô, una saa nan a saa, kpa hanmô u uma u nan una saa nan sha ci Wam yô, nana zua a zua a mi je." 
Matthew16:26 Gadia aluer or á zua a tar cii, kpa uma u nan una gema á saa nan yô, á doo nan sha nyi? Shin ka nyi kwagh man or nana na sha u paan uma u nan sha mini?" 
Matthew16:27 Gadia Wan u or Una na hanma or sha aeren a nan. 
Matthew16:28 Mimi je M kaan ne ne, mba ve til heen ne, mbagenev ker ka mba vea bende a ku je ga, saa vea vande nengen a Wan u or Una lu van ken tartor Na ve." 
Matthew17:1 Tsô ayange nga kar ataratar yô, Yesu kua a Peteru man Yakobu man anngô na Yohane, za unde sha gôgôwo, ve tseegh;" 
Matthew17:2 tsô i gema iyol Na sha ishiv vev; ishigh Nagh engem er iyange nahan, akondo Na kpaa kungu segh segh er iwanger nahan." 
Matthew17:3 Tsô Mose man Eliya va ande her a ve gba ôron kwagh a Na. 
Matthew17:4 Peteru gema kaa a Yesu er: Tere, se mba heen nahan doo; a lu ishima You yô, me er atumbe atar hen ijiir ne, i môm sha ci u Wou, i môm sha ci u Mose, i môm di sha ci u Eliya." 
Matthew17:5 Tsô ngur ôron kwagh nahan ave je yô, ibeenegh ki iwangeregh va gba mure sha a ve; tsô imo due ken ibeenegh kila, kaa er: Ngun ka Wan Wam u ishima ishima, u ishima i doom a Na yum yô, ungwan nen Un." 
Matthew17:6 Mbahenen mba ongo nahan yô, ve gba inya ve cir ishigh inya, cier ve iyol tsung je." 
Matthew17:7 Tsô Yesu va, va kpoghol ve, A kaa er: Mough nen sha, de cie nen ga." 
Matthew17:8 Mba kenden ashe sha yô, ve kera nenge a ma or ga, saa Yesu tseegh." 
Matthew17:9 Tsô mba ngur hungwan sha uwo la yô, Yesu ta ve icin, kaa er: De ôron nen ma or kwagh u ne nenge ne ga, saa Wan u or Una vande nderen shin mbakpenev ve." 
Matthew17:10 Mbahenen Nav pine Un er: Man er nan mbangeren ve kaan er: Saa Eliya una vande van kenge? 
Matthew17:11 A gema A kaa er: Ka mimi, Eliya una vande van man una sôr akaa cii kpaa." 
Matthew17:12 Kpa M ngu kaan ne mer, Eliya vande van a ne nagh kera, kpa ve fa un ga man ve er un nyi ityôkwagh i i sar ve u eren un yô. Kape Wan u or kpaa Una ya ican sha ikev ve la." 
Matthew17:13 Zum la mbahenen Nav kav er i lu Yohane u eren batisema A er ve kwagh na yô. 
Matthew17:14 Tsô mba ve hen ikpelaior yô, orgen va her a Na, va gure Un inya, gba kaan er:" 
Matthew17:15 Tere, zungwe wan wam mhôônom, gadia gbe ikungu, ngu dedoo ga tsung je, sha ci u ka a gba shin usu acin imôngo je kua shin mnger kpaa." 
Matthew17:16 Man m va a na hen mbahenen Ou kpa ve fatyô u been un ga. 
Matthew17:17 Yesu gema kaa er: Kpash! Kov u lun a jighjigh u nan ga, u lun geseghee ne, mase shin ayange a me je man Me wa ishima a vene? Va nen a na her a Mo." 
Matthew17:18 Tsô Yesu yange un, maa jijingi u bo la due ken a na kera; hen shighe la je wanakiriki la hingir dedoo." 
Matthew17:19 Tsô mbahenen va hen Yesu ape lu tswen yô, ve va kaa er: Ka nyi man se se fetyô u dughun un kera ga?" 
Matthew17:20 Yesu kaa a ve er: Ka sha ci u myina u jighjigh wen u nan; gadia ka mimi je M kaan ne ne, aluer nea lu a jighjigh u nan sha inja i ishange i masetadi yô, ma ne kaa a uwo ne ner: Mough heen, hire keela, kpa ma u mough; man ma kwagh u ne fatyô u eren un ga yô, una kera lu ga." 
Matthew17:21 [Kpa imba ne i gbe duen ga saa sha msen u eren man kwaghyan u hôron] 
Matthew17:22 Tsô er ve lu zenden ken Galilia la yô, Yesu kaa a ve er: Á na Wan u or sha ikev i ior." 
Matthew17:23 Vea wua Un kpaa, man sha iyange i sha utar la á nder Un. Nahan asema vihi ve kpishi." 
Matthew17:24 Tsô mba ve ken Kapernahum yô, mba ve ngohol kpandegh ku tempel la va hen Peteru, va pine un er: Ortesen wou te kpandegh ku tempel gaa?" 
Matthew17:25 A kaa er: Te! Tsô nyer ken iyou yô, Yesu vande ôron kwagh a na, kaa er: U hen nana, Shimon? Ka unô man utor mba tarev ve sav akaa man ve ngohol kpandegh hen ve, ka hen ônov vev shinii, ka hen mbavannya." 
Matthew17:26 Peteru kaa er: Ka hen mbavannya. Tsô Yesu kaa a na er: Nahan ônov yô, ve tema enger enger." 
Matthew17:27 Kpa sha u se na ve gbev mbu nôngon ga yô, za shin kpe u zegemnger, za kende tsuwe, tôô ishu i wea vande kôron la; ú bughun i zwa yô, ú zua a shekel môm; tôô, za na ve sha ci Wam vea we." 
Matthew18:1 Tsô hen shighe la mbahenen va hen Yesu, ve kaa er: Ka an je nan hembe sha tartor u Sha?" 
Matthew18:2 Tsô A yila wanye A va ver un her atô ve," 
Matthew18:3 A kaa er: Ka mimi je, M kaan ne ne, saa né gema né hingir er mbayev mba kiriki nahan, gayô, mayange né nyôr tartor u Sha ga." 
Matthew18:4 Hanmô u nana hide a iyol i nan ijime er wanye ne nahan yô, ka nan je nan hembe sha tartor u Sha ye." 
Matthew18:5 Man hanmô u nana rumun u môm ken imba i mbayev mba kiriki mban ken iti Yam yô, ka Mo je nan rumun ye." 
Matthew18:6 Kpa hanmô u nana na u môm ken mbakiriki mban mba ve nem jighjigh ne, gbev mbu nôngon yô, kwagh u a lu nan guda yô, ka u ma i zer nan zegenase sha mon, ma i gbihi shin iv i zegemnger." 
Matthew18:7 Kwagh á tser tar sha ci u atôakaa a nan gbev mbu nôngon. Gadia ka u atôakaa a nan gbev mbu nôngon a a va keng, kpa kwagh á tser or u atôakaa a nan gbev mbu nôngon a va sha ikev i nan la." 
Matthew18:8 Man aluer uwegh ough shin nguhar wou vea na u gbev mbu nôngon yô, tôndo ve, ta kera; u ú nyôr ken uma a iwan shin msombo yô, ka u guda a u ma u lu a ave ahar shin angahar ahar, ma i gbihi u ken icôronusu la." 
Matthew18:9 Man aluer ishe you ia na u gbev mbu nôngon yô, dugh i, ta kera, a ú nyôr ken uma a ishe i môm ka u guda a u ma u lu a ashe ahar ma i gbihi u ken usu u gehena la." 
Matthew18:10 Ver nen ishima, de lahan nen u môm ken mbakiriki mban ga, gadia M ngu kaan ne Mer, mbatyomov vev mba Shaav mba kenger ishigh ki Terem u A lu sha la gbem." 
Matthew18:11 [Gadia Wan u or va sha u yiman kwagh u a saa yô]. 
Matthew18:12 Ne mba henen nana? Aluer or nana lu a iyôngo akunduataan man u môm ken i ia tsume yô, nana kera undu i akunduanyiingber kar itiankarinyiin la sha iwo, nana yem nana za ker i i tsum la gaa?" 
Matthew18:13 Man aluer nana zua a i yô, mimi je M ngu kaan ne, m-ember u nana ember sha i la, una hemba u sha i akunduanyiingber kar itiankarinyiin i i tsum ga la." 
Matthew18:14 Kape i lu ishima i Ter wen u A lu Sha la, u mbakiriki mban, mô ve nana saa ga la." 
Matthew18:15 Man aluer anmgbian wou una er u kwaghbo yô, za za tese un ibo na, we vea na tseegh; aluer una ungwa u yô, u yima anmgbian wou je ve." 
Matthew18:16 Man aluer una ungwa u ga yô, shi kua a or môm shin ior ihiar a we imôngo, sha er hanma kwaghôron una kure sha zwa u mbashiada uhar shin utar yô." 
Matthew18:17 Man aluer una ungwa mbala kpaa ga yô, za kaa nongo u Kristu; man shi una ungwa nongo u Kristu kpaa ga yô, a̱ hingir we er ka ortyôtyev man orngoholkpandegh nahan." 
Matthew18:18 Mimi je M kaan ne ne, hanma kwagh u ne kange shin tar ne, una lu uikangen Sha kpaa; man shi hanma kwagh u ne sagh shin tar ne yô, á sagh un Sha kpaa." 
Matthew18:19 Man shi M ngu kaan ne Mer: Aluer ior ihiar ken a ven man vea zua ishima shin tar sha ma kwagh u vea sôn yô, Terem u A lu Sha kpaa Una er ve un." 
Matthew18:20 Gadia her ape ior ihiar shin itiar ve kohol ken iti Yam yô, Mo kpaa M ngu ve her atô je." 
Matthew18:21 Tsô Peteru va her a Na, va kaa a Na er: Tere, ka acin a me je man anmgbian wam una eren kwaghbo man me de unu? I̱ lu zan zan kwa taankaruhara?" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu kaa a na er: M kaa a we Mer, zan zan kwa taankaruhar tsô ga, kpa i̱ lu zan zan akunduatargber kwa taankaruhar." 
Matthew18:23 Nahan yô, tartor u Sha ngu vough er tor ugen u i lu un pe kuren kwagh u inyar a mbashiren un tom yô." 
Matthew18:24 Zum u a hii u eren nahan la, i va un a ugen u a lu un a injô i utalenti dubu pue yô." 
Matthew18:25 Kpa er ngula lu a kwagh u kimbin ga yô, ter na kaa er, i̱ za tee un a kwase na man ônov nav man akaa a a lu a mi cii kpaa, i̱ kimbi injô." 
Matthew18:26 Ortom la gure, zamber a na er: Tere, wa ishima a mo, tsô me kimbi u cii." 
Matthew18:27 Tsô mhôônom kôr ter u ortom la, a pase un a tuhwa, a de un injô na." 
Matthew18:28 Kpa ortom la dugh yô, a kohol ikar na u ve eren tom imôngo, u a lu un a injô, i sule akunduataan, tsô a kôr un, a ta un ihamber iker, a kaa er: Kimbim injô yam." 
Matthew18:29 Un ikar na u tomough la gure un inya, zamber a na kaa er: Wa ishima a mo, tsô me kimbi u." 
Matthew18:30 Kpa a venda, a za, a za wa un ken gaadi je, er saa una vande kimbin injô i lu ya un la ve." 
Matthew18:31 Tsô er mbaerentom a na imôngo nenge kwagh u a er la yô, asema vihi ve kpishi, ve za, ve za pase ter ve akaa a a er la cii." 
Matthew18:32 Tsô ter na yila un, kaa a na er: We ortom u ifer ne, anzô ou la cii m de u sha ci u u zamber a mo yô." 
Matthew18:33 Nahan we kpaa, ka u ma u zungu ikaru u tom la keng er mo m zungu u mhôônom nahan gaa?" 
Matthew18:34 Nahan ter na la yuwe, a gema a na un sha ikev i mbaeren ior ican la, er saa una kimbi injô i a ye un cii ve." 
Matthew18:35 Kape Terem u A lu Sha kpaa Una er a ven la, aluer ne kpaa hanmô wen nana de anmgbian u nan akaabo a nan gbar gbar ga yô." 
Matthew19:1 Tsô zum u Yesu kure akaaôron ne yô, A mough ken Galilia, A va ken veghertar u Yudia yande Yordan." 
Matthew19:2 Ikpelaior kpishi dondo sha a Na, A bee ve angev ker." 
Matthew19:3 Tsô Mbafarishi mbagenev va her a Na, gba va karen Un kaan er: I rumun u or nana̱ pav a kwase u nan sha hanma ityôikaa shinii?" 
Matthew19:4 A gema A kaa er: Ne mba a ôr kwagh u i nger la gaa, er Un u A er ve sha hiihii la je, A er ve nomsoor kua kwase;" 
Matthew19:5 man A kaa er: Ka sha ci u nahan man nomsoor nana undu ter u nan man ngô u nan, nana var ken kwase u nan, ve uhar vea hingir iyôgh i môm ye gaa?" 
Matthew19:6 Nahan yô, mayange ve kera mba uhar ga, kpa ka iyôgh i môm je. Kwagh u Aôndo je zua yô, or a̱ de kera paven un ga." 
Matthew19:7 Ve kaa a Na er: Tsô er nan man Mose lu na tindi er i̱ na takerada u ivaa i paven, shi i̱ pav a na kpaa ase?" 
Matthew19:8 A kaa a ve er: Ka sha ci u mcighir u asema a en man Mose gba rumun tsô er, ne̱ pav a kasev enev ye, kpa sha hiihii je yô, lu nahan ga." 
Matthew19:9 Kpa Mo M ngu kaan ne Mer: Hanma or u nana pav a kwase u nan, kpa a lu sha ci u idya ga man nana gema á er kwase ugen yô, ka idya je nan er ye." 
Matthew19:10 Mbahenen Nav kaa a Na er: Aluer kape kwagh u nom a kwase a lu la yô, guda u lun kwav." 
Matthew19:11 Kpa A kaa a ve er: Ka ior cii man vea fatyô u rumun kwagh ne ga, saa mba i ne ve yô." 
Matthew19:12 Gadia mbagenev ka u vea er kwase ga, i mar ve a mar nahan je; shi mbagenev ka u vea er kwase ga, ka ior ve gem ve ve hingir nahan ye; man shi mbagenev di yô, ka u vea er kwase ga, ve er nahan ayol a ve je sha ci u tartor u Sha. U nan fetyô u rumun kwagh ne yô, nana̱ rumun." 
Matthew19:13 Tsô i va a mbayev mba kiriki her a Na er A̱ penda ve ave sha ityou, A̱ er msen; kpa mbahenen gema zôhô a ve."
