Mark6:32 Tsô ve nyôr ken tso, ve tseegh, ve yem hen ijiir i or lu ga yô." 
Mark6:33 Ior kpishi nenge ve karen, nahan ve kav ve, ve due ken agar cii, ve hembe ayem, ve vande za aren heregh a Na." 
Mark6:34 Er Yesu due ken tso yô, A nenge a ikpelaior kpishi, nahan mhôônom kôr Un a ve sha ci u ve lu er iyôngo i i lu a orkuran i ga yô. Tsô a hii u tesen ve akaa kpishi." 
Mark6:35 Iyange i gbe mgbôghom u been yô, mbahenen Nav va her a Na, ve kaa er: Or ngu hen ijiir ne ga, man iyange mgbôghom u been;" 
Mark6:36 na ve gbenda, ve̱ yem ken uya man agar a a kase hen ne, ve̱ za yam kwaghyan, ve̱ ya." 
Mark6:37 Kpa A gema A kaa a ve er: Ne, na nen ve kwagh, ve̱ ya. Kpa ve kaa a Na er: Se̱ za yam bredi sha sule deri uhar, se̱ va na ve, ve̱ ya shinii?" 
Mark6:38 A pine ve er: Ne mba a ikpenbredi i me? Za, za nenge nen. Mba fe yô, ve kaa er. Ngi itian kua ishu ihiar." 
Mark6:39 A kaa er, ve cii, ve̱ tema akum akum sha adeghatoho." 
Mark6:40 Ve tema sha nongo sha nongo, mbagenev lu iniongo akunduataan akunduataan, mbagenev akunduahargber, akunduahargber." 
Mark6:41 Tsô A tôô ubredi utaan, man ishu ihiar la, kenden ashe sha yô, A sugh, A coon, a na mbahenen er ve̱ gema ve̱ na mbala. Ishu ihiar la kpaa, A kar ve i cii." 
Mark6:42 Ve cii ve ya, kuma ve." 
Mark6:43 Ve kohol avur, iv akese pue kar ahar, kua avur a ishu la kpaa." 
Mark6:44 Mba ve ya bredi mbala, nomso lu er dubu utaan nahan." 
Mark6:45 Fese nahan A tolough a mbahenen Nav er, ve̱ nyôr shin tsô, ve̱ hira hemen, ve̱ per yande u Betesaida, Wen iyol Na yô, Una na ior gbenda ve̱ yem ve." 
Mark6:46 Ne ve gbenda kera yô, A unde sha uwo sha u za eren msen." 
Mark6:47 Iyange i mir yô, tso la lu ken atô u zegemnger, Wen gema lu sha tar, Un tswen." 
Mark6:48 Tsô A nenge ve lu yan ican sha u nahan tso, gadia ahumbe lu van ve sha hemen; nahan A va her a ve sha ahwa atar a utu, lu zenden sha kwavmnger, er Una kar ve sha hemen nahan." 
Mark6:49 Kpa er ve nenge lu zenden sha kwavmnger nahan yô, lu ve er, ka ormbakuv, tsô ve genger imo taver taver;" 
Mark6:50 gadia ve cii ve nenge a Na, nahan cier ve iyol. Kpa A ôr kwagh a ve, A kaa a ve er: Taver nen ishima, ka Mo, de kera cie nen ga." 
Mark6:51 Nahan A nyôr A kohol ve ken tso; ahumbe maa de. Tsô kunda ve iyol ken asema je gande; 
Mark6:52 gadia ve kav kwagh u ubredi la ga, sha ci u asema cighir ve ker yô." 
Mark6:53 Mba peren yô, ve ar ken tar u Genesareti, ve zer tso hen kpe." 
Mark6:54 Mba dugh ken tso yô, fese je ior kav Un." 
Mark6:55 Nahan ve gba zan ayem ken iningirtar la cii, ve gba tôôn mbalun dedoo ga sha ugambe zan a mi henpe ve ungwa er ngu la." 
Mark6:56 Man shi hanma ijiir i Una nyôr, shin a lu ken agar a kiriki shin agar a tamen, shin ken uya mba ken ityev kpaa, ve za ver mba ve lu dedoo ga sha ityembekasua, ve zamber a Na er, Una rumun yô, shin a lu mkaikondo Na tsô kpaa, ve̱ bende ave; mba ve bende a Na cii yô, angev bee ve je." 
Mark7:1 Mbafarishi man mbagenev ken mbangeren mba ve due ken Yerusalem va kohol her a Na. 
Mark7:2 Tsô ve nenge mbagenev ken mbahenen Nav lu yan kwaghyan a ave a wang ga, inja na yô, ve ôô ga." 
Mark7:3 Gadia Mbafarishi man Mbayuda cii ve gbaa yan kwagh ga, saa ve vande ôôn ave keng ve, sha u kuran aeren a mbayiase la." 
Mark7:4 Man shighe u vea hide kasua kpaa, ve gba yan kwagh ga, saa ve vande ôôn iyol ve. Akaa agen kpishi kpaa i na ve er ve̱ kuran a, er u ôôn ayongo man ityev man agbande a togula nahan." 
Mark7:5 Tsô Mbafarishi man mbangeren pine Un er: Ka nyi mbahenen Ou ve kor atindi a mbayiase ga, ve ye kwaghyan ave ili?" 
Mark7:6 Kpa A kaa a ve er: Kwagh u Yesaia a tsengaôron sha a ven yô, ka vough je, ne mbaimangerev, er i nger nahan er: Nongoior ne ngu civir Mo sha ityumbuzwaav tseegh, kpa ishima ve yô, ngi ica a Mo je;" 
Mark7:7 nahan ka gbilin tsô, ve gur ve civir Mo ye, sha ci u ityesen i ve tesen la, ka atindi a ior tsô." 
Mark7:8 Gadia ne mba gbihin tindi u Aôndo, geman kuran aeren a ior." 
Mark7:9 Shi A kaa a ve er: Mimi je ne mba undun tindi u Aôndo, sha u ne wa aeren a en a mbayiase la iko yô." 
Mark7:10 Gadia Mose lu kaa er: Civir teru man ngôu; man shi: Or u nana tuhwa ter shin ngô yô, nana kpe keng." 
Mark7:11 Kpa ne yô, ne mba kaan ner, aluer or nana kaa a ter u nan shin ngô u nan er: Kwagh u ma u zough a iwasen sha mi her a mo yô, ka korban (inja na yô er, ka nagh ku i ne Aôndo yô)" 
Mark7:12 nahan ne kera rumun er nana̱ wase ter shin ngô u nan sha ma kwagh ga. 
Mark7:13 Kape ne bundu imo i Aôndo jim sha aeren a en a mbayiase a ne ne ior la. Akaa kpishi er angan nahan ne mba eren kpaa. 
Mark7:14 A shi A yila ikpelaior her a Na, A kaa a ve er: Ver nen ato sha a Mo, ne cii, shi kav nen kpaa:" 
Mark7:15 Ma kwagh u ken won u una nyôr or ken iyol, u una na nan nana kera lu wang ga yô, ngu ga; kpa ka akaa a a dugh ken or la man a ne nan, nan kera luun wang ga ye. [" 
Mark7:16 Aluer or a lu a ato a ungwan yô, nana̱ ungwa. ]" 
Mark7:17 Undun ikpelaior nyer ken iyou yô, mbahenen Nav pine Un kwagh sha injakwagh la." 
Mark7:18 A kaa a ve er: Ne je kpaa, ne mba a kav gaa? Ma kwagh u ken won u a nyer ken or yô, una fatyô u nan nan nana lu wang ga ze; ne kav nahan gaa?" 
Mark7:19 Gadia a nyôr nan ken ishima ga, ka ken uya tsô, una shi á za due ken won. Sha u kaan nahan yô, lu wuese akaayan cii." 
Mark7:20 Nahan A kaa er: Ka kwagh u ka a due ken or je, a na nan, nan kera lu wang ga ye." 
Mark7:21 Gadia ka ken ateghatô ken asema a ior je akaabo a henen, man idya i eren, man iv, man iwooor," 
Mark7:22 man shi ivaa i vihin sha idya, man u tômon akaa, man afer a eren a dang, man icugh, man u kôron iyol tsaha ga, man iwuhe, man angereke, man ityough ki kehen, man ibumegh ve dugh ye." 
Mark7:23 Akaabo ne cii ka kimi a dugh, a ne or nan kera lu wang ga ye." 
Mark7:24 Moughon heera yô, A yem ken tar u Tiru. Tsô za nyer ken ya ugen yô, A rumun er or a̱ fa ga; kpa fan ityô u lun myer ga." 
Mark7:25 Nahan kwase ugen u wan na u kiriki u kwase lu a jijingi u hôngorough, ongo kwagh Na yô, a va, a va gba hen angahar a Na." 
Mark7:26 Lu kwase u ken Mbagrika, ityô na yô, lu Mbashiro-Fenishia. A zamber a Na er, A̱ dugh jijingi u bo ken wan na la kera." 
Mark7:27 Kpa A kaa a na er: De, mbayev mba hen ya ve̱ vande yan i̱ kuma ve, gadia doo u tôôn kwaghyan u uôn, kenden aniwaav ga." 
Mark7:28 Nahan a gema a kaa a Na er: Een Tere, aniwaav kpaa mba ye avur a akaayan a uôn shin ityô i tebul." 
Mark7:29 Tsô A kaa a na er: Sha ci u mkaanem man yô, gba yemen tsô, jijingi u bo due ken wan wou kera ve." 
Mark7:30 Tsô er a yem hen ya na yô, a za kohol wan na, a lu yaven sha gambe, jijingi u bo la due kera." 
Mark7:31 Shi A due ken tar u Tiru, A kar sha Shidon, A va hen zegemnger u Galilia, lu karen ker atô u tar u Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Tsô ve va Un a or u kondon ato, u eren ikeghem, ve zamber a Na er, A̱ penda uwegh sha a na." 
Mark7:33 Tsô A kua a na A undu ikpelaior, A yem a na ken huwa, A shindi un ahôaveegh ken ato, A haa ijer, A bende un sha nombor." 
Mark7:34 Kenger sha yô, A shil ishima, A kaa a na er: Efata! Inja na yô, er: Bugh!" 
Mark7:35 Tsô ato na bugh, fese nahan kwagh u a kange un nombor la kpaa sagh kera, a ôr kwagh dedoo." 
Mark7:36 A ta ve icin er, ve̱ de ôron ma or ga; kpa er A seer tan ve icin nahan kpaa, ve hemba seer a seer u ôron kwagh la." 
Mark7:37 Kpiligh ve iyol je zua ga, ve gba kaan er: A er akaa ca ca cii doo doo je, A er mbakondonato mba ungwan, mbakondonaker kpaa mba lamen." 
Mark8:1 Sha ayange la zum u ikpelaior shi lu kpishi man ve lu a kwagh u vea ya ga yô, Yesu yila mbahenen Na, A kaa a ve er:" 
Mark8:2 Mhôônom kôrom a ikpelaior ne, gadia mba a Mo ityô ka ayange atar je ne, man mba a kwagh u vea ya ga." 
Mark8:3 Aluer Mea na ve gbenda Mer, ve̱ yem hen uya vev ijen yô, vea vôr sha gbenda, gadia mbagenev ken a ve va ica." 
Mark8:4 Mbahenen Nav gema kaa a Na er: Ka han je á zua a kwaghyan ken toho ne ve ikpelaior ne ia ya, á kuma ve?" 
Mark8:5 A pine ve er: Ne mba a ubredi u me? Ve kaa er: Mba utaankaruhar. 
Mark8:6 A kaa ikpelaior er, i̱ haa inya; tsô A tôô ubredi mba utaankaruhar la, sughun yô, A coon, A na mbahenen Nav er, ve̱ na ve; nahan ve gema ve na ikpelaior." 
Mark8:7 Ve lu a anishuuv ciôn kpaa. A sôn iveren i dedoo sha mi, A kaa er, ve̱ na ve kpaa." 
Mark8:8 Ve ya, kuma ve; ve kohol avur a a neer la, iv akese ataankarahar." 
Mark8:9 Mba ve ya la, ve kuma er ior dubu unyiin nahan. Tsô A na ve gbenda." 
Mark8:10 Fese nahan A nyôr ken tso a mbahenen Nav, ve va ken tar u Dalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Mbafarishi due gba sendegh kwaghôron a Na, ve lu keren ivande i Sha her a Na, sha u karen Un." 
Mark8:12 Tsô A shil ishima ken vanger taveraa, A kaa er: Ka nyi man kov ne u keren ivande nahana? Mimi je M kaan ne ne: Á na kov ne ivande je ga." 
Mark8:13 Tsô A undu ve, A shi A nyôr shin tso, A per yande la." 
Mark8:14 Kpa hungul ve ve tôô bredi ga; bredi u ve lu a mi shin tso yô, lu môm tsô." 
Mark8:15 A wa ve kwagh er: Ver nen ishima, kuran nen ayol a en sha kwa u Mbafarishi kua kwa u Herode la." 
Mark8:16 Tsô ve gba henen ayol a ve, kaan er: Ka sha ci u se lu a bredi ga yô." 
Mark8:17 Er Yesu kav nahan yô, A kaa a ve er: Ka nyi man ne henen ner, ka er ne tee bredi ga? Ne mba a kav ga, man mfe kpaa ne fa gaa? Ne shi ne mba a asema a cighir her tsôô?" 
Mark8:18 Ne mba a ashe, kpa ne mba nengen gaa? Shi ne mba a ato, kpa ne mba ongo gaa?" 
Mark8:19 Er M coon ubredi utaan sha ior dubu utaan man ne kura avur la, ne iv akese a me, ne kera umbur gaa? Ve kaa a Na er: Lu pue kar ahar." 
Mark8:20 Man sha ubredi utaankaruhar la ne kura avur iv akese a me? Ve kaa er: Lu ataankarahar. 
Mark8:21 Nahan kpaa ne mba a kav gaa? 
Mark8:22 Ve va nyôr ken Betesaida. Tsô ve va Un a orapirashe, ve zamber a Na er, A̱ bende Un uwegh iyol." 
Mark8:23 A kôr orapirashe la sha uwe, A due a na ken akôngo; tsô hee un ijer sha ashe, shi pende un ave sha ityou yô, A pine un er: U ngu nengen a ma kwagh kpa?" 
Mark8:24 A kenger sha, a kaa er: M ngu nengen a ior, gadia m ngu nengen a ve er ka ikon nahan, mba zenden." 
Mark8:25 Tsô A shi penda un ave sha ashe, a gba nengen dedoo, maa i bee un; tsô a nenge akaa cii wanger wanger." 
Mark8:26 A na un gbenda er a̱ yem hen ya na, A kaa er: Ken gar ne tsô kpaa, de nyer ker ga." 
Mark8:27 Yesu shi due a mbahenen Nav, A gba zan sha angarev mba Shisaria-Filipi. Sha gbenda yô, A pine mbahenen Nav er: Ior mba kaan er, Mo M ngu ana?" 
Mark8:28 Ve kaa a Na er: Yohane u eren batisema; mbagenev yô, er Eliya; man mbagenev er, ka u môm ken uprofeti." 
Mark8:29 A gema A pine ver er: Kpa ne yô, ne mba kaan ner, Mo M ngu ana? Peteru kaa a Na er: We U ngu Kristu je." 
Mark8:30 A ta ve icin er, ve̱ de kera ôron ma or kwagh Na ga." 
Mark8:31 Tsô a hii u tesen ve er, ka u Wan u or Una ya ican sha akaa kpishi keng, mbatamen man upristi mba tamen kua mbangeren vea ta Un kera, á wua Un; ayange á karen atar yô, Una nder shin ku." 
Mark8:32 A ôr kwagh ne gbar gbar. Tsô Peteru ta ibalegh a Na, gba zôhôn a Na." 
Mark8:33 Kpa gem nengen a mbahenen Nav yô, A yange Peteru, A kaa er: Hirem ken ijime kera, Satan, gadia ka akaa a Aôndo u henen ga, saa a ior tsô." 
Mark8:34 A yila ikpelaior man mbahenen Nav her a Na, A kaa a ve er: Aluer anti or a sar nan pe van a Mo ityô yô, nana̱ nyiman iyol i nan, nana̱ tôô terankon u nan nana̱ dondo sha a Mo." 
Mark8:35 Gadia hanma or u i sar nan ka yiman uma u nan yô, una saa nan a saa; kpa hanmô u uma u nan una saa nan sha ci Wam man Loho u Dedoo ne yô, nana yima un a yima je." 
Mark8:36 Gadia aluer or a zua a tar cii, man uma u nan una gema á saa nan yô, á doo nan sha nyi?" 
Mark8:37 Shin ka nyi kwagh man or nana na sha u paan uma u nan sha mini? 
Mark8:38 Gadia hanmô u nana cia ashe sha ci Wam man akaaôron a Am hen kov u eren idya man u asorabo ne yô, Wan u or kpaa Una cia ashe sha ci u nan zum u Una va sha icivir i Ter Na a uicighanmbatyomov la." 
Mark9:1 A kaa a ve er: Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, mba ve til heen ne, mbagenev ker ka mba vea kpe mayange ga, saa vea vande nengen tartor u Aôndo ua va sha agee ve." 
Mark9:2 Tsô ayange nga kar ataratar yô, Yesu kua a Peteru man Yakobu man Yohane, za unde sha gôgôwo, ve tseegh; tsô i gema iyol Na sha ishiv vev." 
Mark9:3 Akondo a Na gema engem, kungu segh segh, er orkilenakondo kungun a u shin tar ne mayange nana fatyô u kungun a nahan ga." 
Mark9:4 Tsô Eliya vea Mose va ande hen ve, ve gba ôron kwagh a Yesu." 
Mark9:5 Peteru gema kaa a Yesu er: Ortesen, se mba heen, nahan doo; sar U pe se̱ er atumbe atar, i môm sha ci Wou, i môm sha ci u Mose, i môm di sha ci u Eliya zee?" 
Mark9:6 Gadia a fa kwagh u una kaa ga, sha ci u cier ve iyol yum yô." 
Mark9:7 Tsô ibeenegh va gba mure sha a ve, imo kpaa due ken ibeenegh kila kaa er: Ngun ka Wan Wam u ishima ishima, ungwan nen Un!" 
Mark9:8 Nahan mba jingi yô, ve kera nenge a ma or ga, saa Yesu tseegh lu a ve ye." 
Mark9:9 Mba ngur hungwan sha uwo yô, A ta ve icin er ve̱ de ôron ma or kwagh u ve nenge a mi ne ga, saa Wan u or Una nder shin mbakpenev ve." 
Mark9:10 Ve koso mkaanem mara ken asema a ve, ve gba pinen ayol a ve inja i mnder u shin mbakpenev la." 
Mark9:11 Tsô ve pine Un er: Inja na nan man mbangeren ve kaan er, saa Eliya una vande van kenge?" 
Mark9:12 A gema a kaa a ve er: Eliya una vande van kpee sha u sôron akaa cii; tsô er nan man i nger kwagh sha Wan u or er, Una ya ican sha akaa kpishi, shi á laha Un kpaa?" 
Mark9:13 Kpa M kaa ne Mer, Eliya va kera ve, ve er un nyi ityôkwagh i i sar ve u eren un yô, er i nger kwagh sha a na la." 
Mark9:14 Ve hen mbahenen yô, A nenge a ikpelaior kpishi kase ve, mbangeren kpaa lu sendegh akaaôron a ve." 
Mark9:15 Ikpelaior la cii, mba nengen a Na yô, kpiligh ve iyol kpishi, ve hembe ayem, ve za sugh Un." 
Mark9:16 Tsô A pine ve er: Ka nyi ne sendegh kwaghôron a mbana? 
Mark9:17 Ugen ken ikpelaior la gema kaa er: Ortesen, m va a wan wam u a lu a jijingi u kondon iker, her a We." 
Mark9:18 Hanma pe ka una kôr un yô, a ta un inya; a mbuwa hugh zwa, a yan anyi, a taver nulôô. M kaa a mbahenen Ou mer, ve̱ dugh un, kpa ve fatyô ga." 
Mark9:19 A gema A kaa a ve er: Kpash, kov u lun a jighjigh u nan ga ne! Mase shin ayange a me je man Me tema a vene? Mase shin ayange a me je man Me wa ishima a vene? Va nen a na her a Mo." 
Mark9:20 Tsô ve va a na hen a Na. Nengen a Na yô, jijingi la kende un, a gba inya, a gba viligh iyol inya, mbuwan hugh zwa." 
Mark9:21 A pine ter na er: Kwagh ne hii un ica i gba nana? A kaa er: A lu wanye je. 
Mark9:22 Acin imôngo ka a gbihi un ken usu man shin mnger kpaa, sha u wuan un. Kpa aluer Wea fatyô u eren ma kwagh yô, zungwe se mhôônom, wase se." 
Mark9:23 Yesu kaa a na er: Aluer wea fatyô yô, akaa cii a kôrcio hen or u nan ne jighjigh la." 
Mark9:24 Nahan ter u wan la genger imo, kaa er: M na jighjigh, wasem sha myina u jighjigh wam u nan ne." 
Mark9:25 Tsô Yesu nengen ikpelaior i gbe kohol ayem nahan yô, A yange jijingi u hôngorough la A kaa a na er: We, jijingi u kondon iker man u kondon ato ne, M ngu kaan a we, due ken a na kera, mayange de kera shi nyer ken a na ga." 
Mark9:26 Er a genger imo, shi a kende un taveraa yô, a due. Wanye la hingir er a kpe nahan; nahan ior mbagenev kpishi kaa er: A kpe ve." 
Mark9:27 Kpa Yesu kôr un sha uwe, mough a na sha; wen kpaa a mough a tile sha." 
Mark9:28 Tsô nyer ken iyou yô, mbahenen Nav pine Un ken myer er: Ka nyi man se fetyô u dughun un ga?" 
Mark9:29 A kaa a ve er: Imba ne ka i dugh sha ma kwagh ugen ga, saa sha msen u eren." 
Mark9:30 Ve mough heera kera, ve kar ken tar u Galilia; kpa lu Un ka or nana̱ fa ga;" 
Mark9:31 gadia A lu tesen mbahenen Nav kaan a ve er: Á na Wan u or sha ikev i ior, vea wua Un yô, sha iyange isha utar la, Una nder." 
Mark9:32 Ve kav mkaanem mara ga, kpa ve lu cian u pinen Un." 
Mark9:33 Tsô A va ken Kapernahum. Tem hen ya yô, A pine ve er: Ka nyi ashen ne lu ôron sha gbenda laa?" 
Mark9:34 Kpa ve huan ving; gadia ve lu ôron kwagh sha gbenda er, ka an nan lu orvesene?" 
Mark9:35 Tsô a tema, A yila ve mba pue kar uhar, A kaa a ve er: Aluer a sar or ka lun orhemen yô, nana̱ hingir u masetyô cii, shi nana̱ eren mbagenev cii tom." 
Mark9:36 Tsô A tôô wanye, a ver un her atô ve, A kuve un, A kaa a ve er:" 
Mark9:37 Hanmô u nana rumun u môm ken imba i mbayev mban ken iti Yam yô, ka Mo je nan rumun ye; man shi hanmô u nan rumun Mo yô, ka Mo nan rumun ga, kpa ka Un u A tindim la." 
Mark9:38 Tsô Yohane gema kaa a Na er: Ortesen, se nenge orgen u a dondo sha a vese ga, ngu dughun ujijingi mba bov ken iti You, yô, se yange un sha ci u a dondo sha a vese ga yô." 
Mark9:39 Kpa Yesu kaa er: De yangen nen un ga, gadia or u nana er tom u ageegh ken iti Yam man nana gema nana ôr kwagh u vihin sha a Mo fefa yô, nan ngu ga;" 
Mark9:40 gadia u nan lu ihom a vese ga yô, nan ngu nongo a vese." 
Mark9:41 Gadia hanmô u nana na ne iyongomnger ken iti Yam er, ne̱ ma, sha ci u ne lu ior i Kristu yô, mimi je M kaan ne ne, mayange injar i nan ia saa nan je ga." 
Mark9:42 Man shi hanmô u nana na u môm ken mbakiriki mban mba ve nem jighjigh ne, gbev mbu nôngon yô, kwagh u a lu nan guda yô, ka u ma i har nan zegenase sha mon ma i kende nan shin zegemnger." 
Mark9:43 Man shi aluer uwegh ough kua na u gbev mbu nôngon yô, tôndo ku kera; u ú nyôr ken uma a iwan yô, ka u guda a u lun a ave ahar geman nyôron ken gehena, ken usu u pirin mayange ga la [" 
Mark9:44 ape ijôô ve ia kpe ga, man usu kpaa u pirin mayange ga la. ]" 
Mark9:45 Man shi aluer nguhar wou ua na u gbev mbu nôngon yô, tôndo u kera; gadia u ú nyôr ken uma a ikeer yô, ka u guda a u ma u lu a angahar ahar ma i kende u ken gehena [" 
Mark9:46 ape ijôô ve ia kpe ga, man usu kpaa u pirin mayange ga la. ]" 
Mark9:47 Man shi aluer ishe you ia na u gbev mbu nôngon yô, dugh i kera; u ú nyôr sha tartor u Aôndo a ishe i môm yô, ka u guda a u ma u lu a ashe ahar ma i kende u ken gehena," 
Mark9:48 ape ijôô ve ia kpe ga, man usu kpaa u pirin mayange ga la." 
Mark9:49 Gadia hanma or je, á sôr nan sha usu." 
Mark9:50 Bar doo, kpa aluer bar una kera nyoho ga yô, ka sha nyi né shi né sôr unu? Lu nen a bar ken a ven je, man lu nen bem bem ayol a en." 
Mark10:1 A mough keela A va ken tar u Yudia man shi yande Yordan; ikpelaior kpishi shi zua her a Na; A shi A gba tesen ve sha ieren Na. 
Mark10:2 Mbafarishi kpaa va her a Na, va pine Un er: I rumun er or nana̱ pav a kwase u nana? Ve lu karen Un a kar." 
Mark10:3 Kpa a A gema A pine ve er: Mose lu wa ne tindi nana? 
Mark10:4 Ve kaa er: Mose yô, rumun er i̱ nger takerada u ivaa i paven, paven a nan je." 
Mark10:5 Kpa Yesu kaa a ve er: Ka sha ci u asema a en a cighir man a nger ne tindi ne nahan ye. 
Mark10:6 Kpa sha mhii u igbetar je yô, lu nom man kwase A gba ve ye." 
Mark10:7 Ka sha ci u nahan man nomsoor nana undu ter u nan man ngô u nan, nana var hen kwase u nan;" 
Mark10:8 ve uhar cii vea hingir iyôgh i môm ye; nahan yô, kera mba uhar ga, kpa mba iyôgh i môm je." 
Mark10:9 Kwagh u Aôndo je zua yô, or a̱ de kera paven un ga." 
Mark10:10 Ken iyou yô, mbahenen shi pine Un sha kwagh shon ne." 
Mark10:11 A kaa a ve er: Hanma or u nana pav a kwase u nan, nana gema á er ugen yô, ka idya je nan er a na ye." 
Mark10:12 Man shi kwase kpaa, aluer nana pav a nom u nan, nana za er ugen yô, ka idya je nan er ye." 
Mark10:13 Tsô ve va a mbayev mba kiriki her a Na sha u A̱ bende ve ave, kpa mbahenen zôhô a ve." 
Mark10:14 Tsô Yesu nengen nahan yô, ishima vihi Un, A kaa a ve er: De nen mbayev mba kiriki, ve̱ va her a Mo; de kera yangen nen ve ga, gadia ka anza a mban ne je tartor u lu u ve ye." 
Mark10:15 Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, hanma or u nana rumun tartor u Aôndo er wanye u kiriki nahan ga yô, mayange je nana nyôr ker ga." 
Mark10:16 Tsô A kuve ve, shi A penda ve ave sha ityou kpaa, A ver ve doo doo." 
Mark10:17 Dugh ngur yemen sha gbenda yô, orgen va ayem, va gure inya sha ishigh Nagh, pine Un er: Ortesen u dedoo, me er nan man me zua a uma u tsôrono?" 
Mark10:18 Yesu kaa a na er: Er nan man u yerem wer Or u dedoo? Or u dedoo ngu ga, saa Aôndo tseegh." 
Mark10:19 U fa atindi kaa er: De woo or ga; de eren idya ga; de iin ga; de we or aie iyol ga; de tsughun or ga; civir teru man ngôu. 
Mark10:20 Kpa a gema a kaa a Na er: Ortesen, m kura angan cii er m lu iyev je." 
Mark10:21 Yesu gem kenger un yô, a doo Un ishima, a kaa a na er: Kwagh shi u môm tsô; za, za tôô akaa a u lu a mi la cii, tee, na mbaatsanev, nahan wea lu a kwagh u injaa Sha; yô, va dondo sha a Mo." 
Mark10:22 Kpa iyol kpe un sha mkaanem mara, a yem a ishima i vihin, gadia lu a inyaregh kpishi." 
Mark10:23 Yesu jingi yô, kaa a mbahenen Nav er: Ka ican tsô, u mba ve lu a inyaregh kpishi vea nyôr sha tartor u Aôndo." 
Mark10:24 Cier mbahenen Nav iyol sha kwaghôron Na la. Kpa Yesu shi kimbir kaan a ve er: Mbayev, u nyôron sha tartor u Aôndo ka ican tsô." 
Mark10:25 U ornyar a̱ nyôr sha tartor u Aôndo yô, guda u rakumi á kar hen ihura i anura." 
Mark10:26 Shi kpiligh ve iyol, je gande u ôron; ve kaa ayol a ve er: Tsô, ka an je man á yima nana?" 
Mark10:27 Kpa Yesu kenger ve, kaa er: Hen ior yô, kwagh ne a fatyô ga, kpa her Aôndo yô, ka nahan ga; gadia her Aôndo yô, akaa cii á fatyô." 
Mark10:28 Tsô Peteru gba kaan a Na er: Yô, nenge, se se undu akaa cii, se dondo U." 
Mark10:29 Yesu gema kaa er: Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, or ngu u nana undu ya, shin anmgbianev mba nomso, shin anmgbianev mba kasev, shin ngô, shin ter, shin ônov, shin ishule sha ci Wam man Loho u Dedoo ne," 
Mark10:30 man nana de ngohol mtsera kwa akunduataan hegen hen shighe ne ga: uya man anmgbianev mba nomso man anmgbianev mba kasev man ungô man ônov man ishule a mbamtev mba sha atsan kpaa, man ken ayange a ken hemen, nana ngohol uma u tsôron." 
Mark10:31 Kpa mba ve lu mbahiihii kpishi vea hingir mbamasetyô, mbamasetyô di vea gema á lu mbahiihii." 
Mark10:32 Ve lu sha gbenda u zan sha Yerusalem, yô, Yesu kar lu zan ve sha hemen, lu cier ve iyol; mba ve lu van ken ijime yô, ve lu cian. A shi A kohol ve mba pue kar uhar, A gba ôron ve akaa a á va er Un la." 
Mark10:33 A kaa er: Nenge, se mba kôndon zan sha Yerusalem; á za na Wan u or sha ikev i upristi mba tamen man mbangeren, vea ôr Un ijir i kuugh, vea na Un sha ikev i atôatyev;" 
Mark10:34 vea naha Un tar, vea gbidye Un akpa, vea haa Un azer iyol, vea wua Un kpaa; sha iyange i sha utar la, Una nder shin ku." 
Mark10:35 Tsô Yakobu man Yohane, ônov mba Sebedeu, kporom her a Na, ve gba kaan a Na er: Ortesen, sar se ka ma U er se nyi ityôkwagh i se sôn U yô." 
Mark10:36 A pine ve er: Ka nyi i lu ne pe M̱ er ne? 
Mark10:37 Ve kaa a Na er: Rumun se, se̱ tema a We, u môm ken uwegh Ough ku yanegh, u môm ken uwegh Ough ku imesegh, sha iengem You." 
Mark10:38 Kpa Yesu kaa a ve er: Ne fa kwagh u ne sen ga. Ne fatyô u man iyongo i M me nee? Shin á er ne batisema sha batisema u i eren Mo ne? 
Mark10:39 Ve kaa a Na er: Se fatyô. Kpa Yesu kaa a ve er: Iyongo i M me ne, né ma, batisema u i eren Mo ne, ne kpaa á er ne un," 
Mark10:40 kpa u teman ken uwegh Agh ku yanegh shin ku imesegh yô, ka kwagh Wam er Me na kera ga; kpa ka sha ci u mba i ser ijiir la sha ci ve yô." 
Mark10:41 Er mba pue mbala ungwa nahan, asema gba vihin ve a Yakobu man Yohane." 
Mark10:42 Kpa Yesu yila ve her a Na, A kaa a ve er: Ne fa er mba i ver ve sha u ve̱ lu utor sha atôatyev yô, ka ve manger sha a ve, mbatamen vev kpaa ve eren tahav sha a ve yô." 
Mark10:43 Kpa her a ven yô, ka nahan ga; kpa hanmô u i sar nan pe lun u vesen ken a ven yô, nana̱ hingir wanakiriki wen." 
Mark10:44 Man shi hanmô u i sar nan pe lun u hiihii ken a ven yô, nana̱ hingir wanakiriki u mbagenev cii." 
Mark10:45 Gadia Wan u or kpaa va sha u i̱ er Un tom ga kpa ka sha ci u Una er, man sha u Una na uma Na a̱ hingir ipaan sha ci u ior kpishi." 
Mark10:46 Tsô ve va ken Yeriko. Ngur duen ken Yeriko, Un kua mbahenen Nav man ikpelaior kpishi yô, orsônonkwagh u a lu orapirashe, iti na er Bartimeu, wan u Timeu, tema hen kpegbenda." 
Mark10:47 Ongo er i lu Yesu or u Nasareti yô, a gba genger imo kaan er: Yesu, Wan u Davidi, zungwem mhôônom." 
Mark10:48 Ior kpishi yange un er, a̱ de ayôôso; kpa a seer a seer genger imo taver taver er: We, Wan u Davidi zungwem mhôônom." 
Mark10:49 Tsô Yesu tile, kaa er: Yila nen un. Ve yila orapirashe la, ve kaa a na er: Taver ishima, mough sha, ngu yilan we." 
Mark10:50 Un kpaa, te riga na kera yô, a mough fese, a va hen Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu gema kaa a Na er: Ka nyi i̱ sar u, u ma M er uwe? Orapirashe la kaa a Na er: Ortesen, ma m nenge kera." 
Mark10:52 Yesu kaa a na er: Yem tsô, jighjigh wou u nan war u ve. Fese nahan a hingir u nengen kera, a dondo sha a Na sha gbenda." 
Mark11:1 Tsô mba va mgbôghom a Yerusalem hen Betefage man Betani hen uwo u Olev yô, A tindi mbahenen Nav uhar," 
Mark11:2 A kaa a ve er: Za nen sha wangar u a lu ne sha hemen la; né za nyôron yô, fese je né zua a wanjaki u i zer un u mayange je or lu a henda un ga yô. Sagh, va nen a mi." 
Mark11:3 Man aluer or a pine ne er: Ka nyi ne eren nahana, yô, kaa nen ner: Kwagh gba Ter sha mi, Una shi Á hide a mi fese je." 
Mark11:4 Tsô ve za, ve za zua a wanjaki, i zer un hen hunda ken won sha gbenda, ve sagh un." 
Mark11:5 Mbagenev mba ve tile her la, pine ve er: Inja na nan ne saghen wanjaki?" 
Mark11:6 Tsô ve kaa ve er Yesu kaa nahan; nahan ve de ve, ve yem." 
Mark11:7 Mba ve a wanjaki la hen Yesu yô, ve haa un akondo a ve sha ijime, A tema sha mi." 
Mark11:8 Ior kpishi samber akondo a ve sha gbenda, mbagenev haa ahu a ve kever ken ikôngo yô." 
Mark11:9 Tsô, mbazan sha hemen man mbadondon ken ijime kpaa, gba genger amo kaan er: Hosana! I̱ wuese Un u A ve ken iti i Ter." 
Mark11:10 I̱ wuese tartor u ter wase Davidi u u lu van la; Hosana sha Usha mba hemban gban ica la! 
Mark11:11 Tsô Yesu nyôr ken Yerusalem kar za nyôr ken tempel; jingi sha akaa cii been yô, iyange kpaa i been yô, a due a mba pue kar uhar, A yem ken Betani." 
Mark11:12 Kper nan, mba dugh ken Betani yô, ijen kôr Un." 
Mark11:13 Nengen a itinetur a ika sha mi yô, A za er, shin alaghga Una zua a atam sha miou? Ar heregh yô, A zua a ma ityamegh sha mi ga, saa ika tseegh; gadia lu shighe u tur umen ga." 
Mark11:14 A gema A kaa a na er: Mayange mayange ma or nana̱ de kera shi ye atam a ou ga. Yô, mbahenen Nav lu ungwan." 
Mark11:15 Tsô ve va ken Yerusalem. Yesu va nyer ken tempel yô, A gba zendan mbateenkwagh man mbayamenkwagh ken tempel kera, A mgbegha utebul mba mbamusaninyaregh man mkônom ma mbateenmkungum kera kpaa." 
Mark11:16 A kera rumun u ma or nana̱ nyôr a ma ikagh ken tempel ga. 
Mark11:17 A gba tesen kaan a ve er: I kera nger er: Á yila iyou Yam er iyou i msen sha ci u akuraior cii gaa? Kpa ne yô, ne gema a mi, hingir bar u mbanumunior." 
Mark11:18 Upristi mba tamen man mbangeren mba ongo nahan yô, ve gba keren gbenda u vea wua Un yô; gadia ve lu cian Un, sha ci u ikpelaior cii, lu kpiligh ve iyol sha ityesen Na." 
Mark11:19 Iyange va been yô, A due ken gar." 
Mark11:20 Mba ngur karen pepe yô, ve nenge tur la uma, hii shin amise na je." 
Mark11:21 Peteru umbur yô, kaa a Na er: Ortesen, nenge tur u U we un ifan ne, a uma." 
Mark11:22 Yesu gema kaa a ve er: Na nen Aôndo jighjigh. 
Mark11:23 Gadia mimi je, M kaan ne ne, hanma or u nana kaa a uwo ne er: Mough, za gba shin zegemnger man nana ta akpelan ken ishima ga, kpa nana na jighjigh er kwagh u nan kaa la una er yô, á er nan un." 
Mark11:24 Ka nahan man M kaa ne Mer: Akaa a ne sôn sha msen u eren cii, na nen jighjigh ner, ne ngohol un ve, tsô né zua a mi." 
Mark11:25 Man hanma shighe u nea tile u eren msen, man ma kwagh una vihi ne a orgen yô, de nen nan kwagh la, sha u Ter wen u A lu Sha la kpaa, A̱ de ne akaabo a en yô." 
Mark11:26 Kpa aluer nea deen ga yô, Ter wen u A lu Sha la kpaa Una de ne akaabo a en ga." 
Mark11:27 Tsô ve shi ve va hen Yerusalem, Ngur zenden ken tempel yô, upristi mba tamen man mbangeren kua mbatamen ve va her a Na," 
Mark11:28 ve pine Un er: Ka sha tahav mbu nyi man U eren akaa ne? 
Mark11:29 Yesu gema kaa a ve er: Mo kpaa Me pine ne kwagh môm tsô, kaam nen, yô, Mo kpaa Me kaa ne tahav mbu M eren akaa sha mi ne." 
Mark11:30 Batisema u Yohane la yô, ka Sha a dugh shin ka hen ioro? Kaam nen ase!" 
Mark11:31 Tsô ve gba henen ayol a ve er: Aluer sea kaa nahan ser, ka Sha yô, Una kaa er: Ka nyi ne na un jighjigh ga?" 
Mark11:32 Man aluer sea kaa ser: Ka hen ior yô, nahan ve lu cian ikpelaior, gadia ve cii ve fa er Yohane lu profeti mimi je yô." 
Mark11:33 Tsô ve gema ve kaa a Yesu er: Se fa ga. Yesu kpaa kaa a ve er: Mo kpaa Me kaa ne tahav mbu M eren akaa ne sha mi ga. 
Mark12:1 Tsô A hii u ôron kwagh a ve sha anzaakaa er: Orgen er sule u wain, kase u gar shi time ihungwa i shoghol wain ker, shi maa gôgôyou u taven sha sha u kuran u kpaa; tsô a gema u, a wa sha ikev i mbashiren sule sha tôndo, a yem tar ugen." 
Mark12:2 Shighe kom yô, a tindi ortom hen mbashiren sule mbala er, a̱ za ngohol kwar u atam a wain hen ve." 
Mark12:3 Kpa ve kôr un, ve gbidye, ve na un gbenda aveve." 
Mark12:4 A shi A tindi ortom ugen her a ve. Ugen ne yô, ve gber un ivav sha ityou, ve hee un." 
Mark12:5 Tsô shi a tindi ugen; ngula yô, ve wua je. Shi mbagenev, kpishi kpaa; i gbidye mbagenev, i wua mbagenev." 
Mark12:6 Mase shin un môm, lu wan na u ishima ishima; a mase tindin un her a ve, a kaa er: Wan wam yô, vea wa un iko." 
Mark12:7 Kpa mbashirensule mbala, ve kaa ayol a ve er: Ngun ka u dyako je ne, se wua nen un, dyako a̱ hingir u wase." 
Mark12:8 Ve kôr un, ve wua ve gbihi hen ikpisule i wain la." 
Mark12:9 Nahan ter u sule la una er nana? Una va, una va tim mbashirensule mbala kera, una gema u, una na ior mbagenev." 
Mark12:10 Shin icighanruamabera ne, ne mba a ôr un gaa? er: Iwen i mbamaan venda i, ka i je, i hingir i sha zongo ye;" 
Mark12:11 ka Ter A er kwagh ne ye. Ka kwagh u kpilighyol sha ashe ase. 
Mark12:12 Tsô ve gba keren ian i vea kôr Un, kpa ve lu cian ikpelaior, gadia ve kav er A ôr injakwagh la sha a ve yô. Maa ve undu Un ve yem." 
Mark12:13 Tsô ve tindi mbagenev ken Mbafarishi man Mbaherode her a Na sha u vea kôr Un a ikaazwa yô. 
Mark12:14 Mba ve yô, ve kaa a Na er: Ortesen, se fa U ngu Or u mimi, or môm môm kpaa U cie nan ashe ga; gadia U nengen sha mlu u or er nan lu la ga, kpa ka sha mimi je U tesen gbenda u Aôndo ye. Yô, u tan Shisar kpandegh ka sha mi shinii, ka sha mi ga? Se̱ na shinii, se̱ de ne ga?" 
Mark12:15 Kpa A fa atseregh a ve la, nahan A kaa a ve er: Ka nyi ne karen Mo? Va nam nen sule, M nenge sha mi." 
Mark12:16 Tsô ve va a mi. A pine ve er: Ityough kin man kwaghngeren ne ka u ana? Ve kaa a Na er: Ka u Shisar je. 
Mark12:17 Nahan Yesu kaa a ve er: Yô, na nen Shisar akaa a a lu a Shisar yô, Aôndo di kpaa na nen Un akaa a a lu a Aôndo yô. Kpiligh ve iyol a Na kpishi." 
Mark12:18 Man shi Mbasadushi mba ve kaan er mnder u shin ku ngu ga la, ve va her a Na, ve va pine Un er:" 
Mark12:19 Ortesen, Mose nger se er, aluer anngô u or una kpe, una undu kwase, kpa wan una lu ga yô, anngô u nan la a̱ tôô kwase la a̱ ver anngô na la tse." 
Mark12:20 Yô, ior lu utaankaruhar; ve lu ngô môm; u hiihii la er kwase, kpe, ver tse ga." 
Mark12:21 U sha uhar la kpaa tôô un, shi kpe, ver tse ga; u sha utar la kpaa di nahan." 
Mark12:22 Zan zan ve utaankaruhar cii ve ver tse ga. Ken masejime la, kwase la iyol na kpaa kpe." 
Mark12:23 Tsô sha mnder u vea nder shin ku la yô, kwase la una lu u an ken a ve? Gadia ve utaankaruhar cii ve er un." 
Mark12:24 Yesu kaa a ve er: Kera ka er ne fe icighanruamabera man agee a Aôndo ga, ve ne tsum nahan ye gaa?" 
Mark12:25 Gadia zum u ka a nder shin mbakpenev yô, i kera er kwase ga, man shi i kera na kwase ken nom kpaa ga, kpa ka ve lu er mbatyomov mba Shaav nahan." 
Mark12:26 Man sha kwagh u mbakpenev er á nder a ve yô, ne kera ôr ken takerada u Mose sha kwagh u ageva la, er Aôndo ôr a na, kaa er: Mo m ngu Aôndo u Aberaham man Aôndo u Isaka man Aôndo u Yakob kpaa, gaa?" 
Mark12:27 Un ka Aôndo u mbakpenev ga, kpa ka Aôndo u mbaumav je; ne tsume yum." 
Mark12:28 Tsô ugen ken mbangeren va; ongo er ve lu sendegh kwaghôron ayol a ve man shi fa er Yesu kaa ve imo sha mi vough yô, a va pine Un er: Atindi cii, ka hanmô ker a lu u hiihii?" 
Mark12:29 Yesu kaa er: U hiihii yô, er: Ver ato Iserael, Ter Aôndo wase ka Ter tswen je," 
Mark12:30 man shi Ter Aôndo wou A̱ doo u ishima sha ishima you cii, man sha uma wou cii, man sha mfe wou cii kua sha agee ou cii." 
Mark12:31 U sha uhar yô, er: Or u nan we ndor a we yô, nana̱ doo u ishima er we iyol you nahan. Tindi ugen u a hembe angan, ngu ga." 
Mark12:32 Nahan orngeren la kaa a Na er: Ka sha mi, Ortesen, U kaa vough er U kaa Wer, ngu môm tsô, ugen ngu ga, saa Un tseegh yô." 
Mark12:33 Man shi A̱ doo or ishima sha ishima i nan cii man sha mkav u nan cii man sha agee a nan cii kpaa. Shi or u nan we ndor a nan kpaa, nana̱ doo nan ishima er iyol i nan nahan la, hemba nagh ku sôngon ica je." 
Mark12:34 Er Yesu nenge er a rumun vough nahan yô, A kaa a na er: U ngu ica a tartor u Aôndo ga. Nahan ma or kera cihi u pinen Un kwagh ga." 
Mark12:35 Zum u Yesu lu tesen ken tempel la, A gema A kaa er: Hii nan man mbangeren ve kaan er: Kristu ka Wan u Davidi?" 
Mark12:36 Gadia Davidi iyol na je kaa sha Icighan Jijingi er: Ter kaa a Terem er: Temam ken uwegh ku yanegh zan zan Me gema mbaihomov Ou ve̱ hingir We kwagh u pendan angahar sha mi. 
Mark12:37 Davidi iyol na yilan Un er Ter, man er nan shi A lu Wan Naa? Nahan doo ikpelaior u ungwan Un." 
Mark12:38 Ken ityesen na i A tesen yô, A kaa er: Kura nen ayol a en sha mbangeren, mba i doo ve u zenden a ugôgômbarigav man u ior ve̱ sughun ve sha ityembekasua," 
Mark12:39 man shi mkônom ma injaam ma ken ushinagoge kua ajiir a teman a injaa ken uiniongo hemba doon ve ishima; 
Mark12:40 mba yan uya mba kasev mba côgholov, man eren ugôgômbamsenev sha imanger, ka ve je á hemba nan ve ibo sha ijir ye." 
Mark12:41 Tsô Yesu za tema ken hemen u akwati u inyar. A nenge ikpelaior lu haan inyaregh ken akwati u inyar; mbanyarev mbagenev kpishi va haa inyaregh kpishi. 
Mark12:42 Tsô kwasecôghol u a lu icankwase va, va haa ideri ihiar, ka kobo je la." 
Mark12:43 Nahan A yila mbahenen Nav her a Na, A kaa a ve er: Ka mimi je, M kaan ne ne, kwagh u kwasecôghol u a lu icankwase ne a hee ker ne a hembe kwagh u mbagenev ve lu haan ken akwati u inyar la cii." 
Mark12:44 Gadia mban cii ka ken mngee u ve ngee a akaa man ve hee kimi ye, kpa wen yô, ka ken ibanave na a hee kimi ye, ka kwagh u a lu a mi sha u koson iyol na cii je la." 
Mark13:1 Tsô ngur duen ken tempel yô, ugen ken mbahenen Nav kaa a Na er: Ortesen, nenge ambaawen ne man shi ambaayou ne!" 
Mark13:2 Yesu kaa a na er: U nenge uzegembaayoughouv mban kpa? Iwen i môm tsô kpaa i á de i i̱ lu sha igen ngi ga, á yôhôl a ca ca." 
Mark13:3 Za tem sha uwo u Olev yô, tempel lu Un sha hemen, tsô Peteru man Yakobu man Yohane man Anderia va pine Un ken myer er:" 
Mark13:4 Kera kaa ase se yôô, ka hanma shighe man akaa ne aa ere? man ka nyi ia lu ikav, zum u á kuma u akaa ne aa ere?" 
Mark13:5 Tsô Yesu gba kaan a ve er: Ver nen ishima, ma or nana̱ de tsughun ne ga." 
Mark13:6 Gadia ior kpishi vea va ken iti Yam, vea kaan er: Ka mo, Un je ne! Vea tsugh ior kpishi." 
Mark13:7 Man shi zum u nea ungwa kwagh u utya man igwa i utya kpaa yô, ishima i̱ de nyian ne ga, akaa ne aa er keng, kpa mkur una lu a kuma ga." 
Mark13:8 Gadia ikurior igen ia mough num a ikurior igen, tartor ugen ua mough num a tartor ugen; ityartenger ia lu sha ajiir kposo kposo, ijen ia gba kpaa, akaa ne ka a ka mhii u ican tsô." 
Mark13:9 Kpa ne yô, ver nen asema sha ayol a en, gadia vea na ne ken mbamkohol mba mbaajiriv, man ken ushinagoge, á gbidye ne; né tile sha ishigh ki ugomna man utor sha ci Wam, sha u i̱ lu ve shiada yô." 
Mark13:10 Kpa á vande ôron akuraior cii Loho u Dedoo ne keng. 
Mark13:11 Kpa zum u vea za a ven sha u ôron ne ijir yô, asema a̱ de vanden nyian ne sha kwagh u né za ôr ga. Kpa kwagh u á na ne hen shighe la yô, ka un je né ôr ye; gadia ka ne né ôr kwagh ga, kpa ka Icighan Jijingi je." 
Mark13:12 Or nana na anngô u nan ken ku je; ter kpaa una na wan na; ônov kpaa vea mough num a mbamaren vev, vea wua ve." 
Mark13:13 Ior cii vea kôr ne ihom sha ci u iti Yam. Kpa or u nana taver ishima zan zan mkur yô, ka nan je á yima nan ye." 
Mark13:14 Kpa zum u nea nenge kwaghndôhôrshima u nan mtim la una tile hen ijiir i i doo u ma a til ga yô,—or u ôron kwaghngeren ne nana̱ kav—zum la, mba ve lu ken Yudia, ve̱ nyôngoso ve̱ yem sha iwo." 
Mark13:15 U nan lu sha tor kpaa, nana̱ de hongo nana̱ nyôron ken iyou i nan sha u nana̱ tôô kwagh ga." 
Mark13:16 U nan lu ken ityev kpaa, nana̱ de hidi sha u nana tôô riga u nan ga." 
Mark13:17 Kasev mba lun iyav man shi mbalun a ônov ikum sha ayange la yô, kwagh á tser ve." 
Mark13:18 Er nen msen, kwagh ne a̱ de lu sha shighe u fam ga." 
Mark13:19 Gadia sha ayange la, ican ia lu, imbacan i hii er Aôndo gba tar je zan zan ainge ne i lu a vande eren nahan ga yô, mayange ia kera shi er nahan kpaa ga." 
Mark13:20 Ka er Ter A pande ayange la kera, gayô, ma i yom ma or ga; kpa sha ci u uicuwanmbaiorov mba A tsough ve yô, á pande ayange la kera." 
Mark13:21 Hen shighe la, aluer ma or nana kaa a ven er: Nenge, Kristu ngun, shin ngula keela la, de ne nen jighjigh ga." 
Mark13:22 Gadia Ukristu mba aiev man uprofeti mba aiev kpaa vea mough vea er uivande man akaa a kpilighyol, sha u vea tsugh uicuwanmbaiorov aluer vea fatyô yô." 
Mark13:23 Kpa ne yô, ver nen ishima. Nenge, M tsengaôron ne akaa ne cii, er shighe u a, a lu a kuma ga yô." 
Mark13:24 Kpa sha ayange la, ken masejime u ican la, iyange ia wa ime, uwer kpaa ua kera wanger ga." 
Mark13:25 Asan aa osough sha kwavaôndo, man agee a a sha kwavaôndo la aa tenger." 
Mark13:26 Hen shighe la, á nenge Wan u or Una va sha abeen, a agee a vesen kua iengem." 
Mark13:27 Hen shighe la, Una tindi mbatyomov Nav vea kohol uicuwanmbaiorov Nav sha ahumbe a sha avegher anyiin la, hii shin ikighir i tar zan zan á ar sha ikighir i Sha." 
Mark13:28 Hen nen injakwagh ne sha kon u tur. Zum u gbaa na ka una leghem una hôm ika yô, ne fa je ner, wangernyom mgbôghom ve." 
Mark13:29 Kape ne kpaa, zum u né nenge akaa ne aa eren yô, fa nen ner, a mgbôghom ve, a nangem sha hunda je." 
Mark13:30 Mimi je M kaan ne ne, kov ne ua lu a kar kera ga, saa akaa ne cii aa er ve." 
Mark13:31 Sha man tar vea kar kera, kpa akaaôron a Am yô, aa kar kera ga." 
Mark13:32 Kpa iyange la man ihwa la yô, ma or fa ga, shin mbatyomov mba Shaav shin Wan kpaa ga, saa Ter tseegh." 
Mark13:33 Ver nen ishima, kuran nen, gadia ne fa zum u shighe la una kuma ga." 
Mark13:34 Ka er or u nan yem zende, nan undu ya u nan kera, nan na mbatomov mba nan tahav, hanmô sha tom u nan, shi nan wa orhunda kwagh er a̱ kuran." 
Mark13:35 Nahan yô, kuran nen, gadia ne fa shighe u Orya Una va ga, shin a lu aikigheou, shin a lu atôghatô u utuou, shin a lu sha ikeghtôngonou, shin a lu pepeou," 
Mark13:36 yô, A̱ de kera va bulun ne a bul A̱ kohol ne mnya ga." 
Mark13:37 Kwagh u M kaan ne ne, M ngu kaan ior cii Mer: Kuran nen." 
Mark14:1 Tsô ka shin ayange ahar a iniongo i Paseka kua i bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la, ia kuma yô, upristi mba tamen man mbangeren gba keren ian i vea kôr Un sha atseregh, vea wua Un." 
Mark14:2 Gadia ve kaa er: I̱ de lu sha shighe u iniongo ga, sha er ikpelaior i̱ de moughon ayôôso ga yô." 
Mark14:3 Zum u A lu ken Betani ken ya u Shimon, orimande, tem ngur yan kwagh yô, kwase ugen va a tumugh ku alabasetu u mkurem ma nardu jim, ma sha inyaregh kpishi, a hembe tumugh kura a haa Un mkurem mara sha ityou." 
Mark14:4 Kpa mbagenev asema vihi ve, ve kaa er: Inja na nan man i vihi mkurem man nahana?" 
Mark14:5 Gadia mkurem man kuma u ma i tee ma, ma i yam inyaregh ma i hembe sule deri utar je, ma i ne mbaatsanev; ishima vihi ve a na kpishi." 
Mark14:6 Kpa Yesu kaa er: De nen un; ka nyi ne ze un iyolo? A erem kwagh u dedoo. 
Mark14:7 Gadia ne mba a mbaatsanev a ven imôngo gbem, hanma shighe u i sar ne cii kpaa ne fatyô u eren a ve dedoo; kpa Mo yô, né lu a Mo gbem ga." 
Mark14:8 A er kwagh u a fetyô yô; a hira shighe iyol Yam sha ci u m-ii Wam. 
Mark14:9 Mimi je M kaan ne ne, hanma ijiir i á ôr Loho u Dedoo ne sha won cii yô, kwagh u a er ne kpaa, á ter sha ci umbur un." 
Mark14:10 Tsô Yuda Isekarioti, u a lu u môm ken mba pue kar uhar la, za hen upristi mba tamen sha u una za na Un sha ikev ve yô." 
Mark14:11 Ve kpaa, mba ongo nahan yô, doo ve, man ve tôndo zwa a na er vea na un inyaregh. Wen kpaa, a ker ian i dedoo i una na Un sha ikev ve yô." 
Mark14:12 Sha iyange i hiihii i ayange a bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga la, shighe u ka i sôngo Paseka nahan, mbahenen Nav pine Un er: Ka hanma ijiir i sar U pe se̱ za, se̱ za sôr, Ú za ya Paseka here?" 
Mark14:13 Tsô A tindi uhar ken mbahenen Nav, A kaa a ve er: Za nen ken gar, tsô or nana va kohol ne, nan tôô ityegh ki mngeregh, yô, dondon nen sha a nan." 
Mark14:14 Ape nana za nyôr la yô, kaa nen a orya la ner: Ortesen kaa er: Iyou i Me ya Paseka a mbahenen Av yô, ngi hana?" 
Mark14:15 Tsô una tese ne kpoyou u vesen u sha, a ikav kimi cii; yô, maa sôr nen sha ci wase heregh." 
Mark14:16 Mbahenen mbala za za nyôr ken gar la, za kohol er A kaa ve nahan, tsô ve sôr Paseka." 
Mark14:17 Iyange i been yô, A va a mba pue kar uhar mbala." 
Mark14:18 Tsô mba tem, mba ngur yan kwagh yô, Yesu kaa er: Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, u môm ken ven una nenge mker sha a Mo, ka u nan lu yan kwagh a Mo je." 
Mark14:19 Asema gba vihin ve, ve gba pinen Un môm môm er: Ka mo shinii?" 
Mark14:20 A kaa a ve er: Ka u môm ken mba pue kar uhar mban je, u a lu zan uwegh a Mo shin gbande imôngo ne." 
Mark14:21 Gadia Wan u or ngu zan er i nger sha a Na yô; kpa kwagh á tser or u nan nengen mker sha Wan u or la, ka u ma i mar nan ga la ma i lu nan guda ye." 
Mark14:22 Tsô mba ngur yan yô, a tôô bredi, A sôn iveren i dedoo sha mi A coon, A na ve, A kaa er: Ngohol nen, ngun ka iyol Yam je ne." 
Mark14:23 Shi A tôô iyongo, sughun yô, A na ve; ve cii ve ma shimi." 
Mark14:24 A kaa a va er: Ka awambe Am a ikuryan i he je ne, a i hee a sha ci u ior kpishi." 
Mark14:25 Mimi je M kaan ne ne, mayange me kera ma zar u atam a kon u wain ne ga, zan zan iyange i Me ma u hegh sha tartor u Aôndo." 
Mark14:26 Mba we icam kera yô, ve due, ve za sha uwo u Olev." 
Mark14:27 Tsô Yesu kaa a ve er: Ne cii, á na ne anzughul sha kwagh Wam; gadia i nger er: Me gbidye orkuranilev, ilev cii mbia sambe." 
Mark14:28 Kpa Me nderen shin ku kera yô, Me hemen a ven u zan sha Galilia." 
Mark14:29 Kpa Peteru kaa a Na er: Shin á lu ve cii á na ve anzughul kpaa, mo yô, ze." 
Mark14:30 Yesu kaa a na er: Mimi je M kaan we ne, nyian hen tugh mbun, er ikegh ia lu a tôngo kwa har ga je tsô, ú nyiman kwa tar wer, u fam ga." 
Mark14:31 Kpa a shi a seer suwen er: A lu u m̱ kpe a We imôngo keng kpaa, me nyiman We ga. Kape ve cii kpaa ve kaa la." 
Mark14:32 Tsô ve va hen ijiir igen i i yer er Gesemane la; A kaa a mbahenen Nav er: Hira tema nen heen M̱ za er msen. 
Mark14:33 Tsô A mough a Peteru man Yakobu man Yohane, gba cier Un iyol kpishi, lu yan ican ken ishima kpaa." 
Mark14:34 Tsô A kaa a ve er: Ishima vihim tsung je ar ken ku; tema nen heen, kura nen." 
Mark14:35 Tsô kporom sha hemen kpeghee yô, A gba hen inya, A er msen er, a fetyô yô, shighe la ma a kar Un kera." 
Mark14:36 A kaa er: Aba, Tere! Akaa cii U fa a ityô; tôôm iyongo ne kera, nahan kpaa i̱ de eren sha ishima Yam ga, kpa i̱ er sha ishima You." 
Mark14:37 Tsô A va, A va kohol ve ve lu yaven; A kaa a Peteru er: Shimon, u ngu yavena? Ihwa i môm tsô kpaa u fatyô u kuran gaa?" 
Mark14:38 Kuran nen, eren nen msen, sha er né gba ken imeen ga yô; mimi je, jijingi yô, rumun, kpa iyol yô, ngi a agee ga." 
Mark14:39 A shi A yem a za er msen, A kimbir mkaanem ma ashen la." 
Mark14:40 A shi A hide, A va kohol ve, ve lu yaven, gadia ashe yuhwa ve ikôr; ve kera fa kwagh u vea kaa Un ga." 
Mark14:41 A shi A va mve u sha kwa tar la, A kaa a ve er: Gba yaven nen hegen tsô, mem nen. Kuma ve; shighe va ve; nenge, mba nan Wan u or sha ikev i mbaasorabo." 
Mark14:42 Mough nen sha, se yem nen. Nenge, u a nengen mker sha a Mo la, mgbôghom." 
Mark14:43 Tsô fese je, er lu ôron ave nahan yô, Yuda, u môm ken mba pue kar uhar mbala za va, ikpelaior kpishi lu a na ityô a usanker man agudô, ve due hen upristi mba tamen man mbangeren kua mbatamen." 
Mark14:44 Un u a lu nengen mker sha a Na la vande tesen ve ikav, kaa er: U me suse Un zwa la yô, ka Un je la, kôr nen Un, yem nen a mi doo doo." 
Mark14:45 Va ar heregh yô, fese je a va her a Na, a kaa a Na er: Ortesen! Tsô a gba susen Un zwa." 
Mark14:46 Maa ve shile sha a Na, ve kôr Un." 
Mark14:47 Tsô u môm ken mba ve tile her la, tsuwa sanker na, gber wanakiriki u zegepristi, bugh un togh." 
Mark14:48 Yesu gema kaa a ve er: Ne due a usanker man agudô sha u va kôron Mo, bee er ka or u numun gbenda yôô?" 
Mark14:49 M luun a ven ken tempel ayange ayange, M tesen, kpa ne kôrom ga; kpa ka u icighanruamabera a̱ kure sha mi vough." 
Mark14:50 Ve cii, ve undu Un ve yevese." 
Mark14:51 Wanyekwaor ugen dondo Un ijime cir ikondo iyol, kpa lu ker idyelegh; tsô ve kôr un," 
Mark14:52 kpa a undu ikondo la, a yevese idyelegh." 
Mark14:53 Tsô ve za a Yesu hen zegepristi. Mbatesen mba tamen cii man mbatamen kua mbangeren kpaa, ve kohol imôngo." 
Mark14:54 Kpa Peteru lu dondon Un ken ica zan zan ken atô u tembe u zegepristi la, za tema a udugwer imôngo, gba ôson usu." 
Mark14:55 Upristi mba tamen man mkohol la cii, gba keren ityôkwagh sha Yesu, sha u vea wua Un yô, kpa ve zua a min ga." 
Mark14:56 Gadia ior kpishi wa Un aie iyol, kpa ushiada vev mbala ve lu zwa môm ga." 
Mark14:57 Mbagenev shi mough gba wan Un aie iyol kaan er: 
Mark14:58 Se ungwa A kaa er: Me hembe tempel u i maa un sha ave ne, ayange atar Me shi Me maa ugen u a lu sha ave ga yô." 
Mark14:59 Nahan kpaa shiada ve lu zwa môm ga. 
Mark14:60 Tsô zegepristi mough tile her atô, pine Yesu er: U shi bughun zwa sha kwagh môm je gaa? Ka nyi kwagh man mban ve eren shiada sha a We nahana?" 
Mark14:61 Kpa A huan ving, A bugh zwa sha ma kwagh ga. Zegepristi shi pine Un, kaa a Na er: Ka We, U lu Kristu, Wan u Un u i wuese Un la yee?" 
Mark14:62 Yesu kaa er: Ka Mo Un je ne; man né nenge Wan u or, Una tema ken uwegh ku yanegh ku Ageegh la, Una va a abeen a sha kwavaôndo imôngo." 
Mark14:63 Tsô zegepristi ande akondo a na, kaa er: Ka nyi shi i gbe se a mbashiada?" 
Mark14:64 Ne ungwa ityuhwanev mbin ve; yô, ne nenge nana? Ve cii ve na un ibo er, A kuma ku." 
Mark14:65 Mbagenev hii u tan Un azer, ve yisa Un ishigh, ve ta Un azu, ve kaa a Na er: Tsenga ase ôron! Udugwer kpaa ve ta Un sambe." 
Mark14:66 Yô, Peteru lu ken won ken tembe; tsô wankwase ugen u ken mba ve eren zegepristi tom la, va." 
Mark14:67 Nengen er Peteru a tem a lu ôson usu, nahan yô, a kenger un, a kaa er: We kpaa, u lu a Yesu Ornasareti ne imôngo." 
Mark14:68 Kpa a tuna a kaa er: M fa kwagh u u er ne ga, kaven tsô kpaa m kav ga. Tsô a due sha puadwer." 
Mark14:69 Wankwase la shi nengen a na yô, a shi a gba kaan a mba ve tile her la er: Ngun kpaa ka u ken ve." 
Mark14:70 Kpa a shi a tuna. Ka tem dôghôô yô, mba ve tile her la, ve shi ve kaa a Peteru er: Mimi je, we kpaa, u ngu ken ve, gadia u ngu or u Galilia je." 
Mark14:71 Kpa a gba tuhwan, bumun kpaa er: Mayange m fa Or u ne teren Un ne ga." 
Mark14:72 Fese nahan ikegh maa tôngo i sha kwa har la; tsô Peteru umbur mkaanem ma Yesu kaa un er: Ikegh ia lu a tôngo kwa har ga, tsô ú nyiman kwa tar je wer, u fam ga. Umbur nahan yô, a gba vaan." 
Mark15:1 Fese nahan er sev av yô, upristi mba tamen kua mbatamen man mbangeren kua mkohol u mbaajiriv cii, ve hen imôngo, ve kange Yesu ve yem a Na, ve za na sha ikev i Pilatu." 
Mark15:2 Pilatu pine Un er; U ngu tor u Mbayuda? A gema A kaa a na er: U kaa tsô. 
Mark15:3 Upristi mba tamen sende Un sha akaa kpishi. 
Mark15:4 Pilatu shi pine Un er: U shi bughun zwa sha ma kwagh gaa? Ungwa ase atôakaa kpishi a ve senden We a mi ne. 
Mark15:5 Kpa Yesu kera bugh zwa sha ma kwagh ga, nahan kpiligh Pilatu iyol." 
Mark15:6 Man sha shighe u iniongo yô, a dughun ve orkwar môm u ve sen un yô." 
Mark15:7 Tsô ugen lu, iti na Baraba, a lu uikangen a mbanumuv mbagenev imôngo, mba ve wua or sha num." 
Mark15:8 Ikpelaior gba za zamber a na er, a̱ er a ve sha ier na la." 
Mark15:9 Pilatu gema kaa a ve er: Ka ne pe m̱ pase ne tor u Mbayuda shinii? 
Mark15:10 Gadia a kav er i lu sha iwuhe man upristi mba tamen ve ne Un sha ikev na yô. 
Mark15:11 Kpa upristi mba tamen tor ikpelaior ityô er, guda a̱ pase ve Baraba." 
Mark15:12 Pilatu shi pine ve er: Tsô m̱ er nyi a Or u ne yer Un ner tor u Mbayuda nee? 
Mark15:13 Ve shi ve genger amo er: Mande Un sha terankon! 
Mark15:14 Nahan Pilatu, kaa a ve er: Ka nyi kwaghbo A ere? Kpa ve ger er: I̱ mande Un sha terankon!" 
Mark15:15 Nahan Pilatu, er i lu un ka eren sha asema a ikpelaior yô, a pase ve Baraba; man zum u i gbidye Yesu akpa kera yô, a na Un sha u i̱ za mande Un sha terankon." 
Mark15:16 Tsô mbautyav yem, a Na ken iyou, ka iyoujir je la, ve yila mbautyav cii, va kohol imôngo." 
Mark15:17 Ve haa Un riga u nyian dindee; shi ve tume tsar sha saa ve penda Un sha ityou. 
Mark15:18 Ve gba sughun Un er: Mba sughun We, tor u Mbayuda!" 
Mark15:19 Ve gbidye Un aga sha ityou, ve haa Un azer, ve gure inya ve civir Un sha tar nahan." 
Mark15:20 Mba nahan Un tar cii yô, ve er Un riga u nyian dindee la kera, ve hire ve haa Un akondo a Na. Tsô ve due a Na sha u za manden Un sha terankon." 
Mark15:21 Yô, orgen due ken ikôngo lu karen, iti na er Shimon u Shirene, ter u Alekesander man Rufu, ve kighir un er a̱ tôô terankon Na." 
Mark15:22 Ve va a na hen ijiir igen i i yer er Golgota la, inja na yô er, ijiir i gbôndotyou." 
Mark15:23 Tsô ve na Un wain u i nongo mire sha mi yô, er A̱ ma, kpa A venda." 
Mark15:24 Tsô ve mande Un sha terankon, ve tôô akondo a na ve kar, ve gba eren ishor sha a, sha u fan kwagh u hanma or nana tôô yô." 
Mark15:25 Shighe u i mande Un la, lu ahwa ataankaranyiin atetan." 
Mark15:26 I nger ityôikaa i ijirigh Na la er: Tor u Mbayuda. 
Mark15:27 Shi ve mande mbanumungbenda uhar a na imôngo, u môm ken uwegh Nagh ku yanegh, u môm ken imese." 
Mark15:28 Nahan icighanruamabera u a kaa er: I wa Un ken mbavendan atindi la, kure sha mi vough." 
Mark15:29 Mba ve lu karen her yô, ve ôr akaa a dang sha a Na, ve gba jingir ityouv, kaan er: We u U hembe tempel, shi U maa un ayange atar ne," 
Mark15:30 yima ase iyol You ga! Hungwa sha terankon! 
Mark15:31 Kape upristi mba tamen lu ôron ayol a ve, nahan Un tar, kua mbangeren kpaa, ve lu kaan er, A yima mbagenev, tsô A kera fatyô u yiman iyol Na ga." 
Mark15:32 De, Kristu, Tor u Iserael, A̱ hungwa sha terankon hegen, se̱ nenge, se̱ na jighjigh. Mba i mande ve sha terankon a Na imôngo la kpaa, ve lu nahan Un tar." 
Mark15:33 Iyange i kom sha tembe yô, ime wa tser tar cii zan zan ahwa atar atetan." 
Mark15:34 Tsô sha ahwa atar atetan la, Yesu yila sha imo i taver genger genger er: Eloi, Eloi, Lama Sabatani! Inja na yô, er: Aôndo Wam, Aôndo Wam, ka nyi U undumu?" 
Mark15:35 Mba ve tile her la, mbagenev ken a ve mba ongo nahan yô, ve kaa er: Ungwa, ngu yilan Eliya." 
Mark15:36 U môm kura ayem, za wa kileyongo ken vineger, shindi sha aga u iyia, na Un er A̱ ma, kaa er: De tsô, se nenge nen shin Eliya una va hungwa Unou?" 
Mark15:37 Kpa Yesu yila sha imo i taver genger genger maa A sule. 
Mark15:38 Tsô ikondo i yisan i ken tempel la pav hii sha je, mande shin inya." 
Mark15:39 Tsô torutya u a tile her sha ishigh Nagh la, nengen er A sur nahan yô, a kaa er: Mimi je, Or ne lu Wan u Aôndo." 
Mark15:40 Kasev mbagenev kpaa tile ken ica lu kenger; ken ve yô, lu Maria Magedalena man Maria ngô u Yakobu u kiriki kua Yose, man Salome kpaa." 
Mark15:41 Ka ve mba ve dondo Un, ve wasen Un zum u A lu ken Galilia la; man shi kasev mbagenev kpishi kpaa mba ve va a Na sha Yerusalem imôngo la, ve lu her." 
Mark15:42 Iyange i bee, tsô er i lu shighe u wan ago iyol yô, inja na yô, kper á lu iyange i memen" 
Mark15:43 Yosev u Arimatia, orjir u mimi, u wen iyol na kpaa lu keghen tartor u Aôndo la va hen Pilatu vangertiôr je, va sôn er, i̱ na un ikom i Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Kpiligh Pilatu iyol er A kpe fefa yum nahan yô; a yila torutya la, a pine un, shin A kpe anshighe karou?" 
Mark15:45 Zough a imo hen torutya la yô, a na Yosev ikom la." 
Mark15:46 Tsô a yam ikondo, hongo a Na yô, a cir Un i iyol, a ii Un ken uwar u i time ken vande; tsô a menger iwen a cir sha hunda u uwaregh la." 
Mark15:47 Maria Magedalena man Maria ngô u Yosev, ve nenge ijiir i i ii Un her la." 
Mark16:1 Tsô iyange i memen kar kera yô, Maria Magedalena man Maria ngô u Yakobu, kua Salome kpaa, ve yam icimbiv mbi human doon sha u vea za shighe Un yô." 
Mark16:2 Pepe pepe sha iyange i Lahadi la, ve va hen uwar la, er iyange ka i due nahan." 
Mark16:3 Tsô ve gba kaan ayol a ve er: Ka anti nana menger se iwen i sha hunda u uwaregh la keraou? 
Mark16:4 Mba kenden ashe yô, ve nenge i vande menger iwen la kera ve, gadia i gba ikôl tsô." 
Mark16:5 Mba nyer ken uwar la yô, ve nenge wanyekwaor tema ken uwegh ku yanegh, haa gôgôriga u pupuu; cier ve iyol." 
Mark16:6 Kpa a kaa a ve er: I̱ de kera cier ne iyol ga; ne mba keren Yesu u Nasareti, u i mande Un sha terankon. A nder, ngu heen ga; nenge nen henpe i ver Un la." 
Mark16:7 Kpa za, za kaa nen mbahenen Nav man Peteru ner: Ngu hemen a ven u zan sha Galilia, ka keela né za nenge a Na ye, er lu kaa ne nahan." 
Mark16:8 Tsô ve due ken uwar la fefa, ve gba yemen ayem, gadia ikarikase lu gbidyen ve iyol, cier ve iyol kpishi kpaa, ve ôr ma or kwagh ga, sha ci u ve lu cian yô." 
Mark16:9 Er a nder shin ku pepe pepe sha iyange i lahadi la yô, A hii anden hen Maria Magedalena, un u yan A dugh ujijingi mba bov ken a na utaankaruhar la." 
Mark16:10 Tsô un yem za kaa mba yan ve lu a Na imôngo la; asema lu vihin ve, ve lu vaan." 
Mark16:11 Ve yô, er ve ungwa er ngu uma, un nenge a Na kpaa, ve na jighjigh ga." 
Mark16:12 Ken masejime u akaa ne yô, A ande sha mlu u iyol igen hen ior uhar ken ve, zum u ve lu zan sha gbenda u ken iningirtar la." 
Mark16:13 Mbala kpaa yem, za kaa mbagenev; ve di kpaa ve na ve jighjigh ga." 
Mark16:14 Ken masejime la, A ande hen mba pue kar môm zum u ve tema ve lu yan kwagh la, A zôhô a ve sha ci u mban u jighjigh ve u nan man asema ve a cighir, sha ci u ve ne mba ve nenge a Na zum u Un nder shin ku la jighjigh ga yô." 
Mark16:15 A kaa a ve er: Zende nen sha won cii, za ôr nen uumace cii Loho u dedoo ne." 
Mark16:16 U nana na jighjigh man á er nan batisema yô, á yima nan. Kpa u nana na jighjigh ga yô, á ôr nan ijir á na nan ibo." 
Mark16:17 Uivande mban kpaa vea zaan a mbananjighjigh ityô; ken iti Yam je, vea dugh ujijingi mba bov, man shi vea ôr kwagh ken ijô i he kpaa;" 
Mark16:18 vea tôô iyô, shin vea ma nyityô boci kpaa, una er ve kwagh mayange ga; vea penda ave sha mbalun dedoo ga, vea war kpaa." 
Mark16:19 Tsô zum u Ter er ve kwagh kera yô, i yem a Na Sha, A za tema ken uwegh ku yanegh ku Aôndo." 
Mark16:20 Ve kpaa ve yem, ve gba za ôron kwaghaôndo sha won cii; Ter kpaa lu eren tom a ve imôngo, lu taver kwaghôron ve sha uivande mba ve ze a ve ityô la." 
Luke1:1 Ior kpishi ver ishima ve nger akaa a i er a hen vese i kure a la," 
Luke1:2 er mba ve lu nengen Imo la sha ashe a ve sha hiihii je shi ve lu eren Un tom kpaa yô, ve na se a la," 
Luke1:3 nahan mo kpaa er m time sha akaa la cii doo doo, hii sha mhii u a zan zan, je yô, m nenge doo u me nger u a sha inja sha inja sha adondo adondo, we Teofilu ormimi," 
Luke1:4 sha u ú fa mimi u akaa a i ôr u la yô. 
Luke1:5 Sha ayange a Herode, tor u Yudia la, pristi ugen lu, iti na er Sekaria, u ken nongo u Abiya; lu a kwase, lu wan u ken ônov mba Aron, iti na er Elisabetu." 
Luke1:6 Ve uhar cii ve lu mbaperapera sha ishigh ki Aôndo, ve kuran atindi a Ter kua akaawan a Na cii ve lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga." 
Luke1:7 Kpa ve lu a wan ga, sha ci u Elisabetu lu ikômkwase; ve uhar cii, ayange kar ve sha won kpishi." 
Luke1:8 Tsô zum u a lu ken tom na u pristi sha ishigh ki Aôndo sha shighe u nongo na la yô," 
Luke1:9 ishor gba sha a na sha ieren i tom u pristi er a̱ nyôr ken tempel u Ter, a̱ nande nagh ku human doon." 
Luke1:10 Ikpelaior i nongo la cii lu eren msen ken won sha shighe u nanden nagh ku human doon la. 
Luke1:11 Tsô ortyom u Ter va ande hen na, tile ken uwegh ku yanegh ku atse a nanden nagh ku human doon sha mi la." 
Luke1:12 Sekaria nengen a na yô, ishima ta un kwe, mciem gba un iyol kpaa." 
Luke1:13 Kpa ortyom la kaa a na er: De cie ga, Sekaria, gadia i ungwa msen wou; kwase wou, Elisabetu, kpaa una mar u wannomso, ú ii un iti wer Yohane." 
Luke1:14 Ú zua a iember á saan we iyol kpaa; ior kpishi vea ember sha mmar na. 
Luke1:15 Gadia una lu zegeor sha ishigh ki Ter; una tswer wain kua msôrom kpaa, una iv a Icighan Jijingi er una lu ngô na ken uya je." 
Luke1:16 Man una gema ior kpishi ken Mbaiserael una va a ve hen Ter Aôndo ve. 
Luke1:17 Una za Un sha ishi a jijingi u Eliya man agee a na, sha u una gema asema a uter a̱ hide hen uôn, man una gema mbahembanato sha mfe u mbaperapera, sha u una sôr Ter nongo u i vande veren u a ver je." 
Luke1:18 Tsô Sekaria kaa a ortyom la er: Ka sha nyi man me fa kwagh nee? Gadia mo m bee iyol, kwase wam kpaa za gigh ve." 
Luke1:19 Ortyom la gema kaa a na er: Ka mo Gaberiel u m til sha ishigh ki Aôndo ne; i tindim er m̱ va ôr u kwagh, m̱ va u a loho u dedoo sha akaa ne." 
Luke1:20 Nenge, huan you ving, ú kera fatyô u ôron kwagh ga, zan zan iyange i akaa angan aa va er la, sha ci u u ne akaaôron am a aa va er sha shighe u a la, jighjigh ga yô." 
Luke1:21 Ikpelaior lu her, lu keghen Sekaria, lu kpiligh ve iyol er a ngôôr ken tempel yum nahan yô," 
Luke1:22 kpa dugh ken won yô, a kera fatyô u lamen a ve ga; nahan ve kav er a nenge a ma kwagh ken tempel yô. Lu ôron kwagh a ve sha ave, a kondo iker." 
Luke1:23 Tsô ayange a tom na la nga been yô, a hire a yem ken ya na." 
Luke1:24 Ayange ne nga kar kera yô, kwase na Elisabetu jile iyol, yer iyol na iwer itian, lu kaan er:" 
Luke1:25 Kape Ter a er a mo sha ayange a A nenge sha a mo sha u Una beem ilyahan hen ior yô. 
Luke1:26 Tsô sha uwer u sha ataratar la Aôndo tindi Gaberiel, ortyom, hen gar ugen ken Galilia, iti na er Nasareti," 
Luke1:27 hen iniunkwase i or lu sôôr a sôôr i; iti i or la er Yosev, u ken tsombor u Davidi; iti i iniunkwase la yô, er Maria." 
Luke1:28 Ortyom la va nyer her a na yô, kaa er: Mba sughun we, we u i rumun we sha mhôôn tsung ne, Ter ngu a we." 
Luke1:29 Ishima ta un kwe kpishi sha kwaghôron la, a gba henen ken ishima er, shin ka nyi inja ishughun neou?" 
Luke1:30 Ortyom la kaa a na er: De cie ga, Maria, gadia u zua a mrumun u sha mhôôn her Aôndo." 
Luke1:31 Nenge, ú va wa iyav, ú mar wan u nomso, ú ii Un iti wer Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Un, Una lu Zegeor, á yilan Un er Wan u Uhembansha; Ter Aôndo kpaa Una na Un ikônough ki torough ki Ter Na Davidi." 
Luke1:33 Una lu tor ken ya u Yakob gbem sha won; tartor Na kpaa ua bee mayange ga. 
Luke1:34 Tsô Maria kaa a ortyom la er: Á er nan man kwagh ne una ere, gadia m ngu a fa nom ga?" 
Luke1:35 Ortyom la gema kaa a na er: Icighan Jijingi Una sen sha a we, man agee a Uhembansha la kpaa aa kase u; ka sha ci u nahan man Un u á mar Un la á yilan Un er Icighanwan u Aôndo ye." 
Luke1:36 Nenge, Elisabetu, anmgbian wou, er a bee iyol nahan kpaa, ngu iyav, ka uwer na u sha ataratar je ne, un u ngise i yilan un er ikômkwase la." 
Luke1:37 Gadia ma kwagh môm u a hembe Aôndo u eren un yô, ngu ga." 
Luke1:38 Tsô Maria kaa er; Nenge, mo kpankwase u Ter, m ngun; i̱ erem sha mkaanem ou. Tsô ortyom la undu un." 
Luke1:39 Tsô ken ayange la Maria mough yem zende ken tar u iwoogh, hen gar u Yuda ugen." 
Luke1:40 A za nyôr ken ya u Sekaria a sugh Elisabetu. 
Luke1:41 Er Elisabetu ungwa ishughun i Maria nahan yô, wan tsuwe un ken uya; tsô Elisabetu iv a Icighan Jijingi," 
Luke1:42 a genger imo taver taver er: I̱ wuese we ken ukase cii, Wan u ú va mar Un la kpaa i̱ wuese Un." 
Luke1:43 Man er nan man i lu mo ngô u Terem a ve hen mo? 
Luke1:44 Gadia er imo i ishughun you i nyerem ken ato la je, wan tsuwem ken uya sha m-ember." 
Luke1:45 Saan un u a ne jighjigh la, iyol, gadia kwagh u Ter kaa un la, á va er sha mi vough." 
Luke1:46 Tsô Maria kaa er: Ishima yam ngi wuese Ter kpishi," 
Luke1:47 jijingi wam kpaa ngu ember ken Aôndo, Oryiman wam." 
Luke1:48 Gadia A nenge sha mlu u icivirigh ga u kpankwase Na la, hii hegen je zan zan ikov cii ia wuese msaanyol wam;" 
Luke1:49 gadia Wen u A lu u ageegh la A erem akaa a vesen je. Iti Na kpaa ka icighanti. 
Luke1:50 Mhôônom Nam ma zungwen kpaa ma sha mba ve cie Un la, sha ikov ikov zan zan." 
Luke1:51 A er tom u ageegh sha uwegh Nagh; mba ve gengese iyol sha mhen u ken asema a ve la, A sambe ve kera." 
Luke1:52 A dugh mbaageev sha ukwav vev kera, A kende mba ve gengese iyol ga la, sha," 
Luke1:53 A iv mbagenev a akaa a dedoo; A na mbanyarev gbenda ave gbilin; 
Luke1:54 A wase wanakiriki Na, Iserael, gadia A umbur mhôônom Nam ma zungwen." 
Luke1:55 Er lu kaa uter asev nahan a Aberaham man tsombor na kpaa, gbem sha won." 
Luke1:56 Tsô Maria tsa her a na er iwer itiar nahan, man a hide hen ya na ye." 
Luke1:57 Tsô shighe kom u Elisabetu una mar yô, maa a mar wannomso." 
Luke1:58 Mba ve wa ndor a na man anmgbianev nav ungwa er Ter A zungu un mhôônom kpishi nahan ve ember a na imôngo. 
Luke1:59 Tsô ka kom sha iyange i sha anigheni yô, ve va sha u va tsôngon wan la; lu ve ka yilan un iti er, Sekaria, sha iti i ter na la." 
Luke1:60 Kpa ngô na gema kaa er: Ei, nahan ga, á yila un iti er, Yohane." 
Luke1:61 Tsô ve kaa a na er: Ken anmgbianev ou cii ma or ngu u i yer nan sha iti ne ga. 
Luke1:62 Nahan ve ôr kwagh a ter na sha ave, ve pine un er i lu un pe i̱ yilan un yô." 
Luke1:63 Tsô a sôn kpande u ngeren, a nger er: Iti na er, Yohane. Ve cii kpiligh ve iyol." 
Luke1:64 Fese nahan zwa na bugh, nombor na kpaa sagh; a ôr kwagh a gba wuese Aôndo." 
Luke1:65 Tsô mciem gba ior mba ve wa ndor a ve la cii iyol; ve gba ôron kwagh u akaa angan ken tar u iwoogh u Yudia la cii. 
Luke1:66 Mba ve ungwa cii ve koso a ken ishima, ve gba kaan er: Wan ne una va lu nan kangev kangeva? Gadia uwegh ku Ter lu sha a na." 
Luke1:67 Ter na, Sekaria kpaa iv a Icighan Jijingi, gba ôron kwaghôron u profeti kaan er:" 
Luke1:68 I̱ wuese Ter Aôndo u Iserael; gadia A va sôr nongo Na, A paa u kpaa." 
Luke1:69 A tim se korough ku myom ken ya u wanakiriki Na Davidi," 
Luke1:70 er A ôr sha ikev i uicighanmbaprofeti Nav mba tsuaa la," 
Luke1:71 sha u yiman se sha ikev i mbaihomov asev, man sha uwegh ku mba ve ker se ihom la cii." 
Luke1:72 Lu sha u zungwen uter asev mhôônom, man shi u umbur icighanikuryan Na kpaa;" 
Luke1:73 ka mbum u A bum a Aberaham ter wase la," 
Luke1:74 er Una na á yima se sha uwegh ku mbaihomov kera, man sé civir Un a mciem iyol ga ye," 
Luke1:75 sha wang man sha perapera sha ishigh Nagh sha ayange a uma wase cii. 
Luke1:76 Man we, wan á yilan we er profeti u Uhembansha; gadia ú zaan Ter sha hemen sha u sôron Un gbenda," 
Luke1:77 man shi sha u nan nongo Na kwaghfan sha u fan myom u sha mde u á de ve asorabo a ve yô," 
Luke1:78 sha mhôônom ma zungwen tsung ma Aôndo wase la; ka sha ma man sev mbu aven Sha la mbua va hen vese ye," 
Luke1:79 sha u tan sha mba ve tem ken ime man ken mure u kuugh la kpaa, man shi sha u kôôm angahar ase zan a mi sha gbenda u bem kpaa." 
Luke1:80 Wan la vese man taver a taver ken Jijingi; lu ken taaikôngo zan zan sha iyange i i ver un ken igbar sha ishigh ki Iserael la. 
Luke2:1 Tsô sha ayange la tindi due hen Shisar Agusetu er i̱ nger ior mba ve lu sha won cii. 
Luke2:2 Ngun ka mnger u hiihii u sha shighe u Shiriniu lu gomna u Shiria la. 
Luke2:3 Ior cii za sha u i̱ za nger ve, hanma or nan za hen gar u nan." 
Luke2:4 Yosev kpaa mough ken Galilia ken gar u Nasareti, za hen Yudia hen gar u Davidi u i yilan er Betelehem la, sha ci u un lu u ken ya u Davidi man tsombor na kpaa." 
Luke2:5 A za sha u i̱ za nger un, kua Maria, kwase na u un sôôr a sôôr, lu iyav la." 
Luke2:6 Er ve lu keela je, tsô shighe kuma u una mar;" 
Luke2:7 a maa a mar Wan na u iunda u nomso, a wa Un ken akondo man a gbir Un shin anar u haan ilev kwaghyan la, gadia ijiir i tsan ken iyou i mbavannya yina ve." 
Luke2:8 Mbakuranilev lu ken tar la, ve tsaan ken toho, ve kuran ilev vev tugh." 
Luke2:9 Tsô ortyom u Ter va tile hen ve, man iengem i Ter mondo kase ve, tsô mciem gba ve iyol kpishi." 
Luke2:10 Kpa ortyom la kaa a ve er: De cie nen ga, gadia m va ne a loho u dedoo u iember i vesen u ua lu sha ci u ior cii;" 
Luke2:11 gadia i mar ne Oryiman ken gar u Davidi nyian, ka Kristu Ter je la." 
Luke2:12 Man kwagh u una lu ne ikav yô, né za zua a Wanikundan u i we Un ken akondo i gbir Un shin anar u haan ilev kwaghyan." 
Luke2:13 Fese nahan ikumior i Sha va kohol ortyom la, ve gba wuese Aôndo, kaan er:" 
Luke2:14 I̱ wuese Aôndo Sha, shin tar yô, bem a̱ lu sha ior mba i doon Un a ve la." 
Luke2:15 Tsô mbatyomov mba undun ve, mba yemen Sha yô, mbakuranilev kaa ayol a ve er: Se za nen ken Betelehem, se za nenge nen kwagh u a er man Ter A pase se ne." 
Luke2:16 Nahan ve mough fefa, ve za kohol Maria man Yosev, man Wanikundan la kpaa, lu yaven shin anar u haan ilev kwaghyan." 
Luke2:17 Mba nengen nahan yô, ve pase ior mkaanem ma i er ve sha Wan la." 
Luke2:18 Mba ve ungwa cii, kpiligh ve iyol sha akaa a mbakuranilev ve er ve la." 
Luke2:19 Kpa Maria koso akaa ne cii, lu a mi ken ishima lu henen sha mi." 
Luke2:20 Mbakuranilev mbala hire, gba civir Aôndo, wuese Un, sha ci u akaa a ve ongo man ve nenge la cii lu er i kaa ve nahan vough." 
Luke2:21 Tsô ayange anigheni nga kom sha u á tsôngo Un yô, i ii Un iti er Yesu, i ortyom u Sha vande kaan je, er i lu a jile Un ken uya ga la." 
Luke2:22 Tsô ayange a mwanger u á wanger ve la nga kom sha tindi u Mose yô, ve za a Na sha Yerusalem sha u vea za na Un sha ikev i Ter yô," 
Luke2:23 er i nger ken tindi u Ter er: Hanma wannomso u iunda á yilan er icighankwagh u Ter," 
Luke2:24 man sha u vea za na nagh kpaa, er i kaa ken tindi u Ter er, mbaatii uhar, shin utulembamkunguv uhar yô." 
Luke2:25 Orgen lu ken Yerusalem, iti na er Shimeon; or la lu or u perapera man u cian Aôndo a ishima i môm, lu keghen msurshima u Iserael; Icighan Jijingi kpaa lu sha a na." 
Luke2:26 Icighan Jijingi lu pase un er una kpe ve ga saa una vande nengen Kristu u Ter ve. 
Luke2:27 Jijingi hemen un, a nyôr ken tempel man zum u mbamaren va nyôr a Wan ve Yesu sha u vea er a Na sha ieren i tindi yô," 
Luke2:28 A ngohol Un sha ave na, a gba wuese Aôndo kaan er:" 
Luke2:29 Hegen yô, Tere, de wanakiriki Wou a̱ yem bem, bem sha mkaanem Ou;" 
Luke2:30 Gadia ashe am nenge a myom Wou 
Luke2:31 u U ser sha ishigh ki akuraior cii la ve; 
Luke2:32 ka iwanger i á pase i hen atôatyev, man ka iengem i nongo Wou Iserael kpaa." 
Luke2:33 Kpiligh ter Na man ngô Na iyol sha akaa a i er sha a Na la. 
Luke2:34 Tsô Shimeon ver ve doo doo, shi a kaa a ngô Na, Maria, er: Wan ne yô, i ver Un sha ci u mgbe man mmough u ior kpishi ken Iserael, man shi sha ci u ikav i á nyiman i yô" 
Luke2:35 (we kpaa, sanker una sôô u ken ishima), sha u mbamhen mba ken asema kpishi vea due ken igbar yô." 
Luke2:36 Shi Ana kpaa lu her, lu profeti u kwase, lu wan u Fanuel u ken tsombor u Asher; un kpaa ayange kar un sha won kpishi, er a hia yô, a lu a nom anyom ataankarahar," 
Luke2:37 gema lu kwasecôghol, anyom a na cii yô, lu akunduanyiin kar anyiin, undun tempel ga, civir Aôndo sha kwaghyan u hôron man msen u eren tugh man tetan." 
Luke2:38 Un kpaa, er a va nôôr hen shighe la yô, a sugh Aôndo shi a ôr kwagh Na a mba ve lu keghen mpaa u Yerusalem la cii." 
Luke2:39 Mba kur akaa a sha tindi u Ter cii yô, ve hide ken Galilia ve va hen gar ve Nasareti." 
Luke2:40 Wan la vese, taver agee, A iv a mfe; man mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo lu sha a Na." 
Luke2:41 Mba ve mar Un la yô, hanma inyom ve zaan ken Yerusalem sha iniongo i Paseka." 
Luke2:42 Anyom a Na nga kom pue kar ahar yô, ve kôndo sha Yerusalem sha ieren i iniongo." 
Luke2:43 Ayange a iniongo la nga been, mba ngur hiren yô, Yesu Wanakiriki la, lu ken Yerusalem heregh, kpa mbamaren Un fa ga." 
Luke2:44 Kpa ve lu henen er, ngu ken ikpelaior, nahan ve yem zan zan zende u sha iyange i môm, ve gba za keren Un hen anmgbianev vev man hen mba ve fe ve yô;" 
Luke2:45 mba zough a Na ga yô, ve hide ken Yerusalem, ve gba keren Un." 
Luke2:46 Tsô ayange nga kar atar yô, ve va kohol Un ken tempel, A tema her atô u mbatesen, lu ungwan ve, man shi lu pinen ve akaa." 
Luke2:47 Mba ve lu ungwan Un cii, kpiligh ve iyol sha mkav Na man sha mbamrumun Nav kpaa." 
Luke2:48 Mba nengen a Na yô, kpiligh ve iyol; tsô ngô Na kaa a Na er: Wana, ka nyi U er a vese nahana? Nenge, teru man mo, se lu keren We a ishima i nyian je." 
Luke2:49 Kpa A gema A kaa a ve er: Er nan man ne keren Mo? Ne kera fa er i lu u Me lu ken akaa a Terem keng gaa? 
Luke2:50 Kpa ve kav mkaanem ma A kaa a ve la ga. 
Luke2:51 Tsô A yem a ve, A va ken Nasareti, A lu ungwan imo ve. Ngô Na kpaa koso mkaanem man cii ken ishima na." 
Luke2:52 Yesu kpaa lu yemen hemen hemen sha mfe man ivesen, man Aôndo rumun Un, ior kpaa rumun Un." 
Luke3:1 Tsô ken inyom i sha pue kar utaan u Shisar Tiberiu lu tor, er Pontiu Pilatu lu gomna sha Yudia, Herode gema lu tor u tetera sha Galilia, man anngô na, Filibu, lu di tor u tetera sha Ituria man sha tar u Terakoniti, man Lisania kpaa lu di tor u tetera sha Abilene," 
Luke3:2 sha ayange a Ana man Kayafa lu uzegembaupristi la yô, mkaanem ma Aôndo va hen Yohane, wan u Sekaria, ken taaikôngo." 
Luke3:3 A va ken iningir i tar u ifi u Yordan cii, lu pasen kwagh u batisema u mgemshima sha u den asorabo;" 
Luke3:4 er i nger ken takerada u akaaôron a profeti Yesaia er: Imo i or u yilan ken taaikôngo er: Sôr nen gbenda u Ter kôôm nen gbenda Na jighilaa. 
Luke3:5 Á cir hanma pev, hanma uwo man igungu kpaa á sambe ve, uihurenmbaigbendav vea hingir nôô, igbenda i i lu agbee agbee la ia hingir vaanaa." 
Luke3:6 Man uumace cii vea nenge a myom u Aôndo. 
Luke3:7 Tsô a kaa a ikpelaior i i due sha u a̱ er ve batisema la er: Ne ônov mba igbindev mban, ka anti man nan we ne kwagh er, ne̱ yevese iyugh i i lu van la ase?" 
Luke3:8 Nahan yô, ume nen ase atam a a kom mgemshima yô. De kera gbe kaan ayol a en ner: Se mba a ter wase Aberaham ga, gadia m ngu kaan ne mer, awen ne je kpaa Aôndo Una fatyô u geman a hingir ônov mba Aberaham." 
Luke3:9 Ahegen kpaa i ver ijembe hen misekon; hanma kon u u um atam a injaa ga yô, á gber u kera, á kende ken usu." 
Luke3:10 Nahan ikpelaior gema pine un er: Tsô sé er nana? 
Luke3:11 A gema a kaa a ve er: U nan lu a uriga uhar yô, nana̱ pande nana na u a lu a mi ga la; U nan lu a kwaghyan kpaa kape nana̱ er la." 
Luke3:12 Mbangoholkpandegh kpaa va, sha u i̱ er ve batisema; ve pine un er: Ortesen se yô, se̱ er nana?" 
Luke3:13 A kaa a ve er: De ngohol nen kwagh i̱ hemban kwagh u i we ne la inya ga. 
Luke3:14 Mbautyav kpaa pine un er: Man se yô, se̱ er nana? A kaa a ve er: De gbe eren nen ma or ican gbilin ga, shi de ngohol nen ma or kwagh sha apera ga; injar i i ne ne la i̱ kuma ne." 
Luke3:15 Tsô nongo la cii lu veren ashe, lu henen ken asema a ve sha kwagh u Yohane er: Shin ka Kristu je neou?" 
Luke3:16 Nahan Yohane gema kaa a ve cii er: Mo yô, M ngu eren ne batisema sha mnger, kpa u A hembem agee ngu van, u mo m kom u saghen kwange u akôvangahar a Na ga; Wen yô, Una er ne batisema sha Icighan Jijingi man sha usu kpaa." 
Luke3:17 Tser ngu sha uwegh Nagh, Una ese vande Na tsembelee, Una kohol uwua Na Una za ombo sha una Na; kpa akoo yô, Una nande sha usu u pirin mayange ga." 
Luke3:18 Nahan a ôr ior Loho u Dedoo sha akaawan agen kpishi kpaa. 
Luke3:19 Kpa er a yange Herode u tetera sha kwagh u Herodia, kwase u anngô na Filibu, man shi sha akaa a dang agen a a lu eren la yô," 
Luke3:20 Herode mase seer kwagh ne sha akaa la, a wuhe Yohane ken gaadi." 
Luke3:21 Tsô mba eren ior batisema cii, mba been yô, Yesu kpaa i er Un batisema; ngur eren msen yô, i bugh Sha," 
Luke3:22 man Icighan Jijingi sen sha a Na sha inja i iyolough er ikungugh nahan; imo kpaa due Sha kaa er: We, U ngu Wan Wam u ishima ishima; ka We ishima i doom a We yum ye." 
Luke3:23 Man Yesu iyol Na, zum u A hii u tesen yô, anyom a Na kuma er ikundugber nahan; man i lu henen er Un ka wan u Yosev, wan u Heli," 
Luke3:24 wan u Matati, wan u Levi, wan u Melki, wan u Yani, wan u Yosev," 
Luke3:25 wan u Matatia, wan u Amoshi, wan u Nahum, wan u Eseli, wan u Nagai," 
Luke3:26 wan u Maati, wan u Matatia, wan u Semein, wan u Yoseki, wan u Yoda," 
Luke3:27 wan u Yoanan, wan u Resa, wan u Serubabel, wan u Shealtiel, wan u Neri," 
Luke3:28 wan u Melki, wan u Adi, wan u Kosam, wan u Elmadam, wan u Er," 
Luke3:29 wan u Yosua, wan u Elieser, wan u Yorim, wan u Matati, wan u Levi," 
Luke3:30 wan u Shimeon, wan u Yuda, wan u Yosev, wan u Yonan wan u Eliakim," 
Luke3:31 wan u Melea, wan u Mena, wan u Matati, wan u Natan, wan u Davidi," 
Luke3:32 wan u Yese, wan u Obedi, wan u Boashi, wan u Salmon, wan u Nashon," 
Luke3:33 wan u Aminadabi, wan u Ademini, wan u Arni, wan u Heseron, wan u Pereshi, wan u Isaka, wan u Ademini, wan u Pereshi, wan u Yuda," 
Luke3:34 wan u Yakob, wan u Isaka, wan u Aberaham, wan u Tera, wan u Nahor," 
Luke3:35 wan u Serugi, wan u Reu, wan u Pelegi, wan u Eber, wan u Shela," 
Luke3:36 wan u Kainan, wan u Arpakasadi, wan u Shem, wan u Noa, wan u Lameki," 
Luke3:37 wan u Metusela, wan u Enoki, wan u Yaredi, wan u Mehalalel, wan u Kainan," 
Luke3:38 wan u Enoshi, wan u Setu, wan u Adam, wan u Aôndo." 
Luke4:1 Yesu kpaa, iv a Icighan Jijingi, A mough hen Yordan, A hide; tsô Icighan Jijingi yem a Na ken taaikôngo," 
Luke4:2 tsa keregh ayange akunduahar, diabolo lu meen Un; sha ayange la cii ya kwagh ga. Ayange la nga kar kera yô, ijen kôr Un." 
Luke4:3 Tsô diabolo kaa a Na er: Aluer Wea lu Wan u Aôndo je yô, kaa iwen ne i̱ hingir bredi." 
Luke4:4 Kpa Yesu gema kaa a na er: I nger er: Ka sha bredi tseegh or á lu uma ga. 
Luke4:5 Shi a yem a Na sha ijiir i taven sha a tese Un ityartor i sha won cii fese. 
Luke4:6 Tsô diabolo kaa a Na er: Me na U tahav mbun cii kua icivir i mbu kpaa gadia i nam mbu sha ikev; ka m na hanma or u i lum pe nan nan yô. 
Luke4:7 Aluer Wea gure inya Wea civir mo yô, á hingir kwagh Wou cii." 
Luke4:8 Kpa Yesu gema kaa a na er: I nger er: Civir Ter Aôndo wou, ka Un tseegh er Un tom ye." 
Luke4:9 Tsô a yem a Na ken Yerusalem a za ver Un sha ityough ki tempel, a kaa a Na er: Aluer Wea lu Wan u Aôndo je yô, henpe U til ne, gba ase iyol You shin inya," 
Luke4:10 gadia i nger er: Una wa mbatyomov Nav kwagh sha a We, ve̱ kura U dedoo," 
Luke4:11 man shi: Vea kôr U sha ave ve sha u U̱ de te nguhar sha iwen ga yô. 
Luke4:12 Kpa Yesu gema kaa a na er: I kaa er: De karen Ter, Aôndo wou, ga." 
Luke4:13 Zum u diabolo bee ameen cii yô, a mough hen a Na kera er saa shighe ugen." 
Luke4:14 Nahan Yesu hire hen Galilia ken agee a Jijingi, man gwa Na samber ken iningirtar la cii." 
Luke4:15 A lu tesen ken ushinagoge vev man ior cii lu wuese Un. 
Luke4:16 Tsô A va ken Nasareti henpe i yese Un la. A nyôr ken shinagoge sha ieren Na sha iyange i memen; A mough A tile sha sha u Una ôr Icighanruamabera. 
Luke4:17 Mba ne Un Ruamabera u profeti Yesaia yô, A bugh, A zua a ijiir i i nger er:" 
Luke4:18 Jijingi u Ter ngu sha a Mo, sha ci u A shighem mkurem, A tindim er M̱ yôô Loho u Dedoo hen mbaatsanev," 
Luke4:19 M̱ yôô, i̱ pase mbakwarev, i̱ tuhwa, i̱ bugh mbaapirashe ashe, man M̱ pase mba i nzughul a ve ve gbe caver yô, M̱ tuhwa, shi M̱ yôô inyom i erdoo u Ter." 
Luke4:20 Tsô A hure Ruamabera, A gema A na ortom la, A hire A tema inya. Mba ken shinagoge cii ve haa ashe sha a Na." 
Luke4:21 A gba kaan a ve er: Nyian i kure icighanruamabera ne ken ato a en ve. 
Luke4:22 Tsô ve cii ve wuese Un, gba kpiligh ve iyol sha akaaôron a dedoo a a dugh ken zwa Na yô, ve kaa er: Shin ka Wan u Yosev ne ga ase?" 
Luke4:23 A gema A kaa a ve er: Né kaam injakwagh ne kpee er: We Ortwer, sôr ase iyol You, hanma kwagh u se ongo i er ken Kapernahum la yô, shi er ken gar Wou nahan kpaa." 
Luke4:24 Tsô A kaa er: Mimi je, M kaan ne ne, mba wuese ma profeti ken gar na ga." 
Luke4:25 Kpa mimi je M kaan ne ne, sha ayange a Eliya la kasev mba côgholov lu ken Iserael kpishi, zum u ura kera nôô ga anyom atar man iwer ataratar, man zegejen gba sha won cii la." 
Luke4:26 Kpa i tindi Eliya hen ma kwase hen ve ga saa hen Sarefati ken tar u Shidon, hen kwase ugen u a lu kwasecôghol yô." 
Luke4:27 Sha ayange a profeti Elisha kpaa, mbaamandev lu ken Iserael kpishi, kpa i wanger mô ve môm ga, saa Naaman or u Shiria la tseegh." 
Luke4:28 Mba ken shinagoge la cii, asema nyoon ve tsung er ve ungwa akaa ne yô." 
Luke4:29 Nahan ve mough, ve zenda Un, ve due a Na ken akôngo a gar, ve za a Na zan zan sha kurigôr u uwoogh henpe i maa gar ve la, sha u vea gbihi Un shin ijem yô." 
Luke4:30 Kpa A kar hen atô ve kera, A yem a Nagh." 
Luke4:31 Tsô A va shin Kapernahum, gar u Galilia ugen, lu tesen ve sha ayange a memen." 
Luke4:32 Kpiligh ve iyol a ityesen Na, gadia kwaghôron Na lu sha utaha." 
Luke4:33 Ken shinagoge la orgen lu, lu a jijingi u bo u hôngorough, a genger imo taver taver er:" 
Luke4:34 Ka nyi i zough se a We, We Yesu, Ornasareti? U va sha u va timin see? M fa U doo doo, U ngu Icighan u Aôndo je." 
Luke4:35 Kpa Yesu yange un, kaa er: Huan, due ken a na kera! Er jijingi u bo la kende un inya her atô ve yô, maa a due ken a na, kpa a vihi un iyol mape ga." 
Luke4:36 Nahan cier ve iyol ve gba ôron kwagh ayol a ve kaan er: Ka nyi injakwaghôron ne? Gadia ka sha utaha man sha agee A yange ujijingi mba hôngorough man ve dugh ye. 
Luke4:37 Gwa Na samber ken hanma ijiir ken iningirtar la cii. 
Luke4:38 Tsô A mough ken shinagoge a za nyôr ken ya u Shimon. Yô, angev mbu iyolhian kôr ngôkem u Shimon kpishi; nahan ve zamber a Na sha ci na." 
Luke4:39 Tsô A va tile A ngurum her a na, A yange angev mbu iyolhian la maa mbu de un; fese nahan a mough, a gba gilim sha sha ci ve." 
Luke4:40 Iyange ngur milen yô, ior cii mba ve lu mba i kpe ve iyol ga mba angev atô kposo kposo er ve yô, ve va a mi her a Na. A penda ave sha hanmô ve, A war ve." 
Luke4:41 Ujijingi mba bov kpaa due ken ior kpishi, ve lu genger imo, kaan er: U ngu Wan u Aôndo je! A yange ve, A rumun ve u ve̱ ôr kwagh ga, gadia ve fa er A lu Kristu je yô." 
Luke4:42 Sev mbu av yô, A due A yem hen ijiir igen her ape or lu ga yô; ikpelaior ker Un; mba ar her a Na yô, lu ve pe timbir Un, sha u A̱ de undun ve ga yô." 
Luke4:43 Kpa A kaa a ve er: Ka u Me ôr Loho u Dedoo u tartor u Aôndo ken agar agen kpaa keng, gadia ka sha ci u nahan je i tindim ye." 
Luke4:44 Tsô A gba ôron kwaghaôndo ken ushinagoge mba ken Galilia. 
Luke5:1 Tsô er ikpelaior lu imbishi Un, lu ungwan kwaghôron u Aôndo yô, a tile shin kpe u ber u Genesareti." 
Luke5:2 Tsô A nenge utso uhar lu hen kpe u ber, kpa mbakôronishu vande duen kera, lu nzuan ukper." 
Luke5:3 Ken utso mbala Un nyôr ken u môm u lu u Shimon la, man A kaa a na er a̱ hide a tsô ijime a̱ undu kpetar kpeghee; tsô A tema ken tso, A gba tesen ikpelaior." 
Luke5:4 Kur kwaghôron yô, A kaa a Shimon er: Kporom hen ijiir i i ze yô, za haa ukper enev sha u kôron ishu." 
Luke5:5 Kpa Shimon gema kaa er: Tere, se tsa keren kaka sha ican, kpa se zua a ma kwagh ga; kpa sha imo You yô, me haa ukper." 
Luke5:6 Mba eren nahan yô, ve kôr ikpelaishu i vesen je, ukper vev gba anden." 
Luke5:7 Ve gba welegh mbaerentom a ve imôngo ken tso ugen la er ve̱ va, ve̱ va wase ve. Tsô ve va, ve va iv utso mba uhar mbala je, gba nôngon u urun." 
Luke5:8 Er Shimon Peteru nenge nahan yô, a gure Yesu hen anu, a kaa er: Due hen mo kera, Tere, gadia mo m ngu or u isholibo je." 
Luke5:9 Gadia cier un iyol kua mba ve lu a na cii sha mker u ishu u ve kôr la. 
Luke5:10 Kape Yakobu man Yohane, ônov mba Sebedeu, mba ve lu mbawasen Shimon la kpaa i cier ve iyol la. Tsô Yesu kaa a Shimon er: De cie ga, hii nyian je zan zan ken hemen kpaa ú mase kôron ior." 
Luke5:11 Mba dugh a utso sha tar yô, ve undu akaa cii, ve dondo sha a Na." 
Luke5:12 Tsô er A lu ken wangar ugen yô, nenge, orgen lu a imande iyol yoholoo; nengen a Yesu yô, a gure, a kuma ityough inya, a gba zamber a Na, kaan er: Tere, a lu ishima You yô, U fatyô u wanger mo." 
Luke5:13 Tsô A naregh uwegh, A bende un iyol, A kaa er: M rumun, i̱ wanger we! Fese nahan imande maa bee un." 
Luke5:14 Tsô A ta un icin er a̱ de ôron ma or kwagh ga; A kaa er: Gba yemen tsô, za tese pristi iyol you, shi na nagh sha ci u mwanger u i wanger we er Mose lu kaa nahan, sha u i̱ lu mpase hen a ve yô." 
Luke5:15 Kpa gwa Na hemba seer samber a samber; ikpelaior kpishi kohol sha u ungwan Un man shi u A̱ war ve sha uange. 
Luke5:16 Kpa A undu ior A yem ken taaikôngo, A gba za eren msen."
