Romans13:12 Tugh za yum, sev sôôn aven. Nahan yô, se gbihi nen aeren a imegh kera se haa nen ikav mbi utyav mbi iwangerev iyol." 
Romans13:13 Se zenden nen sha inja, i̱ lu sha inja i atetan, i̱ de lu sha iniongo i msôr shin msôrom ma hunden ga, i̱ de lu sha idya shin ijimba i eren ga, i̱ de lu sha iyongo shin iwuhe i eren kpaa ga." 
Romans13:14 Kpa haa nen Ter Yesu Kristu iyol, de veren nen iyol ian sha u i̱ kende asaren a i la ga." 
Romans14:1 Or u nan taver sha jighjigh u nan ga la kpaa, rumun nen nan, kpa i̱ de lu sha u hendan kwagh sha anyimanakaa ga." 
Romans14:2 Orgen ka nan na jighjigh er nan ngu a ian i yan akaa cii, kpa u nan taver ga la yô, ka ikaiue nan ye ye." 
Romans14:3 Or u nan ye la nana̱ de lahan or u nan ye ga la ze, man shi or u nan ye ga la nana̱ de ne or u nan ye la ibo ga, gadia Aôndo rumun nan." 
Romans14:4 We, u ngu nyi man u ne wanye u orgen ibo? Shin una tile, shin una gba kpaa ka kwagh u Ter na je." 
Romans14:5 Orgen ka nan nenge er iyange igen i hemba igen yô. Orgen di yô nan nenge er ayange cii nga kwagh môm yô. Hanma or yô, i̱ wanger nan ken ishima i nan doo doo je." 
Romans14:6 Or u nan ver ishima sha iyange kpaa ka sha ci u Ter nan veren ishima ye, or u nan ye kpaa ka sha ci u Ter nan lu yan ye, gadia nan sughun Aôndo. Or u nan ye ga la kpaa, ka ken Ter nan ye ga ye, nan sughun Aôndo kpaa." 
Romans14:7 Ma or môm ken vese nan gbe lun uma sha ci u nan iyol i nan ga, man shi ma or gbe kpen sha ci u iyol i nan kpaa ga." 
Romans14:8 Gadia shin sea lu uma, kpa ka sha ci u Ter se lu uma ye, shin sea kpe kpaa, ka sha ci u Ter se kpe ye, nahan yô, shin sea lu uma shin sea kpe kpaa se mba kwagh u Ter." 
Romans14:9 Ka sha ci u nahan man Kristu kpaa A kpe shi A lu uma ye, ka sha u Una lu Ter u mbakpenev man mbaumav kpaa." 
Romans14:10 Kpa we yô, ka nyi u ne anmgbian ibo? Shin ka nyi u laha anmgbian wouwe? Gadia se cii sé va tile sha ikônough ki ijirigh ki Aôndo." 
Romans14:11 Gadia i nger er: Ter ngu kaan er: Er Mo M lu u uma ne, ka sha ishigh Yagh hanma inyu ia gure ye, hanma nombor kpaa ua wuese Aôndo." 
Romans14:12 Kape hanmô wase nana va ôr [Aôndo] kwagh u nan iyol i nan je la. 
Romans14:13 Nahan yô, se kera gbaa nan ayol ase ibo tsô ga, kpa guda yô, se wa nen ken ishima ser, sé kera na anmgbian anzughul ga shin ityôikaa i nôngon gbev kpaa ga." 
Romans14:14 Wanger mo, m fa dedoo ken Ter Yesu mer, ma kwagh gbe lun wang ga iyol na tsô ga, saa or u nan nenge er kwagh a lu wang ga la a lu nan kwagh u wang ga ye." 
Romans14:15 Aluer ka sha kwaghyan wou man ishima ia vihi anmgbian wou yô, kera ka sha dooshima u lu zenden ga. Kwaghyan u u ye la, a̱ de hingir kwagh u vihin uma u un u Kristu A kpe sha ci na la kera ga." 
Romans14:16 I̱ de lamen dang sha kwagh wen u a lu u dedoo la ga. 
Romans14:17 Gadia tartor u Aôndo yô, ka sha kwaghyan man kwaghman u lu ga, kpa ka sha perapera man bem man iember ken Icighan Jijingi u lu ye." 
Romans14:18 Or u nan eren Kristu tom sha gbenda ne yô, á doo Aôndo a nan, ior kpaa vea rumun nan." 
Romans14:19 Nahan yô, se keren nen kwagh u nan bem man shi kwagh u se maan a maa ayol a ase sha mi." 
Romans14:20 De vihin tom u Aôndo kera sha ci u kwaghyan ga. Akaa cii nga wang, kpa or u nan ye kwaghyan man nan ne orgen anzughul yô, hingir kwaghbo hen nan ve." 
Romans14:21 Doo u yan inyam ga, shin u man msôrom kpaa ga, shin u eren nyityô kwagh i nan anmgbian wou anzughul la kpaa ga." 
Romans14:22 Jighjigh u nan u u lu a mi la yô, a̱ lu kwagh wou iyol you vea Aôndo. Or u nan gbe nan iyol i nan ibo ga sha kwagh u nan nenge er ka kwagh u dedoo yô, saan nan iyol." 
Romans14:23 Kpa or u nan te akpelan ken ishima sha kwagh u nan ye la yô, i na nan ibo kera je ve gadia nan ngu eren sha jighjigh u nan ga. Hanma kwagh u a dugh ken jighjigh u nan ga yô, ka isholibo je." 
Romans15:1 Se mba se lu a agee ne yô, ka u se̱ waan ishima a mbamyina mba mba ve taver ga la, se̱ keren kwagh u doon se ayol a ase la tsô ga." 
Romans15:2 Hanmô wase nana̱ nôngo u eren kwagh u doon or u nan we ndor a nan la i̱ lu sha gbenda u doon, man shi u maan nan a maa kpaa." 
Romans15:3 Gadia Kristu kpaa ker kwagh u doon sha ci Na ga, kpa lu er i vande ngeren nahan la er: Aheen a ior ve lu heen We la gema haa sha a Mo." 
Romans15:4 Gadia akaa a i vande ngeren la cii ka sha ci u ityesen yase lu i nger a ye, lu sha u se̱ lu a ishimaverenkeghen sha ishimawan man ishimasurun i ken icighanruamabera la." 
Romans15:5 Aôndo u ishimawan man ishimasurun A̱ na ne, lu nen ishima i môm ayol a en sha inja i Kristu Yesu la," 
Romans15:6 sha u né civir Aôndo Ter u Ter wase Yesu Kristu sha ishima i môm man sha imo i môm kpaa. 
Romans15:7 Nahan yô, rumun nen ayol a en er Kristu kpaa A rumun ne sha ci u iengem i Aôndo nahan." 
Romans15:8 Inja na yô, er, Kristu hingir ortom u icôngo u tesen mimi u Aôndo sha u taver uityendezwa mba i tôndo a uter la," 
Romans15:9 sha u atôatyev a̱ civir Aôndo sha ci u mhôônom nam. Kape i nger kpaa la er: Ka nahan man me wuese we ken atôatyev, Me wa icam i civir iti You kpaa ye." 
Romans15:10 Shi i kaa er: Ember nen ne atôatyev a nongoior Na imôngo. 
Romans15:11 Man shi: Wuese nen Ter, ne atôatyev cii, ior ci ca cii, ve̱ wuese Un." 
Romans15:12 Man shi Yesaia kpaa kaa er, Mise u Yese Una va, ka Un u Una mough Una ya tor sha atôatyev la, ka sha a Na man atôatyev aa veren ishima aa keghen ye." 
Romans15:13 Aôndo u ishimaverenkeghen A̱ iv ne a iember gbing kua bem kpaa sha jighjigh u ne ne la, sha u né ngee a ishimaverenkeghen sha agee a Icighan Jijingi yô." 
Romans15:14 Anmgbianev av, sha kwagh wen yô, m fa dedoo mer ne mgbough a mdoom shi ne iv a mfe gbing gbing kpaa, ne kuma u wan ayol a en kwagh kpaa." 
Romans15:15 Kpa sha akaa agen yô, m wa cihin m nger ne kwagh sha u umbur ne, lu sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo A nem la er" 
Romans15:16 m̱ lu ortom u Yesu Kristu hen atôatyev ken icighantom u Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo, sha u nagh ku atôatyev ku̱ doo, ku̱ lu kwagh u i tsegh sha Icighan Jijingi yô." 
Romans15:17 M ngu a ityôikaa i tan ihagh ken Kristu Yesu sha akaa a Aôndo. 
Romans15:18 Gadia me cihi me ôr ma kwagh ugen ga saa kwagh u Kristu A er sha ikev yam sha u atôatyev a̱ ungwan kwagh yô, lu sha kwaghôron man sha ieren" 
Romans15:19 man sha agee a uivande man akaa a kpilighyol man sha agee a Icighan Jijingi kpaa. Nahan hii ken Yerusalem ningir zan zan ar ken Ilirikum m ôr Loho u Dedoo u Kristu m tser. 
Romans15:20 M ver ishima mer me kera ôr Loho u Dedoo ape i vande teren Kristu la ga, sha u m̱ de maan sha imagh ki orgen ga yô." 
Romans15:21 Kape i vande ngeren kpaa la er: Ve mba i pase ve kwagh Na ga la, vea nenge a Na je, mba ve ungwa kwagh ga la kpaa, vea kav." 
Romans15:22 Ka nahan man acin imôngo je i bundum u van hen ven ye. 
Romans15:23 Kpa hegen yô, er ian i tom i kera shim ken avegher angan ga shi er anyom imôngo je m lu veren ishima u van ken ven," 
Romans15:24 zum u mea karen me zaan ken tar u Ishpania la yô, m ver ishima mer me zua ishigh a ven, me tema imôngo anyangem kpeghee, imôngo ia hômon yô, né wam ikav mbi zan keela." 
Romans15:25 Kpa hegen yô, m ngu zan sha Yerusalem sha kwagh u iwasen i sha ci u uicighanmbaiorov la," 
Romans15:26 gadia doo Masedonia man Akaya u nan iwasen sha ci u mbaatsanev mba ken uicighanmbaiorov mba ken Yerusalem la. 
Romans15:27 Doo ve man ka u ve̱ er a ve nahan kpee je, gadia aluer atôatyev zua a kwar a ve imôngo sha akaa a jijingi yô, ka u a kpaa a̱ wase ve sha akaa a iyolough kpee." 
Romans15:28 Nahan zum u me kure kwagh ne me za na ve kwagh u i kohol la yô, me kar ken ven man me za ken Ishpania ye." 
Romans15:29 M fa, zum u me va hen ven yô, me va a iveren i Kristu ia iv gbing." 
Romans15:30 Anmgbianev, m ngu zamber a ven sha Ter wase Yesu Kristu man sha dooshima u Jijingi mer, nôngon nen tsung a mo imôngo ken mbamsen mba ne lu sônon Aôndo sha ci wam yô," 
Romans15:31 sha u i̱ yimam sha ikev i mbanan jighjigh ga mba ken Yudia man sha u iwasen yam i sha ci u Yerusalem la i̱ doo uicighanmbaiorov," 
Romans15:32 sha u m̱ va hen ven sha ishima i Aôndo a iember, i̱ yôhôl mo iyol a ven imôngo yô." 
Romans15:33 Aôndo u bem A̱ lu a ven cii. Amen. 
Romans16:1 M ngu eren shiada u dedoo pasen ne kwagh u Fibi, anmgbian wase u kwase, un ka ortom ken nongo u Kristu u ken Kenkria la," 
Romans16:2 mer, rumun nen un ken Ter er i kom hen uicighanmbaiorov nahan. Wase nen un sha hanma kwagh u una gba un cii, gadia un wasen ior kpishi je, mo iyol yam kpaa a wasem." 
Romans16:3 Sugh nen Prishila man Akula, nam nen, ka mbaerentom a mo imôngo ken Kristu Yesu." 
Romans16:4 Mban yô, ve ver mon ve sha ci u uma wam, ka mo tseegh m lu sughun ve ga, ka iniongo i Kristu i ken atôatyev cii kpaa." 
Romans16:5 Shi sugh nen nongo u Kristu u ken ya ve kpaa. Sugh nen Epineto, or u doon mo ishima la nam nen. Un ka iyiagh ki tsutswagh ki ken Ashia sha ci u Kristu." 
Romans16:6 Sugh nen Maria u a er tom kpishi ken a ven la nam nen. 
Romans16:7 Sugh nen Anderoniku man Yunia mba ve lu ityô yam shi ve lu mbakwarev a mo imôngo kpaa la. 
Romans16:8 Sugh nen Ampiliatu or u doon mo ken Ter la, nam nen." 
Romans16:9 Sugh nen Urbanu u a lu ortom a mo imôngo ken Kristu man Setaku or u doon mo la kpaa, nam nen." 
Romans16:10 Sugh nen Apele u i rumun un ken Kristu la nam nen. Shi sugh nen mba ve lu ken ya u Aristobulu kpaa nam nen. 
Romans16:11 Sugh nen Herodion or u ken ityô yam nam nen. Shi sugh nen mba ken ya u Narkisu mba ve lu ken Ter la nam nen. 
Romans16:12 Sugh nen Terufina man Terufosa mba ve eren tom tsung ken Ter nam nen. Sugh nen Perse un u a doom ishima, a er tom kpishi ken Ter la nam nen." 
Romans16:13 Sugh nen Rufu u a lu icuwanor ken Ter, shi sugh nen ngô na kpaa u a lum er ka ngôm la nam nen." 
Romans16:14 Sugh nen Asunkritu man Felegon man Herme man Pateroba man Herma kua anmgbianev mba ve lu a ve imôngo la cii nam nen. 
Romans16:15 Sugh nen Filologu man Yulia man Neriu kua anngô na u kwase man Olumpa kua uicighanmbaiorov mba ve lu a ve imôngo cii nam nen. 
Romans16:16 Sugh nen ayol a en sha icighanzwa u susen. Iniongo i Kristu cii ngi sughun ne. 
Romans16:17 Anmgbianev, m ngu wan ne kwagh mer, mbala mba ve lu van a mbampav man ameen, i lu sha ityesen i i tese ne la ga yô, palegh nen ve." 
Romans16:18 Gadia ambaaior la yô, ka Ter wase Kristu ve eren Un tom ga kpa ka iyav vev ve eren mbu tom ye. Ka sha zwanyohon man zwaovon ve lu tsumen a asema a mbakavenkwagh ga la ye." 
Romans16:19 Iko yen i wan la i fa i sha won cii, ka nahan man m lu ember sha kwagh wen ye. Kpa sarem ka lu nen mbafankwagh sha kwagh u a lu u dedoo yô, kpa gema lu nen wang sha kwagh u bo la." 
Romans16:20 Ica ia gba ga je tsô Aôndo u bem Una cagh Satan shin angahar a en. Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter Yesu a̱ lu sha a ven. 
Romans16:21 Timoteu u a lu eren tom a mo imôngo ngu sughun ne kua Lukiu man Yason man Sosipater mba ve lu ityô yam. 
Romans16:22 Mo Tertiu u m lu ngeren washika ne kpaa, m ngu sughun ne ken Ter." 
Romans16:23 Gayu u mo kua nongo u Kristu cii ka se tsa her a na la ngu sughun ne. Erasetu ornengen sha inyaregh ki ken gar ngu sughun ne. Kwaretu anmgbian wase kpaa ngu sughun ne. [ 
Romans16:24 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter Yesu Kristu a̱ lu sha ven cii.] 
Romans16:25 Un u A lu a agee a̱ taver ne sha ivangeli yam man sha myee u i lu yôôn kwagh u Yesu Kristu man sha mpase u kwaghmyer u a lu ken iuv hii sha ashighe a tsuaa la je zan zan. 
Romans16:26 Kpa i va a mi ken igbar hegen shi mba pasen un sha uruamabera mba uprofeti hen akuraior cii, sha u a̱ wa jighjigh u nan la iko—" 
Romans16:27 Aôndo u A lu a kwaghfan Un tswen ne, iengem i̱ lu i Na ken Yesu Kristu gbem sha won. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paulu u i yila un a yila sha ishima i Aôndo sha u a̱ lu apostoli u Kristu Yesu, kua Sosetene, anmgbian," 
1Corinthians1:2 mba sughun nongo u Kristu u Aôndo u u lu ken Korinte la, mba i tsegh ve ken Kristu Yesu, mba i yer ve er ve̱ lu uicighanmbaiorov a mba ve yilan sha iti i Ter wase Kristu la imôngo cii, sha hanma ijiir cii, ka Ter ve man Ter wase kpaa;" 
1Corinthians1:3 mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven man bem mba ve dugh ken Aôndo Ter wase man Ter Yesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:4 Mba sughun Aôndo ayange ayange sha ci wen, sha ci u mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo u i ne ne ken Kristu Yesu ne," 
1Corinthians1:5 gadia sha hanma gbenda cii i gema ne ne hingir mbalun a akaa wuee ken a Na, sha hanma kwaghôron cii man hanma mfe cii kpaa—" 
1Corinthians1:6 er i taver shiada u i er sha Kristu la ken a ven nahan— 
1Corinthians1:7 nahan ne kera yina sha ma iwua i sha mrumun u sha mhôôn ga, er ne keghen mpase u á va pase Ter wase Yesu Kristu ken igbar la," 
1Corinthians1:8 u Una taver ne zan zan mkur sha u né kera lu a acôghol iyol sha iyange i Ter wase Yesu Kristu la ga yô. 
1Corinthians1:9 Aôndo ka u jighjigh, A yila ne u lun ken mzough vea Wan Na Yesu Kristu Ter wase." 
1Corinthians1:10 M ngu zamber a ven anmgbianev, ken iti i Ter wase Yesu Kristu mer: Ne cii, lu nen zwa môm, mbampav ve̱ de lu her a ven ga, kpa zua nen, lu nen ishima i môm man mhen môm kpaa." 
1Corinthians1:11 Gadia, anmgbianev, ior mba ken ya u Kelue ôrom kwagh wen er ayongo nga ken atô wen." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kwagh u m ver ishima sha mi jim je yô, ka er hanmô wen ka nan kaa er: Mo m ngu or u Paulu, mo di m ngu or u Apolo, mo yô, m ngu or u Kefa, mo ne yagh yô, m ngu u Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:13 Nahan yô, i pav Kristu shinii? Ka Paulu man i mande un sha terankon sha ci wen yee? Shin ka ken iti i Paulu je i er ne batisema ase?" 
1Corinthians1:14 M wuese er m er mô wen batisema ga yô, saa di Krisepu man Gayu tsô," 
1Corinthians1:15 sha er ma or nana̱ de kaan er: Ka ken iti yam i er ne batisema ga. 
1Corinthians1:16 Mba ken ya u Sefana kpaa, m er ve batisema, sha mfe wam yô, m kera er orgen batisema ga." 
1Corinthians1:17 Gadia Kristu tindim, lu sha u eren batisema ga, kpa lu sha u m ôron Loho u Dedoo, i̱ de lu sha kwaghôron u fan yum kpaa ga sha u terankon u Kristu u̱ de hingir gbilinkwagh ga yô." 
1Corinthians1:18 Gadia kwaghôron u terankon ka mba ve lu timin la ibumekwagh, kpa se mba i lu yiman se yô, gema ka se agee a Aôndo je." 
1Corinthians1:19 Gadia i nger er: Me vihi mfe u mbafankwagh, man mkav u mbakavenkwagh kpaa, Me bunde un." 
1Corinthians1:20 Orfankwagh ngu hana? Man orngeren ngu hana? Or u sendegh kwagh u hen ayange ne nan ngu hana? Aôndo kera gema mfe u tar ne hingir ibumekwagh gaa? 
1Corinthians1:21 Gadia er i lu sha kwaghfan u Aôndo je man tar u kera fe Aôndo sha gbenda u kwaghfan la ga yô, nahan doo Aôndo u yiman mba ve ne jighjigh la sha ibumegh ki kwaghôron Na." 
1Corinthians1:22 Gadia Mbayuda mba pinen uivande man Mbagrika yô, mba keren kwaghfan." 
1Corinthians1:23 Kpa se yô, se mba pasen kwagh u Kristu u i mande Un sha terankon; Mbayuda yô, ka kwagh u nan ve gbev mbu nôngon je, man atôatyev yô, gema ka ve ibumekwagh je." 
1Corinthians1:24 Kpa ve mba i yer ve yô, Kristu gema ka ve agee a Aôndo man kwaghfan u Aôndo kpaa, shin a lu Mbayuda, shin Mbagrika kpaa." 
1Corinthians1:25 Gadia ibumegh ki Aôndo hemba kwaghfan u ior man isheer i Aôndo hemba agee a ior. 
1Corinthians1:26 Gadia nenge nen sha myer u i yila ne la, anmgbianev, mbafankwagh sha inja i iyolough ngee ken ven ga, mbaageev kpaa ngee ga, shin mbaiciviriv kpaa ga." 
1Corinthians1:27 Kpa akaa a a lu a ibume ken tar yô, Aôndo sange a sha u heen mbafankwagh man akaa a a lu a agee ga ken tar yô, Aôndo sange a sha u heen akaa a a lu a agee la," 
1Corinthians1:28 man akaa a a lu a icivir ga ken tar la man a i laha a la, man a a gbe kwagh ga la, Aôndo sange a sha u Una vihi akaa a a gbe kwagh la kera yô," 
1Corinthians1:29 sha er ma or nana̱ de te ihagh sha ishigh ki Aôndo ga yô. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kpa ka Un A ne ne lu ken Kristu Yesu ye, Un u Aôndo gema Un A hingir se mfe man perapera man mtsegh man mpaa kpaa." 
1Corinthians1:31 Nahan i̱ lu er i nger nahan er: U nan te ihagh yô, nana̱ ta ihagh ken Ter." 
1Corinthians2:1 Mo kpaa, anmgbianev, zum u m va hen ven la, lu sha kwaghôron u hemban shin sha kwaghfan man m ôr ne mpase u Aôndo ga." 
1Corinthians2:2 Gadia m wa ken ishima mer me fa ma kwagh ken a ven ga, saa di Yesu Kristu man er i mande Un a mande sha terankon la." 
1Corinthians2:3 Mo yô, lu sha isheer man sha mcie man sha ikarikase iyol kpishi yan m va hen a ven ye." 
1Corinthians2:4 Kwaghôron wam man kwaghaôndo wam u pasen kpaa, lu sha mhanger u kwaghôron tsô ga, kpa ikav i Jijingi man i agee kpaa lu sha mi," 
1Corinthians2:5 sha er jighjigh wen u nan a̱ de suur sha mfe u ior ga, kpa i̱ lu sha agee a Aôndo." 
1Corinthians2:6 Nahan kpaa se mba ôron kwagh u mfe je hen mba ve vie dedoo yô, kpa ka mfe u tar ne ga shin u mbavesen mba tar ne mba vea tim kera ne kpaa ga." 
1Corinthians2:7 Kpa se mba ôron kwaghfan u Aôndo, ka kwaghmyer u i yer un, u Aôndo vande veren un sha ci u iengem yase je er i lu a gba tar ga yô." 
1Corinthians2:8 Ma or u mbavesen mba tar ne fa kwagh ne ga, gadia vea fe un yô, ma ve mande Ter u iengem la sha terankon ga." 
1Corinthians2:9 Se mba ôron er i nger la nahan er: Akaa a ashe a nenge a mi ga, ato kpaa a ungwa a ga, a ve or ken ishima kpaa ga, ka akaa a Aôndo A ser a sha ci u mba Un doo ve ishima la." 
1Corinthians2:10 Kpa se yô, Aôndo gema pase se a sha Jijingi. Gadia Jijingi tev akaa cii, zan zan akaacimin a Aôndo je kpaa." 
1Corinthians2:11 Gadia hen ior yô, ka an nan fe akaa a oro, saa jijingi u or u a lu ken a nan la gaa? Kape akaa a Aôndo kpaa ma or nan fe a ga la, saa Jijingi u Aôndo tseegh." 
1Corinthians2:12 Kpa se yô, ka jijingi u taregh se ngohol ga, kpa ka jijingi u A dugh her Aôndo la, sha u se̱ fa akaa a Aôndo A ne se sha mhôôn yô." 
1Corinthians2:13 Ka a je se lu ôron ye, ka sha asemberakaa a mfe u or a tesen la ga, kpa ka a Jijingi A tesen yô, nahan se mba karen akaa a jijingi sha akaa a jijingi." 
1Corinthians2:14 Kpa or u nan lu ken uma u sha marami la tsô yô, nan ngohol akaa a jijingi u Aôndo ga, gadia ka nan akaa a ibume, nan fatyô u kaven a kpaa ga, gadia mba kar a sha inja i jijingi." 
1Corinthians2:15 Kpa or u nan lu ken mlu u jijingi yô, nan karen akaa cii, kpa nan iyol i nan yô, ma or karen nan ga." 
1Corinthians2:16 Gadia ka an nan fe mhen u Ter je u nana tese Un kwagha? Kpa se yô, se mba a mhen u Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:1 Kpa mo yô, anmgbianev m fatyô u ôron ne kwagh er ka mbajijingiv nahan ga, kpa lu er mbaiyolov nahan tsô, er anikundanev ken Kristu nahan." 
1Corinthians3:2 Lu sha atumba je m koso ne ye, lu sha kwaghyan u taver ga, gadia ne lu a kuma ga. Hegen je kpaa ne mba a kuma ga," 
1Corinthians3:3 gadia ne mba mbaiyolov heregh di tsô, gadia aluer iwuhe man iyongo vea lu her a ven yô, kera ka mbaiyolov ne lu, man kera ka sha inja i or ne zenden gaa?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Gadia aluer orgen nana kaa er: Mo yô, m ngu or u Paulu, shin ugen er: Mo m ngu or u Apolo, yô, kera ka ior tsô ne lu gaa?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Apolo ngu di nyi je? Man Paulu yô, ngu di nyi? Ka mbatomov mba i lu tom ve man ne gem ne ne jighjigh ye, sha inja i Ter A ne hanmô wase la." 
1Corinthians3:6 Mo m môôr. Apolo gema ur mngerem, kpa ka Aôndo A ne mvese ye." 
1Corinthians3:7 Nahan un u a môôr la ngu ma kwagh ga, shin un u a ur mngerem la kpaa ga, saa Aôndo u A ne mvese la." 
1Corinthians3:8 Un u a môôr la vea un u a ur mngerem la ka kwagh môm tsô, kpa hanmô ve nana zua a injar i nan iyol i nan sha inja i tom u nan." 
1Corinthians3:9 Gadia se mba mbashirentom a Aôndo imôngo je, ne mba sule u Aôndo je, man shi mmaa u Aôndo jim kpaa." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ka sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo u i nem la man m tim imagh er orfanmaa nahan ye, orgen nan kar nan ngu maan sha mi, kpa hanma or nana̱ er teghelee sha mmaa u nan maan sha mi la." 
1Corinthians3:11 Gadia ma or nana fatyô u shi timin imagh kigenegh kposo a ki i vande timin la ga, ka Yesu Kristu je la." 
1Corinthians3:12 Aluer hanma or nan ngu maan sha imagh kila yô, shin a lu zenaria shin a lu azurfa shin a lu awen a injaa shin a lu ikon shin a lu toho shin a lu ayia kpaa," 
1Corinthians3:13 tom u hanma or ua hingir ken igbar, gadia ka iyange la ia tese inja i u ye, gadia ka sha usu je á pase iyange la ye, man ka usu ua kar tom u hanma or, er u lu ye." 
1Corinthians3:14 Aluer tom u hanma or u nan maa la ua lu heregh yô, nana zua a injar." 
1Corinthians3:15 Aluer tom u hanma or ua hia kera yô, akaa a nan saa kera je ve, kpa nan iyol i nan yô, nana war, kpa á lu je er ka sha usu nahan." 
1Corinthians3:16 Ne kera fa er ne lu tempel u Aôndo man Jijingi u Aôndo A tem ken a ven gaa? 
1Corinthians3:17 Aluer anti or nana vihi tempel u Aôndo yô, Aôndo Una vihi nan, gadia tempel u Aôndo ka icighan je, man ka ne ne lu tempel la ye." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ma or nana̱ de tsughun iyol i nan ga. Aluer anti or u ken a ven nan ngu henen er nan ngu orfankwagh ken kov u ainge ne yô, nana̱ hingir ibumeor, man nana fa kwagh ye." 
1Corinthians3:19 Gadia kwaghfan u tar ne ka Aôndo ibumekwagh je. Gadia i nger er: Un u A ker mbafankwagh sha atseregh a ve la," 
1Corinthians3:20 man shi: Ter fa mbamhen mba mbafankwagh la, ka gbilinkwagh tsô." 
1Corinthians3:21 Nahan yô, ma or nana̱ de kera taan ihagh sha ior ga; gadia akaa cii ka a en," 
1Corinthians3:22 shin a lu Paulu shin a lu Apolo shin a lu Kefa shin a lu tar shin a lu uma shin a lu ku shin a lu akaa a hegen, shin a lu akaa a a lu van ken hemen la kpaa, ka a en cii." 
1Corinthians3:23 Kpa ne yô, ne mba kwagh u Kristu, man Kristu gema ka u Aôndo je." 
1Corinthians4:1 Se yô, i̱ nengen se er se lu mbatomov mba Kristu yô, man shi mbakarenkwar u akaa a myer a Aôndo kpaa." 
1Corinthians4:2 Kwagh ugen u i veren ishima sha mi hen mbakarenkwar yô, ka u ve̱ lu ior mba jighjigh." 
1Corinthians4:3 Kpa mo yô, u ne né time kwagh wam né kure, shin a lu ma mkohol u ior u ôron ijir kpaa, kam kwagh je ga. M time kwagh wam iyol yam, m kure kpaa ga." 
1Corinthians4:4 M fa ma ityôikaa sha iyol yam ga, kpa heera tseegh yô, nam u me lu a ishô ga. Ka Ter A lu timen kwagh wam, kuren un ye." 
1Corinthians4:5 Nahan yô, de gbe ôron nen ma ijir er shighe a lu a kuma ga la ga, saa Ter Una va Una due a akaa a myer a ken ime la, Una va a mi ken iwanger, man Una pase mbaawashima mba ken asema a ior kpaa, ka ken shighe la man hanma or nana zua a iwuese i nan hen Aôndo ye." 
1Corinthians4:6 Akaa ne yô, anmgbianev, m gema a m zua sha iyol yam kua Apolo kpaa; ka sha ci wen sha u ne̱ zua a ityesen hen a vese er, i̱ de karen akaa a i nger la ken inya ga yô, sha er ma or nana̱ de gengese iyol a ma or sha kwagh u orgen la ga." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ka an nan ver u u hembee? Ka nyi u lu a mi i u ngohol a ngohol ga? Man aluer u ngohol yô, ka nyi u gengese iyol er u ngohol a ngohol ga nahana?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Ne ide kera ve, ne hingir mbanyarev kera ve, ne ya tor, kpa se lu ga. Ma ne ye tor, se kpaa ma se ye tor a ven imôngo." 
1Corinthians4:9 Gadia beem er Aôndo ver se mbaapostoli se hemba gban ijime cii, bee er ka ior mba i er ve ijir i kuugh yô; gadia se hingir kwagh u tar man mbatyomov mba Shaav kua ior kpaa ve kenger un yô." 
1Corinthians4:10 Se yô, se mba abumeaior sha ci u Kristu, kpa ne yô, ne gema ne mba mbafankwagh ken Kristu. Se yô, se mba aseeraior, kpa ne yô, ne mba mbataveragee. Ne yô, ne mba mbaiciviriv, kpa se yô, se mba mbaaheenev." 
1Corinthians4:11 Zan zan hegen je kpaa, se mba ijen, imura kpaa ngi ker se, se mba idyelegh, mba gbidi se, se mba mba azende azende sha won." 
1Corinthians4:12 Man se mba eren tom sha ican sha ave ase ayol ase. Ka a tuhwan se kpaa, se gema se naan iveren i dedoo. Ka a lu tôvon se a ican kpaa, se gba wan ishima tsô;" 
1Corinthians4:13 ka a teren se sha dang kpaa, se gema se ôron kwagh bem bem. I gema se se hingir kwagh u hôngorough sha won, zan zan hegen se mba ingbôrakembegh hen ior cii." 
1Corinthians4:14 M nger ne akaa ne ka u van ne ahenge ga, kpa m ngu wan ne kwagh er ônov av mba doon mo ishima nahan." 
1Corinthians4:15 Gadia shin nea lu a mbakuran ken Kristu vea ngee gande u ôron je kpaa ne mba a uter imôngo ga, gadia ka mo m mar ne ken Kristu Yesu sha Loho u Dedoo ye." 
1Corinthians4:16 M ngu wan ne kwagh mer: Hingir nen mbakaven mo. 
1Corinthians4:17 Ka sha ci u nahan man m tindi Timoteu her a ven ye. Un ka wan wam u doon mo ishima man u jighjigh ken Ter kpaa. Una umbur ne igbenda i m lu zan sha mi ken Kristu Yesu la, er m tesen hanma ijiir ken hanma nongo u Kristu cii yô." 
1Corinthians4:18 Kpa mbagenev gengese iyol, mba henen er m kera ngu van hen a ven ga." 
1Corinthians4:19 Kpa me va her a ven fefa, aluer Ter Una rumun yô, man me fa agee a mbagengeseyol mbala, á kera lu kwaghôron ve la tsô ga." 
1Corinthians4:20 Gadia tartor u Aôndo yô, ka sha kwaghôron u lu ga, kpa ka sha agee je." 
1Corinthians4:21 Ka nyi i sar ne? M̱ va her a ven a akpa shinii, i̱ lu sha dooshima man jijingi u legh leghee?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Gwa ngu zan ne je er idya ngi her atô wen, man ka imbaidya i ken atôatyev je kpaa i lu ga yô, orgen ngu a kwase u ter u nan je." 
1Corinthians5:2 Nahan kpaa ne mba gengese iyol; guda u ma i vihi ne, ma i dugh or u nan er kwagh la ken atô wen kera." 
1Corinthians5:3 Gadia mo yô, shin er ken iyol yam m lu her ga yô, ken jijingi yô, m ngu heregh, man kera je kpaa m hen kwagh u or u nan er imbakwagh la, m kure, bee er m ngu heregh yô." 
1Corinthians5:4 Zum u ne kohol ken iti i Ter Yesu, ne kua jijingi wam man agee a Ter wase Yesu yô," 
1Corinthians5:5 i̱ na imbaor la sha ikev i Satan sha u á vihi iyol i nan kera, kpa jijingi u nan yô, a̱ war sha iyange i Ter." 
1Corinthians5:6 Ihagh yen la doo ga. Ne kera fa er wankwa u kpeghee ka a zua sha ijenmwe cii ga? 
1Corinthians5:7 Dugh nen kwa u tse la kera sha u né lu ijenmwe i he yô, gadia jim je yô, ne kera mba a kwa ga. Gadia Waniyôngo wase u Paseka kpaa i sôngo un kera, ka Kristu je la." 
1Corinthians5:8 Nahan yô, se ya nen iniongo i̱ de lu sha kwa u tse ga, shin sha kwa u bo shin u ifer kpaa ga, kpa i̱ lu sha bredi u i we kwa sha mi ga yô, u wang man u mimi." 
1Corinthians5:9 M nger ne ken washika la mer, de zough nen a mbadyarev ga." 
1Corinthians5:10 Kpa ka mbadyarev mba ken tar ne cii ga, shin Mbahuav shin mbanumungbenda shin mbacivirakombo cii kpaa ga, a lu nahan yô, ma i gbe u né due shin tar kera kpee je." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kpa hegen yô, m ngu ngeren ne mer: De zough nen a ma or u i yer nan er anmgbian kpa nan gem nan lu or u idya shin u hua shin or u civir akombo shin or u ityuhwan shin or u hunden msôrom shin or numun gbenda ga; imbaor la yô, kwaghyan tsô kpaa de ye a nan imôngo ga." 
1Corinthians5:12 Ka nyi i gbem u ôron mba ken won mbala ijiri? Kpa mba ve lu kimi yô, kera ka ne né or ve ijir gaa?" 
1Corinthians5:13 Mba ken won yô, ka Aôndo A er ve ijir ye. Dugh nen iferor la ken a ven kera." 
1Corinthians6:1 Aluer orgen ken a ven ikyaa ia zua nan a orgen yô, nan cihi nan yila ijir hen mbaaferev, i kera lu hen uicighanmbaiorov ga zee?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Shin ne kera fa er i lu uicighanmbaiorov je man vea ôr tar ijir gaa? Man aluer ka ne man nea ôr tar ijir yô, nahan ne kera kuma u ôron ajir a kiriki gaa?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Ne kera fa er mbatyomov mba Shaav je kpaa sé va ôr ve ijir gaa? Man hire akaa a shin tar ne? 
1Corinthians6:4 Nahan aluer ne mba a ajir a sha kwagh u shin tar ne yô, mba i nengen ve er ve lu mba ikoogh ga ken nongo u Kristu la, ve̱ tema ve̱ ôr." 
1Corinthians6:5 M ngu ôron ne kwagh ne, ka u van ne ahenge je. Or u fan kwagh môm tsô kpaa ngu ken a ven u nana fatyô u ôron ikyaa i hen anmgbianev mba nan gaa?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Angbian ka a gema a za yila anmgbian ijir man i lu hen mbanan jighjigh ga la jee? 
1Corinthians6:7 Kera je kpaa kwagh hemba ne a hemba je er ne lu a ajir ayol a en yô. Kera guda u ne gba ngohol ibo sha apera tsô gaa? Kera guda u kwagh a gba saan ne tsô gaa? 
1Corinthians6:8 Kpa ne mba eren sha mi ga, ne mba ngohol kwagh sha apera kpaa, man gema ka anmgbianev je." 
1Corinthians6:9 Ne kera fa er mbaaferev vea ya dyako u tartor u Aôndo ga jee? I̱ de tsughun ne ga, mbadyarev shin mbasôronakombo shin mbavihin ivaa sha idya shin nomso mba ve yaven a ayol a ve" 
1Corinthians6:10 shin mbaiv shin mbahuav shin mbahundenmsôrom shin mbauityuhwanev shin mbanumungbenda kpaa, vea ya dyako u tartor u Aôndo je ga." 
1Corinthians6:11 Kape ne mbagenev kpaa ne vande lun la. Kpa i ôô ne, i tsegha ne, i na ne ishô ken iti i Ter Yesu Kristu man sha Jijingi u Aôndo wase." 
1Corinthians6:12 M ngu a ian sha akaa cii, kpa ka akaa cii man a lu iwasen ga, m ngu a ian sha akaa cii, kpa mo yô, me rumun ma kwagh u yan tor sha a mo ga." 
1Corinthians6:13 Akaayan nga sha ci u iyav; iyav di kpaa mbu sha ci u akaayan, kpa mbu kua a kpaa, Aôndo Una kar a mi kera cii. Kpa iyol yô, ngi sha ci u idya ga, kpa ngi sha ci u Ter man Ter kpaa ngu sha ci u iyol." 
1Corinthians6:14 Aôndo nder a Ter shin ku, se kpaa Una nder a vese sha agee a Na." 
1Corinthians6:15 Ne kera fa er ayol a en a lu alegh a Kristu je gaa? Nahan me gema alegh a Kristu a̱ hingir alegh a agbagaa? Mayange ga. 
1Corinthians6:16 Shin ne fa er or u nan zough a agbaga nan lu iyol i môm vea na gaa? Gadia i nger er: Ve uhar cii vea hingir iyôgh i môm je. 
1Corinthians6:17 Kpa u nana var a Ter yô, nan ngu jijingi môm a Na je." 
1Corinthians6:18 Yevese nen idya. Hanma isholibo igen i or nan eren yô, ka ken wonyolough tsô i lu ye. Kpa or u eren idya yô, ka iyol i nan je nan eren i kwaghbo ye." 
1Corinthians6:19 Shin ne fa er iyol yen i lu tempel u Icighan Jijingi u A lu ken a ven u ne ngohol Un her Aôndo la gaa? Ne kera mba kwagh wen ayol a en ga. 
1Corinthians6:20 Gadia i yam ne a yam sha ishe je. Civir nen Aôndo ken iyol yen. 
1Corinthians7:1 Sha kwagh u akaa a ne nger la yô, doo u or nana bende a kwase ga." 
1Corinthians7:2 Kpa sha ci u idya yô, hanma or nana̱ lu a kwase u nan iyol i nan, man hanma kwase di kpaa nana̱ lu a nom u nan iyol i nan." 
1Corinthians7:3 Nom la nana̱ er kwase kwagh u i lu kpee u eren a nan la, kwase la di kpaa nana̱ er a nom u nan nahan vough." 
1Corinthians7:4 Iyol i kwase yô, nan ngu a tahav sha mi ga, saa nom. Iyol i nom di kpaa nan ngu a tahav sha mi ga, saa kwase." 
1Corinthians7:5 De vende nen ayol a en ga, saa di alaghga né zua zwa ayol a en sha shighe u né ver yô, sha u ne ver ishima sha msen u eren yô, kpa shi zua nen sha u Satan a̱ de meen ne sha mban u kôron iyol tsaha la ga." 
1Corinthians7:6 M ngu ôron kwagh ne ka sha ian i nan tsô, ka u wan tindi ga." 
1Corinthians7:7 Kpa sarem u ior cii ma ve gbe lun er mo nahan tsô. Kpa hanma or nan zua a iwua i nan her Aôndo iyol i nan; orgen nan ngu a mi nahan, orgen di nan ngu a mi kposo." 
1Corinthians7:8 M ngu kaan a mbaukwav man kasev mba côgholov mer: U vea gba lun er mo nahan tsô yô, doo." 
1Corinthians7:9 Kpa aluer vea fatyô u kôron ayol a ve tsaha ga yô, ve̱ er kasev shin ve̱ er noov. Gadia guda u eren kwase a u yughur." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kpa mba ve vande eren kasev kera yô, m ngu tan ve icin man kera ka mo m lu tan ve ga, kpa ka Ter je: Kwase nana̱ de dugh hen nom u nan kera ga." 
1Corinthians7:11 Kpa aluer nana duen kera yô, nana̱ lu kwav, gayô nana̱ hime a nom u nan; nom kpaa, nana̱ de paven a kwase u nan ga." 
1Corinthians7:12 Mbagenev yô, kera ka Ter ga, ka mo m lu ôron ve nahan mer: Aluer ma anmgbian nan ngu a kwase u nan ne jighjigh ga, man kwase la rumun u lun vea nan yô, nana̱ de paven a nan ga." 
1Corinthians7:13 Man aluer kwase ngu a nom u nan ne jighjigh ga, man nom la rumun u lun vea nan yô, nana̱ de duen hen nom la ga." 
1Corinthians7:14 Gadia i tsegha nom u nan ne jighjigh ga la ken kwase la, man i tsegha kwase u nan ne jighjigh ga la di ken anmgbian la. A lu nahan ga yô, ônov enev ma ve lu wang ga, kpa hegen yô, mba icighan je." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kpa aluer u nan ne jighjigh ga la nan soo u paven yô, i̱ de nan nana̱ pav. Sha imbagbenda ne yô, i kighir anmgbian u nomso shin anmgbian u kwase la ga. Gadia ka sha u lun bem bem je Aôndo A ver ne ye." 
1Corinthians7:16 Gadia we kwase, u fa nana, alaghga ú va yima nomu shinii? Man we nom kpaa, u fa nana, alaghga ú va yima kwase wou shinii?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kwagh u a lu yô, hanma or nana̱ zenden sha kwar u Ter A ne nan yô, man shi er Aôndo A yer nan yô. Kape m we tindi ken hanma nongo u Kristu cii je ne." 
1Corinthians7:18 Aluer ma or tsôngo kera man i yila nan yô, nana̱ de gem icôngo la ga. Man aluer i yila orgen nan ngu ipusu yô, nana̱ de tsenge ga." 
1Corinthians7:19 Icôngo yô, ngi ma kwagh ga, ipusu kpaa ngi ma kwagh ga, saa u wan atindi a Aôndo iko." 
1Corinthians7:20 Hanma or nana̱ lu sha kwagh u nan lu sha mi zum u i yila nan la. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wea lu kpan zum u i yila u yô, ishima i̱ de nyian we ga, kpa wea fatyô u duen kera yô, nôngo sha mi ngeegh je." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kpan u i yer nan ken Ter yô, nan ngu or u Ter u i pase nan i toho yô. Kape or u nan lu kpan ga man i yer nan la kpaa, nan lu kpan u Kristu je la." 
1Corinthians7:23 Ka sha ishe je i yam ne ye, de kera geman hingir nen ikpan i ior ga." 
1Corinthians7:24 Anmgbianev, kwagh u hanma or nan lu sha mi zum u i yila nan la yô, nana̱ lu sha mi sha ishigh ki Aôndo." 
1Corinthians7:25 Sha kwagh u anuunaukase yô, m ngu a tindi u a dugh hen Ter ga, kpa me na mhen wam, mo u m lu or u jighjigh sha mhôônom ma zungwen ma Ter yô." 
1Corinthians7:26 M ngu henen mer, doo u or nana gba lun nahan tsô sha ci u ican i i lu hegen ne." 
1Corinthians7:27 I zua u a kwasaa? Yô de keren u ma i sagh u ga. U ngu a kwase gaa? Yô, de eren kwase ga." 
1Corinthians7:28 Kpa aluer wea er kwase kpaa, u er isholibo ga. Man aluer iniunkwase la er nom kpaa i er isholibo ga. Kpa mba ve eren nahan yô, vea ya ican ken iyol. Mo yô, sarem pe ican la ma i er ne ga." 
1Corinthians7:29 Kpa anmgbianev, m ngu kaan mer, shighe kera vese ga. Hii hegen yô, mba ve lu a kasev kpaa, ve̱ lu er mba a kwase ga yô." 
1Corinthians7:30 Mba ve vaan kpaa ve̱ lu er mba vaan ga yô, mba ve yamen kwagh kpaa, ve̱ lu er mba a kwagh ga yô." 
1Corinthians7:31 Mba kwagh a zough ve a tar kpaa ve̱ lu er kwagh zua ve a u ga nahan. Gadia mluashe u tar ne ngu karen kera. 
1Corinthians7:32 Sarem u ma ne lu a ishima i nyian ga. Or u nan lu kwav yô, ishima ka i nyian nan sha akaa a Ter, er nana er man á doo Ter yô." 
1Corinthians7:33 Kpa or u nan lu a kwase yô, ishima ka i nyian nan sha akaa a taregh, er nana er man á doo kwase u nan yô," 
1Corinthians7:34 tsô asema hingir nan ahar. Kpa kwase u nan lu kwav shin iniunkwase yô, ishima ka i nyian nan sha akaa a Ter er nana er man nana lu wang ken iyol man ken jijingi kpaa yô. Kpa u nan lu a nom yô, ishima ka i nyian nan sha akaa a taregh er nana er man á doo nom u nan yô." 
1Corinthians7:35 M ngu ôron kwagh ne nahan ka u wasen ne a wase je, ka u tan ne icul ga, sha u né eren kwagh sha inja man né var a Ter er akaa a zan iyol aa kera lu ga yô." 
1Corinthians7:36 Kpa aluer orgen nan ngu henen er nan ngu eren sha mi ga a ishiôr i nan i iniunugh la man nana kera fatyô u wan ishima her ga yô, nana̱ er sha ishima i nan aluer gba u a lu nahan kpee yô; nan ngu eren isholibo ga; de, ve̱ zua ivaa." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kpa or u nan til ken ishima i nan jighilii, i kighir nan a kighir ga, nan lu a tahav u eren ishima i nan iyol i nan man nan wa ken ishima i nan er nana gba lun a ishiôr i nan i iniunugh la her nahan tsô yô, nan er doo." 
1Corinthians7:38 Nahan or u nana zua ivaa a ishiôr i nan i iniunugh yô, nan er sha mi je, kpa u nana zua ivaa ga yô, nan er doo kpishi." 
1Corinthians7:39 Kwase ngu sha tindi er nom u nan a lu uma yô. Kpa aluer nom u nan una kpe kera yô, nan ngu sha ian i nan iyol i nan, nan fatyô u eren nom sha ishima i nan, kpa i̱ lu ken Ter tseegh." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kpa aluer nana gba lun nahan tsô yô, á hemba saan nan iyol; ka mnenge wam je ne. Beem er mo kpaa, m ngu a Jijingi u Aôndo yô." 
1Corinthians8:1 Sha kwagh u inyamakombo yô, se fa er se cii se lu a kwaghfan yô. Kwaghfan yô, ne iyolmoron kpa dooshima yô, gem maan a maa." 
1Corinthians8:2 Aluer or ngu henen er nan fa ma kwagh yô, nan ngu a fa er i doo u ma nan fe la ga." 
1Corinthians8:3 Kpa aluer Aôndo Una doo or ishima yô, nan kpaa Aôndo fa nan." 
1Corinthians8:4 Nahan sha kwagh u inyamakombo i yan yô, se fa, ma akombo nga a inja sha won ga, man shi ma Aôndo ugen ngu ga, saa môm tseegh." 
1Corinthians8:5 Gadia shin er mba i yer ve er mbaaôndo la vea lu Sha shin shin tar yô,—gayô mbaaôndo ngee uter kpaa ngee—" 
1Corinthians8:6 kpa her a vese yô, Aôndo ngu môm tsô, ka Ter u akaa cii a dugh her a Na yô, man shi ka sha ci Na se lu uma ye; Ter kpaa ngu môm, ka Yesu Kristu, ka sha a Na man akaa cii a lu ye, se kpaa ka sha a Na se lu uma ye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kpa ka ken ior cii man kwaghfan ne a lu ga. Mbagenev yô, hoghol ve iyol a akombo zan zan hegen, ka ve ya kwagh la er ka inyamakombo nahan; tsô imo i ken asema a ve i i taver ga la i gema i hôngor." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kpa kwaghyan yô, ngu se ityôikaa sha ishigh ki Aôndo ga. Aluer se ya ga kpaa, se yina ga, aluer se ya kpaa, se seer ga." 
1Corinthians8:9 Kpa kura nen ayol, tahav enev mbula mbu̱ de hingir mba ve taver ga la ityôikaa i nôngon gbev ga." 
1Corinthians8:10 Gadia aluer orgen nana nenge a we, we u u lu a kwaghfan la, u ngu yan kwagh ken kwa akombo, imo i nan i taver ga i ken ishima la yô, ia kera kende nan ishima u yan inyamakombo gaa?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Nahan u nan taver ga la nana̱ gema nana̱ saa ishe sha kwaghfan wou la zee? Man ka anmgbian, u Kristu A kpe sha ci u nan je." 
1Corinthians8:12 Aluer ne er anmgbianev kwaghbo, ne vihi imo ve i ken asema i i taver ga la yô, ka Kristu je ne lu eren Un kwaghbo ye." 
1Corinthians8:13 Nahan yô, aluer kwaghyan una hingir ityôkwagh i nan anmgbian wam gbev mbu nôngon yô, mayange me kera ya inyam ga, sha u i̱ de ne anmgbian wam gbev mbu nôngon ga yô." 
1Corinthians9:1 Mo m ngu sha ian yam ga ha? Mo m ngu apostoli ga zee? M nenge a Yesu Ter wase ga ha? Ne kera mba tom wam ken Ter gaa? 
1Corinthians9:2 Aluer m ngu mbagenev apostoli ga kpaa, ne yô, m ngu ne apostoli keng je. Ka ne je, ne lu ikav i tesen sha tom wam u apostoli ken Ter ye." 
1Corinthians9:3 Ipalegh yam a mba ve lu karen mlu wam yô, ka i ne:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Se kera mba a tahav mbu yan kwagh, man shi man kwagh gaa?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Se kera mba a tahav mbu zenden a kwase wase u a lu anmgbian ken Ter er mbaapostoli mbagenev man anngôôv mba Ter man Kefa nahan gaa? 
1Corinthians9:6 Shin ka mo man Barnaba tsô se kera lu a tahav mbu den tomshiren la ga ase? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ka an nana nyôr tom u nôngon ityav man shi nana koson iyol i nana? Ka an nana er sule u wain man nana kera ya atam a u ga? Ka an nana kura ilev man nana kera ma atumba a mbi ga ase? 
1Corinthians9:8 M ngu ôron kwagh ne sha tahav mbu or tsô shinii? Tindi yô, kaa nahan gaa?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Gadia ken tindi u Mose i nger er: De we bua kper sha zwa zum u a lu shoghol iyiagh la ga. Nahan ka ibua man Aôndo A we i iko yee? 
1Corinthians9:10 Kera ka sha ci wase jim man A ôr nahan ye gaa? Ka sha ci wase je lu i nger nahan ye, gadia or u kahan sule yô, ka u nana kaha sha ishimaverenkeghen, u nan shoghol iyiagh kpaa, i̱ lu sha ishimaverenkeghen, sha u nana zua a kwagh yô." 
1Corinthians9:11 Aluer ka se se te ne ivor ken jijingi yô, gema ka zegekwagh je u sé sunda akaa a en ken iyol ye zee?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Aluer mbagenev mba a tahav sha a ven yô, kera guda se gaa? Kpa se er kwagh sha tahav mbula ga; kpa m gba taver ishima sha akaa cii tsô sha u m̱ de te Loho u Dedoo u Kristu icul ga yô." 
1Corinthians9:13 Ne kera fa er mba ve eren tom sha uicighanmbaakaav mba ken tempel la ve ye kwagh ken tempel gaa? Man shi mba ve eren tom sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi yô, mba zough a kwar sha atse gaa?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Kape Ter kaa la er: mbapasen Loho u Dedoo kpaa, ve̱ lu uma sha Loho u Dedoo la." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kpa mo yô, m er kwagh sha akaa a i ne ian sha mi ne môm môm kpaa ga. Man m ngu ngeren akaa ne sha u i̱ erem a kpaa ga, gadia guda u me kpe kera a u ma or nana̱ bunde ihagh yam ne." 
1Corinthians9:16 Gadia aluer m ngu ôron Loho u Dedoo yô, kam kwagh u tan ihagh a mi ga, gadia i kighir mo a kighir je. Aluer me ôr Loho u Dedoo ga yô, kwagh á tserem." 
1Corinthians9:17 Aluer m ngu eren kwagh ne sha ishima i gbar gbar yô, m ngu a injar, aluer ka sha ishima i gbar gbar ga kpaa, i nam a na tom sha ikev." 
1Corinthians9:18 Ka nyi je i lu injar yama? Ka er me na Loho u Dedoo gbilin er m lu ôron u yô, sha u me kera er kwagh sha tahav av mbu sha Loho u Dedoo la cii ga yô." 
1Corinthians9:19 Shin er m lu uikangen hen ma or ga nahan kpaa, m gema iyol yam m hingir kpan u ior cii sha u me hemba kôron ior yô." 
1Corinthians9:20 Mbayuda yô, m hingir ve er ka Oryuda nahan sha u me kôr Mbayuda yô. Mba ve lu sha tindi yô, m hingir ve er ka or u sha atindi nahan, sha u me kôr mba ve lu sha atindi la, shin er mo iyol yam m lu or u sha atindi ga nahan kpaa." 
1Corinthians9:21 Mba ve lu sha atindi ga yô, m hingir ve er ka or u sha atindi ga yô, sha u me kôr mba ve lu sha atindi ga la, nahan kpaa m ngu or u sha atindi a Aôndo ga ze, m ngu sha atindi a Kristu." 
1Corinthians9:22 Aseeraior yô, m hingir ve er ka isheeror nahan sha u me kôr aseeraior yô. Ior cii m hingir ve hanma kwagh cii, sha u a lu nan nan kpaa, me yima mbagenev yô." 
1Corinthians9:23 M er akaa cii sha ci u Loho u Dedoo sha u me zua a kwar sha mi yô. 
1Corinthians9:24 Ne kera fa gaa? Mbagban ayem ken iniumbe ka ve yevese cii, kpa ka môm tsô nan tôô iwua la ye gaa? Yô, yevese nen sha er né zua a mi yô." 
1Corinthians9:25 Hanma or u wan iyol sha iniumbe yô, ka nan kôr iyol i nan tsaha sha akaa cii. Ve yô, ka sha u zuan a tsar u usen tsô, kpa se yô, ka u usen ga." 
1Corinthians9:26 Mo yô, m ngu yevese bema be bema ga, m ngu tan azu er or u tan ahumbe dang nahan ga." 
1Corinthians9:27 M ngu gbidyen iyol yam m ngu veren i ken kpan je, sha u i̱ de lu u m ôr mbagenev kwaghaôndo kera man mo iyol yam yô, m̱ gema m̱ yina sha ikaren ga." 
1Corinthians10:1 Sarem ka de lanen nen ga, anmgbianev. Uter asev cii lu shin ityô i ibeen shi ve cii ve per zegemnger la." 
1Corinthians10:2 Ve cii i er ve batisema ken Mose, ken ibeen kua ken zegemnger la." 
1Corinthians10:3 Ve cii ve ya kwaghyan u sha inja i jijingi la môm je. 
1Corinthians10:4 Shi ve cii kpaa ve ma kwaghman u sha inja i jijingi la môm je. Gadia ve lu man ken vande u sha inja i jijingi u u lu zan a ve ityô la. Vande la yô, lu Kristu je." 
1Corinthians10:5 Ken ve yô, mba i doo Aôndo a ve ga la ve hemba ngeen gadia A tim ve ken ikôngo." 
1Corinthians10:6 Akaa ne hingir se ikav i nengen sha mi sha u asorabo a̱ de saren se er a lu saren mbala nahan ga. 
1Corinthians10:7 De luun nen mbacivirakombo er mbagenev ken ve ve eren nahan ga. Kape i nger la er: Nongoior la tema inya sha u vea ya kwagh vea ma kwagh shi ve kighir ve mough sha sha u vinen amar. 
1Corinthians10:8 Se yô, se kera er nen idya er mbagenev ken ve ve er nahan la ga, ve gba inya ve kpe iyange i môm ior dubu ikundu kar utar." 
1Corinthians10:9 Se kera kar nen Ter er mbagenev ken ve lu ve eren man ve gba iyô nahan ga. 
1Corinthians10:10 De gbe nen ahon er mbagenev ken ve lu ve gba ahon man ortiminior gema tim ve nahan ga. 
1Corinthians10:11 Akaa ne er ve, lu akav a tesen man i nger a sha u a̱ lu se ityesen, se mba mkur u ashighe a ve sha a vese ne yô." 
1Corinthians10:12 Nahan yô, or u nan fe er nan tile yô, nana̱ ver ishima er nana kera va gba ga yô." 
1Corinthians10:13 Ma imeen ngi a tser ne ga, saa i hemban or ga la. Kpa Aôndo yô, ka u jighjigh, Una rumun er i̱ va mee ne i̱ hemba agee a en ga, kpa ken imeen la Una bugh ne gbenda u waren sha er ne tile dông yô." 
1Corinthians10:14 Nahan yô, ne mbadoon mo ishima, yevese nen akombo a civir." 
1Corinthians10:15 M ngu ôron kwagh er ka i ôr a mbakavenkwagh yô. Kar nen kwagh u m kaan ne ne: 
1Corinthians10:16 Iyongo i ishughun i se nan ishughun sha ci u i la yô, kera ka mzough wase a awambe a Kristu gaa? Bredi u se coon la, kera ka mzough a iyol i Kristu gaa?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Er bredi la a lu môm yô, nahan se mba se lu kpishi kpaa, se mba iyol i môm je, gadia se cii se ya bredi môm la." 
1Corinthians10:18 Nenge nen sha kwagh u mba i mar ve ve lu Mbaiserael la. Mba ve ye nagh yô, ve zua ve hingir kwagh môm a atse a nanden nagh sha mi la gaa?" 
1Corinthians10:19 M ngu ôron nana? Nagh ku i ne sha akombo la, ka ma kwagha? Shin akombo ka ma kwagha?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Ei. M ngu kaan mer: Akaa a ve senge la yô, ka sha ci u ujijingi mba bov je, kera ka sha ci u Aôndo ve senge a ga. Man sarem u ma ne zough ma ne lu kwagh môm a ujijingi mba bov ga." 
1Corinthians10:21 Ne fatyô u man iyongo i Ter kua i ujijingi mba bov la imôngo ga. Ne fatyô u yan sha tebul u Ter kua sha tebul u ujijingi mba bov la kpaa ga. 
1Corinthians10:22 Shin se mba bamen Ter ser, A̱ er iwuhee? Shin se hemba Un agee ase?" 
1Corinthians10:23 I na ian sha akaa cii. Kpa ka akaa cii man a lu iwasen ga. I na ian sha akaa cii kpa ka akaa cii a lu mmaa ga. 
1Corinthians10:24 Ma or nana̱ de keren kwagh u doon sha ci u nan iyol i nan tsô ga, kpa i̱ lu kwagh u doon orgen kpaa." 
1Corinthians10:25 Hanma inyam i i teen hen ijiir i teen inyam la yô, gba yan nen tsô, de pin kwagh sha mi ga, sha ci u imo i ken ishima la." 
1Corinthians10:26 Gadia tar ka u Ter je, man m-iv u u." 
1Corinthians10:27 Aluer orgen u ken mbanan jighjigh ga la nana lôhô ne kwaghyan man a lu ne pe zan yô, hanma kwagh u á za due ne a mi yô, gba yan nen tsô, de pin kwagh sha mi ga sha ci u imo i ken ishima la." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kpa aluer orgen nana kaa a ven er: Ngin ka inyamakombo yô, de kera ye nen ga, sha ci u or u nan pase ne kwagh la yô, man sha ci u imo i ken ishima la kpaa." 
1Corinthians10:29 Ka imo i ken ishima you la, m er kwagh sha mi ga, ka i orgen la. Gadia ka nyi man ian yam i eren akaa la, imo i ken ishima i orgen ia ôr ijir sha mini?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Aluer m ngu yan kwagh sha ishughun yô, ka nyi man á va ôr kwagh dang sha a mo sha kwagh u m sughun sha mi laa?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Nahan yô, aluer nea yaan kwagh, shin nea maan kwagh shin nea eren nyityô kwagh kpaa, eren nen akaa cii sha ci u icivir i Aôndo." 
1Corinthians10:32 De ne nen Mbayuda anzughul ga shin Mbagrika shin nongo u Kristu u Aôndo kpaa ga," 
1Corinthians10:33 di er mo kpaa, ken hanma kwagh cii m eren kwagh u doon ior cii nahan, gadia ka mtsera wam iyol yam m lu keren ga, kpa ka u mbagenev kpishi sha u ma ve war yô." 
1Corinthians11:1 Lu nen mbakaven mo er mo kpaa, m kaven Kristu nahan." 
1Corinthians11:2 M wuese ne je er ne lu umbur mo sha hanma kwagh cii, man ne lu kuran ityesen er m ne ne nahan vough." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kpa sarem ka fa nen, ityough ki hanma nomsoor yô, ka Kristu, man ityough ki kwase yô, gema ka nom, man ityough ki Kristu yô, ka Aôndo je." 
1Corinthians11:4 Hanma nomsoor u nana eren msen shin nana ôron kwaghôron u profeti man nan cir kwagh sha ityou yô, nan ngu heen ityough ki nan." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kpa hanma kwase u nana eren msen shin nana ôron kwaghôron u profeti man nan cir kwagh sha ityou ga yô, nan ngu heen ityough ki nan je, gadia ka kwagh môm a u ma nan gbongor ityough je." 
1Corinthians11:6 Aluer kwase nana cir kwagh sha ityou ga yô, nana̱ hondo ase ityough kpaa. Kpa a lu kwase kwagh u iheenegh u hondon ityough shin u gbongor ityough yô, nana̱ cir kwagh sha ityou." 
1Corinthians11:7 Kpa nomsoor yô, ka u nana cir kwagh sha ityough ga gadia nan ngu ibeen man iengem i Aôndo, man kwase gema ka iengem i nomsoor." 
1Corinthians11:8 Gadia ka nom nan dugh ken kwase ga, kpa ka kwase nan dugh ken nomsoor ye." 
1Corinthians11:9 Man shi i gba nom sha ci u kwase ga, kpa i gba kwase sha ci u nom." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ka nahan man i lu u kwase nana̱ lu a ikav i utaha sha ityou kpee sha ci u mbatyomov mba Shaav ye. 
1Corinthians11:11 Nahan kpaa ken Ter yô, kwase gbe lun ga, saa nomsoor kpaa nana lu, man shi nomsoor kpaa nan gbe lun ga, saa kwase nana lu." 
1Corinthians11:12 Gadia er kwase nan dugh ken nomsoor nahan yô, nomsoor di kpaa ka kwase a ne ve nan lu ye; man akaa cii gema ka ken Aôndo a dugh ye." 
1Corinthians11:13 Yô, nenge nen ayol a en: Doo u kwase nana sôn Aôndo nana cir kwagh sha ityou ga kpa?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Kera je kpaa mlu u sha won tese er ka nomsoor kwagh u iheenegh u nana ume ityough gaa? 
1Corinthians11:15 Kpa kwase yô, aluer nana ume ityough yô, ka nan kwagh u icivirigh je. Gadia i na nan ice la sha u i̱ lu nan kwagh u cirin." 
1Corinthians11:16 Aluer ma or wa anyiman yum yô, se yô, se mba a imbaieren la nahan ga, shin iniongo i Kristu i Aôndo kpaa ga." 
1Corinthians11:17 M ngu wan ne kwagh ne nahan kpaa, kwagh u m wuese ne sha mi gayô, ka er mkohol u ne kohol la i kera lu kwagh u doon a dugh heregh ga, i gem i lu kwagh u vihin a vihi yô." 
1Corinthians11:18 Gadia kwagh u hiihii yô, m ungwa mer, mbampav mba her atô wen man m wa nan kwagh la jighjigh kpaa." 
1Corinthians11:19 Gadia ka u mbamkaha vea lu ken a ven keng sha u mbamimi ve̱ due ken igbar yô. 
1Corinthians11:20 Ka nea kohol yô, i kera lu u yan kwaghyan u umbur Ter la ga." 
1Corinthians11:21 Gadia hanma or ka nan gba sasen yan kwaghyan u nan iyol i nan tsô. Orgen ijen i lu kôron nan orgen di nan lu hunden je. 
1Corinthians11:22 Nahan yô, ne kera mba a uya mba né ya kwagh ker, né ma kwagh ker gaa? Shin ka nongo u Kristu u Aôndo ne lahan ve ne ne mba ve lu a kwagh ga la iheene? Tsô me kaa ne nana? Me wuese nee? Sha kwagh ne yô, m ngu wuese ne ga." 
1Corinthians11:23 Gadia mo yô, kwagh u m ngohol un hen Ter yô, m gema m na ne mer: Ter Yesu tôô bredi hen tugh mbu i nenge Un mker la," 
1Corinthians11:24 sughun Aôndo yô, A coon A kaa er: Ngun ka iyol Yam je ne, ngi sha ci wen. Eren nen kwagh ne sha u umbur Mo." 
1Corinthians11:25 Mba ye kwaghyan kera yô, A tôô iyongo nahan vough A kaa er: Iyongo ne yô, ka Ikuryan i he i sha awambe Am. Eren nen kwagh ne sha u umbur Mo sha hanma shighe u nea maan i cii." 
1Corinthians11:26 Gadia hanma shighe u nea yaan bredi ne man shi nea maan iyôngo ne yô, ka ku u Ter je ne lu yôôn u ye; zan zan Una kar van." 
1Corinthians11:27 Nahan hanma or u nana ya bredi ne shin nana ma iyongo i Ter sha dang yô, nana lu a ibo sha iyol i Ter man sha awambe a Na kpaa." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kpa or nana̱ kar iyol i nan man nana ya bredi la man nana ma iyongo la ye. 
1Corinthians11:29 Kpa u nana ya shi nana ma yô, nan ngu yan man nan ngu man haan mtsaha sha iyol i nan aluer nana kav er i lu iyol i Ter ga yô." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ka nahan man mbagenev kpishi ken a ven ve lu aseeraior, ve lu dedoo ga kpaa ye, mbagenev kpe kera je." 
1Corinthians11:31 Kpa aluer sea kar ayol a ase mimi yô, ma i er se ijir ga." 
1Corinthians11:32 Kpa ka Ter je A lu karen mlu wase kôôm se ye, sha u i̱ de tsahan se a tar imôngo ga yô." 
1Corinthians11:33 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, aluer ne kohol sha u yan kwagh yô, kegh nen anmgbianev kpaa." 
1Corinthians11:34 Aluer ijen ia kôr orgen yô, nana̱ ya kwagh ken ya u nan sha er mkohol wen la a̱ de hee ne mtsaha iyol ga yô. Akaa a a shi yô, me va wa kwagh sha mi shighe u me va yô." 
1Corinthians12:1 Hegen yô, anmgbianev, sha kwagh u uiwua mba jijingi yô, sarem ka de lanen nen ga." 
1Corinthians12:2 Ne fa, shighe u ne lu atôatyev la, i gba yemen a ven ken akombo a lamen ga la tsô, i za a ven han han kpaa." 
1Corinthians12:3 Nahan yô, m ngu pasen ne sha u fa nen, ma or u nan er kwagh sha Jijingi u Aôndo yô, nana kaa er: Yesu ngu a ifan iyol ga, man shi ma or nana fatyô u kaan er: Yesu ka Ter ga; saa sha Icighan Jijingi." 
1Corinthians12:4 Uiwua mba atôghatô kpa ka Jijingi môm tsô. 
1Corinthians12:5 Ityom kpaa ngi atôghatô, kpa ka Ter môm tsô." 
1Corinthians12:6 Akaa a eren kpaa nga atôghatô kpa ka Aôndo môm tsô A eren akaa ne cii ken hanma or ye. 
1Corinthians12:7 Kpa i na hanma or mpase u Jijingi sha u i̱ lu mbagenev cii a inja yô. 
1Corinthians12:8 Gadia orgen yô, ka sha Jijingi man i ne nan kwaghôron u sha kwaghfan ye, orgen yô, i na nan kwaghôron u kaven kwagh, sha Jijingi môm la je." 
1Corinthians12:9 Ugen yô, ka jighjigh u nan, kpa ka sha Jijingi môm la je; orgen yô, ka uiwua mba been ior angev, kpa ka sha Jijingi môm la je." 
1Corinthians12:10 Orgen yô, ka aeren a sha agee, orgen yô, ka u ôron kwaghôron u profeti, orgen yô, ka u karen ujijingi, orgen yô, ka u lamen ijô kposo kposo, orgen yô, ka u pasen ijô." 
1Corinthians12:11 Kpa akaa ne cii ka Jijingi ne môm A lu eren a ye, A karen hanma or kwar er i doo Un yô." 
1Corinthians12:12 Gadia er iyol i lu i môm man i lu a alegh kpishi yô, man alegh a iyolough a a lu kpishi la, a lu iyol i môm tsô yô, kape Kristu kpaa A lu je la." 
1Corinthians12:13 Gadia se cii kpaa, ka sha Jijingi môm i er se batisema ken iyol i môm ye, shin a lu Mbayuda, shin a lu Mbagrika, shin a lu ikpan shin a lu ônov kpaa, se cii i haa se Jijingi môm, heen se iyol cii." 
1Corinthians12:14 Gadia iyol kpaa ka ilyeegh i môm ga, alegh nga kpishi je." 
1Corinthians12:15 Aluer nguhar ua kaa er: Er m lu uwegh ga yô, nahan m kera ngu ken iyol ga; sha kwagh la tsô yô, ngu ken iyol ga ze." 
1Corinthians12:16 Man aluer togh kua kaa er: Er m lu ishe ga yô, nahan m kera ngu ken iyol ga; sha kwagh la tsô yô, ku ken iyol ga ze." 
1Corinthians12:17 Aluer iyol cii ia lu ishe yô, m-ongo ma a lu hana? A lu m-ongo jimin cii yô, ihuma i hungul ma i lu hana?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kpa hegen Aôndo ver alegh ken iyol hanmôgh ser ser er i doo Un yô. 
1Corinthians12:19 Kpa aluer a cii a lu ilyeegh i môm yô, iyol ma i lu hana?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Kpa hegen alegh yô, nga kpishi, kpa iyol gema ngi môm." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ishe ia fatyô u kaan a uwegh er: Kwagh gbam a we ga, ze; shin ityough kpaa kia fatyô u kaan a angahar er: kwagh gbam a ven ga, ze." 
1Corinthians12:22 Man ka nahan tseegh ga, kpa alegh a iyolough a i bee er a yina agee la gema nga a inja her keng." 
1Corinthians12:23 Man alegh a iyolough a i bee se er a yina icivir la, ka a je se hembe haan a icivir iyol ye, man alegh a ase a a doo ken igbar ga la, se mba hembe wuhan a iyol." 
1Corinthians12:24 Kpa alegh a ase a a doo ken igbar la yô, kwagh kera gba a nahan ga. Aôndo kohol iyol cii, zua, ilyeegh ki ki gbe ijime yô, A hemba nan ki icivir," 
1Corinthians12:25 sha u mpav a̱ de lu sha iyol ga yô, kpa alegh a̱ waan iyol a a iko vough vough cii." 
1Corinthians12:26 Aluer ican ngi eren ilyeegh i môm yô, alegh cii aa lu ken ican la imôngo. Aluer a civir ilyeegh i môm yô, a cii, aa ember imôngo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Kpa ne yô, ne mba iyol i Kristu man alegh a i ser ser." 
1Corinthians12:28 Man Aôndo ver mbagenev ken nongo u Kristu: hiihii yô, ka mbaapostoli, u dondon yô, ka uprofeti u cirin yô ka mbatesen, u gbiren sha mi yô, ka ityom i ageegh, u masen la yô, ka uiwua mba sha mrumun u sha mhôôn sha u been angev, man uiwasen man mnenge u nengen sha akaa, man ijô kposo kposo kpaa." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ka ve cii ve lu mbaapostoli yee? Ka ve cii ve lu uprofeti yee? Ka ve cii ve lu mbatesen yee? Ka ve cii ve eren akaa a sha agee yee? 
1Corinthians12:30 Ka ve cii ve lu a uiwua mba sha mrumun u sha mhôôn sha u been angev yee? Ka ve cii ve lu lamen ijô yee? Ka ve cii ve lu mbapasen ijô yee? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kpa nôngo nen ngegh sha u zuan a uiwua mba ve hembe lun a inja cii yô; man me gema me tese ne gbenda u hemban jimin cii. 
1Corinthians13:1 Aluer mea ôron kwagh sha ijô i ior man i mbatyomov mba Shaav je kpaa, mea lu a dooshima ga yô, m hingir er iyôgh ki uvan nahan, shin kwen u kaan." 
1Corinthians13:2 Aluer i nam u ôron kwaghôron u profeti man mea fa akaamyer cii man kwaghfan cii kpaa, man mea lu a jighjigh u nan je una kuma u moughon a iwo, kpa mea lu a dooshima ga yô, m ngu ma kwagh je ga." 
1Corinthians13:3 Man aluer mea gema akaa a m lu a mi cii, mea kar mbagenev shin aluer mea na iyol yam mer, i̱ nandem sha usu kpaa, mea lu a dooshima ga yô, á lum a inja sha ma kwagh môm môm ga." 
1Corinthians13:4 Dooshima we ishima, lu sar sar gbe iwuhe ga; dooshima gengese iyol ga, moron iyol kpaa ga," 
1Corinthians13:5 we dang ga, keren kwagh na iyol na tsô ga, nyoon ishima ga, koson kwagh u bo ken ishima ga." 
1Corinthians13:6 Ka saan un iyol a ifer ga, kpa saan un iyol a kwagh u mimi." 
1Corinthians13:7 Dooshima we ishima a akaa cii; un ne jighjigh sha akaa cii, luun a ishimaverenkeghen sha akaa cii, taver ishima sha akaa cii." 
1Corinthians13:8 Dooshima been mayange ga, kpa u ôron akaaôron a profeti yô, á va kar a mi kera, shin a lu ijô kpaa, ia bee, shin a lu mfe kpaa, á va kar a mi kera." 
1Corinthians13:9 Gadia mfe wase yina, kwaghôron wase u profeti la kpaa yina." 
1Corinthians13:10 Kpa zum u kwagh u a lu vough la una va yô, á kar a kwagh u a yen la kera." 
1Corinthians13:11 Zum u m lu wanye la yô, m ôron kwagh er wanye nahan, m henen kwagh er wanye nahan, m nengen kwagh ken ishima er wanye nahan. Kpa hegen er m hingir orvesen ne yô, m de akaa a uye la." 
1Corinthians13:12 Gadia hegen se mba nengen ken ijingi cing kpa shighe la yô, á lu ishigh a ishigh. Hegen yô, mfe wam yina kpa hen shighe la me fa kwagh vough di er i fem vough nahan." 
1Corinthians13:13 Hegen yô, akaa ne nga lun her, ka jighjigh u nan man ishimaverenkeghen kua dooshima, nga atar je; kpa kwagh u hemban ken a yô, ka dooshima." 
1Corinthians14:1 Za nen a dooshima ityô kpa nôngo nen ngegh sha u zuan a uiwua mba sha jijingi, kpa hemba veren nen ishima sha u ôron kwaghôron u profeti." 
1Corinthians14:2 Or u lamen ijô yô, ka ior nan er kwagh a ve ga, kpa ka Aôndo je, gadia or môm kpaa nan ongo ga, nan ngu ôron akaa a myer ken jijingi." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kpa or u nan er kwaghôron u profeti yô, ka ior je nan er kwagh a ve ye, sha u maan ve a maa man sha u surun ve asema man shi u taver ve asema kpaa." 
1Corinthians14:4 Or u lamen ijô yô, ka iyol i nan tseegh nan maan ye, kpa or u nan er kwaghôron u profeti yô, ka nongo u Kristu nan lu maan ye." 
1Corinthians14:5 Sarem u ne cii ma ne lu lamen ijô, kpa hemba saren mo u ma ne ôr kwaghôron u profeti. Gadia or u nan er kwaghôron u profeti yô, nan hemba or u lamen ijô la, saa nana̱ pase i, nongo u Kristu kpaa, u̱ zua a mmaa sha mi." 
1Corinthians14:6 Hegen yô, anmgbianev, aluer me va her a ven man mea lamen ijô yô, me lu ne a inja nana, saa me ôr ne kwagh sha mpase u sha mnenge shin sha kwaghfan shin sha kwaghôron u profeti shin sha ityesen." 
1Corinthians14:7 Akaa a lun a uma ga, a a eren imo la kpaa, kape a lu je la, er imar shin adiguve nahan, aluer vea pav imo ga yô, á er nan man á fa kwagh u imar shin adiguve ve kaana?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Gadia ikpamkor kpaa, aluer ia kaa imo hughuluu yô, ka an nana kange iyol i utya?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Kape ne kpaa aluer ne mba lamen ma zwa man á wanger u ungwan ga yô, á fa kwagh u i lu ôron nana? Gadia né lu er ior mba lamen a ahumbe nahan." 
1Corinthians14:10 Amo nga sha won kposo kposo ngee je, kpa hanmô de ngin a ikenge i i ga." 
1Corinthians14:11 Nahan aluer me kar inja i ikenge la ga yô, me hingir or u ôron kwagh la er ortyôtyev nahan man or u ôron kwagh la di kpaa nana hingir mo er ka ortyôtyev nahan." 
1Corinthians14:12 Ne kpaa er ne lu nôngon ngegh sha u zuan a uiwua mba sha jijingi la yô, kape ma ne nenge ngegh sha u hemban maan a maa nongo u Kristu je la." 
1Corinthians14:13 Kape i lu man or u ôron kwagh sha ma zwa la nana̱ er msen sha u ma nan pase u kpaa yô. 
1Corinthians14:14 Gadia aluer m ngu eren msen sha imbazwa la yô, ka jijingi wam tsô a lu eren msen ye, kpa mhen wam yô, tema gbilin." 
1Corinthians14:15 Tsô á er nana? Me er msen sha jijingi shi me er msen sha mhen kpaa. Me wa icam sha jijingi, shi me wa icam sha mhen kpaa." 
1Corinthians14:16 A lu nahan ga yô, wea sughun sha jijingi yô, á er nan man u nan lu sha ian i fan kwagh la ga la, nana rumun er, “Amen” sha ishughun you laa? Gadia nan fa kwagh u u lu ôron la ga." 
1Corinthians14:17 Gadia we yô, u ngu sughun doo kpekpe, kpa orgen la yô, i maa nan a maa ga." 
1Corinthians14:18 M ngu sughun Aôndo er m hembe lamen ijô a ven cii yô. 
1Corinthians14:19 Nahan kpaa, ken nongo u Kristu yô, hemba doon mo u ôron asemberakaa ataan sha mhen wam a u ôron asemberakaa dubu pue sha imbazwa la." 
1Corinthians14:20 Anmgbianev av, de kera luun nen yev yev sha mhen wen ga; sha gbenda u kwaghbo yô, lu nen anikundanev, kpa sha mhen yô, lu nen mbavesen." 
1Corinthians14:21 I nger ken atindi er: Ka sha ior mba ve lu zwa ugen man sha ityumbujôôgh i mbagenev man Me ôr kwagh a nongoior ne ye. Heera je kpaa vea ungwa ato, kape Ter A kaa la." 
1Corinthians14:22 Nahan ijô i lamen ne ka ikav sha ci u mbananjighjigh la ga, kpa ka sha ci u mba ve ne jighjigh ga la. Kpa u ôron kwaghôron u profeti yô, ka sha ci u mbanan jighjigh ga la ze, kpa gema ka sha ci u mba ve ne jighjigh la." 
1Corinthians14:23 Nahan aluer nongo u Kristu cii ua kohol ijiir i môm man ve cii vea lu lamen ijô man mba ve fe kwagh la ga, shin mba ve ne jighjigh ga la vea va nyôr yô, vea kera kaa er ne mba hunden gaa?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kpa aluer ve cii vea lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti yô, man orgen nana nyôr, a lu or u nan jighjigh ga, shin or u fan kwagh la ga yô, nahan ve cii vea kôôm nan, ve cii vea kar nan kpaa," 
1Corinthians14:25 akaa a myer a ken ishima i nan aa hingir ken igbar, nana kuma ishigh inya nana wuese Aôndo, nana pase er, mimi je Aôndo ngu ken a ven." 
1Corinthians14:26 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, kwagh ne ngu nana? Ka nea kohol ijiir i môm yô, hanmô wen nan lu a icam shin ityesen shin mpase shin u lamen ma zwa, shin u pasen inja i u. Yô, i̱ er hanma kwagh cii sha u maan a maa." 
1Corinthians14:27 Aluer mba lamen ma zwa yô, i̱ lu ior ihiar, i̱ de hembe utar ga, i̱ lamen môm môm man ugen nana̱ gema nana̱ pasen." 
1Corinthians14:28 Kpa aluer or u pasen zwa la nana lu ga yô, or la nana̱ huan ving ken nongo u Kristu nana̱ ôr kwagh a iyol i nan kua a Aôndo kpaa." 
1Corinthians14:29 Uprofeti yô, ve̱ ôr kwagh, ior ihiar shin itiar, mbagenev di ve̱ gema ve̱ kar kwaghôron la." 
1Corinthians14:30 Aluer orgen u nan tem heregh nana zua a mpase yô, or u hiihii la nana̱ huan." 
1Corinthians14:31 Gadia ne cii ne fatyô u ôron kwaghôron u profeti môm môm, sha u ne cii ne zua a ityesen man á taver ne asema kpaa." 
1Corinthians14:32 Man ujijingi mba uprofeti mba ongo imo i uprofeti. 
1Corinthians14:33 Gadia Aôndo ka u nzughul nzughul ga, kpa ka u bem. Er i lu ken iniongo i Kristu i u icighanmbaiorov cii nahan yô," 
1Corinthians14:34 kasev ve̱ luun ving ken nongo u Kristu. Gadia i na ve ian i ôron kwagh ga, ve̱ ungwan kwagh, er atindi kpaa a kaa nahan." 
1Corinthians14:35 Kpa aluer a sar ve pe zuan a ityesen sha ma kwagh yô, ve̱ pine noov vev ken ya. Ka kwagh u iheenegh je u kwase nana ôr kwagh ken nongo u Kristu." 
1Corinthians14:36 Shin ka her a ven kwaghôron u Aôndo a dughu? Shin ka ne tseegh i ôr ne un yee? 
1Corinthians14:37 Aluer orgen nana hen er nan ngu profeti shin or u ken jijingi yô, nana̱ fa er akaa a m nger ne yô, ka tindi u Ter je." 
1Corinthians14:38 Aluer orgen nana wa kwagh ne iko ga yô, nan kpaa i̱ de we nan iko ga." 
1Corinthians14:39 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, nôngo nen ngegh sha u ôron kwaghôron u profeti kpa i̱ de yangen ijô i lamen la ga." 
1Corinthians14:40 Kpa i̱ eren akaa cii tsembelee je, sha inja sha inja." 
1Corinthians15:1 Anmgbianev, m ngu pasen ne sha u fa nen Loho u Dedoo u m ôr ne, ne ngohol ne til sha mi la." 
1Corinthians15:2 Ka sha u kpaa i lu yiman ne ye, aluer ne kôr ave sha mi gbang er m lu pasen ne kwaghôron la nahan, saa di nea na jighjigh gbilin tsô." 
1Corinthians15:3 Gadia kwagh u vesen u mo kpaa m ngohol a ngohol m gem m ne ne yô: Kristu kpe sha asorabo ase er lu i nger ken icighanruamabera nahan. 
1Corinthians15:4 I ii Un, sha iyange i sha utar la yô, A nder er lu i nger ken icighanruamabera nahan." 
1Corinthians15:5 A ande hen Kefa, dondo sha mi yô, lu hen mba pue kar uhar." 
1Corinthians15:6 Shi A ande hen anmgbianev hemba deri utaan sha shighe môm je, ken ve yô, mba ve lu uma her zan zan hegen ve hemba ngeen, kpa mbagenev yô, kpe kera." 
1Corinthians15:7 Shi A ande hen Yakobu, man shi hen mbaapostoli cii kpaa." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ken masetyô cii yô, mo kpaa A ande hen mo er wan u i mar un kôgh nahan." 
1Corinthians15:9 Gadia mo m hemba gban ijime ken mbaapostoli cii m kuma u á yilam er apostoli kpaa ga, gadia m tôv nongo u Kristu u Aôndo a ican." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kpa ka sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo je man m lu kwagh u m lu ne ye, man mrumun Na u sha mhôôn u hen a mo la lu gbilin ga, kpa m hemba eren tom a ve cii, nahan kpaa lu mo ga, lu mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo u a lu a mo la." 
1Corinthians15:11 Nahan shin a lu mo, shin a lu ve kpaa, kape se lu ôron kwaghaôndo je ne, man kape ne na jighjigh kpaa ne." 
1Corinthians15:12 Aluer mba pasen kwagh u Kristu er A nder shin mbakpenev yô, hii nan man mbagenev ken ven ve kaan er mnder u shin mbakpenev ngu ga?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Aluer mnder u shin mbakpenev ngu ga yô, nahan Kristu kpaa, i nder a Na ga." 
1Corinthians15:14 Man aluer i nder a Kristu ga yô, kwaghaôndo wase u pasen ngu gbilin tsô, jighjigh wen u nan kpaa ngu gbilin." 
1Corinthians15:15 Shi á va fa se er se lu mbashiada mba Aôndo mba aiev, gadia se mba sendegh kwagh a Aôndo eren shiada ser, A nder Kristu, man A nder Un ga je, aluer mnder u shin mbakpenev ngu ga yô." 
1Corinthians15:16 Gadia aluer mba nderen mbakpenev ga yô, Kristu kpaa i nder Un ga je ve." 
1Corinthians15:17 Man aluer i nder Kristu ga yô, jighjigh wen u nan kpaa ka gbilinkwagh tsô, ne mba ken asorabo a en her je." 
1Corinthians15:18 Nahan mba ve kpe ken Kristu la kpaa ve saa je ve. 
1Corinthians15:19 Aluer ka sha uma u hegen ne tseegh man se lu a ishimaverenkeghen sha Kristu yô, se hemba kôron mhôônom a ior cii." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kpa mimi je i nder Kristu shin mbakpenev, ka iyiagh ki tsutswagh ken mba ve kpe kera la." 
1Corinthians15:21 Gadia er i lu sha or man ku u ve yô, kape mnder u shin mbakpenev di kpaa i lu sha or je la." 
1Corinthians15:22 Gadia er i lu ken Adam man ior cii ve lu kpen yô, kape ken Kristu kpaa, á gema ior cii vea hingir mbaumav la." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kpa hanma or nana̱ lu sha nongo u nan. Iyiagh ki tsutswagh yô, ka Kristu; kwagh u a dondon yô, ka mba ve lu ior i Kristu sha m-ande Na la," 
1Corinthians15:24 u cirin yô, ka mkur zum u Una gema tartor Una na Aôndo Ter, er A vande timin tarkuran cii kera man tahav kua agee cii kpaa." 
1Corinthians15:25 Gadia ka u Una ya tor keng, zan zan Una gema mbaihomov Nav cii, vea lu shin angahar a Na." 
1Corinthians15:26 Orihom u masetyô u á tim un kera yô, ka ku." 
1Corinthians15:27 Gadia A gema akaa cii A wa sha ikev Na A ver shin angahar a Na je, kpa zum u i kaa er: I gema akaa cii hingir sha ikev Na yô, wanger er Un u A gema akaa cii A wa sha ikev Na la i we Un ker ga yô." 
1Corinthians15:28 Zum u á va gema akaa cii á hingir sha ikev Na yô, Wan kpaa Una gema iyol Na Una wa sha ikev i Un u A gem akaa cii A wa sha ikev Na la, sha er Aôndo Una hoghom cii ken hanma or cii yô." 
1Corinthians15:29 A lu nahan ga yô, mba i eren ve batisema sha ci u mbakpenev la, vea er nana? Aluer mba nderen mbakpenev mayange je ga yô, ka nyi man i eren ior mbala batisema sha ci ve?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Ka nyi se lu zorough zorough a kwagh u tseren se u bo hanma shighe? 
1Corinthians15:31 Mimi je, sha ihagh i m te sha a ven ken Kristu Yesu Ter wase ne, anmgbianev, m ngu kpen ayange ayange." 
1Corinthians15:32 Aluer i lu sha inja i or man m nôngo a inyamikume ken Efese yô, i lum a inja sha nyi? Aluer mba nderen mbakpenev ga yô, se gbaa yan nen akaa man akaa tsô, gadia kper se mba kpen." 
1Corinthians15:33 De tsughun nen ayol a en ga, ujende mba bov mba vihin mbamlu mba dedoo." 
1Corinthians15:34 Nder nen tsevaa, de nen u eren isholibo. Mbagenev lan kwagh u Aôndo je, M ngu ôron nahan ka iheen yen je." 
1Corinthians15:35 Kpa orgen nana pine er: Mba nderen mbakpenev nana? Man ka inja i iyolough i nana vea va a mi? 
1Corinthians15:36 We orlanenkwagh ne! We iyol you kpaa, kwagh u u lee la, zough a uma ga, saa ka a vande kpen kera ve." 
1Corinthians15:37 Man aluer u lôô kwagh yô, ka iyol i una va lu a mi la, u lee ga, kpa ka ishange tseegh, shin a lu alakema shin a lu ma inja igen kpaa." 
1Corinthians15:38 Kpa ka Aôndo A ne i iyol er i sar Un yô, hanma inja i ivor ka A na i iyol sha inja i i." 
1Corinthians15:39 Inyam i akaa cii ngi inja i môm cii ga, inyam i uumace ngi kposo a inyam i shôso, inyam i inyon di kpaa gema ngi kposo a inyam i ishu." 
1Corinthians15:40 Akaa a sha aôndo nga, akaa a shin tar kpaa nga. Kpa iengem i a sha aôndo la ngi kposo, iengem i a shin tar kpaa ngi kposo je." 
1Corinthians15:41 Iengem i iyange ngi kposo, iengem i uwer shi ngi kposo, iengem i asan di kpaa ngi kposo, gadia iengem i ishan igen ngi kposo a iengem i asan agen." 
1Corinthians15:42 Kape mnder u shin mbakpenev kpaa, a lu la. Mba lee kwagh u a lu u hôôn yô, kpa mba gem mba nderen kwagh u a lu u hôôn ga yô." 
1Corinthians15:43 Mba lee kwagh u iheenegh mba gem mba nderen kwagh u icivirigh. Mba lee kwagh u lun isheer, mba gem mba nderen kwagh u ageegh." 
1Corinthians15:44 Mba lee iyol i sha marami, mba gem mba nderen iyol i sha inja i jijingi. Aluer iyol i sha marami ngi yô, iyol i sha inja i jijingi kpaa ngi." 
1Corinthians15:45 Kape i nger kpaa la er: Or u hiihii la, Adam, hingir or u uma. Adam u masetyô la hingir jijingi u nan a na uma." 
1Corinthians15:46 Kpa kwagh u hiihii yô, ka kwagh u sha inja i jijingi ga kpa ka u sha marami, kwagh u a dondo yô, ka u sha inja i jijingi la." 
1Corinthians15:47 Or u hiihii la ka u shin tar, ka shin inya je i dugh nan ye, Or u sha uhar la yô, ka Sha A dugh ye." 
1Corinthians15:48 Er or u i er nan sha inya nan lu nahan, kape mba i er ve sha inya kpaa ve lu je la. Man er Or u Sha a lu yô, kape mbashaav kpaa ve lu je la." 
1Corinthians15:49 Man er se lu a ibeen i or u shin inya yô, kape shi se va lu a ibeen i Or u Sha kpaa la." 
1Corinthians15:50 Kpa, anmgbianev, m ngu ôron ngun nahan mer: inyam man awambe fatyô u yan dyako u tartor u Aôndo ga, kwagh u a lu u hôôn la kpaa, ye dyako u kwagh u hôôn ga la ze." 
1Corinthians15:51 Nenge, ka kwaghmyer je m lu ôron ne ye. Ka se cii sé kpe ga, kpa á va gema se cii." 
1Corinthians15:52 Á lu fese je er ka i pelegh ashee nahan, sha mtenge u ikpamkor i masetyô la, gadia á tôngo ikpamkor man á nder mbakpenev vea kera lu mbahôôn ga je, man se yô, á gema se a gema." 
1Corinthians15:53 Gadia kwagh u a lu u hôôn ne, ka u una haa kwagh u a lu u hôôn ga la iyol keng, man kwagh u a lu u kpen ne kpaa ka u una haa kwagh u kpen ga la iyol." 
1Corinthians15:54 Kpa zum u kwagh u a lu u hôôn ne una haa kwagh u a lu u hôôn ga la iyol kera yô, man shi kwagh u a lu u kpen ne una gema á haa kwagh u kpen ga la iyol kera yô, ka zum la man kwaghôron u i nger la una kure vough ye, er: I mena ku sha mhembe je." 
1Corinthians15:55 Yô, ku, mhembe wou ngu hana? Ku, soho wou ngu hana?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Soho u kuugh yô, ka isholibo man agee a isholibo gema ka tindi." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kpa i̱ wuese Aôndo u A ne se mhembe sha Ter wase Yesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Nahan yô, ne anmgbianev av mba doon mo ishima, tile nen dông, de kpoghol nen ga, eren nen tom u Ter ngegh je sha hanma shighe cii, gadia ne fa, ken Ter yô, tom wen ngu gbilin ga." 
1Corinthians16:1 Sha kwagh u inyaregh ki kohol sha ci u uicighanmbaiorov la yô, ne kpaa, er nen er lu m wa nongo u Kristu u ken Galatia la kwagh nahan." 
1Corinthians16:2 Hanma lahadi, sha iyange i lahadi la je, hanmô wen nana̱ ver kwagh sha agee a nan, nana̱ koson un her sha er zum u me va la, i̱ de gbe kohol kwagh ken shighe la ga yô." 
1Corinthians16:3 Zum u me va nyôr yô, mba ne nenge ve kom la, me tindi ve a uwashika, ve̱ tôô iwua yen la, ve̱ yem a mi ken Yerusalem." 
1Corinthians16:4 Man aluer a va gba u mo kpaa me za yô, vea za a mo imôngo." 
1Corinthians16:5 Me kar ken Masedonia man me va hen ven ye, gadia m ngu karen ken Masedonia." 
1Corinthians16:6 Ka ken ven man me va tsa, shighe á kar kpuaa ye. Alaghga fam cii je kpaa me tsa, sha u né wam ikav mbi zendev zum u me mough me yem ken hemen yô." 
1Corinthians16:7 Gadia kera sarem pe nengen a ven hen kwa ne karen yemen tsô ga, gadia m ver ishima mer, me ngôôr a ven aluer Ter Una rumun yô." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kpa me ngôôr ken Efese zan zan iyange i Pentekosti. 
1Corinthians16:9 Gadia hunda u vesen man u ageegh bughum man mbaahendanev gema ngee. 
1Corinthians16:10 Zum u Timoteu una va yô, nôngo nen, a̱ de lu ken a ven a mciem iyol ga, gadia wen kpaa eren tom u Ter er mo nahan." 
1Corinthians16:11 Nahan yô, ma or nana̱ de lahan un ga. Kpa wa nen un ikav bem bem, a̱ va, a̱ va kohol mo. Gadia m ngu keghen un a anmgbianev." 
1Corinthians16:12 Sha kwagh u anmgbian wase Apolo yô, m zamber a na kpishi mer, a̱ za her a ven a anmgbianev imôngo, kpa sar un pe zan hegen je ga, una za shighe u ian ia va due yô." 
1Corinthians16:13 Kuran nen, tile nen dông sha jighjigh u nan. Lu nen nomsombaiorov, taver nen iyol." 
1Corinthians16:14 I̱ eren hanma kwagh wen cii sha dooshima. 
1Corinthians16:15 M ngu zamber a ven, anmgbianev; ne fa er ya u Sefana a lu iyiagh ki tsutswagh ken Akaia man er ve na ayol a ve sha u eren uicighanmbaiorov tom yô." 
1Corinthians16:16 Ne kpaa ungwan nen imo i ambaaior la, man shi mba ve eren tom imôngo la cii, shi ve nenge sha gbashima kpaa." 
1Corinthians16:17 Sefana man Fortunatu kua Akaiku za va nahan m ember je gadia ve va seer kwagh u a yen ken a mo er ne lu a mo ga la. 
1Corinthians16:18 Gadia ve taver jijingi wam kua u wen. Rumun nen ambaaior ne. 
1Corinthians16:19 Iniongo i Kristu i ken Ashia ngi sughun ne. Akula man Prishila a nongo u Kristu u ken ya ve la, mba sughun ne ken Ter kpishi je." 
1Corinthians16:20 Anmgbianev cii mba sughun ne. Sugh nen ayol a en sha icighanzwa u susen. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ishughun yam i mo, Paulu, m ngu sughun ne sha uwegh agh je." 
1Corinthians16:22 Aluer Ter Una doo or ishima ga yô, ifan i̱ kôr nan. Maranata. (Ter ngu van.)" 
1Corinthians16:23 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter Yesu a̱ lu a ven. 
1Corinthians16:24 Dooshima wam a̱ lu a ven cii ken Kristu Yesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Paulu, apostoli u Kristu Yesu u sha ishima i Aôndo man Timoteu anmgbian, mba sughun nongo u Kristu u Aôndo u u lu ken Korinte la kua uicighanmbaiorov mba ve lu ken Akaya cii." 
2Corinthians1:2 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven man bem mba ve dugh her Aôndo man shi hen Ter Yesu Kristu la. 
2Corinthians1:3 I̱ wuese Aôndo Ter u Ter wase Yesu Kristu, ka Ter u A lu a mhôônom ma zungwen man ka Aôndo u A lu a ishimasurun cii," 
2Corinthians1:4 Un u A surun se asema sha atsan a ase cii sha er se kpaa se fatyô u surun mba ve lu ken hanma ican la ishima sha ishimasurun i se ayol a ase kpaa Aôndo A sur se asema a mi la. 
2Corinthians1:5 Gadia er atsan a Kristu a ngee ken vese yô, kape ishimasurun yase kpaa i ngee sha Yesu Kristu je la." 
2Corinthians1:6 Aluer se mba yan ican kpaa, ka sha u i̱ sur ne asema yô, man ka sha ci u myom wen kpaa. Aluer mba surun se ishima kpaa, ka sha ci u ishimasurun i i lu nan ne u ne̱ taver ishima a atsan a se kpaa se lu yan la." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ishimaverenkeghen yase sha a ven ngi taveraa gadia se fa, er ne nyer nongo ken atsan a yan nahan yô, kape shi né nyôr nongo ken ishimasurun kpaa la." 
2Corinthians1:8 Gadia anmgbianev, sar se pe ma ne lan atsan a a tser se ken Ashia la ga, i kighir se je gande, hemba agee ase ken inya je, se kera fa mwar wase ga." 
2Corinthians1:9 Se yô, i lu se je er i ôr se ijir i kuugh kera ve yô, lu sha u se̱ de suur sha ayol a ase ga, kpa se̱ suur sha Aôndo u A nderen mbakpenev la." 
2Corinthians1:10 Un u A yima se sha imbaku i vesen ne shi Una yima se kpaa la, ka sha a Na je se veren ishima se lu keghen ser, shi Una yima se kpaa ye." 
2Corinthians1:11 Ne kpaa ne mba wasen se sha mbamsen enev mba ne sen sha ci wase la, sha u ior kpishi vea naan ishughun sha ci wase tsung sha ci u mrumun u sha mhôôn u i ne se la." 
2Corinthians1:12 Gadia ihagh yase yô, ka i ne, ka shiada u imo i ken ishima yase, er se lu zenden ken tar, jim je yô lu hen a ven, lu sha icighanmlu man mimi u Aôndo lu sha mfe u iyolough ga, kpa lu sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo je." 
2Corinthians1:13 Gadia se mba ngeren ne kwagh ugen ga, saa kwagh u ne lu ôron kaven kpaa la. M ngu veren ishima mer né kav, né bee cii," 
2Corinthians1:14 di er ne vande kaven kpuaa ner: se mba ihagh yen vough er ne kpaa ne lu i yase nahan sha iyange i Ter wase Yesu la. 
2Corinthians1:15 Er m fe kwagh ne dedoo nahan yô, kera je kpaa m wa ken ishima u vanden van hen ven sha u né shi né zua a iember i sha kwa har yô." 
2Corinthians1:16 Ma m kar ken ven ma m ze Masedonia, shi ma m mough ken Masedonia ma m hir ken a ven, ne ma ne wem ikav u zan ken Yudia ye." 
2Corinthians1:17 Er m we ishima nahan yô, lu sha beer tsô zee? Shin akaa a m we ishima mer me er la, m gba wan ishima sha inja i iyolough tsô, “een” wam kua “ei” hingir kwagh môm zee?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Aôndo ka u jighjigh, kwaghôron wase a ven lu “een” vea “ei” imôngo ga." 
2Corinthians1:19 Gadia Yesu Kristu Wan u Aôndo u se ôr ne kwagh Na la lu mo man Siluanu man Timoteu, lu “een” vea “ei” imôngo ga, kpa ken a Na yô, lu “een” vough." 
2Corinthians1:20 Gadia uityendezwa mba Aôndo cii, ken A Na yô, ka “een” ka nahan man se rumun amen ken a Na sha ci u icivir i Aôndo ye." 
2Corinthians1:21 Un u A ver se ken Kristu a ven imôngo shi A shigh se mkurem kpaa yô, ka Aôndo." 
2Corinthians1:22 Ka Un kpaa A ver se ikav shi A ne se ibumun ken asema ase ye, ka Jijingi je la." 
2Corinthians1:23 Kpa m ngu yilan Aôndo shiada sha uma wam mer, ka sha u yiman ne a yima je m kera ve ken Korinte ga ye." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ka er se mba yan tor sha kwagh u jighjigh wen u nan ga, kpa se mba eren tom a ven imôngo sha ci u né ember yô, gadia ka sha jighjigh u nan man ne til taveraa ye." 
2Corinthians2:1 M wa ken ishima yam mer me kera va hen a ven sha ishima i vihin ga. 
2Corinthians2:2 Gadia aluer ka mo m ne ne ishima i vihin yô, ka an nana shi á nam iember saa di un u m ne un ishima i vihin la?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ka sha ci u nahan je m nger ne nahan ye sha er zum u me va yô, mbala mba ma ve nem iember la yô, ve̱ de nem ishima i vihin ga. M fa dedoo mer, ne cii, iember yam yô, ka iember yen kpaa." 
2Corinthians2:4 Gadia er m nger ne yô, m lu ken ican kpishi, je m ya ican ken ishima tsung kpaa, mlu a mliam ashe kpishi kpaa lu sha u nan ne ishima i vihin ga, kpa lu sha u ne fa dooshima u ne doom ishima tsung la." 
2Corinthians2:5 Aluer ma or na ishima i vihin yô, ka mo nan nem ishima i vihin ga, shi kpuaa ma i lu ne cii, kpa kam pe kehen kwaghôron ga." 
2Corinthians2:6 Sha imbaor la yô, er mba ve hemba ngeen la vea tsaha nan yô, kuma." 
2Corinthians2:7 Nahan yô, guda gema de nen nan kwagh la man shi sur nen nan ishima kpaa sha u ijungwen i tsung la i̱ de hembe nan ga yô." 
2Corinthians2:8 M ngu zamber a ven mer, shi rumun nen or la sha dooshima." 
2Corinthians2:9 Ka sha ci u nahan m nger ne ye, sha u me kar ne me fa, shin ne mba mbaungwan kwagh sha hanma kwagh cii kpaou?" 
2Corinthians2:10 Or u ne de nan kwagh yô, mo kpaa m de nan. Aluer mea de kwagh kpaa, kwagh u m de la, ka sha ci wen sha ishigh ki Kristu." 
2Corinthians2:11 Ka sha u Satan a̱ de ye mtsera sha a vese ga yô. Se kera lan ayom a na ga. 
2Corinthians2:12 Zum u m va ken Teroa sha ci u ôron Loho u Dedoo u Kristu yô, i bughum hunda ken Ter" 
2Corinthians2:13 kpa m zua a mmem ken ishima ga sha ci u m kohol anmgbian wam Titu her ga yô. Tsô m lôhô ve ayem m yem ken Masedonia. 
2Corinthians2:14 Kpa i̱ wuese Aôndo u A ne se, se lu hemban ken Kristu gbem ne, shi A lu samber a ihuma i kwaghfan Na ken hanma ijiir cii sha ikev yase." 
2Corinthians2:15 Gadia se mba ihuma i doon i Kristu sha ci u Aôndo hen mba i lu yiman ve la man shi hen mba ve lu timin la kpaa. 
2Corinthians2:16 Mbagenev yô, ka ve ihuma i kuugh i zan ken ku. Mbagenev di yô, ka ve ihuma i uma i zan ken uma. Ka an je nan kom sha akaa nee?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Se mba zenden kpenga a kwaghôron u Aôndo er mbagenev kpishi ve eren nahan la ga, kpa se mba ôron kwagh ken Kristu sha mimi, ka er mba Aôndo A tindi ve nahan man ka sha ishigh ki Aôndo kpaa." 
2Corinthians3:1 Shi se gba wuese ayol a ase vee? Shin uwashika mba pasen mlu u or mba zan a mi ken ven shin mba ne di ne nger la, kwagh gba se a mi er mbagenev nahana?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Washika wase yô, ka ne je, i nger un ken asema ase, ior cii fa un ve ôr un kpaa." 
2Corinthians3:3 Ne mba tesen gbar gbar er ne lu washika u Kristu, ka sha tom wase i nger un ye, ka sha inki ga kpa ka sha Jijingi u Aôndo u uma, ka sha ikpande i awen kpaa ga, kpa ka sha ikpande i inyam i nger un ye." 
2Corinthians3:4 Imbamsuur i se suur sha Aôndo ne se zua a mi ken Kristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Se ayol a ase se kuma u kaan ser ma kwagh ka u wase ga, kpa mkom wase ka her Aôndo a dugh ye." 
2Corinthians3:6 Ka Un A gem se se kom u lun mbatomov sha ikuryan i he, ka i sha kwaghngeren la ga kpa ka i ken jijingi, gadia kwaghngeren la woo a wua kpa jijingi ne a na uma."
