2Corinthians3:7 Aluer tom u u lu zan ken ku, u i nger asangeakaa sha iwen la, u hingir u engem je, ônov mba Iserael kera fatyô u kenger ishigh ki Mose ga sha ci u iengem i ishigh nagh i i lu i karen kera la yô," 
2Corinthians3:8 man hire tom u sha jijingi la ua hemba lun a iengem ga yee? 
2Corinthians3:9 Gadia aluer tom u u lu nan ior ibo la, iengem ia lu sha mi kpaa, tom u nan perapera la ua hemba ngeen a iengem ica je." 
2Corinthians3:10 Kwagh u lu iengem la kpaa, sha gbenda ne yô a kera engem ga, sha ci u iengem i hemban cii la." 
2Corinthians3:11 Aluer kwagh u karen kera la kpaa ngu a iengem yô, kwagh u lun gbem la una hemba lun a iengem." 
2Corinthians3:12 Er se lu a imbaishimaverenkeghen ne yô, se hemba lun a vangertiôr je." 
2Corinthians3:13 Ka er Mose u a cir ikondo sha ishigh nagh sha u ônov mba Iserael ve̱ de kenger mkur u kwagh u a lu karen kera la ga nahan ga. 
2Corinthians3:14 Kpa i cighir asema a ve, gadia zan zan nyian je kpaa ape i lu ôron Ikuryan i Tse yô, ikondo i yisan shon la ngi her, mba bughun i sha ga, gadia ka ken Kristu i bughun i kera ye." 
2Corinthians3:15 Een, zan zan nyian je kpaa hanma shighe u ka a ôron Mose yô, ikondo i yisan la i cirin asema a ve." 
2Corinthians3:16 Kpa zum u or ka nana gema hen Ter yô, i bugh ikondo i yisan la kera." 
2Corinthians3:17 Ter yô ka Jijingi, hen ape Jijingi u Ter A lu yô, ikangenev mbi her ga." 
2Corinthians3:18 Se cii se kera mba a ikondo i yisan sha ishi ga se mba nengen iengem i Ter er ka ken ijingi nahan. Mba geman se se̱ hingir er ibeen shon la nahan, hii ken iengem za a za hemen ken iengem. Ka hen Ter u A lu Jijingi la kwagh ne a dugh ye." 
2Corinthians4:1 Nahan yô, er se lu a tom ne sha mhôônom ma i zungu se la yô, asema kera nga yinan se ga." 
2Corinthians4:2 Kpa se venda akaa a kunya a ken myer la, se mba zenden sha atseregh ga, se mba kôron mkaanem ma Aôndo geman a mi ga, kpa se mba duen a mimi ken igbar, se mba pasen ayol a ase sha ci u imo i ken ishima i hanma or sha ishigh ki Aôndo." 
2Corinthians4:3 Aluer ivangeli yase shi ngi ior myer her yô, ka mba ve lu timin la tsô i lu ve myer her ye." 
2Corinthians4:4 Ve yô, ka mbanan jighjigh ga, aôndo u tar u ainge ne pir ve ashe a asema sha u ve̱ de nengen a iwanger i Loho u Dedoo u iengem i Kristu u A lu ibeen i Aôndo la ga." 
2Corinthians4:5 Gadia ka kwagh wase se lu ôron ga, kpa ka kwagh u Kristu Yesu, er A lu Ter yô, man se ayol a ase yô, se mba mbaeren ne tom sha ci u Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ka Aôndo u A kaa er, iwanger i̱ wanger ken ime la, A lu tan iwanger ken asema ase ye, sha u mkav u iengem i Aôndo i sha ishigh ki Kristu la i̱ wanger se yô." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kpa se mba a kwagh u injaa ne ken ikav mbi inyaav; nahan agee a hemban la ka a Aôndo, ka ken vese a dugh ga." 
2Corinthians4:8 Mba eren se ican sha hanma ian kpa i her se a her ga. Lan se ishima cii kpa se hunde ishima kera ga. 
2Corinthians4:9 Mba tôvon se a ican nahan kpaa i ta se kera ga. Mba kôron se tan inya, kpa i wua se ga." 
2Corinthians4:10 Se mba tôôn ku u kpen u Yesu ken iyol yase gbem je sha u uma u Yesu la kpaa i̱ tese un ken iyol yase gbar gbar yô. 
2Corinthians4:11 Er se lu uma ne yô, mba nan se ken ku gbem je sha ci u Yesu, sha er uma u Yesu kpaa, i̱ tese un gbar gbar ken iyol yase i va kpen kera ne." 
2Corinthians4:12 Kape ku u lu eren tom ken vese ne. Kpa ken ven yô, gema ka uma." 
2Corinthians4:13 Se mba a imbaishima i nan jighjigh vough er kwagh u i nger la a kaa nahan yô er: M na jighjigh, ka nahan man m lu ôron kwagh ye, se kpaa se mba nan jighjigh, ka nahan man se lu ôron kwagh kpaa ye." 
2Corinthians4:14 Gadia se fa, Un u A nder Ter Yesu yô, se kpaa, Una nder se a Yesu imôngo man Una ver se a ven imôngo sha ishigh Nagh." 
2Corinthians4:15 Akaa cii nga sha ci wen sha u mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ seer sha ior kpishi man i̱ seer iwuese sha ci u icivir i Aôndo kpaa. 
2Corinthians4:16 Nahan yô, asema kera nga yinan se ga; shin er or wase u ken won ne lu vihin kera kpaa, or wase u kimi ne mba gem un hegh ayange ayange." 
2Corinthians4:17 Gadia ancan u peesa u sha anshighe kpeghee ne ngu sôron se a sôr iengem i tsôron i vesen i ganden cii. 
2Corinthians4:18 Se mba kera veren asema sha akaa a i nengen a mi la ga, kpa ka akaa a i nengen a mi ga la, gadia akaa a i nengen a mi la ka a karen kera, kpa a i nengen a mi ga la gema ka a tsôron je." 
2Corinthians5:1 Se fa tenti u shin tar ne u se tse ker ne, aluer á sough un kera kpaa, se mba a iyou i Aôndo, ka ya u tsôron u Sha u i maa un sha ave ga yô." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ka sha ci u nahan man se lu toghor iyol kpaa ye, ka hangen se u ma i cir se iyou yase i i dugh Sha la;" 
2Corinthians5:3 sha er se cir ayol a ase yô, ma i kohol se idyelegh ga yô." 
2Corinthians5:4 Se mba se lu ken tenti her yô, se mba toghor iyol, kwagh tsule se, sar se pe i̱ bugh se ikondo kera ga, kpa i̱ hemba cirin se a cir i iyol, sha u uma a̱ gema a̱ mena kwagh u a lu u kpen kera la." 
2Corinthians5:5 Un u A lu sôron se sha ci u kwagh ne yô ka Aôndo, ka Un A ne se ibumun kpaa ye, ka Jijingi je la." 
2Corinthians5:6 Nahan yô, ishima taver se gbem, se fa, er se lu ken iyol heregh yô, se kera mba ken Ter ga." 
2Corinthians5:7 Gadia ka sha jighjigh u nan se lu zenden ye, ka sha mnenge a nenge ga." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ishima i taver se, hemba saren se u duen ken iyol kera za lun vea Ter." 
2Corinthians5:9 Nahan yô, se mba veren ishima u ma se doo Un, shin sea lu ken iyol her shin sea kera lu ken iyol ga kpaa." 
2Corinthians5:10 Gadia se cii sé va tile ken igbar sha ishigh ki ikônough ki ijirigh ki Kristu keng, sha er hanma or nana ngohol kwagh u nan lu eren ken iyol la shin a lu u doon shin a lu u bo kpaa." 
2Corinthians5:11 Nahan yô, er se fe er Ter a lu u cian yô, se mba sendegh a ior; sha ishigh ki Aôndo yô, kwagh wase ngu gbar gbar, man m ngu veren ishima mer, ken imo i ken asema a en di kpaa kwagh wase ngu gbar gbar je." 
2Corinthians5:12 Se mba wuese ayol a ase sha ishigh yenegh ga, kpa se mba nan ne ityôkwagh i tan ihagh sha kwagh wase, sha u né lu a kwagh u ôron a mba ve te ihagh sha mnenge u sha ashe la, i lu kwagh u ken ishima ga la." 
2Corinthians5:13 Gadia shin sea lu hunden kpaa, ka sha ci u Aôndo, shin sea lu kaven kwagh kpaa, ka sha ci wen." 
2Corinthians5:14 Dooshima u Kristu ngu mgbeghan se, sha mnenge wase yô or môm kpe sha ci u ior cii, nahan yô, ve cii ve kpe je ve." 
2Corinthians5:15 Man A kpe ka sha ci u ior cii sha u mba ve lu uma yô, ve̱ de kera lu uma sha ci ve ayol a ve ga, kpa i̱ lu sha ci u Un u A kpe sha ci ve shi i nder Un kpaa la." 
2Corinthians5:16 Nahan se yô, hii hegen je se kera fa ma or sha inja i iyolough ga. Aluer se vande fan Kristu sha inja i iyolough kpaa, hegen yô, se kera fa Un nahan ga." 
2Corinthians5:17 Nahan yô, aluer or ngu ken Kristu yô, i gba nan hegh je ve, akaa a tse la kar kera, nenge a hingir a he." 
2Corinthians5:18 Akaa ne cii ka hen Aôndo A dugh ye, Un u A him se a iyol Na ken Kristu, shi A ne se tom u mhim la sha ikev kpaa la." 
2Corinthians5:19 Inja na yô, Aôndo lu ken Kristu, lu himen tar a iyol Na, kera na ve ibo sha mbamper mba ve per tindi la ga, shi A na se loho u mhim la sha ikev kpaa." 
2Corinthians5:20 Nahan yô, se mba mbaôronkwagh sha ci u Kristu za iyol er ka Aôndo A lu ôron kwagh a ven ken a vese yô. Se mba zamber a ven sha ci u Kristu ser, i̱ hime ne a Aôndo." 
2Corinthians5:21 A gema Un u A fe isholibo ga la, hingir isholibo sha ci wase sha u se se̱ hingir perapera u Aôndo ken a Na yô." 
2Corinthians6:1 Er se lu mbaerentom a Na imôngo yô, se mba wan ne kwagh ser, mngohol u ne ngohol mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo yô, i̱ de lu gbilinkwagh ga." 
2Corinthians6:2 Gadia ngu kaan er: Ka sha shighe u a doo la M ver ato we, sha iyange i myom la kpaa M wase u. Nenge, ka hegen je i lu shighe u doon ye, nenge ka hegen i lu iyange i myom kpaa ye." 
2Corinthians6:3 Se mba nan ityôkwagh i nôngon gbev sha ma gbenda môm je ga, sha u i̱ de teren tom wase sha kwagh u dang ga yô," 
2Corinthians6:4 kpa se mba pasen ayol a ase ken akaa cii je er se lu mbatomov mba Aôndo yô: ken ishima i wan tsung, man ken atsan, man akaa a tseren, man uzayol," 
2Corinthians6:5 man igbidiv, man gaadi man ayôôso a ikpelaior, man ityom i eren, man u tsan per acin imôngo, man u lun ijen acin imôngo," 
2Corinthians6:6 man mlu u wang, man kwaghfan, man ishima i wan, man mlu u sar sar, man Icighan Jijingi, man dooshima u lun a imanger ga," 
2Corinthians6:7 man kwaghôron u mimi, man agee a Aôndo, man sha ikav mbi utyav mbi perapera ken uwegh ku yanegh man ku imesegh kpaa," 
2Corinthians6:8 man icivir, man iheen, man gwa u bo, man gwa u dedoo. Mba nengen se er ka mbaaiev yô, kpa se mba mbamimi je;" 
2Corinthians6:9 man shi bee er i fa se ga, kpa i fa se doo doo je; bee er se mba nôngon ku yô, kpa nenge, se mba uma je; man shi bee er i tsaha se yô, kpa i wua se ga;" 
2Corinthians6:10 man shi bee er se mba zungwen yô, kpa se mba ember gbem je; man shi bee er se mba mbaatsanev yô, kpa se mba geman mbagenev kpishi hingir mbanyarev; man shi bee er se mba a ma kwagh ga yô, kpa se mba a akaa cii je." 
2Corinthians6:11 Ne Mbakorinte, se ôr ne vanger wase cii, ishima yase bugh gbangeraa." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ka ken vese i imbishi ne ga, ka ken asema a en i imbishi ne ye." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ne di kpaa, gema er nen kwagh—m ngu ôron kwagh er ka i ôr a mbayev nahan—ne kpaa, bugh nen ishima." 
2Corinthians6:14 I̱ de zough ne ken mzough u kpeegh sha igbur i môm a or u nan ne jighjigh ga, imôngo ga. Gadia perapera zua vea ifer sha nyi? Shin ka nyi mzough i lu hen iwanger a ime?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Ka nyi i zough Kristu a Belial la? Shin ka sha nyi man kwagh u or u nan ne jighjigh a zua a u nan ne jighjigh ga laa? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ka nyi i zough tempel u Aôndo a akombo? Gadia se yô, se mba tempel u Aôndo u uma je. Kape Aôndo A kaa je la er: Me tema hen ve shi Me zenden hen atô ve kpaa, Me lu Aôndo ve, ve kpaa vea lu nongoior Wam." 
2Corinthians6:17 Nahan yô, due nen ken atô ve kera, lu nen kposo, kape Ter A kaa la, kwagh u hôngorough kpaa, de benden nen ave ga. Nahan Mo Me rumun ne," 
2Corinthians6:18 Me lu Ter wen, ne di né lum ônov mba nomso man ônov mba kasev, kape Ter Uhembanagee, A kaa la." 
2Corinthians7:1 Nahan yô, ne mbadoon mo ishima, er se lu a uityendezwa mban yô, se wanger nen ayol a ase sha hanma kwagh u hôngorough u ken iyol kua ken jijingi cii, se sôr nen mtsegh wase, a̱ hingir vough sha mcie u cian Ter la." 
2Corinthians7:2 Na nen se ian ken asema a en. Se er ma or kwaghbo ga. Se vihi ma or kwagh ga, se ya mtsera sha ma or sha icugh kpaa ga." 
2Corinthians7:3 M ngu ôron nahan kpaa ka u nan ne ibo ga, gadia m vande kaan ne mer, né mba se ken ishima je kuma u sé kpe imôngo shi kuma u sé lu uma imôngo kpaa." 
2Corinthians7:4 M ngu a vangertiôr kpishi, ne mba ihagh i tan yam kpishi kpaa. M mgbough a ishimasurun, iember yam kpaa i ngee gande ken atsan a am cii." 
2Corinthians7:5 Gadia zum u se va nyôr ken Masedonia yô, iyol yase zua a ma mmem ga, se ya ican sha hanma kwagh cii: ken won yô, lu num, ken vanger yô gema lu mciem." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kpa Aôndo u A surun mba ve hir ayol a ve ijime la asema yô, A sur se ishima sha mve u Titu." 
2Corinthians7:7 Lu sha mve na tseegh ga kpa lu sha ishimasurun i ne sur un ishima la, gadia a va ôr se er i hange ne a vese man er ne lu zungwen man er ne lu a ishima i tseen sha kwagh wase, nahan m hemba ember cii." 
2Corinthians7:8 Gadia er m ne ne ishima i vihin sha washika wam la nahan kpaa, vihim ga shin er i vande vihin mo nahan kpaa; gadia m nenge washika la vihi ne kpa lu ayange kpuaa tsô." 
2Corinthians7:9 Hegen yô m ngu ember ka sha ci u ishima i vihi ne la ga, kpa ka sha ci u ishima i vihi ne, ne gem ishima yô, gadia ishima vihi ne sha inja i Aôndo A ne la, nahan se er, kwagh saa ne a saa ga." 
2Corinthians7:10 Gadia ishima i vihin i i dugh her Aôndo ka i na mgemshima u zan ken myom u á kera vaa afanyô sha mi ga yô, kpa ishima i vihin i tar ne yô i ne ku je." 
2Corinthians7:11 Gayô nenge imbaishima i veren i ken ven ne, ka ishima i vihin i i dugh her Aôndo la i ne ne i ye, man shi iyolpalegh man mvihi u kwagh a vihi ne ishima la man mciem, man gbashima man ishima i tseen man mtsaha u nan cii. Gadia sha hanma gbenda cii ne tese er ne lu a ibo sha kwagh ne ga yô." 
2Corinthians7:12 Nahan m nger ne kpa lu sha ci u un u a er kwaghbo la ga, shin sha ci u or u i er un kwaghbo la kpaa ga, kpa lu sha u ma i tese ishimaveren yen sha kwagh wase gbar gbar sha ishigh ki Aôndo." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ka sha ci u nahan man i taver se ishima ye. Man ken ishimasurun yase la se hemba ember sha ci u iember i Titu, gadia ne cii ne yôhôl un ishima." 
2Corinthians7:14 Gadia aluer se ta ihagh sha kwagh wen sha ato na kpaa, m va ahenge ga gadia er hanma kwagh u se ôr ne la a lu mimi nahan yô, kape ihagh i se ta sha ato a Titu kpaa i lu mimi la." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ka una umbur iko yen i wan man shi er ne ngohol un a mciem man ikarikase iyol yô, ishima na i hemba lun sha a ven cii." 
2Corinthians7:16 M ember gadia ishima i kera nyian mo sha kwagh wen ga. 
2Corinthians8:1 Anmgbianev, se mba pasen ne kwagh u mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo u i ne iniongo i Kristu i ken Masedonia la," 
2Corinthians8:2 gadia sha mkar u i kar ve sha atsan kpishi la iember ve i tsung kua ibanave ve i tsung la i na ve hemba eren iwua gengee gengee. 
2Corinthians8:3 M ngu eren shiada sha kwagh ve mer, ve na sha agee ve, ve na hemba agee ve ken inya kpaa, ve na sha asema a ve je," 
2Corinthians8:4 ve zamber a vese ngeelee er i̱ na ve ian, ve kpaa vea lu ave sha iwasen i i lu nan sha ci u uicighanmbaiorov la." 
2Corinthians8:5 Ve kera er er se we ishima la tseegh ga, kpa ve gema ayol a ve ve na Ter shi ve na se kpaa sha ishima i Aôndo." 
2Corinthians8:6 Nahan se wa Titu kwagh ser, a̱ kure tom u dooshima ne ken ven vough er a vande hiin u nahan." 
2Corinthians8:7 Yô er ne nôngo tsembelee sha hanma kwagh, sha kwagh u jighjigh u nan man kwaghôron man kwaghfan man hanma ishima i veren man mdoo u se doo ne ishima la, kape nôngo nen tsembelee sha tom u dooshima kpaa ne." 
2Corinthians8:8 M ngu ôron kwagh ne ka sha u wan a wa tindi ga, kpa m ngu tôôn ishimaveren i mbagenev m ngu karen mimi u dooshima wen a mi." 
2Corinthians8:9 Gadia ne fa mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter wase Yesu Kristu la. A ngee a akaa kpa A gema A hingir or u ibanave sha ci wen, sha u ne ne̱ gema ne̱ hingir mbanyarev sha ibanave Na la." 
2Corinthians8:10 Sha kwagh ne yô m ngu nan mhen wam gadia ka ne a inja; kwagh u ne hii eren inyom i i kar la shi lu hangen ne kpaa la," 
2Corinthians8:11 kure nen u eren sha mi nahan vough, sha kwagh u ne lu a mi sha ave la." 
2Corinthians8:12 Gadia aluer gbashima una lu yô, á rumun un sha kwagh u or nan lu a mi la, ka sha kwagh u nan lu a mi ga la ga." 
2Corinthians8:13 M kaa nahan ka u heghem mbagenev ikav geman seer ne a seer ican ga. 
2Corinthians8:14 Sha gbenda u vough yô, kwagh u ne lu a mi kpishi la ngu wasen sha ibanave i mbala ken shighe ne, sha u kwagh u ve lu a mi kpishi la a̱ wase sha ibanave yen, sha u kwagh a̱ lu vough vough yô." 
2Corinthians8:15 Kape i nger kpaa la er, Un u a kor kpishi la kwagh neer un ga man un u a kor kpuaa la kpaa kwagh yina un ga." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kpa i̱ wuese Aôndo u A ne ne imbagbashima ne sha kwagh wen ken ishima i Titu kpaa la," 
2Corinthians8:17 gadia a rumun zamber wase la tseegh ga, kpa er a lu a ishima i tseen yum yô, a za hen ven sha ishima na je." 
2Corinthians8:18 Shi se tindi anmgbian u a ze gwa sha kwagh u Loho u Dedoo ken iniongo i Kristu cii la a na imôngo. 
2Corinthians8:19 Ka nahan tseegh ga, kpa iniongo i Kristu ver un a ver je er a̱ zenden a vese imôngo sha tom u dooshima ne u se lu eren u sha ci u iengem i Ter man sha u tesen iko i wan yase kpaa." 
2Corinthians8:20 Se mba palegh sha u i̱ de teren se sha kwagh u zegeiwua u se lu eren tom sha mi ne ga. 
2Corinthians8:21 Gadia se mba veren ishima sha akaa a dedoo la, ka sha ishigh ki Ter tseegh ga, kpa ka sha ishigh ki iorov kpaa." 
2Corinthians8:22 Anmgbian wase u se kar un sha akaa kpishi se nenge er a lu a ishimaveren la kpaa, se tindi un a ve imôngo man hegen a hemba veren ishima cii sha ci u a ne ne jighjigh yô." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titu yô, ka ijende yam man shi ikarem u tom sha ci wen, anmgbianev asev mban yô, ka mbatyomov mba iniongo i Kristu tindi ve sha ci u iengem i Kristu yô." 
2Corinthians8:24 Nahan yô tese nen ve ikav i dooshima wen kua ihagh i se te ven la sha ishigh ki iniongo i Kristu kpaa. 
2Corinthians9:1 Sha kwagh u iwasen i sha ci u uicighanmbaiorov la yô, kera gbam u ngeren ne kwagh sha mi ga," 
2Corinthians9:2 gadia m fa er ne ver ishima yô, m ta ihagh sha ven hen mba ken Masedonia mer, Akaya kohol iyol ver a ver inyom i i kar la je; ken ve yô, mba ishima i veren yen ne i nder ve, ve hemba ngeen." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kpa m ngu tindin anmgbianev mban sha u ihagh i se te ven la i̱ de gbe gbilin sha kwagh ne ga, sha u né lu a iyol i kohol er m vande kaan nahan la." 
2Corinthians9:4 Aluer Mbamasedonia mbagenev vea va a mo imôngo yô, ve̱ de kohol ne a iyol i kohol ga ze, á lu nahan yô, sé gema sé ya kunya sha ishimaveren yase; ne je yô, kera ka kwagh u kaan a kaa ga." 
2Corinthians9:5 Nahan yô m nenge doo u wan anmgbianev mban kwagh mer, ve̱ vande zan ken a ven ve̱ sôr iwua i ne tende zwa la ve̱ ver a ver je, i̱ lu her, i̱ lu iwua i sha ishima yen, i̱ de lu kwagh u i ngohol sha apera ga." 
2Corinthians9:6 Umbur nen kwagh ne, or u tangen iyol lôôn cuku yô, ka di cuku je nana sunda ye, kpa or u nan lee wuee yô, nana sunda di wuee je." 
2Corinthians9:7 Hanma or nana̱ na er nan we ken ishima i nan la nahan, i̱ de lu zunguluu ga, i̱ de lu sha apera kpaa ga, gadia ka or u nan ne kwagh sar sar la je nan doo Aôndo ishima ye." 
2Corinthians9:8 Aôndo fatyô u nan ne mrumun u sha mhôôn cii wuee, sha u hanma shighe né lu a hanma kwagh á kuma sha hanma gbenda cii man shi né na kwagh wuee sha hanma tom u dedoo yô." 
2Corinthians9:9 Kape i nger kpaa la er: Nan samber kwagh wuee, nan na mbaibanave, perapera u nan una lu gbem sha won je." 
2Corinthians9:10 Un u A ne ortanivor la ivor, shi A lu nan bredi sha ci u kwaghyan la yô, Una na ne ivor i tan, Una seer i, shi Una seer atam a perapera wen kpaa," 
2Corinthians9:11 né lu a kwagh ave sha ci u nan hanma iwua gengee gengee, sha tom wase ne, á hingir u wuese Aôndo sha mi." 
2Corinthians9:12 Gadia tom u wasen a wase ne ka u wasen sha ugbayol mba uicighanmbaiorov tseegh ga, ngu nan er i̱ wuese Aôndo kpishi kpaa." 
2Corinthians9:13 Sha ikav i tesen i tom ne yô, mba civir Aôndo sha ci u ne we iko ne rumun Loho u Dedoo u Kristu man sha ci u ne kar kwar a ve gengee gengee man a mbagenev cii kpaa." 
2Corinthians9:14 Ka saren ve a ven, mba eren msen sha ci wen kpaa, sha ci u mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo u a ngee ken ven yum la." 
2Corinthians9:15 I̱ wuese Aôndo sha ci u iwua Na i i gande u ôron la. 
2Corinthians10:1 Mo Paulu iyol yam m ngu zamber a ven sha ishima i legh legh man ishima i sar sar i Kristu, mo u m lu or u cian kwagh sha ishigh yenegh zum u m lu a ven la, kpa ka mea lu a ven her ga yô, m hingir u cihin kwagh." 
2Corinthians10:2 M ngu zamber a ven mer, zum u me va her a ven yô, i̱ de gbe u me cihi kwagh sha vangertiôr u m ver ishima mer, me norom ikaa a mba ve nengen er se mba zenden sha inja i iyolough la ga." 
2Corinthians10:3 Gadia shin er se lu zenden ken iyol nahan kpaa, se mba nenge ityav sha inja i iyolough ga." 
2Corinthians10:4 Gadia ikav mbi utyav yasev ka mbi iyolough ga, kpa ka mbi ageev sha ishigh ki Aôndo sha ci u yôhôl ayou a utya," 
2Corinthians10:5 man sha ci u vihin mbamhen kera man shi hanma kwagh u taven u i kende a mi sha, sha u yisan kwaghfan u Aôndo; se mba haan hanma mhen abata sha u a̱ wa Kristu iko." 
2Corinthians10:6 Se kohol iyol u tsahan hanma ihembeato zum u iko yen i wan ia kuma vough. Nenge nen kwagh u a lu ne sha ishi bong ne. 
2Corinthians10:7 Aluer or nana fa dedoo er nan ngu kwagh u Kristu yô, nana̱ shi nana̱ hen kwagh ne iyol i nan nahan er, er nan lu kwagh u Kristu yô, se kpaa kape se lu la." 
2Corinthians10:8 Tahav asev mbu Ter A ne se sha u maan ne a maa i kera lu u yôhôl a yôhôl ga la, aluer m ngu tan ihagh sha mi yum kpaa, me ya kunya ga." 
2Corinthians10:9 I̱ de been er m ngu tan ne a ta mciem iyol sha uwashika ga. 
2Corinthians10:10 Gadia mba kaan er uwashika nav yô, mba norom sha kwagh, shi ve taver kpaa, kpa u nengen a na sha ashe yô, ka iurenor, kwaghôron na kpaa ka u ikoogh ga." 
2Corinthians10:11 Ambaaior a kaan nahan ne yô, ve fa er kwagh u se ôron ken uwashika zum u se lu ga la ka un je se eren zum u ka sea lu her kpaa ye." 
2Corinthians10:12 Gadia se mba cihin u wan ayol ase ken mbagenev mba ve lu wuese ayol a ve la ga, shin u karen ayol a ase sha a ve tsô kpaa ga. Mba eren gesa ayol a ve, mba karen ayol a ve hen ayol a ve, mba kaven kwagh ga." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kpa se yô, sé ta ihagh á kar ikaa inya ga, kpa sé kighir sha ikighir i Aôndo A ver se i ne kpaa ne lu ker la." 
2Corinthians10:14 Se mba henen ser á bunde se u aren ken ven ga nahan se mba naregh ave gande ikaa inya ga gadia kera je kpaa se vande nyôron a Loho u Dedoo u Kristu ken a ven. 
2Corinthians10:15 Se mba karen ikaa inya ga, se mba tan ihagh sha tom u mbagenev ve eren tsung la kpaa ga, kpa m ngu veren ishima mer, er jighjigh u nan wen una seer yô, ian yase i ken a ven kpaa ia seer," 
2Corinthians10:16 sha u sé ôr Loho u Dedoo ken ityar i i dondo a ven la kpaa yô, sé kera ta ihagh sha tom u i er ken ian i orgen la ga." 
2Corinthians10:17 Or u nan te ihagh yô, nana̱ ta ihagh ken Ter." 
2Corinthians10:18 Gadia ka or u nan wuese iyol i nan la man á rumun nan ga, kpa ka or u Ter A wuese nan la." 
2Corinthians11:1 Kpash, ma ne we ishima a anibume wam ne tsô; een, wa nen ishima a mo!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Gadia m ngu a ishima i tseen sha kwagh wen je, ka imbashima i tseen i Aôndo la, m ver ne sha ci u nom môm sha u me na ne hen Kristu er ka iniunkwase i lun wang nahan." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kpa m ngu cian mer, alaghga á va vihi mbamhen enev né undu mlu u mimi [man u wang] u ken Kristu la er iyô mee Ifa sha atseregh a i nahan." 
2Corinthians11:4 Gadia aluer orgen nana va nana va pase kwagh u Yesu ugen kposo, ka u se vande pasen ne un la ga, shin aluer ne ngohol jijingi ugen kposo, ka u ne vande ngohol la ga, shin né ngohol ivangeli igen kposo, ka i ne vande ngohol la ga yô, kpa ne gba rumun tsô." 
2Corinthians11:5 M hen mer m yina sha uihembanmbaapostoli mban je ga. 
2Corinthians11:6 Aluer mea lu or u fan kwaghôron ga kpaa, sha kwaghfan yô, m yina ga. M pase ne nahan gbar gbar je sha hanma gbenda cii ken hanma kwagh kpaa." 
2Corinthians11:7 Er m hide a iyol yam ijime sha u i̱ kende ne sha, m ôr ne Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo gbilin, nahan m er ka kwaghbo shinii?" 
2Corinthians11:8 M tsuwe iniongo i Kristu igen kwagh, m ngohol injar hen ve sha u me er ne tom yô." 
2Corinthians11:9 Zum u m lu a ven man kwagh gbam kpaa, m za ma or iyol ga, gadia anmgbianev mba ve za va ken Masedonia la ve wasem sha ugbayol av. M kura iyol yam sha hanma kwagh cii sha u me hingir ne ikav mbi yuhwan ga yô, shi me kura iyol yam nahan kpaa." 
2Corinthians11:10 Er mimi u Kristu a lu hen a mo ne yô, ihagh yam i tan ne ia bundem ken avegher a Akaya ga." 
2Corinthians11:11 Ka sha ci u nyi? Ka sha ci u ne doom ishima gaa? Aôndo kpaa fa. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kwagh u m lu eren yô, me eren her, sha u me bunde ian i mba ve keren ian sha u vea lu er se nahan vough sha kwagh u ve lu tan ihagh sha mi la." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ambaaior la yô, ka mbaapostoli mba aiev, ka mbatomov mba icughuv, ka ve gema ayol a ve er ka mbaapostoli mba Kristu nahan." 
2Corinthians11:14 Kwagh ne kpaa ka kwagh u kpiligh iyol ga, gadia Satan je kpaa ka a gema iyol na er ka ortyom u iwanger nahan." 
2Corinthians11:15 Nahan aluer mbatyomov nav kpaa vea gema ayol a ve er ka mbatyomov mba perapera yô, ka kwagh u kpiligh iyol ga. Kpa mkur ve yô, una lu vough er aeren a ve nahan." 
2Corinthians11:16 M shi m ngu kaan mer ma or nana̱ de kera nengen er mo m bum ga, gayô, gba rumun nen mo er ka ibumeor nahan tsô, mo kpaa, m shi ta ihagh kpuaa yôô." 
2Corinthians11:17 Kwagh u m lu ôron ne yô, ka ken Ter m lu ôron ga kpa ka er ka ibumegh nahan, ka sha u tan ihagh vangertiôr je." 
2Corinthians11:18 Er mbagenev kpishi ve lu tan ihagh sha inja i iyolough yô, mo kpaa me ta ihagh," 
2Corinthians11:19 gadia ne mba wan ishima a abumeaior saan saan je er ne lu mbafankwagh yum yô. 
2Corinthians11:20 Gayô ne mba wan ishima aluer or nana kôr ne ne lu ikpan, shin aluer or nana ya ne akaa, shin aluer or nana bume ne, shin aluer or nana gengese iyol, shin aluer or nana gbidye ne sha ishi yô." 
2Corinthians11:21 Me gba pasen kunya wam tsô, se se yina sha kwagh la. Nahan kpaa aluer or nana cihi kwagh yô,—m gbe ôron er ka sha ibume nahan tsô—mo kpaa me cihi." 
2Corinthians11:22 Ve ka Mbaheberu? Mo kpaa ka nahan. Ve ka Mbaiseraele? Mo kpaa ka nahan. Ve ka tsombor u Aberahama? Mo kpaa ka nahan. 
2Corinthians11:23 Ve ka mbatomov mba Kristu? M gbe ôron er ka orihundu nahan tsô,—m hemba je. Sha tom u eren sha ican kpaa m hemba, sha gaadi u nyôron kpaa m hemba, sha ugbidi yô, gande u ôron, sha iku i waren kpaa kwa imôngo." 
2Corinthians11:24 Mbayuda gbidyem akpa yina môm u lun kwa akunduahar, kuma acin ataan je." 
2Corinthians11:25 I gbidyem sha kwagir acin atar, i tam awen icin i môm, tso ur a mo acin atar, m shi sha kwavmnger hen iv, m tsa her kpaa." 
2Corinthians11:26 M zende ijende kpishi, m war ku shin uifi, m war ku hen mbanumungbenda, m war ku hen ityô yam, m war ku hen atôatyev kpaa, m war ku ken gar man ken ikôngo kpaa, m war ku shin zegemnger shi m war ku hen anmgbianev mba aiev kpaa." 
2Corinthians11:27 M lu eren tom sha ican, m eren tom tsung je, m tsa per ayange imôngo, m luun ijen, imura kpaa kôron mo, ashighe agen kwaghyan lum ga, wuhe lu kôron mo, m lu idyelegh kpaa." 
2Corinthians11:28 Man ka akaa ne tseegh ga, ishima i nyian i sha iniongo i Kristu cii ngi va tan sha a mo use use." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ka an nan lu isheer man mo m lu isheer ga? Ka an nan nenge gbev man i vihim ga? 
2Corinthians11:30 Aluer a gba u tan ihagh keng yô, me ta ihagh sha isheer yam." 
2Corinthians11:31 Aôndo Ter u Ter Yesu Kristu u i wuese Un gbem sha won ne, A fa er i lu aie m eren ga yô." 
2Corinthians11:32 Ken Damaseku or u nengen tor Areta sha gar kura gar u Damaseku sha u kôron mo," 
2Corinthians11:33 kpa i due a mo ken ian i sha gilgar i shirigh a mo shin ikese ve m war sha ikev na ye. 
2Corinthians12:1 Ka u tan ihagh keng, nahan kpaa ka a inja ga, kpa me za ar sha akaa a nengen a mi sha ashe kua mbampase mba Ter kpaa." 
2Corinthians12:2 M fa or u ken Kristu, anyom kar hegen pue kar anyiin, i feese nan i za a nan Sha sha u Sha utar la—shin lu ken iyol, shin lu ken iyol gaou, m fa ga, ka Aôndo A fe ye." 
2Corinthians12:3 M fa i feese or la i za a nan ken Paradiso,—shin lu ken iyol shin lu ken iyol ga kpaa m fa ga, ka Aôndo A fe ye—" 
2Corinthians12:4 nan za ungwa akaaôron a a lu a ôron ga yô, i rumun er or a̱ ôr a ga." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ka sha imbaor la me ta ihagh ye, kpa sha kwagh wam iyol yam yô, me ta ihagh ga saa sha isheer yam." 
2Corinthians12:6 Aluer a sarem pe tan ihagh kpaa ma m lu ibumeor ga, kpa ma i lu mimi ma m lu ôron ye. Kpa m de, sha u or nana̱ de henen kwagh sha mo i̱ hemba kwagh u nan nenge a mi ken mo shin kwagh u nan ongo ken mo la ga," 
2Corinthians12:7 sha ci u mbampase mba sha mnenge mba ve gande la. Sha u m̱ de kenden iyol sha yum ga la, i nam saa ken iyol, ka ortyom u Satan je, sha u a̱ gbidyen mo, m̱ de kenden iyol sha yum ga yô." 
2Corinthians12:8 Sha kwagh ne m sôn Ter kwa tar mer, kwagh ne a̱ due ken mo kera." 
2Corinthians12:9 Kpa A gema A kaa a mo er: Mrumun u sha mhôôn Wam kuma u, gadia agee Am ka a tema hoghom hoghom ken isheer. Nahan yô, me ta ihagh sha isheer saan saan sha u agee a Kristu a̱ tema ken mo yô." 
2Corinthians12:10 Nahan yô m rumun isheer sha ci u Kristu kua aheen kpaa, man akaatseren man mbamtev mba sha atsan man atsan a eren kpaa, gadia ka shighe u m lu isheer la je m gem m taver ye." 
2Corinthians12:11 M hingir ibumeor ve, kpa ka ne ne kighir mo m er nahan ye, gadia ka ne ma ne wuese mo ye, gadia m yina sha uihembanmbaapostoli mban sha ma kwagh ga, shin er m gbe kwagh ga nahan kpaa." 
2Corinthians12:12 I er akav a orapostoli ken a ven sha ishima i wan kpishi, lu sha akav a tesen, man akaa a kpilighyol man ityom i ageegh kpaa." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ka sha nyi je ne yen sha iniongo i Kristu igene, saa di er mo iyol yam m ze ne iyol ga la, shinii? Shi dem nen kwaghbo ne tsô." 
2Corinthians12:14 Nenge acin a m kohol iyol u van ken ven ka atar je ne. Kpa me za ne iyol ga; gadia ka akaa a en la kwagh a gbem a min ga kpa ka ne ayol a en. Gadia ka u ônov vea ombo kwagh sha ci u mbamaren ve ga kpa ka mbamaren vea ombo sha ci u ônov vev ye. 
2Corinthians12:15 Mo yô, me vihi akaa a am saan saan shi me na nagh sha iyol yam kpaa sha ci u uuma enev. Er ne doom ishima yum, nahan mo m gema m pande a pande doon nee?" 
2Corinthians12:16 I̱ lu nahan tsô, mo yô, m za ne iyol ga. Kpa ne mba kaan ner, m hemba ayom m kôr ne sha icugh." 
2Corinthians12:17 Nahan m tsugh ne sha ma or u m tindi ken a ven yôô? 
2Corinthians12:18 M taver Titu ishima mer a̱ za, shi m tindi anmgbian ugen vea na kpaa. Nahan Titu za tsugh nee? Kera lu sha jijingi môm se lu zenden gaa? Lu gbenda môm se lu zan gaa?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Ne mba henen gbem ner se mba palegh iyol. Kpa ka sha ishigh ki Aôndo se lu ôron kwagh ken Kristu ye, man akaaôron ne cii ka u maan ne a maa, ne mbadoon mo ishima." 
2Corinthians12:20 M ngu cian mer, me va yô, alaghga me kera kohol ne er i sarem nahan ga, ne kpaa né kera zua ishigh a mo er i sar ne nahan ga, alaghga ayôôso aa lu, kua iwuhe, man ishima i vihin, man akaa a kpelan, man angereke a eren, man u kôson ior sha dang, man iyolgengese, man anzughul kpaa." 
2Corinthians12:21 M ngu cian mer, aluer me shi me va yô, Aôndo wam Una heem sha ashe a en, á gba u me zungwe sha kwagh u mbagenev kpishi mba ve vande eren isholibo kpa ve lu a gema ishima sha hôngor ve man sha idya i eren man sha ijimba i ve lu eren la kpaa ga." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ka kwa tar je m lu van ken ven ne. Ka sha zwa u mbashiada uhar shin utar man hanma kwaghôron una kure vough ye. 
2Corinthians13:2 Mba ve lu vanden eren asorabo la kua mbagenev cii m vande wan ve kwagh er m lu a ven sha kwa har la, hegen er m lu her ga kpaa shi m ngu wan kwagh her mer, aluer me shi me va yô, me kera gba den ga," 
2Corinthians13:3 gadia ne mba keren ikav sha u fan er Kristu A lu ôron kwagh ken mo yô. Un yô ngu isheer sha kwagh wen ga, ngu a agee ken ven." 
2Corinthians13:4 I mande Un sha terankon ken isheer, kpa gema ngu uma ken agee a Aôndo. Se kpaa se mba isheer ken a Na, kpa her a ven yô, sé lu uma ken agee a Aôndo." 
2Corinthians13:5 Kar nen ayol a en sha u né fa aluer nea lu ken jighjigh u nan yô, time nen ken ayol a en. Ne kera fa er Yesu Kristu A lu ken a ven gaa? Saa nea yina ikaren tsô." 
2Corinthians13:6 Kpa m ngu veren ishima mer, né va kav er se se yen ikaren ga yô." 
2Corinthians13:7 Se mba sônon Aôndo ser, ma ne er ma kwaghbo ga, ka sha u i̱ nenge se er se kom ikaren kpee ga, kpa ka sha u ma ne er kwagh u doon shin er se sea lu er se kuma ikaren ga nahan kpaa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Gadia se fatyô u eren kwagh u vihin a vihi mimi ga, saa u wasen a wase mimi tsô." 
2Corinthians13:9 Se mba ember shighe u se lu isheer kpa ne ne gem ne taver yô. Shi se mba eren msen sha kwagh ne sha u ma ne kom vough yô. 
2Corinthians13:10 Ka nahan m lu ngeren akaa ne er m lu a ven imôngo ga je ne ye, sha u zum u me va lu a ven yô, i̱ de lu u me er kwagh taveraa sha tahav mbu Ter A nem mbu maan a maa, i kera lu mbu yôhôl a yôhôl ga la ze." 
2Corinthians13:11 Kwagh u a shi yô, anmgbianev, ember nen, sôr nen mbamlu enev, ungwa nen kwaghwan, lu nen ishima i môm, lu nen bem bem man Aôndo u dooshima man u bem Una lu a ven ye." 
2Corinthians13:12 Sugh nen ayol a en sha icighanzwa u susen. 
2Corinthians13:13 Uicighanmbaiorov cii mba sughun ne. 
2Corinthians13:14 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter Yesu Kristu man dooshima u Aôndo man mzough u Icighan Jijingi ve̱ lu sha a ven cii. Amen. 
Galatians1:1 Paulu apostoli u i lu ior ve tindi un ga, i lu or kpaa nan ver un ga, kpa i lu Yesu Kristu A ver un yô, man shi Aôndo Ter u A nder un shin ku la," 
Galatians1:2 kua anmgbianev mba ve lu a mo cii, se mba sughun iniongo i Kristu i ken Galatia." 
Galatians1:3 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven kua bem mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter wase man Ter Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 u A ne iyol Na sha ci u asorabo ase, sha u Una dugh se ken tar u ainge u ifer ne kera, sha ishima i Aôndo Ter wase." 
Galatians1:5 Iengem i̱ lu i Na gbem sha won, Amen." 
Galatians1:6 Ka kpiligh mo iyol er ne gbe undun Un u A yila ne sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Kristu la fefa ne gem ne lu zan sha ivangeli igen kposo nahan; 
Galatians1:7 man igen ngi ga, ka di asema tsô mbagenev ve lu va kenden ne asema sha ye, sar ve ka goom ivangeli i Kristu." 
Galatians1:8 Shin a lu se je sea va ôr ne, shin a lu ortyom u a dugh Sha je kpaa una va ôr ne ivangeli igen kposo a i se vande ôron ne la yô, ifan i̱ kôr nan." 
Galatians1:9 M shi m ngu ôron ne er m vande kaan nahan la mer, aluer ma or nana ôr ne ivangeli igen kposo a i ne vande ngohol la yô, ifan i̱ kôr nan." 
Galatians1:10 Nahan ka ior m lu sendegh a ve hegen shin ka Aôndo? Shin ka ior m lu nôngon u doon ityough a ve ase? Aluer mea lu nôngon u doon ityough a ior heregh yô, ma m kera lu kpan u Kristu je ga." 
Galatians1:11 Anmgbianev, m ngu pasen ne sha u fa nen er ivangeli i mo m lu ôron la yô, ka i hen or ga." 
Galatians1:12 Gadia ka hen or man mo m ngohol i ga, ka or nan tesem i kpaa ga, kpa lu sha mpase u Yesu Kristu je." 
Galatians1:13 Gadia ne ungwa kwagh u zende wam u tsuaa u sha kwagh u Mbayuda la, er m lu tôvon nongo u Kristu u Aôndo a ican ngegh, m nôngo u timin u kera je." 
Galatians1:14 Man m za hemen ken kwagh u Mbayuda je m hemba mbakwav wam mbagenev kpishi ken ityô yam, gadia m nôngo sha ishima i tseen tsung sha akaa a uter av la." 
Galatians1:15 Kpa Aôndo u A tsegham er m lu ngôm ken uya je yô, shi A yilam sha mrumun u sha mhôôn," 
Galatians1:16 zum u i doo Un u pasen Wan Na hen a mo sha u m̱ za pase Un ken atôatyev la yô, fese je m kera ker mhen hen or ga," 
Galatians1:17 m za hen Yerusalem hen mba ve vande lun mbaapostoli a mo la kpaa ga, kpa m gema m za ken Arabia shi m hide ken Damaseku." 
Galatians1:18 Ken masejime, anyom nga kar atar yô, m za sha Yerusalem m za sôr Kefa, m tsa hen na ayange pue kar ataan." 
Galatians1:19 Mbaapostoli mbagenev kpaa m nenge a mô ga, saa di Yakobu, anngô u Ter." 
Galatians1:20 Akaa a m lu ngeren ne ne yô, ka sha ishigh ki Aôndo je, ka aie m eren ga." 
Galatians1:21 Ken masejime yô, m za ken atôôn a Shiria kua Shilishia." 
Galatians1:22 Iniongo i Kristu i ken Yudia lu a fam sha ishi ga. 
Galatians1:23 Ve ungwa a ungwa tsô, i kaa er: un u a lu tôvon se a ican la yô, hegen gema ngu pasen jighjigh u nan u a vande nôngon u vihin un kera la." 
Galatians1:24 Tsô ve civir Aôndo sha ci wam. 
Galatians2:1 Ken masejime, anyom nga kar pue kar anyiin yô, m shi m za sha Yerusalem, mo vea Barnaba, m za a Titu kpaa." 
Galatians2:2 Ka sha mpase u Aôndo pasem man m za ye. M tim ve ivangeli i m lu ôron ken atôatyev la sha ishi, kpa lu ken iuv a mba ve za gwa yô, sha u m̱ de zenden gbilin ga, shin zende u m vande zenden la kpaa u̱ de gbe gbilin ga." 
Galatians2:3 Titu u a lu vea mo la, shin er a lu or u Grika je nahan kpaa i kighir un sha u a̱ tsôngo ga." 
Galatians2:4 Kpa lu sha ci u anmgbianev mba aiev mba ve nyer myer la; ve yô, ve nyôr imbusu sha u vea nenge mker sha mlu wase u lun a ikangenev ga ken Kristu Yesu la, sha u vea za a vese ken ikpan yô." 
Galatians2:5 Kpa anshighe môm tsô kpaa se kera rumun u nan ayol a ase sha ikev ve ga, sha er mimi u ivangeli a̱ lu a ven her gbem." 
Galatians2:6 Mba ve ze gwa er ve gbe kwagh yô—kwagh u ve vande lun la kam ma kwagh ga, Aôndo sangen sha dooshima ga—mbala yô, ve kera seer mo ma kwagh ga." 
Galatians2:7 Kpa ve gema ve nenge er i wam tom u ôron mbaipusuv Loho u Dedoo la sha ikev di er i ver Peteru ken mbaicôngo nahan. 
Galatians2:8 Gadia Un u A na Peteru agee sha u lun apostoli u mbaicôngo la yô, mo kpaa, A nam di nahan sha ci u atôatyev." 
Galatians2:9 Zum u ve kav mrumun u sha mhôôn u i nam la yô, Yakobu man Kefa kua Yohane mba i nenge ve er ka mtuunummbaiorom yô, ve na, mo kua Barnaba uwegh ku yanegh ku mzough sha er se se za ken atôatyev, ve di vea za ken mbaicôngo." 
Galatians2:10 Ka mbaatsanev tseegh i lu ve ka ma se umbur ve ye, man lu kwagh la je i gbam ken ishima u eren ye." 
Galatians2:11 Kpa zum u Kefa za va hen Antioki yô, m hendan a na sha ishigh nagh je, gadia lu a ibo doo doo je." 
Galatians2:12 Gadia er mbagenev mba ken Yakobu ve lu a va ga yô, a lu yan kwaghyan a atôatyev imôngo. Kpa mbala mba ve yô, a kem iyol, a pav iyol na kposo, lu cian mba ve lu ken icôngo yô." 
Galatians2:13 Mbayuda mbagenev cii kpaa nyôr imanger a na ityô, zan zan Barnaba je kpaa ve urugh un sha imanger ve la." 
Galatians2:14 Kpa zum u m nenge ve kera lu zan sha mimi u ivangeli jighilii ga yô, m kaa a Kefa sha ishigh vegh cii mer: Aluer we u u lu or u Yuda kpa u eren er ortyôtyev nahan, i kera lu er or u Yuda nahan ga yô, ka nyi man u kighir atôatyev wer ve̱ eren er Mbayuda nahan kenge?" 
Galatians2:15 Marami wase je, se mba Mbayuda, kera ka mbaasorabo mba ken atôatyev ga." 
Galatians2:16 Se fa or gbe zuan a ishô sha aeren a sha tindi ga, kpa ka sha jighjigh u nan ken Kristu Yesu. Man se ayol a ase kpaa se na Kristu Yesu jighjigh, sha u ma i ne se ishô sha jighjigh u nan u ken Kristu, i kera lu sha aeren a tindi ga. Gadia sha aeren a tindi yô, ma or u umace nana zua a ishô ga." 
Galatians2:17 Aluer se mba nôngon u zuan a ishô ken Kristu man i va kohol se se lu mbaasorabo yô, nahan Kristu ka ortom u isholibo? Mayange ga." 
Galatians2:18 Aluer m shi m maa kwagh u m vande yôhôl kera la yô, m ngu tesen ikav mer, mo iyol yam m ngu or u peren tindi je." 
Galatians2:19 Gadia ka sha tindi man m kpe sha kwagh u tindi ye, sha u me gema me lu uma sha ci u Aôndo yô." 
Galatians2:20 I mandem sha terankon a Kristu imôngo; m kera ngu uma ga, kpa Kristu ngu uma ken mo. Man uma u m lu uma ken iyol hegen ne yô; ka sha jighjigh u nan ken Wan u Aôndo u m doo Un ishima man A gem A ne iyol Na sha ci wam la, man m lu uma ye." 
Galatians2:21 M ngu tan mhôônom ma Aôndo kera ga, gadia ishô ia lu sha tindi yô, Kristu kpe gbilin je ve." 
Galatians3:1 Kpa! ne Mbagalatia mbalanenkwagh, ka anti nan bum ne, ne mba i tese ne Yesu Kristu u i mande Un sha terankon la sha ashe a en bong ne." 
Galatians3:2 Ka kwagh ne tseegh i sarem pe fan hen a ven ye: Lu sha aeren a sha tindi man ne ngohol Jijingi yee, shin lu sha mpase u i pase ne kwagh u jighjigh u nan laa?" 
Galatians3:3 Kape ne lan kwagh je nee? Ne hii ken Jijingi kpa hegen ne mba geman kuren ken iyolo? 
Galatians3:4 Akaa a ne ye ican sha mi yum ne nahan ka gbilin tsô? Shin lu di gbilin mimi jeo? 
Galatians3:5 Un u A ne ne Jijingi shi A eren akaa a ageegh ken a ven kpaa ne, ka sha aeren a sha tindi shin ka sha mpase u i pase ne kwagh u jighjigh u nan laa?" 
Galatians3:6 Kape Aberaham kpaa, a na Aôndo jighjigh man i gema kwagh la hingir perapera na je." 
Galatians3:7 Nahan yô, ne nenge mba ve lu ken jighjigh u nan la, ka ve je ve lu ônov mba Aberaham ye." 
Galatians3:8 Er icighanruamabera tsenganengen er ka sha jighjigh u nan man Aôndo Una na atôatyev ishô ye, a ôr Aberaham ivangeli tsuaa er: Ka ken we man akuraior a sha won cii aa zua a iveren ye." 
Galatians3:9 Kape mba ve lu ken jighjigh u nan la, i lu veren ve doo doo a Aberaham u a ne jighjigh la imôngo ne." 
Galatians3:10 Mba ve suur sha aeren a sha tindi cii, mba a ifan iyol. Gadia i nger er: Hanma or u nan we akaa a i nger a ken ruamabera u atindigh la cii iko sha u eren a ga yô, nan ngu a ifan iyol." 
Galatians3:11 Nahan wanger er ma or môm nana zua a ishô sha ishigh ki Aôndo sha tindi ga, gadia or u perapera nana lu uma sha jighjigh u nan." 
Galatians3:12 Tindi yô, suur sha jighjigh u nan ga, kpa or u nana eren akaa ne yô, nana lu uma sha mi." 
Galatians3:13 Kristu paa se, due a vese ken ifan i tindi la kera, A gema A hingir ifan sha ci wase; gadia i nger er: Hanma or u i mande nan nan lu sha kon yô, nan ngu a ifan iyol je:" 
Galatians3:14 sha u iveren i dedoo i Aberaham i̱ haa sha atôatyev ken Yesu Kristu, man se̱ ngohol ityendezwa i Jijingi sha jighjigh u nan yô." 
Galatians3:15 Anmgbianev, m gbe ôron kwagh sha inja i or tsô. Iceghzwa i or i sha dyako u karen i i rumun i dedoo la kpaa ma or nana fatyô u bunden i shin u geman i kposo kpaa ga." 
Galatians3:16 Ka Aberaham man i tende zwa a na ye kua vor na. I kaa er “vor imôngo” ga, inja na yô, ka kpishi ga, kpa ngu môm tseegh er, “man shi vor wou”, inja na yô, ka Kristu je la." 
Galatians3:17 Kpa m ngu kaan mer: Ikuryan i Aôndo vande yan la, atindi a a mase van er anyom kar deri unyiin man ikundugber la, a bunde i ga, a kar a ityendezwa la kera ga." 
Galatians3:18 Aluer dyako una dugh ken tindi yô, ma a kera lu sha ityendezwa ga, kpa Aberaham yô, ka sha ityendezwa je man Aôndo rumun un sha mhôôn ye." 
Galatians3:19 Nahan atindi nga a inja sha nyi? Ka sha ci u mbamper mba i per tindi la man i seer a ye, zan zan vor u i tende zwa sha mi la ua kar van. I na a sha mkaa u mbatyomov mba Shaav sha ikev i orhimen." 
Galatians3:20 Orhimen yô, nan ngu sha ci u or môm tseegh ga, kpa Aôndo yô, ngu môm tsô." 
Galatians3:21 Nahan yô, tindi ngu hendan a uityendezwa mba Aôndo shinii? Mayange ga. Gadia aluer a ne tindi u una fatyô u nan uma yô, perapera ma a dugh ken tindi je." 
Galatians3:22 Kpa icighanruamabera wuhe akaa cii sha ikev i isholibo sha u ma i ne mbananjighjigh ityendezwa i i lu sha jighjigh u nan ken Yesu Kristu la. 
Galatians3:23 Er jighjigh u nan a lu a va ga yô, i hira kuran se sha ikev i tindi, i wuhe se zan zan á va pase jighjigh u nan u a lu van la ken igbar." 
Galatians3:24 Kape tindi a lu orkuran wase u zan a vese ken Kristu sha u i̱ na se ishô sha jighjigh u nan yô. 
Galatians3:25 Kpa jighjigh u nan a za ve yô, se kera mba sha ikev i orkuran ga." 
Galatians3:26 Gadia ne cii, ne mba ônov mba Aôndo sha jighjigh u nan ken Kristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:27 Gadia mba i er ve batisema ken Kristu cii, ve haa Kristu iyol je ve." 
Galatians3:28 Or u Yuda kua or u Grika kera ngu ga, kpan kua wan kpaa kera mba ga, nomsoor kua kwase kpaa kera mba ga, gadia ne cii ne mba môm ken Kristu." 
Galatians3:29 Aluer ne mba kwagh u Kristu yô, ne mba tsombor u Aberaham je, man ne mba mbayan dyako sha ityendezwa kpaa." 
Galatians4:1 Kpa m ngu kaan mer sha ayange a or u yan dyako nan lu iyev la yô, nan ngu kposo a kpan ga, shin er nan lu ter u akaa cii nahan kpaa." 
Galatians4:2 Nan ngu sha ikev i ior mba nengen sha nan kua mbakuran zan zan ar sha shighe u ter u nan, nan vande veren la." 
Galatians4:3 Kape se kpaa zum u se lu iyev la yô, se lu sha ikev i ujijingi mba taregh mba hiihii la er ka ikpan nahan." 
Galatians4:4 Kpa er shighe va kuma vough yô, Aôndo tindi Wan Na, kwase va mar Un, i mar Un sha ikev i tindi," 
Galatians4:5 sha u Una paa mba ve lu sha ikev i tindi, sha u se̱ zua a mrumun u i rumun se se lu ônov la." 
Galatians4:6 Man sha ci u ne lu ônov yô, Aôndo tindi Jijingi u Wan Na ken asema a en, ngu genger imo er: Aba, Tere." 
Galatians4:7 Nahan yô, u kera ngu kpan ga, u ngu wan je. Man aluer u ngu wan je yô, u ngu or u yan dyako ken Aôndo kpaa." 
Galatians4:8 Kpa hen shighe u ne lu a fa Aôndo ga la, ne lu sha ikev i akaa a, sha inja i a, a lu mbaaôndo ga yô." 
Galatians4:9 Kpa hegen er ne va fe Aôndo yô, shin guda er ne va lu mba Aôndo A fe ne yô, hii nan man shi ne lu hiden hen ujijingi mba ikoogh ga mbagban kera tsung la, shi i lu saren ne u shi hiden sha ikev ve er ka ikpan nahana?" 
Galatians4:10 Ne mba kor ayange man iwer man ashighe kua anyom. 
Galatians4:11 M ngu cian mer, alaghga m er tom ker a ven, lu gbilin tsô." 
Galatians4:12 M ngu zamber a ven anmgbianev av, hingir nen er mo nahan, gadia mo kpaa m hingir er ne nahan. Ne nzughul a mo mayange ga." 
Galatians4:13 Ne fa, lu sha ci u angev mbu ken iyol man m ôr ne Loho u Dedoo sha hiihii ye." 
Galatians4:14 Shin er kwagh u ken iyol yam la a hingir ne ikaren kpaa, ne laha ga, ne gema ijime kpaa ga, ne nyôr a mo er ka ortyom u Aôndo, er ka Kristu Yesu nahan je." 
Galatians4:15 Msaan u i saan ne iyol hen shighe la yô, ngu han ahegene? Gadia m ngu eren shiada sha a ven mer, aluer nea fatyô yô, yan ma ne tsuwa ashe a en ma ne nam." 
Galatians4:16 Nahan m gema m hingir orihom wen er m lu ôron ne kwagh u mimi yôô? 
Galatians4:17 Ka ve nôngo kwagh sha ci wen ngegh kpa ka sha gbenda u mimi ga, sar ve pe gbihin ne ken won sha u ma ne nenge kwagh sha ci ve tsung yô." 
Galatians4:18 U nôngon sha kwagh u dedoo tsung gbem yô, doo, kpa i̱ de luun sha shighe u ka m lu a ven imôngo la tseegh ga." 
Galatians4:19 Mbayev av, m shi m ngu toghor mar wen zan zan á va jile Kristu ken a ven." 
Galatians4:20 Hangem pe ma m lu a ven hegen, ma m er kwagh a ven sha imo i bem, gadia m ngu yan ican ken ishima sha kwagh wen." 
Galatians4:21 Kaam nen ase yôô, ne mba i sar ne pe lun sha ikev i atindi yô, ne mba ungwan kwagh u atindi a kaa la gaa?" 
Galatians4:22 Gadia i nger er, Aberaham lu a ônov uhar. U môm yô, i mar un a kpankwase, ugen yô, i mar un a kwase jim." 
Galatians4:23 U ken kpankwase la yô, i mar un, sha inja i iyolough, kpa u ken kwase jim la yô, i mar un sha ityendezwa." 
Galatians4:24 Kwagh ne ka ikav. Kasev mba uhar mbala ka uikurmbayan mba uhar. U môm ka u hen uwo u Senai, ngu maren ikpan, ka Hagar je la." 
Galatians4:25 Hagar ka uwo u Senai u ken tar u Arabia la, ngu tesen ikav sha Yerusalem u ainge. Ngu ken kpan a ônov nav." 
Galatians4:26 Kpa Yerusalem u Sha ngu ken kpan ga, ka ngô wase je la." 
Galatians4:27 Gadia i nger er: Ember, we ikômkwase u maren ga ne, Ngor ikenge, nande imo, we u u toghor mar ga ne. Gadia ônov mba kwase u a lu tseeneke la, hemba ngeen a ônov mba kwase u lun a nom la." 
Galatians4:28 Nahan anmgbianev, se yô, se mba ônov mba ityendezwa er Isaka nahan." 
Galatians4:29 Kpa er un u i mar un sha inja i iyolough a lu tôvon u i mar un sha inja i Jijingi la a ican sha shighe la yô, kape hegen kpaa i lu je ne." 
Galatians4:30 Kpa icighanruamabera kaa nana? Zenda kpankwase kua wan na, wan u kpankwase a̱ de ye dyako vea wan u kwase u a lu kwase jim la imôngo mayange ga." 
Galatians4:31 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, se mba ônov mba kpankwase ga, kpa ka ônov mba kwase jim je." 
Galatians5:1 Ka sha u se̱ de luun ken uikangen ga, man Kristu pase se tuhwa ye. Nahan yô, tile nen dông, i̱ de kera shi wan ne igbur i ikpan ga." 
Galatians5:2 Nenge, mo Paulu, me kaa ne, aluer ne tsôngo yô, Kristu Una kera lu ne a inja sha ma kwagh ga." 
Galatians5:3 M ngu kimbir u eren hanma or u nana va tsôngo shiada mer, atindi ci ca cii kpaa ka u nana̱ kura keng." 
Galatians5:4 Mba ve lu keren ishô sha tindi yô, ve pav a pav a Kristu je ve, ve due ken mrumun u sha mhôôn kera kpaa." 
Galatians5:5 Kpa se yô, ka sha Jijingi kua sha jighjigh u nan man se lu keghen ishimaverenkeghen i perapera ye." 
Galatians5:6 Gadia ken Kristu Yesu yô, icôngo kera ngi a ma inja ga shin ipusu kpaa ga, saa di jighjigh u nan u a eren tom sha dooshima yô." 
Galatians5:7 Ne lu yevese dedoo; man ka an nan yange ne u ne kera ungwa imo i mimi la ga ase? 
Galatians5:8 Msendegh ngula due ken Un u A lu yilan ne la ga. 
Galatians5:9 Ankwa u kpeghee ka a zua sha ijenmwe cii. 
Galatians5:10 Sha kwagh wen yô, mo m fa ken Ter dedoo mer né va hen kposo a mo ga, kpa or u nan lu kenden ne asema sha la yô, nana ya mtsaha, a lu anti or kpaa." 
Galatians5:11 Mo yô, anmgbianev, aluer mea lu yôôn kwagh u icôngo heregh yô, ka nyi man shi i lu tôvon mo a icana? A lu nahan yô, kwagh u nan anzughul sha terankon yum la, ma a kera lu ga." 
Galatians5:12 Mba ve lu tumbul a ven la yô, ma ve gbe tôndon ase ayol a ve tsô." 
Galatians5:13 Gadia ne yô, anmgbianev, i yila ne sha u ne̱ lu ken uikangen ga, kpa mlu wen u ne lu ken uikangen ga la yô, a̱ de hingir ityôikaa i iyolough ga, kpa eren nen ayol a en tom sha dooshima." 
Galatians5:14 Gadia atindi cii kure sha kwaghôron môm er: or u nan we ndor a we yô, nana̱ doo u ishima er we iyol you nahan." 
Galatians5:15 Kpa aluer ne nyuma ayol a en, ne ya ayol a en yô, ver nen ishima sha er né mena ayol a en ga yô." 
Galatians5:16 M ngu kaan mer, zende nen sha Jijingi nahan né kera eren sha asaren a iyolough ga." 
Galatians5:17 Gadia asaren a iyolough nga hendan a Jijingi, asaren a Jijingi di kpaa nga hendan a iyol, ve yô, mba hendan ayol a ve, nahan ne kera fatyô u eren akaa a i sar ne la ga." 
Galatians5:18 Kpa aluer ka Jijingi Una hemen ne yô, ne kera mba sha ikev i atindi ga." 
Galatians5:19 Gadia aeren a iyolough nga ken igbar je, ka idya man hôngor man ijimba i eren," 
Galatians5:20 man u civir akombo man ahir a eren man ihom i kôron man iyongo i keren man iwuhe man ishima i nyoon man u wan iyol you iko tseegh, man u hendan akaa, man mbampav," 
Galatians5:21 man mtôm man ihundugh ki msôrough man ugurgurmbaakaav kua ambaakaa ne cii. M ngu wan ne kwagh er m vande wan ne kwagh mer, mba ve eren ambaakaa ne yô, vea ya dyako u tartor u Aôndo ga." 
Galatians5:22 Kpa ityamegh ki Jijingi yô, ka dooshima man msaanyol man bem man ishima i wan man sar sar man mlu u dedoo man jighjigh" 
Galatians5:23 man ishima i legh legh man u kôron iyol tsaha. Anzaakaa ne yô, tindi yange a ga." 
Galatians5:24 Mba ve lu mba Kristu Yesu yô, ve mande iyol a ishima i kenden kua asaren a i sha terankon imôngo ve." 
Galatians5:25 Aluer se lu uma sha Jijingi yô, shi sé zenden nen sha Jijingi kpaa." 
Galatians5:26 Se̱ de kera tan ihagh sha ayol a ase ga, shi se̱ de vemben ayol a ase man se̱ de eren iwuhe ayol a ase kpaa ga." 
Galatians6:1 Anmgbianev av, aluer a kohol or a ma gbev mbu nôngon ave yô, ne mba ne lu ken jijingi yô, kôôm nen imbaor la sha ishima i legh legh; kpa nenge sha iyol you sha er we kpaa i̱ de meen we ga yô." 
Galatians6:2 Wasen nen ikav ayol a en, ka nahan man né er sha tindi u Kristu vough ye." 
Galatians6:3 Aluer ma or nana hen er nan ngu ma kwagh kpa nan gba kwagh ga yô, nan ngu tsughun iyol i nan." 
Galatians6:4 Hanma or nana̱ kar tom u nan iyol i nan, ka nahan man nana lu a ityôikaa i tan ihagh ken iyol i nan tseegh, á kera lu sha kwagh u orgen ga ye." 
Galatians6:5 Gadia hanma or nana va tôô ikav mbi nan iyol i nan je. 
Galatians6:6 Or u i lu tesen nan kwaghôron u Aôndo yô, nana̱ kar akaa a doon cii vea or u tesen la." 
Galatians6:7 I̱ de tsughun ne ga, mba nahan Aôndo tar ga. Kwagh u or nan lee yô, shi ka un je nana sunda ye." 
Galatians6:8 Gadia or u nana lôô ken Jijingi yô, shi ka di sha Jijingi nana sunda uma u tsôron ye." 
Galatians6:9 Sé gba nen uwer u eren akaa a dedoo ga, gadia shighe á va kuma yô, sé sunda aluer se yina ishima ga yô." 
Galatians6:10 Nahan er se lu a ian yô, se eren nen akaa a doon a ior cii, kpa jim je yô, ka mbananjighjigh." 
Galatians6:11 Nenge asangeakaa a kehen a m nger ne sha uwegh agh iyol yam ne. 
Galatians6:12 Ka mbala mba i sar ve pe mongor sha ashe a ior la man ve lu nôngon pe kighir ne sha u ne̱ tsôngo ye, ka sha u i̱ de kera tôvon ve a ican sha kwagh u terankon u Kristu la ga yô." 
Galatians6:13 Gadia mba ve tsenge je kpaa, ve ayol a ve mba kuran atindi ga, kpa sar ve pe ma ne tsenge sha u vea ta ihagh sha iyol yen yô." 
Galatians6:14 Kpa mo yô, me ta ihagh je ga, saa di sha terankon u Ter wase Yesu Kristu, ka sha u je man i mandem tar, mo kpaa i mandem sha terankon sha kwagh u taregh ye." 
Galatians6:15 Icôngo ka kwagh ga, ipusu kpaa ka ma kwagh ga saa mgbe u ka i gba or hegh la." 
Galatians6:16 Man mba ve dondo tindi ngun ne cii yô, bem man mhôônom ma zungwen ma̱ lu sha a ve kua sha Iserael u Aôndo kpaa." 
Galatians6:17 Ken hemen yô, or a̱ de kera shi zem iyol ga, gadia mo m ngu a ayol a avavegh a Yesu sha iyol yam." 
Galatians6:18 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter wase Yesu Kristu a̱ lu a ujijingi enev, anmgbianev. (Amen)" 
Ephesians1:1 Paulu apostoli u Kristu Yesu sha ishima i Aôndo, ngu sughun uicighanmbaiorov mba ve lu [ken Efese], mba ve lu jighjigh ken Kristu Yesu yô." 
Ephesians1:2 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven kua bem mba ve dugh hen Aôndo Ter wase man Ter Yesu Kristu. 
Ephesians1:3 I̱ wuese Aôndo, Ter u Ter wase Yesu Kristu u A ver se sha hanma iveren i dedoo i ken jijingi sha ajiir a Sha ken Kristu." 
Ephesians1:4 A tsuwa se ken a Na je er i lu a gba tar ga yô sha u lun mba i tsegh ve man u lun a acôghol iyol ga kpaa sha ishigh Nagh. Ka sha dooshima je 
Ephesians1:5 A vande veren se sha u Una rumun se ye, se̱ lu ônov Nav ken Yesu Kristu, sha mwe u A wa ishima la ye," 
Ephesians1:6 ka sha ci u iwuese i á wuese iengem i mrumun Na u sha mhôôn u A rumun se ken Udoonshima la. 
Ephesians1:7 Ken a Na yô, se mba a mpaa u sha awambe Na man shi mde u gbev mbu nôngon sha mrumun Na u sha mhôôn u ngeen yum la," 
Ephesians1:8 u A ne ken vese wuee la ken hanma mfe kua mkav kpaa. 
Ephesians1:9 A pase se kwaghmyer u awashima Na u A wa ishima ken Kristu 
Ephesians1:10 sha u sôron akaa cii sha ci u shighe una va kuma vough la yô, Una kohol akaa a a lu Sha man a a lu shin tar kpaa ci ca cii sha ikev i Kristu," 
Ephesians1:11 Un u se ya dyako ken a na, u i vande veren se la sha awashima u Un u A eren akaa cii sha mhen u awashima Na la." 
Ephesians1:12 Ka sha u se̱ lu sha ci u icivir i iengem Na, se mba lu se vande veren ishima u keghen Kristu la." 
Ephesians1:13 Ka Un u ne kpaa, zum u ne ungwa kwaghôron u mimi u Loho u Dedoo u myom wen yô, ne na Un jighjigh man i ver ne ikav sha Icighan Jijingi u ityendezwa ye." 
Ephesians1:14 Ka Un man A lu ibumun u dyako wase er Una paa ior mba ve lu kwagh Na jim sha ci u icivir i iengem Na ye. 
Ephesians1:15 Sha ci u nahan yô, mo kpaa zum u m ungwa jighjigh wen u nan u ne ne Ter Yesu la man shi dooshima u uicighanmbaiorov cii ve doo ne ishima la," 
Ephesians1:16 m kera mem u sughun sha ci wen ga, m ngu umbur ne ken mbamsen av" 
Ephesians1:17 sha er Aôndo u Ter wase Yesu Kristu Ter u iengem A̱ na ne jijingi u mfe man u mpase sha u fan Un," 
Ephesians1:18 shi A̱ wanger ne ashe a asema a en sha u né fa er ishimaverenkeghen i myer u A yila ne la i lu yô, man shi er iengem i ngeen yum i dyako Na u ken uicighanmbaiorov i lu yô," 
Ephesians1:19 man shi er agee a Na a vese a gande ken vese mba se ne jighjigh yô, sha inja i ieren i tahav mbu agee a Na." 
Ephesians1:20 Ka sha a man A er tom ken Kristu zum u a nder Un shin mbakpenev la A ver Un er A̱ tema Un ken uwegh ku yanegh sha ajiir a Sha la," 
Ephesians1:21 A̱ hemba taven sha a hanma tarkuran man tahav man agee man tor u yan cii man hanma iti cii i i yer i sha ayange ne kua a lu van ken hemen la kpaa. 
Ephesians1:22 Man A ver akaa cii shin angahar a Na, A ver Un A̱ lu ityough sha akaa cii ken nongo u Kristu," 
Ephesians1:23 ka iyol Na je la, ka m-iv u Un u A lu ivin akaa cii ken uuma cii." 
Ephesians2:1 Man ne kpaa, A na ne uma, ne mba ne lu kpenegh ken gbev mbu nôngon kua asorabo a en" 
Ephesians2:2 a ne vande zenden sha mi sha inja i mlu u tar u ainge ne, sha inja i tor u tahav mbu ahumbev, ka jijingi u a lu eren tom hegen ken ônov mba ihembeato." 
Ephesians2:3 Ngise se cii kpaa se lu ken ve ken asaren a ayol a ase, se lu eren sha mbamhange mba ken iyol man mba ken mhen wase, man se lu ônov mba iyughuv sha marami vough er mbagenev di nahan." 
Ephesians2:4 Kpa Aôndo ngee a mhôônom ma zungwen, ka sha dooshima Na u vesen u se doo Un ishima la man A na se uma a Kristu imôngo je" 
Ephesians2:5 er se lu kpenegh ken gbev mbu nôngon la ye, ka sha mrumun u sha mhôôn i yima ne ye," 
Ephesians2:6 man A nder se a Na imôngo, A ver se se tema a Na imôngo sha ajiir a Sha ken Kristu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:7 Ka sha u ken ayange a a lu van ken hemen la Una pase mrumun Na u sha mhôôn u a ngee yum, a hemba sha won la, sha a vese ken Kristu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Gadia ka sha mrumun u sha mhôôn i yima ne ye, sha jighjigh u nan. Man kwagh ne yô, ka her a ven a dugh ga, ka iwua i Aôndo." 
Ephesians2:9 Ka sha tom u eren ga, sha er ma or nana̱ de te ihagh ga." 
Ephesians2:10 Gadia se mba tomaveegh Na, i gba se ken Kristu Yesu sha ci u aeren a dedoo a Aôndo vande sôron sha u se̱ zenden sha mi yô." 
Ephesians2:11 Nahan yô, umbur nen er ngise ne lu atôatyev ken iyol; mba i yer ve iti sha icôngo i ka i er ken iyol sha ave la yô, ve gema ve yilan ne er mbaipusuv." 
Ephesians2:12 Shi umbur nen er ken shighe la ne lu paleghaa a Kristu je, ne lu a kwar ken nongo u Iserael ga, ne lu mba ken inya sha kwagh u uikurmbayan mba sha ityendezwa, ne lu a ishimaverenkeghen ga, ne lu a Aôndo shin tar kpaa ga." 
Ephesians2:13 Kpa hegen ken Kristu Yesu yô, ne mba ngise ne lu ica, ne hingir ikua ikua sha awambe a Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Gadia ka Un A lu bem wase ye, A gema ve uhar cii hingir kwagh môm, A hembe kpekpe u ihom u ker atô la kera; ka ken iyol Na" 
Ephesians2:15 man A bunde tindi u akaawan a a lu sha gbaaôndo la kera ye, sha u Una gema ve uhar cii Una gba or u he môm, ken iyol Na, Una va haa bem," 
Ephesians2:16 Una hime ve uhar cii ken iyol môm a Aôndo sha terankon, ka sha u man A wua ihom kera ye." 
Ephesians2:17 Man A va a Loho u Dedoo A yôô bem sha ci wen mba ne lu ica man bem sha ci u mba ve lu ikua ikua kpaa. 
Ephesians2:18 Gadia ka sha a Na man se uhar cii se lu a ian i nyôron hen Ter ken Jijingi môm ye. 
Ephesians2:19 Nahan yô, ne kera mba mbavannya kua ushirmbaiorov ga, ne mba nongo môm a uicighanmbaiorov ne mba mba ken ya u Aôndo je," 
Ephesians2:20 i maa ne sha imagh ki mbaapostoli kua uprofeti, Kristu Yesu iyol Na ka iwen i sha zongo." 
Ephesians2:21 Ka ken a Na man kwaghmaan la a zough a lu taven sha, hingir icighantempel u Ter ye." 
Ephesians2:22 Ka ken a Na man ne kpaa i lu maan ne ne hingir iyou i tsan i Aôndo ken Jijingi ye. 
Ephesians3:1 Ka nahan je man mo, Paulu, m lu orkwar u Kristu sha ci wen ne atôatyev ye," 
Ephesians3:2 gayô ne ungwa kwagh u tom u i wem sha ikev sha ci wen la sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo," 
Ephesians3:3 ka sha mpase je i pasem, m fe kwaghmyer la ye er m nger ne sha nahan, m tôndo a tôndo." 
Ephesians3:4 Aluer ne ôr ngula yô, ne fatyô u fan mkav wam u m kav kwagh u myer u Kristu la." 
Ephesians3:5 Ken ikov igen yô, i lu a pase ônov mba iorov kwagh ne er hegen i pase uicighanmbaapostoli Nav kua uprofeti ken Jijingi nahan ga," 
Ephesians3:6 er atôatyev kpaa a lu mbayandyako imôngo man iyol i môm man nongo môm a vese sha ityendezwa i ken Kristu Yesu sha Loho u Dedoo. 
Ephesians3:7 M hingir ortom u u sha mne u i nam sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo, ka sha m-ertom u agee a Na la." 
Ephesians3:8 Mo u m hembe gban ijime ken uicighanmbaiorov cii yô, i nam mrumun u sha mhôôn ne u ôron atôatyev Loho u Dedoo u mngee u Kristu A ngee a akaa i gande u tôvon la," 
Ephesians3:9 man shi u pasen wanger wanger er tom u sha kwaghmyer la u lu yô; kwaghmyer ne lu myer ken Aôndo u A gbe akaa cii, hii je er shighe lu a lu ga la." 
Ephesians3:10 Ka sha u hegen nongo u Kristu u̱ pase mbatarev man mbautahav mba sha ajiir a Sha la ve̱ fa kwaghfan u Aôndo u a dumbur la," 
Ephesians3:11 ka sha awashima Na u tsôron u A kure ken Kristu Yesu Ter wase la. 
Ephesians3:12 Ken a Na yô, se mba a vangertiôr man ian i nyôron gbar gbar sha jighjigh u se ne Un la." 
Ephesians3:13 Nahan m ngu zamber a ven mer, asema a̱ de yen ne sha atsan a am a m lu yan sha ci wen la ga. Ka icivir yen je la." 
Ephesians3:14 Sha ci u nahan yô, m ngu guren anu sha ishigh ki Ter" 
Ephesians3:15 u hanma nongo u Sha kua u shin tar cii u lu zuan a iti her a Na la. 
Ephesians3:16 M ngu sônon mer, A̱ na ne sha iengem Na i ngeen yum la, i̱ taver ne ne̱ lu a agee sha Jijingi Na ken uma u ken semayolough," 
Ephesians3:17 Kristu A̱ tema ya ken asema a en sha jighjigh u nan er ne we amise ken dooshima, i tim ne ker dông yô," 
Ephesians3:18 i̱ na ne agee a uicighanmbaiorov imôngo cii u kaven er igbanger man iniembe man mtav man mze 
Ephesians3:19 u dooshima u Kristu u a gande u fan la a lu yô man shi u kaven un, sha u né iv zan zan m-iv u Aôndo cii." 
Ephesians3:20 Un yô, A fatyô u eren kwagh sha agee a a lu eren tom ken vese la je á hemba kwagh u se sen shi se lu henen la ica je kpaa." 
Ephesians3:21 Icivir i̱ lu i Na ken nongo u Kristu man ken Kristu Yesu sha ikov ikov gbem sha won. 
Ephesians4:1 Mo orkwar u ken Ter ne, m ngu wan ne kwagh mer, zende nen zende u u kom sha myer u i yila ne la," 
Ephesians4:2 a iyolgengese ga, man a ishima i legh legh, man a ishima i wan kpaa, kundu nen asema a ayol a en sha dooshima." 
Ephesians4:3 Nôngon nen tsung u kuran mzough u ken Jijingi sha mkange u bem. 
Ephesians4:4 Iyol ngi môm, Jijingi kpaa ngu môm di er i yila ne sha ishimaverenkeghen môm i sha myer wen la nahan." 
Ephesians4:5 Ter ngu môm, jighjigh u nan kpaa ngu môm, batisema kpaa môm," 
Ephesians4:6 Aôndo kpaa ngu môm, ka Ter u uuma cii. A tav A kar uuma sha cii, man ngu eren kwagh ken uuma cii man ngu lun ken uuma cii kpaa." 
Ephesians4:7 Kpa i na hanmô wase mrumun u sha mhôôn ser ser sha kwar u Kristu A lu karen yô. 
Ephesians4:8 Ka nahan man A kaa er: Zum u A kôndo sha yô, A kua a mbakwarev, A yem a ve, man A na ior uiwua kpaa." 
Ephesians4:9 Ape i kaa er: “A kôndo” la, inja na nana saa di Una vande senen shin ajiir a zan a masen shin, a shin tar laa?" 
Ephesians4:10 Un u A sen la, shi ka Un je A kôndo sha, A kar Usha cii sha u Una iv akaa cii." 
Ephesians4:11 Ka Un je A ne mbagenev ve lu mbaapostoli, mbagenev yô, ka uprofeti mbagenev ka mbaivangeli, mbagenev ka mbakuran man mbatesen." 
Ephesians4:12 Ka sha u nan uicighanmbaiorov ve̱ kuma sha tom u eren, sha u maan iyol i Kristu," 
Ephesians4:13 zan zan se cii sé va kuma sha mzough u ken jighjigh u nan, man mfe u fan Wan u Aôndo man sha mlu u igandenor man ikaren i mluyol u m-iv u Kristu la." 
Ephesians4:14 Ka nahan man sé kera lu mbayev mba ka i daase a ve i yem a ve wue wue sha ahumbe a ityesen, sha atseregh a ior, sha mtsugh u tsughun ior tsumen a ve sha wayo la ga ye." 
Ephesians4:15 Kpa er se luun ken mimi sha dooshima yô, sé vesen sha akaa cii ken Un u A lu ityough, ka Kristu je la." 
Ephesians4:16 Ka ken a Na man iyol cii er i magh i, i zua i sha iwasen i hanma ijuan i i lu ker yô, sha tom u hanma ilyeegh ki lu eren sha inja i ki la, i lu vesen i lu maan iyol i i ken dooshima ye." 
Ephesians4:17 M ngu ôron kwagh ne ken Ter m ngu eren shiada mer, mayange de kera zenden nen er atôatyev a zenden sha mhen ve u gbilinigh la nahan ga." 
Ephesians4:18 Mfe ve la wa ime, mba paleghaa a uma u Aôndo, sha ci u lanegh ku ku lu ken ve sha asema ve a cighir la." 
Ephesians4:19 Asema a ve wa akpema, ve na ayol a ve sha ijimba i eren sha u keren hanma kwagh u hôngorough sha hua." 
Ephesians4:20 Kpa ne yô, i tese ne kwagh u Kristu nahan ga," 
Ephesians4:21 gayô ne ungwa kwagh Na shi i tese ne ken a Na er mimi a lu ken Yesu je yô. 
Ephesians4:22 Er nen tseor la kera u a lu sha inja i zende u tsuaa la, u a vihi kera sha asaren a icughugh la." 
Ephesians4:23 Hingir nen hegh ken jijingi u mhen wen," 
Ephesians4:24 man haa nen orhe iyol u i gbe un sha inja i Aôndo ken perapera u mimi man mtsegh u mimi. 
Ephesians4:25 Nahan yô, dugh nen aie kera, hanma or nana̱ ôron kwagh sha mimi a or u nan we ndor a nan yô gadia se mba alegh ayol a ase." 
Ephesians4:26 Nyoon nen ishima, kpa de eren nen isholibo ga, iyange i̱ de been ne a ishima i vihin her ga." 
Ephesians4:27 De ne nen diabolo ian ga. 
Ephesians4:28 Or u iin nana̱ de kera shi iin ga, kpa guda yô, nana̱ nôngo tsung, nana̱ er tom u mimi sha ave a nan, tsô nana lu a kwagh u panden nan orgen u kwagh a gbe nan yô." 
Ephesians4:29 Ma kwaghôron u dang a̱ de dugh ken zwa wen ga, saa di u doon u una fatyô u maan a maa kwagh ape kwagh a gbe sha mi yô, nahan mba vea ungwa kpaa vea zua a mrumun u sha mhôôn." 
Ephesians4:30 De vihin nen Icighan Jijingi u Aôndo ishima ga u i ver ne ikav sha a Na sha ci u iyange i mpaa la. 
Ephesians4:31 Dugh nen hanma ishima i yuan man ishima i nyoon man iyugh man u zôhôn genger genger man ityuhwanev ken a ven kera kua hanma inja i dang kpaa. 
Ephesians4:32 Kpa lu nen sar sar ayol a en, zungwen nen mhôônom, de nen ayol a en kwaghbo, er Aôndo kpaa A de ne ken Kristu nahan." 
Ephesians5:1 Nahan yô, lu nen mbakaven Aôndo er ônov mba doon ishima nahan." 
Ephesians5:2 Man zenden nen ken dooshima, er Kristu kpaa se doo Un ishima man A na iyol Na sha ci wase nahan, lu nagh ku nanden man nagh ku sôngon nan Aôndo sha ci u ihuma i doon." 
Ephesians5:3 Kpa idya man hanma inja i hôngorough kua hua u eren yô, u teren tsô kpaa, de teren her a ven ga er i kom uicighanmbaiorov yô." 
Ephesians5:4 Hwanger man kwaghôron u sha beer man asenge a doon ga la cii, a̱ de luun ken ven ga, guda yô, i̱ lu iwuese." 
Ephesians5:5 Kwagh ne a̱ wanger ne dedoo, hanma or u idya shin or u hwangeregh shin or u hua, ka or u civir akombo je la, nan ngu a dyako ken tartor u Kristu man u Aôndo la je ga." 
Ephesians5:6 Ma or nana̱ de kera bumen ne sha akaaôron a gbilinigh ga. Ka sha ci u akaa angan ne man iyugh i Aôndo i lu van sha ônov mba ihembeato ye. 
Ephesians5:7 Nahan de nyer nen nongo a ve je ga. 
Ephesians5:8 Tsuaa la yô, ne lu ime kpa hegen yô, ne mba iwanger ken Ter, zende nen er ônov mba iwangerev nahan." 
Ephesians5:9 Gadia ityamegh ki iwangeregh yô, ki ken hanma kwagh u doon, man kwagh u perapera man kwagh u mimi cii." 
Ephesians5:10 Karen nen faan nen kwagh u a doo Ter ishima yô. 
Ephesians5:11 Man de nyer nen nongo a aeren a imegh a a lu a inja ga la ze, kpa guda yô, pase nen a ken igbar." 
Ephesians5:12 Akaa a ve eren myer la, kunya kôr u ôron a je." 
Ephesians5:13 Hanma kwagh u iwanger i pase un yô, ka a due ken igbar, gadia hanma kwagh u a lu ken igbar yô, ka iwanger je." 
Ephesians5:14 Ka nahan man i kaa er: Nder, we u u yav ne, mough shin mbakpenev, man Kristu Una ta iwanger sha a we bong ye." 
Ephesians5:15 Nenge nen vighe vighe er ne zenden yô, i̱ de lu er mbalanenkwagh nahan ga, kpa i̱ lu er mbafankwagh nahan." 
Ephesians5:16 Man waan nen ian yen iko, gadia ayange ne ka a bo je." 
Ephesians5:17 De luun nen mbabumen ga, kpa kav nen er ishima i Ter i lu yô." 
Ephesians5:18 De hundu nen msôrom ga, dang ngu keregh, kpa iv nen a Jijingi." 
Ephesians5:19 Ôron nen kwagh ayol a en sha upasalami man atsam man amo a gberen a ken jijingi, man dugh nen amo, waan nen Ter atsam ken asema a en." 
Ephesians5:20 Sughun nen Aôndo Ter hanma shighe sha akaa cii ken iti i Ter wase Yesu Kristu. 
Ephesians5:21 Ungwan nen ayol a en sha ci u cian Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Kasev, ungwan nen imo i noov enev er ka Ter nahan." 
Ephesians5:23 Gadia nom ka ityough ki kwase di er Kristu kpaa A lu ityough ki nongo Na nahan man ka Un je A lu Oryiman u iyol Na la kpaa ye. 
Ephesians5:24 Nahan er nongo u Kristu u lu ungwan imo i Kristu yô, kape kasev kpaa, ve̱ ungwa imo i noov vev ken akaa cii je la." 
Ephesians5:25 Ne noov, kasev enev ve̱ doo ne asema di er Kristu kpaa, nongo Na u doo Un ishima man A ne iyol Na sha ci u u nahan," 
Ephesians5:26 sha u Una tsegha u er A wanger u sha m-ee u A ôô u sha mnger sha kwaghôron Na," 
Ephesians5:27 sha u Una ver nongo Na sha ishigh Nagh, u̱ engem u̱ de kera lu a ahuar shin adivir shin mô u ken ambaakaa la kpaa ga, kpa u̱ lu ken mtsegh, u̱ de lu a acôghol iyol ga." 
Ephesians5:28 Kape noov kpaa, kasev vev ve̱ doo ve ishima keng er ayol a ve nahan la. Or u kwase u nan a doo nan ishima yô, ka iyol i nan je i doo nan ishima ye." 
Ephesians5:29 Gadia mayange ma or nana kôr iyol i nan ihom ga kpa nan koson i shi nan kor i kpaa di er Kristu kpaa A eren a nongo na Nahan," 
Ephesians5:30 gadia se mba alegh a Na. 
Ephesians5:31 Sha ci u nahan yô, or nana undu ter u nan kua ngô u nan, nana gema nana var a kwase u nan man ve uhar yô, vea lu iyôgh i môm je." 
Ephesians5:32 Kwagh u myer ne vese tsô kpa m ngu ôron ka sha Kristu man sha nongo Na. 
Ephesians5:33 Nahan ne kpaa, hanma or kwase u nan a̱ doo nan ishima er iyol i nan nahan, kwase kpaa, a̱ cia nom u nan." 
Ephesians6:1 Ne ônov, ungwan nen imo i mbamaren enev [ken Ter]. Gadia ka nahan je i lu vough ye." 
Ephesians6:2 Civir teru man ngôu, ka tindi u hiihii u ityendezwa i lu sha mi je la," 
Ephesians6:3 ka nahan man á kpe u iyol man ú tsa sha won ye. 
Ephesians6:4 Ne uter kpaa, de eren nen a ônov enev er vea yuwe ga kpa yese nen ve sha mkôôm man kwaghwan u Ter." 
Ephesians6:5 Ne mbashirentom kpaa, ungwan nen imo i mba ve lu uter enev ken iyol la sha mcie man ikarikase iyol kpaa, i̱ lu sha mimi u ken asema a en er ka Kristu nahan." 
Ephesians6:6 I̱ de lu tom u sha ashe a ior tsô er ka mbadoon ityough a ior nahan ga, kpa i̱ lu er mbashiren Kristu tom mba ve eren ishima i Ter a ishima i môm yô." 
Ephesians6:7 Eren nen tom sha gbashima er ka Ter ne eren Un tom nahan i̱ de lu er ka ior ga," 
Ephesians6:8 gadia ne fa hanma kwagh u doon u or nan eren la, nana shi nana ngohol un hen Ter, shin nan lu kpan, shin nan lu kpan ga kpaa." 
Ephesians6:9 Man ne uter kpaa, eren nen a ve nahan, de kera te nen kume a ve ga, gadia ne fa Ter ve man u wen ngu Sha man u sangen sha dooshima yô, ngu ker a Na ga." 
Ephesians6:10 Kwagh ugen yô, taver nen ken Ter sha tahav mbu agee a Na." 
Ephesians6:11 Huwa nen ikav mbi utyav mbi Aôndo cii iyol sha u né fatyô u tilen dông hendan a ayom a diabolo yô. 
Ephesians6:12 Gadia kera ka awambe man inyam se lu nôngon ityav a ve ga, kpa ka mbatarev man mbautahav man mba ve lu utor sha tar cii mba ime ngin ne, man ujijingi mba aferev mba sha ajiir a Sha." 
Ephesians6:13 Sha ci u nahan yô, tôô nen ikav mbi utyav mbi Aôndo cii sha u né fatyô u tilen dông sha iyange i ifer yô, man zum u né kure akaa cii né tile her yô." 
Ephesians6:14 Nahan yô, tile nen, tsule nen kwange hen uya, ka mimi je la, har nen perutya iyol, ka perapera je la," 
Ephesians6:15 man wa nen akôv shin angahar, ka mkoholyol u sha ivangeli i bem je la." 
Ephesians6:16 Er ne lu a akaa ne cii yô, shi tôô nen akuvautya, ka jighjigh u nan je la, u né fatyô u pirin avaan a usu a orbo la a mi cii yô." 
Ephesians6:17 Shi tôô nen agunduutya u iyôô, ka myom je la; kua sanker u Jijingi, ka mkaanem ma Aôndo je la." 
Ephesians6:18 Eren nen msen hanma shighe ken Jijingi sha hanma msen man mzamber cii. Luun nen per sha mi sha ishima i taver man sha mzamber sha ci u uicighanmbaiorov cii," 
Ephesians6:19 man sha ci wam kpaa sha er ma i nem kwaghôron zum u me bugh zwa sha u me pase kwagh u myer u Loho u Dedoo vangertiôr," 
Ephesians6:20 u m lu ortom u u ken mshirim man ne, sha u me yôô u gbar gbar er i doo u me ôr yô." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikiku, anmgbian u doon ishima man ortom u jighjigh ken Ter una pase ne akaa cii sha u ne kpaa né fa mlu wam man kwagh u m lu eren yô." 
Ephesians6:22 M tindi un her a ven ka sha ci u kwagh ne jim sha u né fa kwagh wam man a̱ sur ne asema kpaa yô. 
Ephesians6:23 Bem a̱ lu sha anmgbianev, man dooshima u a lu a jighjigh u nan sha mi, mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter man Ter Yesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ve mba Ter wase Yesu a doo ve ishima sha dooshima u been ga la, cii." 
Philippians1:1 Paulu man Timoteu ikpan i Kristu Yesu mba sughun uicighanmbaiorov ken Kristu Yesu, mba ve lu ken Filipi vea mbakuran kua udiakon kpaa." 
Philippians1:2 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven man bem mba ve dugh hen Aôndo Ter wase man Ter Yesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:3 M sughun Aôndo wam hanma shighe u ka mea umbur ne yô. 
Philippians1:4 Gbem je, ken hanma msen wam cii, m ngu sônon sha ci wen cii a iember je," 
Philippians1:5 ka sha ci u ne lu ave a mo imôngo sha u pasen Loho u Dedoo hii sha iyange i hiihii la je, zan zan ar hegen." 
Philippians1:6 M fa dedoo mer Un u A hii tom u dedoo ken a ven la Una za hemen u eren u zan zan iyange i Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians1:7 U me hen sha kwagh wen cii nahan yô, kam kwagh u dedoo, gadia ne mbam ken ishima, gadia ken mshirim am man shi ken mpaleghyol u Loho u Dedoo man shi mtim u i tim u la kpaa ne cii ne nyôr nongo a mo ken mrumun u sha mhôôn." 
Philippians1:8 Gadia Aôndo ka shiada wam er i hangem a ven cii tsung sha mhôônom ma kôron ma Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians1:9 Man m ngu eren msen mer, dooshima wen a̱ seer a seer ngeen sha kwaghfan man sha hanma mkav cii," 
Philippians1:10 sha er né kar né fa akaa a a hembe lun a inja yô, nahan né lu wang né lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga sha iyange i Kristu," 
Philippians1:11 né iv a atam a perapera a a lu sha Yesu Kristu la sha ci u icivir man iwuese i Aôndo. 
Philippians1:12 Sarem pe fa nen anmgbianev, kwagh u a erem ne gema hingir mzehemen u Loho u Dedoo," 
Philippians1:13 je hingir ken igbar ken ya u mbakuran mba Shisar cii man mbagenev cii kpaa er ikangenev mbi i kangem ne ka sha ci u Kristu je," 
Philippians1:14 man anmgbianev mba ken Ter mba ve zough a ishima i taver sha ikangenev yav, mba ve hembe cihin u ôron kwaghôron u Aôndo, ve kera cie ga yô, ve hemba ngeen." 
Philippians1:15 Mbagenev mba pasen kwagh u Kristu kpa ka sha iwuhe man ahendan, mbagenev di yô, ka sha mimi ve lu pasen ye." 
Philippians1:16 Mban yô, ka sha dooshima gadia ve fa er i verem sha ci u mpaleghyol u Loho u Dedoo yô." 
Philippians1:17 Kpa mbagenev mbala yô, ka sha u wan ayol a ve iko tseegh ve lu pasen kwagh u Kristu ye, ka sha mimi ga, mba veren ishima u seer mo ican ken ikangenev yav." 
Philippians1:18 Tsô á er nana? A lu nan nan kpaa mba pasen kwagh u Kristu je, a lu sha ayom, shin a lu sha mimi kpaa, man ka sha kwagh la je m lu ember ye man shi me va ember kpaa." 
Philippians1:19 Gadia m fa, kwagh ne una va hingir mwar wam sha mbamsen enev man sha iwasen i Jijingi u Yesu Kristu," 
Philippians1:20 er m keghen tsung shi m veren ishima kpaa mer, ma m ye kunya sha kwagh môm môm ga, kpa i̱ civir Kristu ken iyol yam vangertiôr je hegen kpaa er i vande lun keke ne nahan, shin a lu sha uma, shin a lu sha ku kpaa." 
Philippians1:21 Mo yô, u lun uma, kam Kristu man u kpen gema kam a ka mtsera." 
Philippians1:22 Mea lu uma ken iyol her yô, á lum tom u umen atam, yô, m kera fa kwagh u me tsuwa ga." 
Philippians1:23 Asema hingir mo ahar. Sarem ka yemen za lun vea Kristu, gadia nahan hemba doon yum." 
Philippians1:24 Kpa u shi lun ken iyol her yô, á hemba lun ne a inja." 
Philippians1:25 Er i wanger mo nahan yô, m fa, me lu her man me lu a ven cii her kpaa, sha ci u né za hemen man né lu a msaanyol u sha jighjigh u nan kpaa." 
Philippians1:26 Ka sha u nea lu a ityôikaa i tan ihagh ken Kristu Yesu sha ci wam yô aluer me shi me hide her a ven yô. 
Philippians1:27 Kpa kwagh môm yô, mlu wen a̱ kuma sha Loho u Dedoo u Kristu, sha u shin mea va mea va zua ishigh a ven shin mea va ga kpaa, ma m ongo kwagh wen mer, ne tile dông, ne mba ken jijingi môm ne mba ishima i môm, ne mba nôngon imôngo sha ci u jighjigh u nan u sha Loho u Dedoo la." 
Philippians1:28 Mbahendan a ven mbala, kwagh ve môm a̱ de te ne mciem iyol ga. Kwagh ne yô ngu tesen ikav sha mtim ve, kpa ne yô, gema tese sha myom wen; man myom ne yô, ka her Aôndo a dugh ye." 
Philippians1:29 Ne yô, i rumun ne sha mhôôn er sha kwagh u Kristu yô, ka jighjigh tseegh né na Un ga, kpa né ya ican sha ci Na kpaa," 
Philippians1:30 er ne lu nôngon ityav sha ican tsung imba i ne nenge a mi ken a mo shi ne lu ungwan sha a mo hegen kpaa la. 
Philippians2:1 Aluer ma msurshima una lu ken Kristu, man aluer ma ishima i taver i sha dooshima ia lu, shin ma mzough u ken Jijingi una lu shin ma mhôônom ma kôron man mhôônom ma zungwen maa lu yô," 
Philippians2:2 iv nen iember yam, lu nen a ishima i veren môm, lu nen ken dooshima môm, lu nen ishima i môm, lu nen a mhen môm kpaa." 
Philippians2:3 De eren nen kwagh sha u wan ayol a en iko tseegh shin sha u keren icivir i gbilinigh kpaa ga, kpa hide nen ayol a en ijime; hanma or nana̱ nengen er orgen hemba nan yô." 
Philippians2:4 Hanma or nana̱ de kera waan akaa a nan iyol i nan iko tseegh ga, kpa nana̱ wa akaa a mbagenev iko kpaa." 
Philippians2:5 Lu nen a mhen ne ken a ven u a lu ken Kristu Yesu la kpaa. 
Philippians2:6 Un u A lu ken mlu u Aôndo la A nenge er mlu u lun kwagh môm a Aôndo la lu kwagh u yan ishar sha mi ga yô," 
Philippians2:7 kpa A gema iyol Na hingir gbilin er A tôô mlu u ortom, A hingir kwagh môm a ior la." 
Philippians2:8 Man er i va zua a Na a mluyol er or nahan yô, A hide a iyol Na ijime, hingir u ungwan kwagh zan zan ar ken ku, man lu ku u terankon je." 
Philippians2:9 Ka sha ci u nahan man Aôndo A kende Un sha kpishi je ye, A ii Un iti i i hembe hanma iti igen cii," 
Philippians2:10 sha er hanma inyu cii i mba ve lu Sha man mba ve lu shin tar man mba ve lu shin atô u taregh kpaa, ia gure inya ken iti i Yesu yô," 
Philippians2:11 man hanma nombor kpaa ua pase er Yesu Kristu ka Ter je sha ci u iengem i Aôndo Ter. 
Philippians2:12 Nahan yô, ne mbadoon mo ishima, er ne vande lun a iko i wan gbem nahan, i̱ de lu sha shighe u mo m lu a ven la tseegh ga kpa i̱ hemba a hemba hegen er m lu a ven ga ne; eren nen tom sha myom wen a mciem man ikarikase iyol" 
Philippians2:13 gadia ka Aôndo je A lu eren tom ken a ven ye, sha u kwagh u a doo Un la a̱ sar ne, shi ne̱ eren sha mi kpaa." 
Philippians2:14 Eren nen akaa cii, ahon a̱ de lu sha mi ga, anyiman kpaa ga," 
Philippians2:15 sha er né lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga, né lu wang, né lu ônov mba Aôndo mba ve lu a ahuar iyol ga yô, ker atô u kov u lun kpe u geseghee ne," 
Philippians2:16 né taan iwanger ken ve er asan a wanger nahan; kusu nen kwaghôron u uma la gbang gbang, i̱ lum kwagh u tan ihagh a mi sha iyange i Kristu, sha u zende wam u̱ de lu u gbilinigh ga, tom wam u sha gbashima la kpaa, u̱ de lu u gbilinigh ga." 
Philippians2:17 Kpa aluer a va urum kera er nagh ku urun nahan sha nagh ku i ne kua icighantom u i er u sha jighjigh wen u nan la kpaa, m ember man m ngu ember a ven imôngo cii." 
Philippians2:18 Ne kpaa, kape ember nen la, shi ember nen a mo imôngo kpaa." 
Philippians2:19 M ngu veren ishima ken Ter mer, me tindi Timoteu her a ven fefa sha u ma m ongo kwagh wen, mo kpaa, ma i doom iyol yô." 
Philippians2:20 Gadia m kera ngu a orgen u nan lu ishima i môm a ven u nana ver ishima sha kwagh wen sha mimi nahan ga. 
Philippians2:21 Gadia mbagenev cii mba keren akaa a ve ayol a ve, kera ka kwagh u Kristu Yesu ga." 
Philippians2:22 Kpa un yô, ne fa inja na, a er tom a mo imôngo sha Loho u Dedoo er wan vea ter nahan." 
Philippians2:23 Gadia m ngu veren ishima mer, zum u me fa er kwagh wam una za kure yô, ka un je me tindi un her a ven fese ye." 
Philippians2:24 Kpa m ver ishima ken Ter mer, mo kpaa ma m ve fefa." 
Philippians2:25 Kpa m nenge doo u tindin Epafroditu her a ven, un yô, ka anmgbian u eren tom a mo imôngo shi ka orutya a mo imôngo u ne tindi un, a va wasem sha gbayol wam yô." 
Philippians2:26 Hange un u nengen a ven cii, ishima nyian un er ne za ongo er un lu dedoo ga yô." 
Philippians2:27 Man a lu dedoo ga mimi, mgbôghom a ku je, kpa Aôndo zungwe un mhôônom, man ka un tseegh ga, mo kpaa A zungwem sha u i̱ de seer mo ijungwen sha ijungwen ga." 
Philippians2:28 Me nôngo tsung u tindin un sha u né zua ishigh a na, né shi né ember, mo kpaa, ishima i nyian i̱ pandem." 
Philippians2:29 Nahan rumun nen un doo doo ken Ter sha iember tsung, waan nen ambaaior la iko;" 
Philippians2:30 gadia shi côhin ma a kpe sha ci u tom u Kristu, a gbihi uma na sha u ivin kwagh u a shi sha iwasen yen i ne wasem la." 
Philippians3:1 Kwagh ugen yô, anmgbianev av, ember nen ken Ter. U shi ngeren ne akaa shon ne kpaa, uwer gbam ga, ne yô, ka ne iwasen." 
Philippians3:2 Kura nen iyol sha kwagh u iwa, kura nen iyol sha kwagh u mbashirentom mba mimi ga la, kura nen sha kwagh u mbatôndon avav iyol ayol a ve la." 
Philippians3:3 Gadia ka se je se lu mbaicôngo ye, se mba se civir Aôndo ken Jijingi, se mba se te ihagh ken Kristu Yesu, man se kera suur sha iyol ga la," 
Philippians3:4 shin er mo m lu a ityôikaa i suur sha iyol nahan kpaa. Aluer orgen nana nenge er nan fatyô u suur sha iyol yô, mo ma m hembe." 
Philippians3:5 I tsôngom sha iyange i sha anigheni la, m ngu ken nongo u Iserael, ken kwe u Benyamin, m ngu or u Heberu u ken Mbaheberu je, sha kwagh u atindi yô, m ngu Orfarishi." 
Philippians3:6 Sha kwagh u ishima i tseen, m tôv nongo u Kristu a ican je. Sha kwagh u perapera u a lu sha atindi la yô, m lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga." 
Philippians3:7 Kpa akaa a a lum mtsera la cii, a gema hingir mo msaa sha ci u Kristu." 
Philippians3:8 Mimi je m nenge akaa cii hingir mo msaa sha ci u mfe u fan Kristu Yesu Terem la a hembe ica yum yô. Ka sha ci Na man m de akaa cii a saam ye, m nenge a hingir mo hôngor sha u Kristu Una lu mtsera wam yô,"
