Philippians3:9 ma i kohol mo ken a Na, m̱ de lu a perapera wam iyol yam u sha atindi la ga, kpa i̱ lu u sha jighjigh u nan u i ne Yesu la, ka perapera u a dugh her Aôndo sha jighjigh u nan la," 
Philippians3:10 sha u ma m fe Un man agee a mnder Na u shin ku, man mzough u zuan a Na sha atsan a Na man u hingir kwagh môm a Na ken ku Na la," 
Philippians3:11 aluer a fatyô yô, ma m ar sha mnder u shin mbakpenev la." 
Philippians3:12 Ka u kaan er m ngohol ve shin m hingir vough ve ga, kpa m ngu zendan a zenda sha u me tser a mi, i̱ hingir kwagh wam gadia Kristu tser a mo, m hingir kwagh Na." 
Philippians3:13 Anmgbianev av, mo yô, m ngu henen mer m zua a mi hingir kwagh wam ve ga, kpa kwagh u m lu eren yô, ngu môm, akaa a ken ijime la hungul mo kera m ngu naregh zan sha akaa a ken hemen la." 
Philippians3:14 M ngu yevese zan hen ikighir i i ver la sha u zuan a iwua i myila u a sen sha, u Aôndo A lu yilan ken Kristu Yesu la." 
Philippians3:15 Nahan se mba se hingir vough la yô, se lu nen a mhen ne. Man aluer mhen wen una kaha kposo sha ma kwagh yô, heera kpaa, Aôndo Una pase ne." 
Philippians3:16 Kpa kwagh u se zua a mi la yô, se zende nen sha mi vough." 
Philippians3:17 Anmgbianev av, ne cii, lu nen mbakaven mo shi nenge nen sha mba ve lu zenden er ne nenge ikav sha a mo nahan la." 
Philippians3:18 Gadia mbagenev kpishi mba zenden—m vande ôron ne kwagh ve. Hegen shi m ngu ôron ne a mliam ashe je mer, mba zenden, ka mbaihomov mba terankon u Kristu." 
Philippians3:19 Mkur ve yô, ka mtim, aôndo ve yô, ka iyav vev, kunya ve la gema ngu ve icivir, ka akaa a taregh ve veren ishima sha mi ye." 
Philippians3:20 Gadia se yô, tar wase ngu Sha, ka sha her kpaa se lu keghen ser Oryiman Una va ye, ka Ter Yesu Kristu je la." 
Philippians3:21 Una va gema ayol a ase a icivirigh ga ne, aa hingir kposo á lu kwagh môm a iyol Na i iengem la, ka sha agee a Na a A fetyô u geman akaa cii hingir sha ikev Na la." 
Philippians4:1 Nahan yô, ne anmgbianev mba ne doom ishima shi i hangem a ven kpaa, ne mba ne lu iember yam man tsar wam u icivirigh kpaa ne, tile nen ken Ter heregh taveraa, ne mbadoon mo ishima." 
Philippians4:2 M ngu wan Yuodia kwagh shi m ngu wan Suntuki kwagh kpaa mer, ve̱ zua, ve lu kwaghmôm ken Ter." 
Philippians4:3 We ikarem u mimi u sha tom kpaa, m ngu zamber a we mer, wase kasev mban. Ve er tom sha u pasen Loho u Dedoo a mo imôngo tsung kua Kelemen man mbagenev mba ve er tom a mo imôngo kpaa, ve mba ati a ve a lu ken ruamabera u uma la." 
Philippians4:4 Ember nen ken Ter gbem, shi me kaa mer, ember nen." 
Philippians4:5 Ior cii ve̱ fa ishimawan yen doo doo. Ter zulum ve. 
Philippians4:6 Ishima i̱ de nyian ne sha ma kwagh ga, kpa akaa a a gbe ne la, Aôndo A̱ fa a ken hanma kwagh cii sha msen man sha mzamber a ishughun," 
Philippians4:7 man bem u Aôndo u a gande hanma mfe wase cii una kura asema a en man mbamhen enev ken Kristu Yesu ye. 
Philippians4:8 Kwagh ugen yô, anmgbianev av, ver nen ishima sha hanma kwagh u mimi, man hanma kwagh u a kom icivir, man hanma kwagh u perapera man hanma kwagh u wang, man hanma kwagh u doon ishima man hanma kwagh u a doo u ungwan kpaa. Aluer kwagh u hemban lun a inja una lu man kwagh una kuma iwuese yô, ver nen ishima sha akaa ne." 
Philippians4:9 Man akaa a ne hen her a mo man ne ngohol man ne ungwa man ne nenge a mi ken mo yô, ka a je eren nen a, man Aôndo u bem Una lu a ven ye." 
Philippians4:10 M ember ken Ter kpishi er hegen ne shi ne nder u henen sha kwagh wam yô. Kera je kpaa ne lu henen sha kwagh wam kpa ian lu ne ga. 
Philippians4:11 M ngu ôron nahan ka sha ci u ibanave ga. Gadia mo yô, hanma inja i mlu i m lu sha mi cii kpem iyol a mi, hoghor mo iyol a mi kpaa." 
Philippians4:12 U lun ken ican kpaa m fa, u ngeen a kwagh wuee kpaa m fa. Hanma gbenda cii man ken hanma kwagh cii kpaa, i nyôr a mo ker, m fa ci ca cii, u yan kwagh kuman mo man shi u lun ijen kpaa, u ngeen a kwagh wuee man shi u banen a kwagh kpaa." 
Philippians4:13 M ngu a agee a eren akaa cii je ken Un u A taver mo ne. 
Philippians4:14 Nahan kpaa ne er doo kpee zum u ne wasem ken ican la. 
Philippians4:15 Man shi ne Mbafilipi ne fa, sha mhii u ivangeli i Kristu zum u m due ken Masedonia la ma nongo u Kristu lu wasen mo sha kwagh u inyaregh ki duen man inyaregh ki nyôron ga saa ne tseegh." 
Philippians4:16 Ken Tesalonika je kpaa ne tindim a kwagh sha ci u gbayol wam kwa môm shin kwa har nahan. 
Philippians4:17 Nahan kpaa ka iwua m keren ga kpa m ngu keren atam a ngeen sha ci u mtsera wen. 
Philippians4:18 Akaa a ne tindi a mi la m zua a mi hen Epafroditu. I nam cii, neer mo a neer, m mgbough a mi je, ka ihuma i doon, ka nagh ku doon ku ku kom Aôndo yô." 
Philippians4:19 Aôndo wam Una na sha hanma gbayol wen vough sha inja i mngee u A ngee a akaa ken iengem ken Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Iengem i̱ lu i Aôndo, Ter wase, gbem sha won. Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Sugh hanma icighanor ken Kristu Yesu, nam. Anmgbianev mba ve lu a mo mba sughun ne." 
Philippians4:22 Uicighanmbaiorov cii mba sughun ne, hemba kan mba ve lu ken ya u Shisar la." 
Philippians4:23 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter Yesu Kristu a̱ lu a jijingi wen. 
Colossians1:1 Paulu apostoli u Kristu Yesu u sha ishima i Aôndo man Timoteu anmgbian 
Colossians1:2 mba sughun anmgbianev mba ken Kristu mba ken Kolose mba ve lu uicighanmbaiorov shi ve lu mbananjighjigh kpaa la. Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven kua bem kpaa, mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter wase." 
Colossians1:3 Se mba sughun Aôndo Ter u Ter wase Yesu Kristu sha ci wen gbem zum u ka sea eren msen sha ci wen yô; 
Colossians1:4 gadia se ungwa kwagh u jighjigh wen u nan u ken Kristu Yesu la man shi dooshima u uicighanmbaiorov cii ve doo ne asema 
Colossians1:5 sha ci u ishimaverenkeghen i i koso Sha sha ci wen la. Ne vande ungwan kwagh u i sha kwaghôron u mimi u Loho u Dedoo la. 
Colossians1:6 U nyôr ken ven di er u nyer sha won cii nahan, ngu umen atam, ngu vesen di er ken ven nahan, hii sha iyange i ne ungwa man ne va fa mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo sha mimi la." 
Colossians1:7 Kape i tese ne sha ikev i Epafera or u eren tom a vese imôngo u doon ishima la. Un ka ortom u jighjigh u Kristu sha ci wen. 
Colossians1:8 Shi ka un kpaa a pase se dooshima wen u ken Jijingi la ye. 
Colossians1:9 Sha ci u nahan yô, hii sha iyange i se ungwa kwagh la je se kera mem u eren msen man shi u zamber sha ci wen ga, ser ma i iv ne a mfe u fan ishima Na sha kwaghfan cii man mkav u ken jijingi kpaa," 
Colossians1:10 sha u ne̱ zende zende u u kom Ter, ne̱ doon Un ken akaa cii, ne̱ umen atam ken hanma tom u dedoo, shi ne̱ vesen ken kwaghfan u Aôndo," 
Colossians1:11 i̱ taver ne sha agee cii sha inja i agee a iengem Na la sha u taver ishima man shi u wan ishima saan saan kpaa," 
Colossians1:12 ne̱ sugh Ter u A na ne ne kuma u lun a kwar ken dyako u uicighanmbaiorov ken iwanger. 
Colossians1:13 A yima se A due a vese ken tahav mbu imev kera A nyôr a vese ken tartor u Wan Na u doon ishima. 
Colossians1:14 Ka ken a Na man se lu a mpaa ye, ka mde u asorabo je la." 
Colossians1:15 Un ka ibeen i Aôndo u i nengen a Na ga la, ka Waniunda ken akaa a i gbe a cii," 
Colossians1:16 gadia ka ken a Na man i gbe akaa cii ye, a a lu Sha, man a a lu shin tar kpaa, a i nengen a mi la kua a i nengen a mi ga la kpaa, shin a lu mkônom ma torom, shin a lu tor u yan shin a lu mbatarev, shin a lu tahav. Akaa ne cii ka sha a Na i gbe a ye shi ka sha ci Na kpaa." 
Colossians1:17 Un vande a akaa cii man ka ken Na a lu zan hemen her ye. 
Colossians1:18 Ka Un kpaa A lu ityough ki iyolough ye, ka nongo u Kristu je la. Ka Un A lu mhii ye, ka Waniunda u ken mbakpenev, sha er Un Una lu u hiihii ken akaa cii yô." 
Colossians1:19 Gadia doo m-iv u Aôndo cii u teman ken a Na je. 
Colossians1:20 Man er A va a bem sha awambe a sha terankon Na la yô, lu sha a Na je man Aôndo hime akaa cii a iyol Na ye, akaa a a lu shin tar man akaa a a lu Sha kpaa." 
Colossians1:21 Man ne mba ngise ne lu paleghaa, ne lu mbaihomov ken mhen wen sha aeren a bo la, ne kpaa" 
Colossians1:22 A hime ne sha iyol Na i inyam la sha ku, sha u Una ver ne sha ishigh Nagh, né lu icighan man wang man a acôghol iyol ga." 
Colossians1:23 Saa né tile sha jighjigh u nan dông, né tenger ga, man á mgbeghan ne sha ishimaverenkeghen i Loho u Dedoo u ne ungwa la kera kpaa ga, u i yôô u hen akaa a i gbe a sha won cii, man mo, Paulu, m hingir ortom u u." 
Colossians1:24 Hegen yô, m ngu ken atsan a m lu yan sha ci wen man m ngu ivin kwagh u a shi sha atsan a Kristu la ken iyol yam, ka sha ci u iyol Na, ka nongo Na je la." 
Colossians1:25 M hingir ortom u u sha tom u Aôndo A nem sha u ivin kwaghôron u Aôndo ken a ven. 
Colossians1:26 Ka kwaghmyer u a lu myer hii sha shighe u shighe lu a lu ga man ikov i ior kpaa lu a lu ga la, kpa hegen yô, i pase uicighan Nav kwagh la." 
Colossians1:27 Ka ve mba i sar Aôndo pe ve̱ fa er iengem i ngeen yum i kwaghmyer ne i lu ken atôatyev yô. Inja na yô, ka Kristu ken a ven je la, ka ishimaveren keghen iengem la." 
Colossians1:28 Ka Un se lu yôôn kwagh Na, se lu wan ior cii kwagh, se lu tesen ior cii sha hanma kwaghfan ye, sha u veren hanma or nana̱ lu vough ken Kristu yô." 
Colossians1:29 Ka sha kwagh ne je m lu eren tom, m lu nôngon ngegh sha ieren Na i A eren ken mo sha agee la." 
Colossians2:1 Gadia sarem pe ma ne fe mnenge u m lu nôngon tsung sha ci wen kua mba ken Laodishia man mba ve lu a nenge ishigh yagh ki ken iyol ne ga la cii," 
Colossians2:2 sha u ma i taver ve asema ma i zough ve ken dooshima ma ve fe kwaghmyer u Aôndo, ka Kristu je la." 
Colossians2:3 Ka ken a Na man i yer akaa a injaa cii a sha kwaghfan man mkav kpaa ye. 
Colossians2:4 M ngu ôron nahan sha u ma or nana̱ de kera tsughun ne sha kwaghôron u sha msendegh ga. 
Colossians2:5 Gadia aluer ken iyol m ngu ga kpaa ken jijingi yô, m ngu a ven, m ngu ember m ngu nengen a mlu wen u tsembelee man mtil u jighjigh wen u nan a til ken Kristu taveraa la." 
Colossians2:6 Nahan er ne rumun Kristu Yesu ner ka Ter yô, shi zenden nen ken a Na nahan vough," 
Colossians2:7 er ne we amise ken a Na shi i maa ne ken a Na kpaa, man i taver jighjigh wen u nan er i tese ne nahan vough, shi lu nen a iwuese wuee." 
Colossians2:8 Ver nen ishima, or nana̱ de ker ne yemen a ven sha kwaghfan shin sha atseregh a gbilinigh ga. Akaa ne ka sha inja i ukaaer mba ior la, shi ka sha inja i ujijingi mba taregh mba hiihii, kera ka sha inja i Kristu a lu ga." 
Colossians2:9 Gadia ka ken a Na man m-iv u Aôndo cii a tem ken iyol je ye. 
Colossians2:10 Man ne mba a m-iv la ken a Na, Un u A lu ityough sha mbatarev man tahav cii la." 
Colossians2:11 Ka ken a Na man i tsôngo ne ye. Ka sha icôngo i sha ave la ga, kpa ka u eren iyol i inyam ne kera ken icôngo i Kristu la," 
Colossians2:12 gadia i ii ne a Na imôngo ken batisema. Ka sha mi kpaa man i nder ne a Na imôngo sha ci u ne ne agee a Aôndo u A nder Un shin ku la jighjigh yô. 
Colossians2:13 Man ne mba ne lu kpenegh ken aferakaa man ken ipusu i iyolough yen yô, A na ne uma a na imôngo, A de se atindi a se per la cii." 
Colossians2:14 Mnger u anzô ase a atindi a na, u a lu nan se ibo la yô, A ese un kera, A bunde un A gema A mande un sha terankon." 
Colossians2:15 A ngohol mbatarev man mbautahav mba sha kwavaôndo la ikav mbi utyav kera, A due a ve ken igbar hingir ikav i tesen, A hemba ve gbulugh gbulugh sha terankon." 
Colossians2:16 Nahan yô, ma or nana̱ de kera ôron ne ijir sha kwagh u kwaghyan man kwaghman shin sha kwagh u iniongo shin uwer u he shin iyange i memen kpaa ga." 
Colossians2:17 Akaa angan yô, ka di mure u akaa a a lu van la tsô, kpa kwagh jim jim yô, ka u Kristu." 
Colossians2:18 Ma or nana̱ de bundu ne injar ga, ka injaor i i doo nan u hiden a iyol i nan ijime man shi u civir mbatyomov mba Shaav, man u ôron akaa a i pase nan sha mpase u sha mnenge la vighe vighe, man u gban gengese iyol i nan sha kwaghfan u iyolough gbilin tsô," 
Colossians2:19 kpa nan kera kôr sha ityo ga. Ka sha ki man iyol cii i lu vesen sha mseer u Aôndo, sha msuur man mzough u igbila man uijuan mba i ye." 
Colossians2:20 Aluer ne kpe a Kristu imôngo sha kwagh u ujijingi mba taregh mba hiihii yô, ka nyi man shi ne rumun ner, i̱ wa ne atindi bee er shi ne mba uma ken tar nahana?" 
Colossians2:21 er: de ker ave ga, de benden sha nombor ga, de benden ave ga," 
Colossians2:22 ka akaa a i eren kwagh a mi kpa a saan ishe la, nga sha inja i atindi man ityesen i ior tsô." 
Colossians2:23 Akaa ne bee a bee kwaghfan tsô, ka adini u i dugh sha mfe u or la, man u hiden a iyol ijime man u eren iyol ican, kpa nga a ma inja sha u yangen hua u iyolough ga." 
Colossians3:1 Nahan yô, aluer i nder ne a Kristu imôngo yô, ker nen akaa a Sha henpe Kristu A lu A tem ken uwegh ku yanegh ku Aôndo la." 
Colossians3:2 Ver nen ishima sha akaa a Sha, i̱ de lu akaa a shin tar ga." 
Colossians3:3 Gadia ne kpe, uma wen yô i yer un a Kristu imôngo ken Aôndo." 
Colossians3:4 Zum u Kristu u A lu uma wase la Una va ande yô, ne kpaa á ande a ven a Na imôngo ken iengem." 
Colossians3:5 Nahan yô, wua nen alegh a en a shin tar la kera, ka idya man hôngor man ityoronshima man isharen i bo man hua u eren, ka akombo a civir je la." 
Colossians3:6 Ka sha akaa ne man iyugh i Aôndo i lu van ye. 
Colossians3:7 Ka ken a man ne kpaa ngise ne zenden ye, zum u ne lu uma ken a la." 
Colossians3:8 Kpa hegen yô, dugh nen akaa ne kera: iyugh man ishima i nyoon man ifer man ityuhwanev man kwaghôron u dang ken zwa wen." 
Colossians3:9 De eren nen aie hen ayol a en ga gadia ne dugh tseor kua aeren a na la kera," 
Colossians3:10 ne haa orhe iyol u ka i sôr un hegh sha u una lu a kwaghfan u sha inja i ibeen i Un u A gbe un la. 
Colossians3:11 Heera yô, or u Grika man or u Yuda kera ngu ga, shin icôngo man ipusu kpaa ga, ortyôtyev shin Sekuti shin kpan man wan kpaa ga, kpa Kristu gema hoghom cii ken ior cii." 
Colossians3:12 Nahan yô, haa nen mhôônom ma kôron tsung iyol, man shi ieren i dedoo man iyol i gengese ga, man ishima i legh legh man ishima i wan er uicuwan mba Aôndo mba ve lu uicighanmbaiorov mba doon ishima nahan." 
Colossians3:13 Waan nen ishima a ayol a en, deen nen ayol a en kwaghbo aluer kwagh á nzughul orgen a orgen yô, er Ter A de ne akaabo nahan, ne kpaa kape eren nen la." 
Colossians3:14 Kwagh u a hembe cii yô, haa nen dooshima iyol, ka kwagh u maghen mlu u vough je la." 
Colossians3:15 Man bem u Kristu a̱ lu orhemen ken asema a en gadia ka sha ci u kwagh ne man i yila ne ken iyol i môm ye. Shi lu nen a ishughun. 
Colossians3:16 Kwaghôron u Kristu a̱ tema ken a ven gbing, tesen nen ayol a en kwagh shi waan nen ayol a en kwagh sha kwaghfan cii, shi waan nen upasalmi man atsam man gberen nen amo a ken jijingi, sughun nen Aôndo ken asema a en." 
Colossians3:17 Man hanma kwagh u ne eren cii shin a lu kwagh u ôron a ôr shin kwagh u eren a er, eren nen hanma kwagh ken iti i Ter Yesu man sughun nen Aôndo Ter sha a Na." 
Colossians3:18 Ne kasev, ungwan nen imo i noov enev er i doo ken Ter yô." 
Colossians3:19 Ne noov kpaa, kasev enev ve̱ doo ne asema, de yuwen nen ve ga." 
Colossians3:20 Ne ônov kpaa ungwan nen imo i mbamaren enev ken akaa cii, gadia ka kwagh u doon Ter je ne." 
Colossians3:21 Ne uter, de kumbur nen a ônov enev ga sha er asema a̱ de yen ve ga yô." 
Colossians3:22 Ne mbashirentom kpaa, ungwan nen imo i uter enev mba ken iyol ken akaa cii, i̱ de luun tom u sha ashe a ior er mbadoon ityough a ior nahan ga, kpa i̱ lu sha ishima i môm man sha u cian Ter." 
Colossians3:23 Hanma kwagh u ne eren cii yô, eren nen un, i̱ lu sha ishima i môm er ka sha ci u Ter nahan, i̱ de kera lu sha ci u ior ga," 
Colossians3:24 gadia ne fa ka hen Ter man né va zua a injar i sha dyako ye. Ka Ter Kristu ne eren Un tom ye. 
Colossians3:25 Gadia or u nan eren ifer yô, nana ngohol di injar ifer msange u sha dooshima ngu je ga." 
Colossians4:1 Ne uter, eren nen a mbashiren ne tom sha jighjigh man sha mimi gadia ne fa, ne kpaa ne mba a Ter Sha." 
Colossians4:2 Taver nen asema sha msen u eren, lu nen per sha mi sha ishughun." 
Colossians4:3 Eren nen msen sha ci wase kpaa ner, Aôndo A̱ bugh hunda sha kwaghôron wase sha u se ôr kwaghmyer u Kristu u i wuhem sha mi la" 
Colossians4:4 sha u me pase un er i doo u me ôr yô. 
Colossians4:5 Zenden nen sha kwaghfan hen mba ve lu ken won la, man wa nen ian yen iko." 
Colossians4:6 Kwaghôron wen a̱ luun u doon gbem, u i we bar shi mi yô, sha u fa nen er i doo u nea ôr kwagh a hanma or yô." 
Colossians4:7 Tikiku una pase ne kwagh wam cii. Un ka anmgbian u doon ishima man shi ortom u jighjigh kpaa, ngu ortom a mo imôngo ken Ter." 
Colossians4:8 M tindi un ken a ven, ka sha kwagh ne jim je, ka sha u ne fa kwagh wase man shi sha u una taver ne asema yô." 
Colossians4:9 Onesimu kpaa ngu vea na, ka anmgbian u jighjigh man u doon ishima. Wen ka or u ken a ven. Akaa a keen ne cii vea pase ne." 
Colossians4:10 Aristareku u i wuhe un a mo imôngo ngu sughun ne man shi Marku anmgbian u Barnaba la kpaa (wen yô, i vande wan ne kwagh sha kwagh na. Aluer una nyôr ken ven yô, rumun nen un)." 
Colossians4:10 Aristareku u i wuhe un a mo imôngo ngu sughun ne man shi Marku anmgbian u Barnaba la kpaa (wen yô, i vande wan ne kwagh sha kwagh na. Aluer una nyôr ken ven yô, rumun nen un)." 
Colossians4:11 Man shi Yesu kpaa u i yer un er Yusetu. Ken mba ve lu eren tom u tartor u Aôndo a mo imôngo yô, ka ve tseegh ve lu mba ken icôngo ye. Ve surum ishima kpishi je." 
Colossians4:12 Epafera, kpan u Kristu Yesu u a lu or u ken a ven la ngu sughun ne. Ngu eren msen sha gbashima sha ci wen gbem sha u né tile né lu vough né kera tenger ga sha u eren ishima i Aôndo cii." 
Colossians4:13 Gadia m ngu eren shiada sha kwagh na mer, a nôngo tsung sha ci wen kua mba ve lu ken Laodishia man Hierapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Luka ortwer u doon ishima ngu sughun ne kua Dema kpaa. 
Colossians4:15 Sugh nen anmgbianev mba ken Laodishia man Numfa kua nongo u Kristu u ken ya na cii nam nen. 
Colossians4:16 Man zum u né ôr washika ne, né bee yô, na nen i̱ ôr un ken nongo u Kristu u Laodishia kpaa. Ne kpaa, ôr nen washika u hen Laodishia la." 
Colossians4:17 Kaa nen Arekipu ner: Ver ishima sha tom u u ngohol hen Ter la sha u eren u sha mi vough. 
Colossians4:18 Ishughun i mo Paulu sha uwegh agh. Umbur nen ikangenev yav. Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulu man Siluanu man Timoteu mba sughun nongo u Kristu u Mbatesalonika u ken Aôndo Ter man Ter Yesu Kristu. Mrumun u sha mhôôn man bem ve̱ lu sha a ven. 
1Thessalonians1:2 Se mba sughun Aôndo gbem sha ci wen cii, umbur ne ken mbamsen asev." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Ka sha ishigh ki Aôndo Ter wase man se lu umbur tom wen u sha jighjigh u nan gbem ye, man gbashima wen u sha tom u dooshima man ishimawan yen i sha ishimaveren keghen Ter wase Yesu Kristu la." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Gayô, se fa mtsough wen, ne anmgbianev mba ne doo Aôndo ishima." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Gadia ivangeli yase va her a ven, lu sha kwaghôron tseegh ga kpa lu sha agee man sha Icighan Jijingi man gbar gbar kpishi je. Ne fa anzaior a se lu her atô wen sha ci wen yô." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ne hingir mbakaven se man shi Ter kpaa, gadia lu sha ican kpishi man ne rumun kwaghôron u Aôndo sha iember i Icighan Jijingi ye." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Nahan ne hingir ikav hen mbananjighjigh ken Masedonia man Akaya cii. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Gadia ka her a ven man kwaghôron u Ter hura nyôr ken Masedonia man Akaya tseegh ga, kpa kwagh u jighjigh wen u nan u ne ne Aôndo la, samber ken hanma ijiir cii, je kera gba u se ôr ma kwagh ga." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Gadia ve ayol a ve je kpaa mba ôron kwagh wase sha injamnyer i se nyôr her a ven, man er ne gema her Aôndo, ne undu akombo, sha u né eren Aôndo u uma man u mimi la tom," 
1Thessalonians1:10 man né keghen mhir u Wan Na Sha, u A nder Un shin mbakpenev, ka Yesu u A yem se sha iyugh i i lu van la." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Gadia, anmgbianev, ne ayol a en kpaa ne fa mnyer wase her a ven la lu gbilin ga." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Shin er se vande yan ican, i gba eren a vese ken Filipi dang er ne fe nahan, kpa se lu vangertiôr ken Aôndo wase, se ôr ne Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo, lu sha ahendan kpishi je." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Gadia ityesen yase ka i sha mtsum, shin i hôngorough kpaa ga, shin sha atseregh kpaa ga." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Kpa er Aôndo nenge se kuma u á ver Loho u Dedoo sha ikev yase yô, kape se lu ôron je la. Ka sha u i̱ doo ior a vese ga, kpa i̱ doo Aôndo u A karen asema ase yô." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Gadia mayange se lu ôron kwagh sha zwanyohon ga er ne kpaa ne fe nahan, shin sha hua u a lu myer kpaa ga, Aôndo je, ka Shiada wase," 
1Thessalonians2:6 shin u keren icivir hen ior, shin her a ven, shin hen mbagenev kpaa ga; ma se fetyô u zan ne iyol kpaa, er se lu mbaapostoli mba Kristu yô." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Kpa se lu eren sha uee her atô wen er ngô ka a uve sha ônov nav nahan. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Kape se kpaa, er ne sar se yum yô, kera doo se u nan ne Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo tseegh ga, kpa zan zan kua uma wase je kpaa, gadia ne hingir mbadoon se ishima kpishi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Gadia, anmgbianev, ne umbur tom wase u sha ican man u sha gbashima, gadia se ôr Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo kpa se lu eren tom tugh man tetan sha u sé kera za mô wen iyol zum u se lu pasen ne Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo la, ga yô." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Ka ne je ne lu mbashiada kua Aôndo kpaa ye, er mlu wase her a ven, ne mba ne ne jighjigh la, lu wang man perapera man a acôghol a wan iyol ga." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Gadia ne fa er se lu wan ne kwagh er ter ka a eren a ônov nav nahan, se lu taver hanmô wen ishima, se lu pasen ne ser," 
1Thessalonians2:12 zende wen u̱ kuma Aôndo u A yer ne u zan ken tartor Na man iengem Na. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Sha ci u kwagh ne nahan yô, se mba sughun Aôndo gbem gadia zum u ne ngohol kwaghôron u Aôndo u ne ungwa hen vese la yô, ne rumun un er ka kwaghôron u ior ga, kpa er ka kwaghôron u Aôndo man kape i lu kpaa je la, u a eren tom ken a ven, ne mba ne ne jighjigh la." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Gadia ne yô, anmgbianev, ne hingir mbakaven iniongo i Aôndo i ken Kristu Yesu i i lu ken Yudia la, gadia ne kpaa, ka sha ikev i ityô yen man ne ya injacan i ve ve ya sha ikev i Mbayuda," 
1Thessalonians2:15 mba ve wua Ter Yesu kua uprofeti la ye, se kpaa ve tôv se a ican, kwagh ve doo Aôndo ga man shi mba ihom a ior cii kpaa." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Mba yangen se er se̱ de ôron kwagh a atôatyev sha er a̱ war ga, kape ve lu ivin asorabo a ve gbem je la, kpa ken masejime yô, iyugh va sha a ve." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kpa se yô, anmgbianev, i pav se a ven sha anshighe kpeghee, kpa ka sha iyol tsô, ka ken ishima ga, nahan se nôngon tsung sha isharen i vesen u shi zuan ishigh a ven," 
1Thessalonians2:18 Nahan i lu se ka van her a ven, mo Paulu je yô, lum acin imôngo je, kpa Satan yange se." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Gayô, ka nyi i lu ishimaverenkeghen yase, shin iember yase shin tsar wase u ihagh u sha ityou laa? Kera ka ne je sha ishigh ki Ter wase Yesu sha m-ande Na gaa?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Gadia ka ne je, ne lu icivir yase man iember yase kpaa ye." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ka nahan man er se kan wan ishima shio yô, se nenge hemba doon u á undu se ken Atene, se tseegh," 
1Thessalonians3:2 man se tindi a Timoteu, anmgbian wase u eren Aôndo tom sha Loho u Dedoo u Kristu, sha u a̱ taver ne asema man shi a̱ nyôôso jighjigh wen u nan kpaa," 
1Thessalonians3:3 sha u ma or môm nana̱ de lu pee pee sha mtev u sha atsan ne ga. Gadia ne ayol a en kpaa ne fa ka sha kwagh ne je i ver se ye. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Gadia er se lu a ven la je se tsengaôron ne er i lu u sé ya ican keng yô, man kape i va lu kpaa la, er ne fe nahan." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ka nahan man mo kpaa er m kan wan ishima shio yô, m tindi sha u me fa jighjigh wen u nan shin alaghga ormeen vande meen ne kera man tom wase u hingir gbilin tsôou?" 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kpa er Timoteu sember hiden ken ven yô, a wuese jighjigh wen u nan man dooshima wen man a pase er ne mba umbur se doo doo gbem je man i hange ne pe zuan ishigh a vese er se di kpaa a ven nahan." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Sha ci u nahan yô, anmgbianev, ken hanma zayol wase man mtev u i lu tôvon se a atsan la asema sur se sha kwagh wen sha jighjigh wen u nan la." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Gadia hegen yô, se mba uma aluer ne tile ken Ter dông yô." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Gadia ka nyi ishughun je sé sugh Aôndo min sha ci wen sha hanma iember cii i se ember sha ci wen sha ishigh ki Aôndo wase? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Se mba eren msen ngegh tugh man tetan kpaa sha u ma se zough ishigh a ven shi ma se iv kwagh u a yen sha jighjigh wen u nan la. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Hegen yô, Aôndo Ter wase iyol Na man Ter wase Yesu ma ve bugh se gbenda u zan her a ven." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Kpa ne yô, Ter A̱ na dooshima wen a̱ seer a seer, a̱ ngee her ayol a en man a ior cii kpaa, vough er se a ven nahan," 
1Thessalonians3:13 sha u Una taver asema a en, a̱ de lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga ken icighanmlu sha ishigh ki Aôndo Ter wase sha m-ande u Ter wase Yesu kua uicighan Nav cii kpaa." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Nahan hegen yô, anmgbianev, se mba zamber a ven shi se mba taver ne asema ken Ter Yesu, er ne ungwa hen vese er i doo u né zende man á doo Aôndo yô, kape ne lu zenden kpaa la shi yemen nen hemen sha mi kpaa." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Gadia ne fa akaa a se wa ne sha imo i Ter Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Gadia ishima i Aôndo yô, ka i ne, ka mtsegh wen; nyagh nen idya." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Hanma or ker a ven nana̱ fa er nana er kwase u nan iyol i nan sha icighanmlu man iko i wan kpaa. 
1Thessalonians4:5 I̱ de luun sha ishima i kenden i isharen i bo er atôatyev a a fe Aôndo ga la nahan ze. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Ma or môm nana̱ de kera tsughun anmgbian u nan sha kwagh ne, nana̱ eren nan kwagh u vihin ga, gadia Ter ka u oron iyev sha akaa ne cii er se vande kaan ne shi se pase ne nahan kpaa." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Gadia Aôndo yila se ka sha ci u hwanger ga kpa ka sha icighanmlu je. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Nahan yô, or u nan vende kwagh ne yô, kera ka or nan vende ga, kpa ka Aôndo je u A ne ne Icighan Jijingi Na yô." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Sha kwagh u dooshima a anmgbianev yô, kera gba u á nger ne ga, gadia ne ayol a en kpaa, Aôndo tese ne u doon ayol a en." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Man kape ne lu eren a anmgbianev mba ve lu ken Masedonia cii kpaa la, kpa se mba taver ne asema, anmgbianev, shi yemen nen hemen sha mi." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Nôngo nen ngegh je sha u teman ving, lu nen sha kwagh wen ayol a en, eren nen tom sha ave a en er lu se wa ne kwagh nahan," 
1Thessalonians4:12 sha u né zende vough hen mba ve lu ken inya la, man shi ma kwagh môm a̱ de banen ne ga yô." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Kpa, anmgbianev, sar se ka ma ne lan kwagh u mba ve kpe kera la ga, sha u ne̱ de kera zungwen er mbagenev mba ve lu a ishimaverenkeghen ga la nahan ga." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Aluer se na jighjigh ser, Yesu kpe, shi hide nder yô, kape mba ve kpe ken Yesu la kpaa, Aôndo Una va a ve a Na imôngo." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Gadia kwagh ne yô, se mba kaan ne un ka sha imo i Ter je ser: se mba se lu uma, se lu her zan zan m-ande u Ter yô, sé vande a mba ve kpe kera la je ga." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Gadia Ter iyol Na Una sen Sha sha ikenge i kaan, sha imo i ortyom u tamen, sha mkaa u ikpamkor i Aôndo, tsô mba ve kpe ken Kristu la vea vande nderen." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Ken masejime, se mba se lu uma, se lu her la, á feese se a ve imôngo sha abeen, sé za kohol Ter sha kwavaôndo. Kape sé za lu a Ter gbem je la." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Nahan yô, sur nen ayol a en asema sha akaaôron ne." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Kpa sha kwagh u ashighe man a-an yô, anmgbianev, gba u á nger ne ma kwagh ga." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Gadia ne ayol a en ne fa doo doo, iyange i Ter ngi van er ormbaiv ka nan va tugh nahan." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Zum u vea kaan er: Bem, man mkpeyol yô, ka zum la je mtim una ande sha a ve ibuv er martoghol ka u kôr kwase uya nahan ye, mayange vea kera war ga." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kpa ne yô, anmgbianev, ne mba ken ime ga nahan iyange la ia kera va tser ne, er ormbaiv nahan ga." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Gadia ne cii ne mba ônov mba iwangerev, man shi ônov mba atetan, se kera mba mbautuuv shin mbaimev kpaa ga." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Nahan yô, se kera hungul nen mnyam er mbagenev nahan ga, se lu nen per geng ge geng." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Gadia mba ve hungul mnyam yô, ka tugh je ve hungul ma ye, mbahundenmsôrom kpaa, ka tugh ve hundu ye." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kpa se mba se lu mbaatetan yô, se lu nen geng ge geng se har nen perutya u jighjigh u nan man dooshima; man agunduutya yô, ka ishimaveren keghen myom je la." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Gadia Aôndo ver se, lu sha ci u iyugh ga, kpa lu sha ci u zuan a myom ken Ter wase Yesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:10 A kpe sha ci wase sha er shin sea lu per, shin sea hungul mnyam kpaa, sé lu uma a Na imôngo." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nahan yô, taver nen ayol a en asema, wasen nen ayol a en er ne lu eren nahan je." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Se mba zamber a ven, angbianev ser, rumun nen mbala mba ve eren tom her a ven sha gbashima mba ve hemen ne ken Ter shi ve we ne kwagh kpaa la." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Waan nen ve iko kpishi je sha dooshima sha ci u tom ve la. Lu nen bem bem ayol a en. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Anmgbianev, se mba taver ne asema ser, wa nen mba ve eren nzughul nzughul mbala kwagh, taver nen mba ve yen ishima la asema, wasen nen mba ve taver ga yô, waan nen ishima a ior cii." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Nenge nen sha er ma or nana̱ de ôron iyev i ifer sha ifer ga. Nôngon nen sha kwagh u doon gbem je hen a ven ayol a en man shi a mbagenev cii kpaa. 
1Thessalonians5:16 Luun nen saan saan hanma shighe. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Eren nen msen gbem. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Ken hanma kwagh cii, naan nen ishughun, gadia ka ishima i Aôndo sha a ven ken Kristu je ne." 
1Thessalonians5:19 De pirin nen Jijingi ga. 
1Thessalonians5:20 De lahan akaaôron a uprofeti ga. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Kpa karen nen akaa cii, kôr nen u dedoo la gbang je." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Nyagh nen hanma inja i kwaghbo cii. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Aôndo u bem iyol Na, A̱ tsegha ne wang jimin cii, ma i kor jijingi wen, man uma wen ken ishima man iyol yen cii purututu, ve̱ de lu a ma acôghol a wan iyol je ga sha m-ande u Ter wase Yesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Wen u A yer ne yô, ka u jighjigh je Una er sha mi kpaa." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Anmgbianev, eren nen msen sha ci wase." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Sugh nen anmgbianev cii sha icighanzwa u susen. 
1Thessalonians5:27 M ngu kaan ne sha ishigh ki Ter je mer i̱ ôr washika ne hen anmgbianev cii. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter wase Yesu Kristu a̱ lu sha a ven. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulu man Siluanu man Timoteu mba sughun nongo u Kristu u Mbatesalonika u ken Aôndo Ter wase man Ter Yesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:2 Mrumun u sha mhôôn man bem mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter man Ter Yesu Kristu, ve̱ lu sha a ven." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Ka u sé sugh Aôndo ayange ayange sha ci wen, anmgbianev, er i doo u eren yô, gadia jighjigh wen u nan ngu seer je zua iyol ga, man dooshima u hanmô wen hen ayol a en kpaa ngu ngeen je," 
2Thessalonians1:4 zan zan se ayol a ase kpaa se mba tan ihagh a ven ken iniongo i Kristu i Aôndo sha ishima yen i wan man jighjigh wen u nan ken mbamtev mba i lu tôvon ne a atsan man atsan a ne lu taver ishima sha mi la cii. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ka ikav i ijirôron i mimi i Aôndo i tesen er ne kuma tartor u Aôndo u ne lu yan ican sha ci u u la. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Gadia ka Aôndo kwagh u vough u oron mba ve lu tôvon ne a ican la iyev eren ve ican. 
2Thessalonians1:7 Man ne mba i eren ne ican yô, Una na ne mmem a vese imôngo sha mpase u á va pase Ter Yesu Sha, a mbatyomov Nav mba ageev imôngo" 
2Thessalonians1:8 ken igyamusu; Una tsaha mba ve fe Aôndo ga man shi mba ve we Loho u Dedoo u Ter wase Yesu iko ga la kpaa. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Vea ya mtsaha u mtim u tsôron, vea lu ica a ishigh ki Ter man iengem i agee a Na," 
2Thessalonians1:10 zum u Una va sha iyange la sha u á civir Un ken uicighan Nav man á kpiligh ior iyol a Na ken mba ve ne jighjigh la cii; gadia ne na mpase wase la jighjigh. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ka nahan man se lu eren msen sha ci wen gbem ye, sha er Aôndo A̱ nenge ne er ne kuma myer u i yila ne la man A̱ gema hanma isharen i sha kwagh u dedoo man hanma tom u sha jighjigh u nan sha agee, ve̱ lu vough," 
2Thessalonians1:12 sha u á civir iti i Ter wase Yesu Kristu ken a ven, ne di kpaa i̱ civir ne ken a Na, sha injamlu i mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo wase man Ter Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Se mba zamber a ven, anmgbianev, sha kwagh u m-ande u Ter wase Yesu Kristu man mkohol wase u sé va kohol a Na imôngo la," 
2Thessalonians2:2 i̱ de kenden ne asema gagh ga, asema a̱ de nyian ne kpaa ga, shin a lu sha jijingi, shin a lu sha kwaghôron, shin a lu sha washika inja er ka se se nger, er iyange i Ter i kuma ve ga." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ne yô, ma or môm nana̱ de tsughun ne sha nyityôkwagh kpaa ga, gadia saa m-undu u hiden ijime la una vande van ve, man saa á pase or u vendan atindi, ka wan u mtim je la." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ka orhendan u kenden a iyol na sha er un hemba hanma kwagh u i yer un er Aôndo man hanma kwagh u i civir un la kpaa zan zan una tema ken tempel u Aôndo, una yôô er ka un je un lu Aôndo ye." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ne kera umbur er m lu ôron ne akaa ne zum u m lu a ven la gaa? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ne fa kwagh u a lu yangen hegen, sha u á va pase un sha shighe na yô." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Gadia kera je kpaa kwaghmyer u mvende u vendan atindi la ngu eren tom, zan zan un u a lu yangen hegen la á va kar a na sha," 
2Thessalonians2:8 ka zum la man á pase un u a vende atindi la ken igbar ye. Ter Yesu Una wua un sha iôôn i sha zwa Na man Una tim un kera sha mve Na man m-ande Na. 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ka un u mve na a lu sha injatom i Satan sha uivande man akaa a kpilighyol a aiegh," 
2Thessalonians2:10 man sha hanma inja i icugh i sha ifer ken mba vea tim yô, gadia ve ngohol dooshima u sha kwagh u mimi u ma ve war sha mi la ga." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ka nahan man Aôndo Una tindi ve a icugh i taver i ia er vea na aie la jighjigh ye," 
2Thessalonians2:12 sha er á ôr ior cii ijir mba ve ne kwagh u mimi jighjigh ga man ifer i gem i maa ve iyol la. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kpa se yô, ka u sé sugh Aôndo sha ci wen gbem, ne anmgbianev mba ne doo Ter ishima gadia Aôndo tsuwa ne sha hiihii je u zan ken myom sha mtsegh u sha Jijingi man sha u nan kwagh u mimi la jighjigh." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ka nahan je man A yila ne sha ivangeli yase sha u zuan a iengem i Ter wase Yesu Kristu la ye. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, tile nen dông, kôr nen akaa a i tese ne la gbang, shin a lu sha kwaghôron, shin a lu sha washika wase kpaa." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ter wase Yesu Kristu iyol Na man Ter wase Aôndo u se doo Un ishima man A ne se msurshima u tsôron man shi ishimaverenkeghen i dedoo sha mrumun u sha mhôôn la," 
2Thessalonians2:17 A̱ sur ne asema, A̱ taver a sha hanma tom u dedoo kua kwaghôron u dedoo kpaa." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ken masetyô yô, anmgbianev, eren nen msen sha ci wase, kwaghôron u Ter a̱ samber fefa, a̱ zua a icivir er i lu ken ven nahan," 
2Thessalonians3:2 i̱ yima se sha ikev i ior mba vihin kwagh man mbaaferev, gadia ka ior cii ve lu a jighjigh u nan ga." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kpa Ter ka u jighjigh je, Una taver ne agee, Una shi Á kura ne sha ikev i Orbo kpaa." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Se mba veren asema sha a ven ken Ter ser: Akaa a se we ne kwagh sha mi la, ne mba eren shi nea er a kpaa." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ter A̱ kôôm asema a en u zan ken dooshima u Aôndo man ishima i wan i Kristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Anmgbianev, se mba wan ne kwagh ken iti i Ter Yesu Kristu ser, kem nen ayol sha hanma anmgbian u nan zenden nzughul nzughul, i kera lu sha ityesen i ne ngohol hen vese la ga yô." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Gadia ne ayol a en ne fa er i doo u né kav se yô, gadia se zende ken a ven nzughul nzughul ga." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Mayange se ya kwaghyan hen ma or gbilin kpaa ga, saa sha tom u sha ican man u sha gbashima tugh man tetan sha u se̱ de kera zan mô wen iyol ga yô." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Lu sha ci u se lu a tahav ga ze, kpa lu sha u se̱ na ayol a ase a̱ hingir ne ikav i nengen sha mi er né kav se yô." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Gadia er se lu a ven imôngo la je, se wa ne kwagh ser: Aluer tom u shiren doo or ga yô, kwaghyan kpaa nana̱ de ye ga." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Gadia se ungwa mbagenev ken ven mba zenden nzughul nzughul, mba kera eren tom ga, kpa mba amber sha akaa." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ambaaior la yô, se mba wan ve kwagh, se mba taver ve asema ken Ter Yesu Kristu ser: Ve̱ kundu ishima, ve̱ eren tom, ve̱ ya kwaghyan ve ayol a ve." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Kpa ne yô, anmgbianev, uwer u̱ de gbe ne u eren akaa a dedoo ga." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Aluer hanma or nana ver ato sha kwaghôron wase u ken takerada ne ga yô, ver nen nan ikav, de kera zough nen a nan ga, i̱ va nan ahenge." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Kpa de nengen nen nan er ka orihom ga, kpa wa nen a wa nan kwagh er ka anmgbian nahan." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Ter u bem iyol Na, A̱ na ne bem gbem sha hanma gbenda cii. Ter A̱ lu a ven cii." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ishughun i mo, Paulu sha uwegh agh ne, ku ku lu ikav ken hanma washika yô, kape m ngeren ne." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter wase Yesu Kristu a̱ lu sha a ven cii. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulu, apostoli u Kristu Yesu sha imo i Aôndo Oryiman wase man shi Kristu Yesu, ishimaverenkeghen yase," 
1Timothy1:2 ngu sughun Timoteu, ka wan wam mimi sha jighjigh u nan. Mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen man bem mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter man Kristu Yesu Ter wase ve̱ lu sha a we." 
1Timothy1:3 Lu ken Efese her, er m wa u kwagh zum u m moughon u yemen Masedonia la, sha u ú ta ior mbagenev icin er ve de̱ tesen ityesen igen kposo ga," 
1Timothy1:4 shi ve de̱ veren ishima sha ukwaghhir man icombor i ôron i lun a mkur ga la ze. Akaa ne ka a na anyiman a gbilinigh tsô, i kera lu ityesen i Aôndo i sha jighjigh u nan la ga." 
1Timothy1:5 Kpa ishimaveren i ityesen ne yô, ka dooshima u a dugh ken ishima i wang, man imo i dedoo i ken ishima man shi jighjigh u lun a imanger ga la." 
1Timothy1:6 Mbagenev undu akaa ne, mba masen ôron akaa a gbilinigh tsô." 
1Timothy1:7 Sar ve pe ma ve lu mbatesen atindi kpa ve fa akaa a ve lu ôron la ga man shi kwagh u ve lu pasen sha gbashima la kpaa ve fa un ga. 
1Timothy1:8 Se fa, atindi doo tsô, aluer or nana er tom a mi sha tindi yô." 
1Timothy1:9 I fa kwagh ne nahan er, i ver tindi ka sha ci u or u nan lu u perapera la ga, kpa ka sha ci u mbavendan atindi kua mbahembanato, man shi mba ve vende Aôndo kua mbaasorabo man shi mbalun wang ga kua udangmbaiorov man shi mbawuanuter kua mbawuanungô kua mbawuanior," 
1Timothy1:10 man mbaerenidya man mbayaven a nomso man mbaiin ior yemen a mi, man mbaerenaie, man mbabumun sha aie, man shi mbaeren hanma kwagh ugen cii u alu sha ityesen i dedoo la ga yô." 
1Timothy1:11 Ka sha inja i Loho u Dedoo u iengem i Aôndo u i wuese Un la u i nem sha ikev la. 
1Timothy1:12 M ngu wuese Un u A nem agee la, ka Kristu Yesu Ter wase, gadia A nenge er m ngu jighjigh, A verem sha tom," 
1Timothy1:13 shin er yan m lu or u ityuhwan, man or u tôvon mbagenev a ican man shi ipilaor nahan kpaa. Kpa i zungwem mhôônom gadia m lu eren sha lan man sha jighjigh u nan ga kpaa." 
1Timothy1:14 Kpa mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter wase ngee gande man jighjigh u nan kua dooshima mba ve lu ken Kristu Yesu la. 
1Timothy1:15 Kwaghôron ne ka u jighjigh, a kuma u rumun un a ishima i môm er Kristu Yesu va shin tar sha u yiman mbaasorabo, man ken ve yô, ka mo m hembe ye." 
1Timothy1:16 Ka nahan man i zungwen mhôônom ye, ka sha u Yesu Una tese ishimawan Na cii ken mo u m hembe ne, i̱ hingir mbagenev ikav mba vea mase va nan Un jighjigh sha u zuan a uma u tsôron yô." 
1Timothy1:17 Icivir man iengem i̱ lu i Tor u tsôron u A lu u kpen ga, u i nengen a Na kpaa ga, u A lu Aôndo, Un tswen, gbem sha won. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Wan wam Timoteu, m ngu wan we kwaghwan ne, m ngu nan we sha ikev, ka kwagh môm a akaa a i tsengaôron sha a we sha kwaghôron u profeti la, nahan i̱ lu sha akaa ne man ú nôngo ityav mbi dedoo," 
1Timothy1:19 ú lu a jighjigh u nan man imo i dedoo i ken ishima ye. Mbagenev ta i kera, nahan sha kwagh u jighjigh u nan yô, tso ur ve." 
1Timothy1:20 Himeneu man Alekesander kpaa mba ken ve. Ve yô m na ve sha ikev i Satan sha u i̱ tese ve, ve̱ de ityuhwanev." 
1Timothy2:1 Nahan hiihii yô, m ngu wan kwagh mer, i̱ zamber, i̱ eren mbamsen, i̱ sônon sha ci u ior, man i̱ sughun Aôndo sha ci u ior ci ca cii," 
1Timothy2:2 sha ci u utor man ve mba i ver ve sha a-an a icivirigh la cii sha u se̱ tema bem bem, ayôôso a̱ de lu ga, ken mciviraôndo kua mlu u sha inja sha inja sha hanma gbenda cii." 
1Timothy2:3 Ka kwagh u doon man shi kwagh u á rumun un sha ishigh ki Aôndo Oryiman wase. 
1Timothy2:4 Sar Un u ior cii ve̱ war ve̱ ar sha mfe u fan mimi la. 
1Timothy2:5 Gadia Aôndo ngu môm tsô, Orhimen u her atô u Aôndo a ior kpaa ngu môm, ka or, ka Kristu Yesu" 
1Timothy2:6 u A ne iyol Na hingir ipaa sha ci u ior cii. I er shiada sha kwagh ne er shighe va kuma vough yô. 
1Timothy2:7 Ka sha kwagh ne man i verem or u yôôn man apostoli kpaa ye, ka mimi m er ye, ka aie m eren ga, i verem ortesen u atôatyev u sha jighjigh u nan man mimi." 
1Timothy2:8 Nahan yô, sarem pe nomso ve̱ eren msen sha hanma ijiir, ve̱ kenden ave a wang sha, i̱ de lu sha ishima i vihin ga, ayôôso kpaa ga." 
1Timothy2:9 Shi sarem pe kasev di kpaa ve̱ wuhan ayol a ve daalaa, i̱ lu sha kwaghfan man akuma akuma kpaa, i̱ de lu sha gbatyou u gban, shin sha zenaria shin sha utagbede shin sha akondo a taver ishe kpaa ga," 
1Timothy2:10 kpa i̱ lu sha aeren a dedoo er i kom u kasev mba ve kaa er ve mba cian Aôndo mimi vea er yô. 
1Timothy2:11 Kwase nana̱ lu ving, nana̱ rumun i̱ tese nan, na̱na̱ ungwan kwagh doo doo." 
1Timothy2:12 Kpa u tesen yô, m rumun mer, kwase nana̱ tese ga, shin u eren tahav sha nom u nan kpaa ga, kpa nana̱ lu ving." 
1Timothy2:13 Gadia ka Adam i vande gban un man i mase Ifa ye. 
1Timothy2:14 Adam yô, i tsugh un ga, kpa ka kwase man i tsugh un a hingir u peren tindi ye." 
1Timothy2:15 Kpa una war sha ônov mba maren aluer una tile ken jighjigh u nan man dooshima man mtsegh man u eren kwagh sha kwaghfan yô. 
1Timothy3:1 Kwaghôron ne yô, ka u jighjigh, aluer or ngu keren u lun orkuran yô, ka tom u dedoo u sar nan ye." 
1Timothy3:2 Orkuran yô, ka u nana̱ lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga keng je, nana̱ lu or u kwase môm, man or u kundun ishima, man or u tsev tsev, man or u eren kwagh sha inja, man or u eren dedoo a mbavannya, man or u fan ityesen kpaa." 
1Timothy3:3 Nana̱ de lu or u cihin msôrom ga, nana̱ de lu or u cihin num kpaa ga, kpa nana̱ lu or u lun inja legh legh, nana̱ de lu or u hiin iyongo ga, shin u eren hua sha inyar kpaa ga." 
1Timothy3:4 I̱ lu or u nengen sha ya u nan dedoo, nana̱ nengen sha ônov mba nan ve̱ tema sha inja sha inja, ve̱ lu mbaungwan kwagh." 
1Timothy3:5 (Gadia aluer or nana fa u nengen sha ya u nan ga yô, á er nan man nana kura nongo u Kristu u Aôndo?)" 
1Timothy3:6 I̱ de lu or u nan sember geman ishima ga, sha u nana̱ de moron iyol nana̱ gbe ken ibo i yan i diabolo la ga yô." 
1Timothy3:7 Ka u nana̱ lu a shiada u dedoo hen mba ken inya keng sha u nana̱ de gbe ken iheen nana̱ gba ken to u diabolo ga yô. 
1Timothy3:8 Kape udiakon kpaa ve̱ lu la, ve̱ lu ior mba mimi, ve̱ de lu mba ijô ihiar ga, ve̱ de lu mbacihin wain ga, ve̱ de lu mbaeren hua sha mtsera u keren kpaa ga," 
1Timothy3:9 ve̱ luun a kwaghmyer u jighjigh u nan ken imo i nan ibo ga i ken ishima. 
1Timothy3:10 Kpa mban yô, á vande karen ve, aluer vea lu a acôghol iyol ga yô, ve̱ er tom u diakon." 
1Timothy3:11 Kape kasev kpaa, ve̱ lu mbamimi je la, ve̱ de lu mbaangerev ga, ve̱ lu mbakundunasema, ve̱ lu jighjigh ken akaa cii." 
1Timothy3:12 Udiakon ve̱ lu ior mba lun a kwase môm môm, ve̱ nengen sha ônov vev dedoo kua sha uya vev kpaa." 
1Timothy3:13 Mba ve eren tom u diakon dedoo yô, vea zua a iti i dedoo man shi vangertiôr kpishi sha jighjigh u nan u ken Kristu Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 M ver ishima u van hen we fefa, kpa m ngu ngeren we akaa ne," 
1Timothy3:15 sha u aluer me timbir kpaa, ú fa er i doo u eren ken ya u Aôndo, ka nongo u Kristu u Aôndo u uma je la, ka ityôgh man imagh ki mimi a suur sha mi yô." 
1Timothy3:16 Mimi je, kwaghmyer u a lu sha mcivir u se civir Aôndo la, vese tsô. I pase Un ken iyol i or ken igbar, i na Un ishô ken Jijingi, mbatyomov mba Shaav nenge a Na, i pase kwagh Na ken atôatyev, i na Un jighjigh sha won, i yem a Na sha ken iengem." 
1Timothy4:1 Kpa Jijingi ngu kaan wanger wanger er: Sha ayange a masejime yô, mbagenev vea undu jighjigh u nan, vea ver ishima sha ujijingi mba tsughun ior man sha ityesen i ujijingi mba bov." 
1Timothy4:2 Ka sha imanger i mbaaiev mba i ver ve ikav ken imo i ken asema a ve er ka sha iyôgh ki acivin nahan. 
1Timothy4:3 Mba yange kwase u eren, mba tsweren akaayan a Aôndo A gbe a sha u mba ve ne jighjigh shi ve fe mimi la, ve̱ ngohol a sha ishughun la." 
1Timothy4:4 Hanma kwagh u Aôndo A gbe cii ka u doon, ma kwagh u vendan ngu ga, aluer á ngohol un sha ishughun yô," 
1Timothy4:5 gadia hingir icighankwagh sha kwaghôron u Aôndo man sha msen u eren. 
1Timothy4:6 Aluer u tesen anmgbianev akaa ne yô, ú lu ortom u dedoo u Kristu Yesu u i koso u sha akaaôron a sha jighjigh u nan man sha ityesen i dedoo i u dondo sha mi la." 
1Timothy4:7 Kpa ukwaghhir mba dang dang mba ungômbakasev la yô, venda kera. Kar iyol you sha u ú taver sha u civir Aôndo yô." 
1Timothy4:8 Gadia u karen iyol, i̱ taver la tseegh yô, wa ngun a inja kpeghee, kpa u civir Aôndo yô, ngu a inja sha akaa cii gadia ngu a ityendezwa sha uma u hegen ne kua uma u a lu van la kpaa." 
1Timothy4:9 Kwaghôron ne ka u jighjigh, a kuma u rumun un a ishima i môm." 
1Timothy4:10 Ka sha kwagh ne se lu eren tom tsung se lu nôngon sha ican kpaa ye: ka er se ver asema ase se lu keghen Aôndo u uma u A lu Oryiman u ior cii la, jim yô, ka u mbananjighjigh." 
1Timothy4:11 Wa kwagh sha akaa ne shi tesen a kpaa. 
1Timothy4:12 Ma or nana̱ de lahan we er u ngu wanye ga, kpa hingir mbananjighjigh ikav sha kwaghôron man sha zende man sha dooshima man sha jighjigh u nan man mlu u wang kpaa." 
1Timothy4:13 Ver ishima u ôron ior Bibilo man u wan kwagh man shi u tesen zan zan me kar van. 
1Timothy4:14 De hundu ishima sha iwua i sha mrumun u sha mhôôn i i lu ken we i i ne u sha kwaghôron u profeti man ave a pendan a mbatamen la ga. 
1Timothy4:15 Nôngo sha akaa ne, penda ishima sha mi sha u ior cii vea nenge mzehemen wou yô." 
1Timothy4:16 Ver ishima sha iyol you man ityesen you kpaa, taver ishima sha mi. Aluer ú er nahan yô, ú yima iyol you kua shi mba ve lu ungwan we la kpaa." 
1Timothy5:1 De zehe a organden ga kpa wa a wa nan kwagh er ka ter nahan; er a mbayevikaior kpaa er ka anmgbianev nahan," 
1Timothy5:2 kasev mba ganden kpaa er ka ungô nahan; mbayevkasev kpaa er ka anmgbianev mba kasev nahan sha mlu u wang cii. 
1Timothy5:3 Wa kasev mba côgholov iko mba ve lu kasev mba côgholov mimi yô. 
1Timothy5:4 Kpa aluer ma kwasecôghol nana lu a ônov shin ônov mba ônov mba nan yô, ve̱ vande henen u eren a ya ve sha mcivir u i civir Aôndo la, ve̱ gema ve̱ wasen mba ve mar ve la, gadia kwagh ne ka kwagh u doon sha ishigh ki Aôndo je." 
1Timothy5:5 U nan lu kwasecôghol mimi nan kera lu a or ga yô, nan ver ishima sha Aôndo, nan taver ishima sha mzamber man msen u eren tugh man atetan." 
1Timothy5:6 Kpa u nan lu kera ke kera yô, nan ngu kpenegh er nan lu uma ne je." 
1Timothy5:7 Wa kwagh sha akaa ne kpaa sha er vea lu a acôghol a wan iyol ga yô. 
1Timothy5:8 Aluer or nana kera nenge sha ior mba nan ga man jim je yô, ka mba ken ya u nan la, nan nyiman jighjigh u nan ve, nan hemba gban kera a or u nan ne jighjigh ga yô." 
1Timothy5:9 I̱ de ngeren ma kwasecôghol u nan yen anyom akunduatar ga; man i̱ lu kwase u nan er nom môm yô," 
1Timothy5:10 u i er nan shiada sha aeren a dedoo, er nan lu yesen ônov mba nan man nan lu eren a mbavannya dedoo man nan lu ôôn uicighanmbaiorov angahar, man nan lu wasen mbaatsanev man nan lu pendan ishima sha hanma ieren i dedoo cii." 
1Timothy5:11 Kpa kasev mba côgholov mba ve lu a mhem iyol yô, venda, gadia zum u asaren a ve la aa urugh ve sha u ve̱ de kwagh u Kristu yô, á sar ve u eren nom," 
1Timothy5:12 nahan ve kpela ibo sha ayol a ve gadia ve undu jighjigh ve u nan u hiihii la. 
1Timothy5:13 Man shi kwagh ugen kpaa, ka ve hen u lun gbilin yô, man u gbaan zenden sha uya uya tsô, man ve kera lu gbilin tseegh ga, ve eren angereke shi ve amber sha akaa, ve lamen ve teren akaa a a doo ga yô." 
1Timothy5:14 Nahan yô, sarem pe kasev mba côgholov mba ve lu a mhem iyol yô, ve̱ er noov, ve̱ mar ônov, ve̱ nengen sha uya vev, ve̱ de ne orihom ian i lamen dang ga." 
1Timothy5:15 Gadia kera je kpaa mbagenev tsume ve gema ve dondo Satan. 
1Timothy5:16 Aluer kwase u nan jighjigh nan ngu a kasev mba côgholov sha ikev yô, nana̱ wasen ve, i̱ de ze nongo u Kristu iyol ga, nahan nongo u Kristu ua wase mba ve lu kasev mba côgholov mimi yô." 
1Timothy5:17 Mbatamen mba ve nengen sha ior dedoo yô, i̱ wa ve iko kwa har je, jim yô, ka mba ve lu pasen kwaghaôndo shi ve lu tesen kpaa la." 
1Timothy5:18 Gadia icighanruamabera kaa er: Bua u shoghol iyiagh yô, i̱ de we un kper sha zwa ga, man shi orshirentom nan kuma injar i nan." 
1Timothy5:19 Sha kwagh u ortamen yô, de gbe rumun ma ibo i i ne nan ga saa sha zwa u ushiada uhar shin utar." 
1Timothy5:20 Mba ve eren isholibo yô, yange ve sha ishigh ki ior cii man mbagenev kpaa vea cia ye." 
1Timothy5:21 M ngu wan we kwagh sha ishigh ki Aôndo man Kristu Yesu kua uicuwanmbatyomov mba Shaav mer, kura atindi angan, de gbe kuren kwagh sha mhange u i hange u la tsô ga, de eren ma kwagh sha msange u sha dooshima kpaa ga." 
1Timothy5:22 De pende or ave sha ityou gagh ga, de nyer nongo a orgen sha isholibo i nan ga, kura iyol you wang." 
1Timothy5:23 De kera me mngerem tseegh ga, maan wain côhin côhin kpaa sha ci u iyav ou kua ukorkor mba ve kenden we ken iyol sha ashighe ashighe la." 
1Timothy5:24 Ior mbagenev yô, asorabo a ve nga ken igbar je nga hemen ve u zan ken ijir, kpa mbagenev di yô, asorabo a ve gema dondo ve ijime." 
1Timothy5:25 Kape aeren a dedoo kpaa ka a lu ken igbar je la, a a lu nahan ga la kpaa, u yeren a yô, á fatyô ga." 
1Timothy6:1 Mba ve lu ikpan, i te ve igbur cii yô, ve̱ nengen uter vev er ve kom hanma ikoiwan cii, sha u i̱ de teren iti i Aôndo man ityesen Na sha dang ga yô." 
1Timothy6:2 Mba ve lu a uter mba nan jighjigh yô, ve̱ de lahan ve er ve mba anmgbianev vev hegen ga, kpa ve̱ hemba eren ve tom, gadia ve mba ve zough a iwasen sha mi la yô, ka mbananjighjigh man mbadoonshima. Tesen akaa ne, shi waan kwagh sha mi kpaa." 
1Timothy6:3 Aluer or ngu tesen ityesen igen kposo nan kera rumun akaaôron a Ter wase Yesu Kristu a dedoo la shin ityesen i civir Aôndo kpaa ga yô," 
1Timothy6:4 nan ngu moron iyol, kpa nan fa kwagh môm ga; anyimanaikaa doo nan man shi u sendegh kwaghôron sha asemberakaa a ôron kpaa. Iwuhe ka i due ker kua ayôôso man ityuhwanev man u henen akaa a vihin sha or," 
1Timothy6:5 man iyongo i kuren ga hen ior mba i vihi mhen ve, man mimi ve la a saa yô. Mba henen er, u civir Aôndo yô, ka gbenda u zuan a mtsera." 
1Timothy6:6 U civir Aôndo man kwagh a kuman we yô, mtsera ngu sha mi vese." 
1Timothy6:7 Gadia se nyôr ken tar ne a ma kwagh môm ga, u duen yemen a kwagh kpaa se fatyô ga." 
1Timothy6:8 Kpa aluer sea lu a kwaghyan man akondo yô, i̱ kuma se." 
1Timothy6:9 Kpa mba i sar ve pe lun mbanyarev yô, ka ve gba ken imeen man ken to u hônon man ken asaren kposo kposo a gbilinigh man a vihin. Ka a mire a ior ken mtim man ken msaaishe." 
1Timothy6:10 Gadia mise u hanma inja i kwaghbo cii yô, ka inyaregh ki saren. Mbagenev yô, ki hange ve nahan ve tsume ve undu jighjigh u nan, ve kuma ayol a ve sha atsan atô kposo kposo." 
1Timothy6:11 Kpa we, or u Aôndo yô, yevese akaa ne, gema dondo perapera ityô kua u civir Aôndo man jighjigh u nan man dooshima man ishima i wan man ishima i legh legh kpaa." 
1Timothy6:12 Nôngo ityav mbi dedoo mbi jighjigh u nan la, naregh kôr uma u tsôron u i yila u sha mi la gbang, u u pase mpase u dedoo sha mi sha ishigh ki mbashiada kpishi la." 
1Timothy6:13 M ngu wan we kwagh sha ishigh ki Aôndo u A ne akaa cii uma la man shi Kristu Yesu u A er shiada sha ishigh ki Pontiu Pilatu sha mpase u dedoo la mer," 
1Timothy6:14 kura tindi ne tsembelee, acôghol a̱ de lu ga zan zan m-ande u Ter wase Yesu Kristu." 
1Timothy6:15 Kwagh ne yô, ka Un u ageegh tswen u i wuese Un la, Tor u utor man Ter u uter kpaa, Una va pase un er shighe á va kuma vough yô." 
1Timothy6:16 Ka Un tseegh A lu u kpen ga ye, A tema ken iwanger i i gande u mgbôghom her yô. Ma or ngu a nenge a Na ga, á fatyô u nengen a Na kpaa ga, icivir i̱ lu i Na kua tahav kpaa gbem sha won. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Mba ve lu mbanyarev ken tar u ainge ne yô, wa ve kwagh wer, ve̱ de gengese ayol a ve ga, ve̱ de veren ishima sha inyaregh ki i fe kwagh sha min ken hemen ga la ze, kpa ve̱ ver ishima sha Aôndo u A ne se akaa cii wuee sha u se̱ er kwagh a mi yô." 
1Timothy6:18 Ve̱ eren akaa a dedoo ve̱ lu mbanyarev sha aeren a dedoo, ve̱ naan iwua, ve̱ panden kwagh ve̱ naan mbagenev kpaa," 
1Timothy6:19 nahan man vea wa imagh ki dedoo sha ci ve ayol a ve ken hemen ye, sha u vea kôr ave sha uma u a lu uma jim la." 
1Timothy6:20 We, Timoteu, kuran kwagh u i we u sha ikev la. Palegh ayôôso a dang a gbilinigh la man anyimanaikaa a i eren aie sha mi er ka kwaghfan la." 
1Timothy6:21 Mbagenev rumun akaa ne ve pase a je nahan ve tsume gbenda sha kwagh u jighjigh u nan. Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven. 
2Timothy1:1 Paulu apostoli u Kristu Yesu sha ishima i Aôndo sha inja i ityendezwa i sha uma u a lu ken Kristu Yesu la," 
2Timothy1:2 ngu sughun Timoteu, ka wan wam u ishima ishima. Mrumun u sha mhôôn man mhôônom ma zungwen man bem mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter man Kristu Yesu Ter wase ve̱ lu sha a we." 
2Timothy1:3 Ka mea umbur we ken mbamsen av gbem tugh man atetan yô, m wuese Aôndo u m lu civir Un sha imo i ken ishima i nan mo ibo ga la er uter av kpaa lu eren nahan." 
2Timothy1:4 Hangem pe zuan ishigh a we sha u iember yam i̱ iv yô, gadia m umbur mliam ou." 
2Timothy1:5 M ngu umbur jighjigh u nan u mimi u a lu ken a we, u a vande lun ken ngôu u tamen Loisi man shi ken ngôu Unise kpaa, shi m fa dedoo mer ngu ken we kpaa." 
2Timothy1:6 M ngu umbur we sha u seer nderen iwua i sha mrumun u sha mhôôn i i lu ken we la sha mpende u m penda ave sha a we la. 
2Timothy1:7 Gadia ka jijingi u cian kwagh, Aôndo a ne se ga, kpa ka u ageegh man u dooshima man u kôron iyol tsaha." 
2Timothy1:8 Nahan yô, kunya u̱ de ker u u eren shiada sha u pasen Ter wase ga, u̱ de ker u sha kwagh wam, mo orkwar Na kpaa ga, kpa nyôr nongo sha ican i yan sha ci u Loho u Dedoo sha agee a Aôndo," 
2Timothy1:9 u A yima se shi A yila se sha icighanmyer la, lu sha ci u aeren a ase ga kpa lu sha awashima Na iyol Na man shi sha mrumun u sha mhôôn Na u i ne se ken Kristu Yesu je er shighe lu a lu ga la." 
2Timothy1:10 Kpa i pase un ken igbar hegen sha mve u Oryiman wase Yesu Kristu u A ngohol ku agee kera, A va a uma man mtsôr ken iwanger sha Loho u Dedoo." 
2Timothy1:11 I verem or u yôôn u, man apostoli u u man ortesen u u kpaa;" 
2Timothy1:12 ka sha ci u kwagh ne man m lu yan atsan ne nahan ye, kpa kunya kôrom sha mi ga. Gadia m fa Un u m na Un jighjigh la man m fa dedoo mer Una fatyô u kuran kwagh u i wem sha ikev la zan zan iyange la." 
2Timothy1:13 Kwaghôron u dedoo u u zough a mi hen mo yô, a̱ lu u ikav i zan sha mi sha kwagh u jighjigh u nan man dooshima u ken Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Kura kwagh u dedoo u i we u sha ikev la sha agee a Icighan Jijingi u A tem ken vese la. 
2Timothy1:15 U fa er mba ken Ashia cii ve gem ijime a mo yô. Figelu man Hermogene kpaa mba ken ve. 
2Timothy1:16 Ter A̱ zungwe ya u Onesiferu mhôônom gadia a wasen mo acin imôngo, kunya kôr un a ikangenev yav kpaa ga." 
2Timothy1:17 Zum u a va nyôr ken Roma yô, a kerem tsung, a zua a mo kpaa." 
2Timothy1:18 Ter A̱ na un a̱ zua a mhôônom ma zungwen hen Ter sha iyange la—man ityom kpishi i a er ken Efese la kpaa u fa i dedoo. 
2Timothy2:1 Nahan yô, we wan wam, taver ken mrumun u sha mhôôn u ken Kristu Yesu la." 
2Timothy2:2 Akaa a u ungwa hen mo, mbashiada kpishi kpaa lu her la, gema wa sha ikev i ior mba ve lu jighjigh mba vea kuma u tesen mbagenev kpaa yô." 
2Timothy2:3 Nyôr nongo ken ican i yan er orutya u dedoo u Kristu Yesu nahan. 
2Timothy2:4 Ma orutya u nan lu nôngon ityav ave yô nan cimin iyol i nan sha akaa a uma u tar ne ga, gadia ka u nana̱ er kwagh u doon or u a tsough nan sha ci u utya la." 
2Timothy2:5 Aluer or ngu gban gesa u ayemegh a mbagenev yô, nana gba zuan a tsar ga, saa nana yevese sha tindi." 
2Timothy2:6 Orsule u nan er tom sha gbashima la yô, ka nan nana̱ vande zuan a kwar sha iyiagh kila keng." 
2Timothy2:7 Ver ikav sha kwagh u m kaa u ne gadia Ter Una na u mkav sha akaa cii. 
2Timothy2:8 Umbur Yesu Kristu u i nder Un shin ku, u A lu ken tsombor u Davidi la, er m pase ken ivangeli yam nahan." 
2Timothy2:9 Ka sha ci u i man m ya ican je i kangem kpaa er ka iferor nahan ye. Kpa kwaghôron u Aôndo yô, ngu uikangen ga." 
2Timothy2:10 Ka nahan man m we ishima sha akaa cii ye, sha ci u uicuwanmbaiorov, sha u ve kpaa, ve̱ zua a myom u ken Kristu Yesu la kua iengem i tsôron." 
2Timothy2:11 Kwaghôron ne ka u jighjigh: Aluer se kpe a Na imôngo yô, sé lu uma a Na imôngo kpaa." 
2Timothy2:12 Aluer se wa ishima yô, sé ya tor a Na imôngo. Aluer se nyiman Un yô, Un kpaa Una nyiman se." 
2Timothy2:13 Aluer se kera lu jighjigh ga yô, Un yô ngu jighjigh her. Gadia u Una nyiman mlu Na iyol Na yô, Una fatyô ga." 
2Timothy2:14 Umbur ior man shi pase sha ishigh ki Aôndo wer, ve̱ de sendegh kwaghôron sha asemberakaa a ôron ga, nga a inja sha ma kwagh ga, mba ve veren ato sha a kpaa, nga ze a ve ken mtim." 
2Timothy2:15 Nôngo sha gbashima u veren iyol you sha ishigh ki Aôndo er or u i kar nan nan kom yô, ortom u i gba u nana ya kunya ga yô, or u nan pasen kwaghôron u mimi la jighilii." 
2Timothy2:16 Palegh ayôôso a gbilinigh a dang la. Gadia vea hemba yemen a yem hemen sha u vendan Aôndo. 
2Timothy2:17 Kwaghôron ve una za hemen er ivav i samber yan or iyol nahan. Himeneu man Filetu kpaa mba ken a ve. 
2Timothy2:18 Mban yô, ve tsume ve undu mimi ve kaa er mnder u shin ku kar kera bee je. Mba nzughul a jighjigh u nan u mbagenev." 
2Timothy2:19 Kpa imagh ki Aôndo ki ki tenger ga la yô, ki tile her, ki a ikav ne: Ter fa mba Nav, man shi, hanma or u nan teren iti i Ter yô, nana̱ pav a ifer." 
2Timothy2:20 Ken ya u vesen yô, ka ikav mbi sha zenaria man azurfa tseegh mbi lu ker ga, kpa mbi sha kon man mbi sha inyatyuu kpaa mbi. Mbigenev ka mbi eren akaa a icivirigh a mi, mbigenev yô, ka u eren akaa a a lu a icivir ga la a min." 
2Timothy2:21 Aluer or nana dugh akaa ne ken iyol i nan kera yô, nana lu ikagh ki icivirigh ki i tsegha ki, ki lu or u ki a inja kpishi yô, ki i ser ki sha ci u hanma tom u dedoo yô." 
2Timothy2:22 Nahan yevese asaren a sha inja i mbayevikaior la, gema dondo perapera ityô, man jighjigh u nan man dooshima man bem a mbala mba ve yer iti i Ter sha ishima i wang la imôngo." 
2Timothy2:23 Kpa nyagh anyimanaikaa a ibume a injaa ga la gadia u fa er a ne ayongo yô. 
2Timothy2:24 Kpa kpan u Ter yô, ka u nana̱ lu or u ayongo ga keng, kpa nana̱ lu sar sar a ior cii, nana̱ lu or u fan ityesen man or u wan ishima kpaa," 
2Timothy2:25 nana̱ kôôm mbahendan kwagh a nan sha ishima i legh legh. Alaghga Aôndo Una na ve mgemshima vea kav mimi," 
2Timothy2:26 vea nder vea war to u diabolo, gadia a vande kôron ve sha u ve̱ er ishima na yô." 
2Timothy3:1 Fa kwagh ne. Ken ayange a masejime yô, ashighe a ican aa va." 
2Timothy3:2 Gadia ior vea hingir mbawan ayol a ve iko tseegh man mba inyaregh ki doo ve ishima man mbahagher sha akaa man mbagengeseyol man mbaôron kwagh dang dang, man mbahemban mbamaren vev ato man mbalun a ishughun ga man mbalun wang ga," 
2Timothy3:3 man mbalun a dooshima ga man mba ve soo u himen iyongo kpaa ga man mbaerenangereke man mbakôron ayol a ve tsaha ga man anomaior a bo man mba kwagh u dedoo a doo ve ga 
2Timothy3:4 man mbapasen ior aker man mbawan uma ve iko ga man mbamoronyol a ve man mba iember i iyolough i hembe doon ve a Aôndo la. 
2Timothy3:5 Sha ashe yô mba a mlu u civir Aôndo la kpa mba geman mba nyiman agee la. Nyagh ambaaior la. 
2Timothy3:6 Mbagenev ken ve yô, mba nyer ken uya, mba ker adômaukase a asorabo a ngee a iyol, asaren kposo kposo a lu hemen a la." 
2Timothy3:7 Mba henen ityesen gbem kpa mba fan ityô u aren sha mfe u vea fa mimi la ga. 
2Timothy3:8 Er Yane man Yambere kpaa lu hendan a Mose nahan kape mban kpaa ve lu hendan a mimi la, ka ior mba mhen ve a vihi, jighjigh u nan ve kpaa a lu vough ga yô." 
2Timothy3:9 Kpa vea kera za hemen yum ga, gadia ior cii vea va kav ibumegh vegh wanger wanger er yan i kav ki ior mba uhar mbala nahan." 
2Timothy3:10 Kpa we u lu a mo mangeraa sha ityesen man ieren yam man ishimaveren yam man jighjigh u nan man ishima i wan man dooshima man ishima i taver 
2Timothy3:11 man mtev u sha ican man atsan a a tserem ken Antioki man Ikonium man Lisetera. Mbamtev mba sha ican ne cii m wa ishima sha mi, man ve cii, Ter yimam sha mi." 
2Timothy3:12 Man mba i sar ve pe zenden sha mciviraôndo ken Kristu Yesu cii á tôv ve a ican. 
2Timothy3:13 Kpa udangmbaiorov man mbatsughunior vea yem hemen hemen vea hemba vihin a vihi kwagh. Mba tsughun ior man ve di kpaa mba gem mba tsughun ve. 
2Timothy3:14 Kpa we yô, lu ken akaa a i tese u, u ne a jighjigh la, gadia u fa ve mba u hen sha ikev ve la." 
2Timothy3:15 Man shi u fa er hii iyev je u kav icighanruamabera u a fatyô u tesen we u zan ken myom sha jighjigh u nan u ken Kristu Yesu la. 
2Timothy3:16 Gadia icighanruamabera cii ka Aôndo A ne i nger ye. Ngu a inja sha ityesen man sha mkôôm man sha myange man sha myese u ken perapera kpaa," 
2Timothy3:17 sha u or u Aôndo nana̱ kuma nana̱ lu a ago iyol sha ci u hanma tom u dedoo. 
2Timothy4:1 M ngu wan we kwagh sha ishigh ki Aôndo man Kristu Yesu u Una va ôr mbaumav man mbakpenev ijir la, sha m-ande Na man tartor Na la," 
2Timothy4:2 mer, yôô kwaghôron Na wa iyol sha mi keghen a kegh, a lu sha ian i doon, shin a lu sha ian i doon ga kpaa, kôôm, yangen, waan kwagh, sha ishima i wan tsung man sha ityesen kpaa." 
2Timothy4:3 Gadia shighe ngu van u ior vea kera fatyô u veren ato sha ityesen i dedoo ga, vea kohol mbatesen kpishi sha asaren a ve ayol a ve sha ci u ato vande ngiligh ve yô." 
2Timothy4:4 Vea tôô ato a ve sha kwagh u mimi la kera vea gema vea ver sha ukwaghhir. 
2Timothy4:5 Kpa we yô, kundu ishima sha akaa cii, taver ishima sha ican you; er tom u ivangeli, kure u doo doo." 
2Timothy4:6 Mo yô, mba urun mo kera er nagh ku urun nahan. Shighe u myem wam kuma." 
2Timothy4:7 M nôngo ityav mbi dedoo ve. M kure ayem am vough, m saa a jighjigh u nan." 
2Timothy4:8 Mase shin tsar u mhembe u perapera u i verem, u Ter Una nam sha iyange la yô, man ka mo tseegh ga kpa ka mba m-ande Na a doo ve la cii." 
2Timothy4:9 Nôngo, va kohol mo fefa." 
2Timothy4:10 Gadia Dema undum sha ci u tar u ainge ne u doo un yum yô, a yem a nagh Tesalonika. Keresene za Galatia, Titu za Dalematia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ka Luka tsô a shi vea mo ye. Kua a Marku, va a na, gadia ngum a inja kpishi sha tom." 
2Timothy4:11 Ka Luka tsô a shi vea mo ye. Kua a Marku, va a na, gadia ngum a inja kpishi sha tom." 
2Timothy4:12 Tikiku yô, m tindi un ken Efese." 
2Timothy4:13 Zum u ú vaan yô, vam a ikondo i cirin iyol i m undu ken Teroa sha ikev i Karepu la, kua ityakerada kpaa, jim je yô ka i i er sha akôv la." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekesander or u varen togula la a er a mo dang kpishi. Ter Una or un iyev sha aeren a na la. 
2Timothy4:15 We kpaa, sulan un, gadia a hendan a akaaôron a ase kpishi." 
2Timothy4:16 Sha iyolpalegh yam i sha hiihii yô, ma or ta ken mo ga, i kendem tswen, kpa i̱ de ne ve ibo sha mi ga." 
2Timothy4:17 Nahan kpaa Ter yô tile a mo her, A nam agee sha u m̱ ôr kwaghaôndo m̱ kure, atôatyev cii a̱ ungwa. Kape i yiman ken zwa u begha kera ne." 
2Timothy4:18 Man Ter Una yimam sha hanma tom u dang, Una warem sha u m̱ nyôr tartor Na u Sha. Icivir i̱ lu i Na gbem sha won. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Sugh Prishila man Akula man mba ken ya u Onesiferu, nam." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasetu ngu ken Korinte her. Terofimu yô, m undu un ken Milete uange." 
2Timothy4:21 Nôngo, va kohol mo je er fam u lu a gba ga ne. Ubulu man Pudene man Lunu man Keloudia kua anmgbianev cii mba sughun we." 
2Timothy4:22 Ter A̱ lu a jijingi wou. Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven. 
Titus1:1 Paulu, kpan u Aôndo man apostoli u Yesu Kristu sha inja i jighjigh u nan u uicuwan mba Aôndo man sha inja i mkav u kaven mimi u sha mciviraôndo la," 
Titus1:2 ka sha ishimaveren keghen uma u tsôron, u Aôndo u A eren aie ga la, A tôndo zwa je er shighe lu a lu ga la." 
Titus1:3 Kpa zum u shighe va kuma vough yô, A pase kwaghôron Na sha u yôôn un a yôô, man myee shon yô, i wam sha ikev sha imo i Aôndo Oryiman wase." 
Titus1:4 M ngu sughun Titu, ka wan wam mimi ken jighjigh u nan u se zough sha mi la. Mrumun u sha mhôôn man bem mba ve dugh her Aôndo Ter wase man Yesu Kristu Oryiman wase, ve̱ lu sha a we." 
Titus1:5 Kwagh u m undu u ken Kerete yô, ka sha u sôr akaa a kwagh a shi sha mi yô, shi ver mbatamen sha agar agar er lu m kaa u nahan." 
Titus1:6 I̱ ver ior mba ve lu a acôghol iyol ga man ior mba ve lu a kwase môm môm man ônov vev kpaa i lu mbananjighjigh mba i ne ve ibo sha ijimba i eren ga shin sha ipila i eren kpaa ga yô. 
Titus1:7 Orkuran yô, ka or u nengen sha ya u Aôndo, ka u nana̱ lu a acôghol iyol ga keng je shin or u norom ikaa shin or u yuwen fefa shin or u cihin msôrom shin or u cihin num shin or u keren mtsera u dang kpaa ga," 
Titus1:8 kpa i̱ lu or u eren a mbavannya dedoo, man or u kwagh u dedoo a doo nan man or u tsev tsev man or u jighjigh man icighanor man or u kôron iyol na tsaha kpaa," 
Titus1:9 nana̱ kôr ave taveraa sha kwaghôron u jighjigh er i tese nahan, sha u nana̱ fatyô u wan ior kwagh sha inja i ityesen i dedoo la man shi sha u nana̱ yangen kwagh a mba ve nyiman la." 
Titus1:10 Gadia ior mba ve aren ave ve ngee, ka mbalamen gbilin gbilin man mbatsughunior, hemba kan mbaicôngov." 
Titus1:11 I̱ kusu ve ijô keng gadia ka ve nzughul uya mbagenev jimin cii sha ityesen i ma ve tese ga la sha u zuan a mtsera u dang. 
Titus1:12 Orgen u ken ve lu profeti ve ayol a ve, a kaa er: Mbakerete ka mbaerenaie gbem je, ka inyamtoho i bo, ka mbauhweev mba eren fuul sha kwaghyan." 
Titus1:13 Mpase ne ka u mimi je. Nahan yô, yange ve coholoo sha u i̱ kpe jighjigh ve u nan la iyol," 
Titus1:14 man ve̱ de veren ishima sha ukwaghhir mba Mbayuda ga shin sha atindi a ior mba ve undu mimi la kpaa ga. 
Titus1:15 Mba ve lu wang yô, akaa cii nga ve wang je, kpa mbahôngorough man mbanan jighjigh ga yô, ma kwagh ngu ve wang ga, kpa mhen ve kua imo i ken ishima cii hôngor." 
Titus1:16 Ka ve pase er ve fa Aôndo kpa mba gem mba nyiman Un sha aeren a ve la; kwagh ve ndôhôr ishima, ka mbahembanato kpaa, ve kuma u eren ma kwagh u injaa ga." 
Titus2:1 Kpa we yô, ôron akaa a a kom ityesen i dedoo la." 
Titus2:2 Wa mbaganden kwagh wer, ve̱ lu per, ve̱ tema sha inja sha inja, ve̱ lu tsev tsev, i̱ kpe jighjigh ve u nan la iyol kua dooshima man ishima i wan ve la kpaa." 
Titus2:3 Kape kasev mba tamen kpaa ve̱ lu la, mlu ve a̱ kuma icivir, ve̱ de eren angereke ga, ve̱ de lu mba msôrom ma ye tor sha a ve ga, kpa ve̱ tesen akaa a dedoo." 
Titus2:4 Nahan man vea wa kasev mba kiriki kwagh er noov vev ve̱ doo ve asema kua shi ônov vev kpaa," 
Titus2:5 ve̱ lu tsev tsev, ve̱ lu wang, ve̱ sôron uya vev, ve̱ eren dedoo, ve̱ ungwan imo i noov vev, sha u i̱ de lamen sha kwaghôron u Aôndo dang ga yô." 
Titus2:6 Kape mbayevikaior kpaa, wa ve kwagh la, ve̱ lu tsev tsev sha akaa cii." 
Titus2:7 Lu ve ikav i tesen sha aeren a dedoo man sha ityesen i mimi man mlu u sha inja sha inja 
Titus2:8 man sha kwaghôron u a lu vough, a gande u nyiman kpaa, sha u or u nan mough ahendan nana̱ va ahenge nana̱ de fetyô u teren se sha kwaghbo ga yô." 
Titus2:9 Mbashirentom kpaa, ve̱ ungwan imo i uter vev ken akaa cii, ve̱ eren kwagh sha ishima ve kpaa, ve̱ de hon ga," 
Titus2:10 ve̱ de iin ga, ve̱ eren akaa cii sha jighjigh doo doo sha u vea hingir kwagh u hweegh sha ityesen i Aôndo Oryiman wase sha akaa cii." 
Titus2:11 Gadia mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo va ande ve, a va a myom sha ci u ior cii." 
Titus2:12 Ngu tesen se er se̱ venda mwe u i wa Aôndo iko ga la man asaren a taregh kpaa, se̱ zenden tsev tsev man sha jighjigh man sha mciviraôndo kpaa ken tar u ainge ne," 
Titus2:13 se̱ keghen ishimaverenkeghen i dedoo, ka m-ande u iengem i Aôndo wase u A vese yum ne man Oryiman wase Kristu Yesu" 
Titus2:14 u A ne iyol Na sha ci wase sha u Una paa se sha hanma ifer cii man shi Una wanger nongoior sha ci Na iyol Na, mba asema a tsee ve u eren akaa a dedoo." 
Titus2:15 Ôron akaa ne, waan kwagh man shi yangen kwagh sha utaha cii. Ma Or nana̱ de lahan we ga." 
Titus3:1 Umbur ve ve̱ ungwan imo i mbatarev man mbautahav man mba ve nengen sha akaa, ve̱ de karen imo ve ga, ve̱ wa iyol ve kegh a kegh sha u eren hanma tom u dedoo," 
Titus3:2 ve̱ de er kwagh u dang sha ma or ga, ve̱ de lu mbanôngonnum ga, ve̱ lu a ishima i legh legh ve̱ hide a ayol a ve ijime hen ior cii." 
Titus3:3 Gadia se kpaa, ngise se lu mbalanenkwagh se hemban ato, se tsumen, se lu ikpan i asaren man ugurgurmbaakaav atô kposo kposo, se lu zenden sha aferakaa man iwuhe i eren, mbagenev kôr se ihom shi se lu ihom ayol a ase kpaa." 
Titus3:4 Kpa zum u mhôônom ma kôron man dooshima u Aôndo Oryiman wase va ande yô," 
Titus3:5 A yima se, lu sha aeren a ase a perapera ga, kpa lu sha mhôônom ma zungwen Nam iyol Na lu sha m-ee u i ôô se sha mmar u he, man sha mgem u he u sha Icighan Jijingi" 
Titus3:6 u A haa sha a vese wuee ken Yesu Kristu Oryiman wase la," 
Titus3:7 sha u i̱ na se ishô sha mrumun u sha mhôôn Na, se̱ hingir mbayandyako sha ishimaveren keghen uma u tsôron la." 
Titus3:8 Kwaghôron ne ka u jighjigh, sarem pe we ôron akaa ne sha gbashima sha u mba ve suur sha Aôndo yô, ve̱ ver ishima ve̱ tile sha aeren a dedoo her. Ka a je a doo ior shi a lu ve a inja kpaa ye." 
Titus3:9 Kpa kem iyol sha anyimanaikaa a ibume man icombor i ôron man u nyiman akaa sha kwagh u atindi. Akaa angan nga a inja ga, ka gbilin tsô." 
Titus3:10 Or u van a mpav ken nongo u Kristu yô, wa nan kwagh kwa môm shin kwa har nahan, tsô ú de kwagh u nan," 
Titus3:11 gadia u fa imbaor la tsume, nan er isholibo nan na iyol i nan ibo kera kpaa." 
Titus3:12 Zum u Aretema shin Tikiku una va hen we yô, nôngo va kohol mo ken Nikopoli gadia m ver ishima mer ka her me lu sha shighe u fam ye." 
Titus3:13 Nôngo wa Zena oratindigh la ikav man shi Apolo kpaa sha mmough ve, kwagh a̱ de banen ve ga." 
Titus3:14 Ior mba ken vese ve̱ hen er vea er ityom i injaa sha u wasen sha ugbayol yô, atam a̱ de banen hen a ve ga." 
Titus3:15 Mba ve lu a mo cii mba sughun we. Sugh mba se doo ve ishima ken jighjigh u nan la, na se. Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven cii." 
Philemon1:1 Paulu orkwar u Kristu Yesu vea Timoteu, anmgbian wase, mba sughun Filemon u doon ishima, ortom a vese imôngo," 
Philemon1:2 man Apia anmgbian wase u kwase u doon ishima man Arekipu, orutya a vese imôngo man nongo u Kristu u ken ya wou kpaa." 
Philemon1:3 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven man shi bem mba ve dugh hen Aôndo Ter wase man Ter Yesu Kristu kpaa. 
Philemon1:4 M ngu sughun Aôndo wam gbem hanma shighe u ka mea umbur we ken mbamsen av yô," 
Philemon1:5 gadia m ungwa gwa u dooshima wou man jighjigh wou u nan u u lu a mi hen Ter Yesu man uicighanmbaiorov cii yô. 
Philemon1:6 M ngu eren msen mer mnyer wou u u nyer nongo ken jighjigh u nan ne yô, a̱ wase, a̱ er tom ken we, a̱ ar a we ken mfe u fan akaa a doon cii a se lu a mi ken Kristu la." 
Philemon1:7 Gadia m ember kpishi shi m zua a ishimasurun sha dooshima wou, anmgbian, er u ne asema a taver uicighanmbaiorov yô." 
Philemon1:8 Nahan yô, shin er m lu a vangertiôr ken Kristu kpishi sha u kaan we kwagh u a doo u eren yô," 
Philemon1:9 nahan kpaa, sha ci u dooshima yô, hemba doon mo u zamber a zamber—mo Paulu u m lu tamenor ne, u hegen m hingir orkwar u Kristu kpaa ne," 
Philemon1:10 m ngu zamber a we sha ci u wan wam Onesimu u m mar un ken uikangen ne. 
Philemon1:11 Ngise yô lu u a inja ga, kpa hegen yô, ngu u a inja, mo kpaa, ngum a inja je." 
Philemon1:12 M ngu hiden we a na, un u a hingir mo er ka ishima yam nahan ne." 
Philemon1:13 Mo yô sarem pe ma a lu a mo heen sha u una erem tom sha ityough you ken ikangenev mbi sha ci u ivangeli ne. 
Philemon1:14 Kpa lum pe gban eren kwagh sha mfe wou ga ze, sha u erdoo wou a̱ de lu sha mkighir ga, kpa i̱ lu sha ishima you yô." 
Philemon1:15 Alaghga lu sha ci u kwagh ne man a kera lu a we ga, sha anyangem kpeghee, sha u ú mase lun a na gbem ye." 
Philemon1:16 Kera ngu er kpan nahan ga, a hemba kpan, a hingir anmgbian u doon ishima, jim yô, ka u wam man hire we ve una kera lu u wou ga yee? Ka anmgbian ken iyol kua ken Ter kpaa." 
Philemon1:17 Nahan aluer wea fa wer mo m ngu kwagh môm vea we yô, rumun un er ma u rumun mo nahan." 
Philemon1:18 Aluer una vihi u kwagh shin una lu u a kwagh kpaa, nger kwagh la nam, i̱ hingir u wam." 
Philemon1:19 Mo Paulu m ngu ngeren kwagh ne sha uwegh agh je, mo me kimbi; u ngum a injô je kua iyol you sha mi cii, kpa me kera ôr kwagh sha mi kpee ga." 
Philemon1:20 Een, anmgbian ma m zough a iwasen hen a we ken Ter. Taver mo ishima ken Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 M nger u kwagh ne, m fa dedoo ú ungwa imo yam. M fa ú er kwagh je á hemba kwagh u m kaa ne kpaa." 
Philemon1:22 Kwagh ugen kpaa, sôrom ijiir i tsan her, gadia m ver ishima mer sha mbamsen enev yô, á na ne mo." 
Philemon1:23 Epafera u a lu orkwar a mo imôngo ken Kristu Yesu yô, ngu sughun we." 
Philemon1:24 Marku kpaa nahan, kua Aristareku man Dema man Luka mba ve lu eren tom a mo imôngo ne." 
Philemon1:24 Marku kpaa nahan, kua Aristareku man Dema man Luka mba ve lu eren tom a mo imôngo ne." 
Philemon1:25 Mrumun u sha mhôôn u Ter Yesu Kristu a̱ lu a jijingi wou. 
Hebrews1:1 Ngise yô, Aôndo ôr kwagh a uter sha uprofeti acin imôngo man sha igbenda kposo kposo kpaa," 
Hebrews1:2 kpa ken ayange a masetyô ne yô, A ôr kwagh a vese sha Wan Na u A ver Un dyako sha akaa cii, ka sha a Na kpaa A er tar cii ye." 
Hebrews1:3 Un yô, ka mmondo u iengem Na man shi eev mbu mlu Na vough kpaa. Ngu a akaa cii sha ave Na sha kwaghôron u sha agee a Na la. Er A wanger asorabo kera yô, A za tema sha uwegh ku yanegh ku Icivirigh." 
Hebrews1:4 A hemba mbatyomov mba Shaav ica je, vough er iti i A ye dyako a mi la kpaa i hembe i ve la nahan." 
Hebrews1:5 Gadia ka hanma ortyom u Sha je man mayange A kaa a nan er: We, U ngu Wan Wam je Mo M mar U nyiana? Man shi: Mo, Me lu Ter Na je, Wen di kpaa Una lu Wan Wama?" 
Hebrews1:6 Man zum u A lu ôron u shi nyôron a Wan Na u iunda shin tar la yô, A kaa er: Mbatyomov mba Aôndo cii, ve̱ gure inya, ve̱ civir Un." 
Hebrews1:7 Sha kwagh u mbatyomov mba Shaav yô, A kaa er: Un u A gema mbatyomov Nav mba Shaav ve hingir ahumbe, man shi mba ve eren Un tom kpaa ve hingir iniomborusu." 
Hebrews1:8 Kpa sha kwagh u Wan la yô, A kaa er: Aôndo, ikônough You ki torough yô, ka ki tsôron gbem sha won; ka tôgh ku perapera je, ku lu tôgh ku tartor Wou ye." 
Hebrews1:9 Perapera doo U ishima, U gema U nyagh mvende u vendan atindi la. We Aôndo, ka nahan man Aôndo Wou haa U mkurem ma iemberegh hemba mbakwav Wou ye." 
Hebrews1:10 Man shi: We Ter, ka We U tim imagh ki taregh hiihii ye, Sha kpaa, ka tom u sha ave Ou je." 
Hebrews1:11 Ve, vea saa ishe kpa We yô, U tsôr her gbem. Ve cii vea bee iyol er riga ka a bee nahan." 
Hebrews1:12 Ú va hure ve er ikondo i cirin iyol nahan, á musan ve er ka riga nahan, kpa We yô, U ngu di her nahan gbem; anyom a Ou kpaa aa bee je ga." 
Hebrews1:13 Kpa ka hanma ortyom u Sha je man mayange A kaa a nan er: Temam ken uwegh ku yanegh zan zan Me gema mbaihomov Ou vea hingir We kwagh u pendan angahar sha mi. 
Hebrews1:14 Ve cii, kera ka ujijingi mba eren tom mba ka i tindin ve u za wasen mba vea ya dyako u myom la gaa?" 
Hebrews2:1 Nahan yô, ka u sé hemba veren ishima sha akaa a se vanden ungwan la keng sha u se̱ de kuwan karen ihongo ga yô." 
Hebrews2:2 Gadia aluer kwaghôron u i ôr sha zwa u mbatyomov mba Shaav la lu dông man hanma mper u tindi kua hanma ihembeato kpaa i or iyev sha mi vough yô," 
Hebrews2:3 nahan se sé war nana aluer sé kera wa myom u vesen ne iko ga yôô? Ka Ter A hii u pasen un ye, mba ve ungwa un la kpaa, ve va taver un hen vese." 
Hebrews2:4 Aôndo kpaa lu eren shiada a ve imôngo sha uivande man sha akaa a kpilighyol man akaa a ageegh atô kposo kposo man shi sha ikwar i karen i Icighan Jijingi sha ishima Na kpaa. 
Hebrews2:5 Gadia kera ka mbatyomov mba Shaav man A na ve tar u u lu van, u se lu ôron kwagh u u la sha ikev ga." 
Hebrews2:6 Kpa orgen er shiada mape er: Or ngu nyi ve U umbur nana? man shi wan u or kpaa er U we nan iko yô? 
Hebrews2:7 U er nan nan yina sha mbatyomov mba Shaav sha anshighe kpeghee, U cir nan iengem iyol kua icivir kpaa," 
Hebrews2:8 U gema akaa cii U ver shin angahar a nan, hingir sha ikev i nan je Gadia sha mver u A ver akaa cii sha ikev i nan la yô, A kera shi a ma kwagh u a lu sha ikev i nan ga ze. Hegen yô, se mba a nenge i ver akaa cii sha ikev i nan ve ga." 
Hebrews2:9 Kpa se mba nengen a Yesu u i ver Un A yina sha mbatyomov mba Shaav sha anshighe kpeghee la. Ka sha ci u ican i kuugh la man i cir Un iengem iyol kua icivir kpaa ye, sha u Una kav mlu u kuugh sha ci u ior cii, sha mhôônom ma Aôndo." 
Hebrews2:10 Gadia Un u akaa cii a dugh her a Na yô, er A lu van a ônov mba nomso kpishi ken iengem yô, doo u Una sôr Orhemen u myom ve, A̱ hingir vough, sha atsan a yan." 
Hebrews2:11 Gadia Un u A lu tseghan la man ve mba i lu tseghan ve la ka hen u môm man ve cii ve dugh ye. Ka nahan man kunya kera kôr Un u yilan ve er anmgbianev ga ye. 
Hebrews2:12 A kaa er: Me pase anmgbianev Av iti You, ka her atô u mkohol man me wa icam i civir We ye." 
Hebrews2:13 Man shi: Mo yô, Me suur sha a Na. Man shi: Nenge, M ngun, kua ônov mba Aôndo A nem ne." 
Hebrews2:14 Er ônov ve zough sha inyam man awambe cii yô, kape Un kpaa A nyôr nongo a ve sha kwagh la, sha er ka sha ku man Una vihi agee a un u a lu a tahav mbu kuugh la kera ye, ka diabolo je la," 
Hebrews2:15 man sha er Una pase ve cii Una tuhwa, ka ve mba ve lu ken uikangen sha mciem ma kuugh la er i mar ve la je." 
Hebrews2:16 Gadia mimi je, ka mbatyomov mba Shaav man A ver ishima sha a ve ga kpa ka tsombor u Aberaham A ver ishima sha u ye." 
Hebrews2:17 Nahan yô, lu u i̱ er Un A̱ lu kwagh môm a anmgbianev Nav sha akaa cii keng sha u Una hingir zegepristi u zungwen mhôônom man u jighjigh kpaa sha akaa a Aôndo, sha u Una na iwom sha ci u asorabo a ior." 
Hebrews2:18 Un iyol Na ican er Un, sha imeen i i lu meen Un la, ka sha ci u nahan man A fetyô u wasen mba i lu meen ve la ye." 
Hebrews3:1 Nahan yô, ne uicighananmgbianev mba ne lu a kwar sha myer u a dugh Sha, u i yila ne la, ver nen ishima sha Apostoli man Zegepristi u se pase kwagh Na sha mpase u jighjigh wase u nan la cii, ka Yesu je la," 
Hebrews3:2 Un u a lu u jighjigh hen Aôndo u A ver Un sha tom la di er Mose kpaa a lu jighjigh ken ya na cii nahan. 
Hebrews3:3 Gadia i nenge Un er A kom icivir i hembe i Mose yô, di er ormaanya ka nan lu a icivir, i hemba i ya nahan." 
Hebrews3:4 Gadia hanma ya yô, or maa un a maa, kpa u A maa akaa cii yô, ka Aôndo." 
Hebrews3:5 Mose yô, lu jighjigh ken ya Na cii, lu ortom sha u una er shiada sha akaa a á va ôr a ken hemen la." 
Hebrews3:6 Kpa Kristu yô lu jighjigh sha ya Na, lu Wan je. Man ka se se lu ya Na ye, aluer se kôr ave gbang gbang sha vangertiôr wase man ihagh i sha ishimaverenkeghen yase la zan zan mkur yô." 
Hebrews3:7 Nahan yô ka vough er Icighan Jijingi A lu kaa nahan er: Nyian je aluer nea ungwa imo Na yô," 
Hebrews3:8 de kera cighir nen asema a en er sha shighe u vihin ishima la nahan ga, shin er sha iyange i imeen i ken taaikôngo la nahan kpaa ga," 
Hebrews3:9 henpe uter enev meem sha u karen Mo shin er ve lu nengen ityom Yam, anyom akunduahar je nahan kpaa." 
Hebrews3:10 Sha ci u nahan yô, ishima i vihim a kov ne M kaa Mer: Gbem je, mba tsumen ken asema a ve, ve fa igbenda Yam ga." 
Hebrews3:11 Nahan M bum sha ishimanyoon Yam Mer: Vea kera nyôr ken mmem Wam mayange ga. 
Hebrews3:12 Ver nen ishima, anmgbianev, sha u boshima u nan jighjigh ga a̱ de luun ken hanmô wen sha u né undu Aôndo u uma ga." 
Hebrews3:13 Kpa taver nen ayol a en asema use use er i lu teren “nyian” la her yô, sha er i̱ de cighir hanmô wen ishima sha icugh i isholibo ga yô."
