Hebrews3:14 Gadia se hingir mbalun a kwar ken Kristu aluer se kôr ave gbang gbang sha imagh ki hiihii ki ishimaveren yase zan zan mkur yô. 
Hebrews3:15 Er i lu kaan er: Nyian je aluer nea ungwa imo Na yô, de kera cighir nen asema a en er sha shighe u nyoon ishima la nahan ga." 
Hebrews3:16 Tsô ka unô je man ve ungwa kpa ve lu vihin Aôndo ishima? Kera ka ve mba ve due ken Igipiti cii sha ikev i Mose la gaa? 
Hebrews3:17 Ka unô je man ishima vihi Un a ve je kuma anyom akunduahara? Kera ka ve mba ve er isholibo, akom a ve saa ken taaikôngo la gaa?" 
Hebrews3:18 Shi ka unô je man A bum a ve er, vea kera nyôr ken mmem Na mayange ga saa di mba ve hembe ato mbala tsô gaa?" 
Hebrews3:19 Nahan se nenge ve kera fatyô u nyôron ga, sha ci u jighjigh ve u nan ga la." 
Hebrews4:1 Nahan yô, er ityendezwa i nyôron ken mmem Na i lu her yô, se cia nen sha u i̱ de nengen sha hanmô wen er i bunde nan ga." 
Hebrews4:2 Gadia se kpaa, i ôr se Loho u Dedoo vough er i ôr mbala nahan. Kpa loho la lu ve a inja ga gadia u zua a jighjigh u nan hen ve mba ve lu ungwan la ga." 
Hebrews4:3 Kpa se mba se ne jighjigh ne yô, ka se je se lu nyôron ken mmem ne ye, er i kaa yô, er: Er M bum sha ishimanyoon Yam nahan, vea nyôr ken mmem Wam mayange ga, Shin er ityom Na i kure hii sha mgbetar nahan kpaa." 
Hebrews4:4 Gadia A ôr kwagh mape sha kwagh u iyange i sha utaankaruhar la er: Sha iyange i sha utaankaruhar la Aôndo mem ityom Na cii. 
Hebrews4:5 Man ken ijiir ne A kaa er: Vea nyôr ken mmem Wam mayange ga. 
Hebrews4:6 Nahan yô er i shi u mbagenev vea nyôr ker, man mbala mba ve vande zuan a Loho u Dedoo la ve kera nyôr ga sha ci u ihembeato yô," 
Hebrews4:7 shighe kar vese, tsô A shi a ôr kwagh sha imo i Davidi, A ver iyange igen, A kaa er: Nyian je, er i vande kaan nahan la: Nyian je, aluer nea ungwa imo Na yô, de kera cighir nen asema a en ga." 
Hebrews4:8 Aluer Yosua una ne ve mmem yô, mayange ma A kera ter iyange igen kposo ken masejime ga." 
Hebrews4:9 Nahan yô, mmem shi her sha ci u nongoior u Aôndo er u sha iyange i Memen la nahan." 
Hebrews4:10 Nahan u nan nyer ken mmem Na yô, nan mem ityom i nan er Aôndo iyol Na kpaa A mem i Na nahan." 
Hebrews4:11 Yô, se nôngo nen tsung u nyôron ken mmem la sha er ma or nana̱ de gbaan sha inja i ihembeato la ga." 
Hebrews4:12 Gadia mkaanem ma Aôndo ma uma je, ma tem gbilin ga, ma hemba esen a hanma sanker u esen akur ahar cii, ka ma nyôr zan zan ma pav uma a jijingi man shi uijuan a mshiam kpaa, ka ma kar mbamhen kua mbaawashima kpaa." 
Hebrews4:13 Ma kwagh u i gbe sha won kpaa ngu myer sha ishigh Nagh ga, akaa cii nga gbar gbar, i tar a tar a kpaa sha ashe a Wen u kwagh a zough se a Na la." 
Hebrews4:14 Er se lu a Zegepristi u tamen u A nyôr Usha A haa ve ijime cii, ka Yesu Wan u Aôndo je la, nahan yô, se kôr nen ave gbang gbang sha mpase u jighjigh wase u nan la je." 
Hebrews4:15 Gadia se mba a zegepristi u A fetyô u zungwen a vese imôngo ken aseer a ase ga ze, kpa ka u i mee Un sha hanma gbenda cii vough er se nahan, saa di isholibo tsô A er ga ye." 
Hebrews4:16 Nahan yô, se kporom nen hen ikônough ki torough ki mhôôn vangertiôr sha u sé ngohol mhôônom ma zungwen man shi i̱ rumun se sha mhôôn, i̱ wase se sha shighe vough." 
Hebrews5:1 Gadia hanma zegepristi u i tsough un hen ior yô, i ver un u eren tom sha ci u ior, sha akaa a Aôndo la, sha u una naan uiwua kua iniav sha ci u asorabo yô." 
Hebrews5:2 A fatyô u wan ishima a mbalanenkwagh man mbatsumen gadia un iyol na kpaa, isheer kase un." 
Hebrews5:3 Sha ci u kwagh ne yô, lu u una naan nagh sha ci u asorabo sha ci na iyol na keng, di er a naan sha ci u nongoior la nahan." 
Hebrews5:4 Man mayange or gbe ngohol icivir ne iyol i nan tsô ga, kpa ka Aôndo je A yer nan ye er A yila Aron nahan vough." 
Hebrews5:5 Kape Kristu kpaa A civir iyol Na er Una hingir zegepristi ga la, kpa ka Un u A ôr kwagh a Na la, A kaa er: We, U ngu Wan Wam je, Mo M mar U nyian." 
Hebrews5:6 Kape A kaa ijiir igen kpaa la er: We U ngu pristi gbem sha won sha inja i Melkisedeki. 
Hebrews5:7 Sha ayange a Yesu lu ken mlu u or la yô, A eren mbamsen man uzamber sha imo i genger genger man shi a mliam ashe kpaa. A sôn Un u A fatyô u yiman Un ken ku la, man i ungwa Un kpaa sha ci u mcieaôndo Na la." 
Hebrews5:8 Shin er Un lu Wan nahan kpaa, A hen iko i wan sha atsan a A ya la." 
Hebrews5:9 Er A hingir vough yô, A hingir itine i myom u tsôron sha ci u mba ve ongo imo Na la cii." 
Hebrews5:10 Maa Aôndo yila Un er Zegepristi u sha inja i Melkisedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Sha kwagh ne yô, se mba a kwaghôron her kpishi, man a cimin u pasen kpaa gadia ne hingir mbaungwan tumbuluu." 
Hebrews5:12 Gadia shighe yô, kuma u ma ne lu mbatesen je, kpa i shi i gba ne u orgen nana or ne atôakaa a hiihii a sha akaaôron a Aôndo la, ne hingir mba kwagh a gbe ne u man atumba, kera ka kwaghyan u taver ga." 
Hebrews5:13 Gadia hanma or u nan me atumba yô, nan ngu a via sha kwaghôron u perapera ga gadia nan ngu wanikundan je." 
Hebrews5:14 Kpa kwaghyan u taver yô, ngu sha ci u mbaganden, ka ve mba ve er tom sha mkav u ken ishima la, hoghor ve u paven kwagh u dedoo a kwagh u bo." 
Hebrews6:1 Nahan yô, se de nen kwaghôron u hiihii u sha kwagh u Kristu la, se za nen hemen sha mlu u vian la, sé kera kimbir u wan imagh ki mgemshima u sha aeren a a lu kpenegh la ga, shin u nan Aôndo jighjigh," 
Hebrews6:2 shin ityesen sha kwagh u batisema, shin ave a pendan, shin mnder u mbakpenev, shin ijirôron i tsôron la kpaa ga." 
Hebrews6:3 Man ka kwagh u sé er je ne aluer Aôndo Una rumun yô. 
Hebrews6:4 Gadia ve mba kwagh a vande wanger ve man ve kav iwua i Sha, man ve lu a kwar sha Icighan Jijingi" 
Hebrews6:5 man ve kav mdoom ma mkaanem ma Aôndo kua agee a ayange a ken hemen la," 
Hebrews6:6 man vea mase gban kera yô, á fatyô u shi hiden a ve ken mgemshima ga, gadia sha kwagh ve ayol a ve yô, shi mba kimbir u manden Wan u Aôndo sha terankon, heen Un ken igbar." 
Hebrews6:7 Gadia inya i ura u nee sha mi acin imôngo, u nyer shimi dedoo, i menden akaa a a lu mba i lu shiren i sha ci ve la a inja yô, ngi zough a iveren i dedoo i Aôndo." 
Hebrews6:8 Kpa aluer ia mende usaa man ishishagh yô, ngi a inja ga, ngi ikua ikua a u wan i ifan. Mkur u ifan la yô, ka u nanden sha usu." 
Hebrews6:9 Kpa ne mba doon ishima, sha kwagh wen ne yô, se fa akaa a hemban doon, ka a zan ken myom je, shin er se kaa nahan kpaa." 
Hebrews6:10 Aôndo ban a perapera ga. Tom wen ua hungul Un ga, shin dooshima u ne tese sha ci u iti Na kpaa ga er ne lu eren uicighanmbaiorov tom shi ne mba eren her kpaa." 
Hebrews6:11 Sar se u hanmô wen nana̱ tese imbashima i veren tsung shon la u zan ken mfe u mimi u ishimaverenkeghen yase zan zan mkur je," 
Hebrews6:12 sha u iyol i̱ de kera kpeen ne ga, kpa ne̱ hingir mbakaven mba ve ya dyako u uityendezwa sha jighjigh u nan man sha ishima i wan kpaa." 
Hebrews6:13 Gadia zum u Aôndo tôndo zwa a Aberaham la yô, A kera lu a orgen u nan hembe Un u Una bum nan ga, nahan A bum sha iyol Na" 
Hebrews6:14 A kaa er: Mimi je, Me ver u doo doo, Me seer we kpishi je." 
Hebrews6:15 Er a wa ishima gbang, a maa a ngohol ityendezwa la." 
Hebrews6:16 Gadia ior ka ve bum sha kwagh u a hembe yô, man ken akpelanakaa a ve cii mbum ka a kure kwagh vough." 
Hebrews6:17 Ka nahan man Aôndo kpaa er i sar Un pe tesen mbayandyako u ityendezwa la, i̱ hemba wanger er awashima Na a lu kwagh u geman mayange ga yô, A nyôr a mbum sha mi," 
Hebrews6:18 sha u sha akaa ahar a a lu a geman ga, a Aôndo kpaa Una fatyô u eren aie sha mi ga ne, se mba se yevese ser, sé za war her a Na la, se̱ hemba lun a ishima i taver, sha u kôron ave sha ishimaverenkeghen i i lu se ken hemen la." 
Hebrews6:19 I yô, se mba a mi er imandetso i uma i dông i i tenger ga, i nyôr ken ijime i ikondo i yisan nahan." 
Hebrews6:20 Ka hen ape Orhemen wase Yesu kpaa A nyôr sha ci wase la, Un u A hingir Zegepristi sha inja i Melkisedeki gbem sha won." 
Hebrews7:1 Gadia Melkisedeki ne lu tor u Salem, lu pristi u Aôndo Uhembansha. A kohol Aberaham zum u a za hemba utor mbala, a lu hiden la, a ver un doo doo." 
Hebrews7:2 Aberaham kpaa kar kwar a na sha môm-ken-upue ken akaa cii. Aluer a pase inja i iti na yô, hiihii ka Tor u perapera, man shi ka Tor u Salem kpaa, inja na yô, ka Tor u bem." 
Hebrews7:3 Lu a ter ga, lu a ngô kpaa ga, lu a tsombor kpaa ga, lu a mhii u ayange ga shin mkur u uma kpaa ga, kpa a bee a bee Wan u Aôndo, ngu pristi gbem sha won." 
Hebrews7:4 Nenge er or ne a lu zegeor yum yô, Aberaham ter u tamen kpaa tsuwa môm-ken-upue ken ishar la na un." 
Hebrews7:5 Mba ken ônov mba Levi mba ve zough a tom u pristi la yô, tindi kaa er ve̱ ngohol môm-ken-upue hen nongoior la, ka hen anmgbianev vev je la, shin er ve lu mba ken tsombor u Aberaham nahan kpaa." 
Hebrews7:6 Kpa or ne u i ôr un tsombor ken ve ga yô, a ngohol môm-ken-upue hen Aberaham, man a ver un u a lu a uityendezwa la doo doo." 
Hebrews7:7 Ka or u nan lu tamen la je ka nan ver u kiriki dedoo ye, anyiman nga sha kwagh ne je ga." 
Hebrews7:8 Keen yô, ka ior mba vea va kpe man ve lu ngohol môm-ken-upue ye, kpa heera yô, ka u i er shiada sha a nan er nan ngu uma la." 
Hebrews7:9 Jim je yô, á fatyô u kaan er Levi u a ngohol môm-ken-upue la je kpaa a gema a na môm-ken-upue ken Aberaham," 
Hebrews7:10 gadia lu ken iyol i ter na heregh zum u Melkisedeki va kohol un yô. 
Hebrews7:11 Aluer tom u upristi mba Mbalevi la ua lu a mlu u vough yô,—man ka sha u man nongoior la zua a tindi ye,—ka nyi i gbe u pristi ugen u a lu sha inja i Melkisedeki, una mough u i ter un er ngu sha inja i Aron la ga laa?" 
Hebrews7:12 Gadia aluer mba geman tom u pristi yô, tindi kpaa una gema keng." 
Hebrews7:13 Gadia Un u i lu ôron kwagh Na ne yô, lu ken kwe ugen kposo man ken u yô, or môm ngu a er tom u sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la ga." 
Hebrews7:14 Gadia Ter wase due ken Yuda gbar gbar je, man sha kwe ngula yô, mayange Mose ter kwagh u upristi ga." 
Hebrews7:15 Man kwagh ne hemba wanger cii er Pristi ugen u A bee Melkisedeki A va mough yô," 
Hebrews7:16 u A hingir pristi, kera lu sha imo i tindi u sha tsombor u ken iyol la ga, kpa lu sha agee a uma u been ga la." 
Hebrews7:17 Gadia i er shiada sha a Na er: We, U ngu pristi gbem sha won sha inja i Melkisedeki." 
Hebrews7:18 Gadia vegher ugen yô, i sough tindi u tse la kera sha ci u a lu a agee ga, ngu a inja kpaa ga;" 
Hebrews7:19 tindi sôr ma kwagh hingir vough ga. Vegher ugen yô, i nyôr a ishimaverenkeghen i hemban doon ka sha i se kporom hen Aôndo la." 
Hebrews7:20 Man lu sha mbum ga ze; gadia mbala yô, ve hingir upristi, lu sha mbum ga," 
Hebrews7:21 kpa Un yô, lu sha mbum u Wen u A kaa a Na er: Ter bum, man Una kera vaa afanyô ga, We, U ngu pristi gbem sha won." 
Hebrews7:22 Ka nahan man Yesu A hingir ishuur u ikuryan i hemban doon kpaa ye. 
Hebrews7:23 Mbala yô, ve hingir upristi ve ngee iyenge, gadia ku yange ve u lun sha tom gbem." 
Hebrews7:24 Kpa Un yô, ngu lun gbem sha won, nahan ngu a tom u pristi la gbem, ua kera hire sha orgen ga." 
Hebrews7:25 Nahan yô, mba ve lu van hen Aôndo ve karen hen Na yô, Un fatyô u yiman ve been cii, gadia ngu lun uma gbem sha u Una er msen sha ci ve yô." 
Hebrews7:26 Gadia ka imbazegepristi ne i kom se ye; ka u wang, u lun a ibo ga, shin acôghol a wan iyol kpaa ga, u a lu paleghaa a mbaasorabo, man u i kende Un sha A kar Usha cii." 
Hebrews7:27 Un yô, kera gba Un u vanden van a nagh sha ci u asorabo a Na iyol Na use use man masen van a mi sha ci u nongoior la er uzegembaupristi mbala nahan ga. Gadia A er nahan kwa môm vough zum u A na nagh sha iyol Na la." 
Hebrews7:28 Gadia tindi yô, ver ior mba ve lu isheer ve̱ lu uzegembaupristi, kpa kwaghôron u sha mbum u a va ken masejime u tindi la yô, a ver Wan u A lu vough gbem sha won." 
Hebrews8:1 Tamenkwagh u ken akaa a se lu ôron ne yô, ka ngun. Se mba a inja zegepristi ne u A za tema sha uwegh ku yanegh ku ikônough ki torough ki Icivirigh Sha." 
Hebrews8:2 Ngu eren tom ken icighanjiir ken tabernakel u mimi la, u Ter A ver un, i kera lu or ga la." 
Hebrews8:3 Gadia hanma zegepristi yô, ka i ver un u va nan uiwua kua iniav. Nahan yô, lu u Ngun kpaa Una lu a kwagh u nan nagh a mi keng je." 
Hebrews8:4 Aluer Una lu shin tar yô, mayange ma A lu pristi ga, gadia mbavan a uiwua va nan nagh a mi sha tindi vande mban je." 
Hebrews8:5 Ve yô, ka hen eev man mure u akaa a Sha man ve lu eren tom ye. Kape Mose kpaa er i kuma u una tim tabernakel la yô, Aôndo wa un kwagh, A kaa er: Nenge sha u ú er hanma kwagh sha inja i ikav i i tese u sha uwo la nahan vough." 
Hebrews8:6 Kpa hegen yô, Kristu ngohol tom u hemban doon di er A lu Orhimen u ikuryan i hemban doon kpaa, gadia i ya i sha uityendezwa mba ve hembe doon yô." 
Hebrews8:7 Gadia ikuryan i hiihii la aluer kwagh una shi sha mi ga yô, ma i ker ian sha ci u i sha uhar ga." 
Hebrews8:8 Gadia kwagh shi Aôndo a ve er A kaa er: Nenge nen, ayange nga van, kape Ter A kaa ne, a Me ya ikuryan i he a ya u Iserael kua ya u Yuda kpaa;" 
Hebrews8:9 kpa ia kera lu sha inja i ikuryan i M ya a uter vev sha iyange i M kôr ve uwegh u duen a ve ken tar u Igipiti la ga. Gadia ve kera lu ken ikuryan Yam la vough ga nahan Mo kpaa, M kera wa ve iko ga, kape Ter kaa la." 
Hebrews8:10 Gadia ka ikuryan Yam i Me ya a ya u Iserael je ne, er ayange a ngara aa kar kera yô, kape Ter A kaa la. Me ver atindiakaa Am ken mhen ve shi ka ken asema a ve kpaa Me nger a ye. Me lu Aôndo ve ve di kpaa vea lu nongoior Wam." 
Hebrews8:11 Man hanma or nana kera tese or hen tar u nan la, shin anmgbian u nan kpaa er: Fa Ter, ga: gadia ve cii vea fam á hii sha u kiriki zan zan ar sha u vesen." 
Hebrews8:12 Gadia Me zungwe mhôônom sha afer a ve, asorabo a ve la kpaa Me kera umbur a je ga." 
Hebrews8:13 Er a lu ôron kwagh u ikuryan i he yô, A gema i hiihii la hingir kwagh u tse je ve. Kwagh u a ye tsegh a bee iyol yô, mgbôghom a mtim je ve." 
Hebrews9:1 Ikuryan i hiihii la kpaa lu a atindi a sha tom u civir Aôndo la, man shi lu a icighanjiir u shin tar kpaa." 
Hebrews9:2 Gadia i sôr tabernakel u sha hunda hunda la, i yila un er Icighanjiir. Daarimenger lu ker, man shi tebul a ubredi mba sha ishi." 
Hebrews9:3 Ken ijime i ikondo i yisan i sha uhar la yô tabernakel lu; i yilan un er icighankpar u hemban cii," 
Hebrews9:4 lu a atse a zenaria a nanden kwaghhumandoon sha mi man shi areki u ikuryan, i cir un zenaria iyol cii. Ityegh ki sha zenaria ki ki lu a mana shimi lu ker, kua gbough ku Aron ku ku kpar la man shi ikpande i awen i ikuryan kpaa." 
Hebrews9:5 Kughur na yô ucerubi mba iengem lu sha mi. Ve gba mure sha ijiir i nan iwom la. A fatyô u ôron kwagh sha akaa ne vighe vighe hegen ga. 
Hebrews9:6 Er i sôr akaa angan bee yô, upristi mba ve eren tom u civir Aôndo la ve nyôron kpar u sha hunda hunda la gbem." 
Hebrews9:7 Kpa u sha uhar la yô, ka zegepristi tseegh a nyer ker ye, ken hanma inyom kwa môm. Kpa a ban a awambe ga a ka a za na nagh a mi sha ci na iyol na man sha ci u asorabo a nongoior la, a ve er abu la." 
Hebrews9:8 Sha kwagh ne yô, Icighan Jijingi lu tesen er i lu a bugh gbenda u nyôron ken icighanjiir ga er tabernakel u sha hunda hunda la a hira lu her yô." 
Hebrews9:9 Kwagh ne lu tesen ikav sha shighe ne, ve lu van a uiwua man iniav mbi ve fetyô u geman imo i ken ishima i or u civir Aôndo la hingir vough ga yô." 
Hebrews9:10 Akaa ne yô, lu di sha kwagh u akaayan tsô man akaaman man iyol i ôôn sha igbenda kposo kposo, ka atindi a sha iyol tsô a i we a zan zan shighe u sôron akaa una kar kuman." 
Hebrews9:11 Kpa Kristu yô, va due ken igbar, lu zegepristi sha akaa a dedoo a a vande van la, A nyôr ken tabernakel u hemban vesen man u hemban lun vough u i er sha ave a ior ga, inja na yô, ka kwagh u igbetar ne ga," 
Hebrews9:12 lu sha awambe a ivo man anibuav kpaa ga, kpa lu sha awambe Na iyol Na. A nyôr ken icighanjiir kwa môm vough, A zua a mpaa u tsôron." 
Hebrews9:13 Gadia aluer awambe a ivo man anomabua man mtwem ma tulebua ma i mishi ma sha mba ve lu wang ga la, tsegha ve sha u ayol a̱ hingir wang yô," 
Hebrews9:14 man hira awambe a Kristu, Un u A na Aôndo nagh ku lun a ihogholough mape ga, sha iyol Na sha Jijingi u tsôron, aa kera wanger imo i ken asema a en sha aeren a a lu kpenegh la, sha u eren Aôndo u uma tom ga yee?" 
Hebrews9:15 Ka sha kwagh ne A lu Orhimen u ikuryan i he ye, sha er mba i yer ve yô, ma ve zough a dyako u tsôron u i tende zwa la gadia A kpe ku sha u paan atindi a peren a ken ikuryan i tse la." 
Hebrews9:16 Gadia her ape iceghzwa i sha dyako u karen i lu yô, ka u i̱ vande yôôn ku u or u tseghan zwa la keng." 
Hebrews9:17 Man iceghzwa i sha dyako u karen yô, ka shighe u ku u gbe la man i lu a inja ye, ngi a inja zum u or u tseghan zwa la nan lu uma her la ga." 
Hebrews9:18 Ka nahan man i ver ikuryan i hiihii la kpaa, awambe a ban sha mi ga ye." 
Hebrews9:19 Gadia Mose yee hanma tindi u ken atindiakaa hen nongoior la cii been yô, a tôô awambe a anibuav man ivo kua mngerem man ul u nyian man hisop, a mishi sha ruamabera kua sha nongoior la cii." 
Hebrews9:20 A kaa er: Angan ka awambe a ikuryan i Aôndo A ne ne je ne. 
Hebrews9:21 Kape shi a mishi awambe la sha tabernakel kua ikav mbi tomov cii je la. 
Hebrews9:22 Sha tindi yô, shi kpuaa tsô akaa cii ma i wanger a sha awambe, man aluer á haa awambe ga yô mde u akaabo kpaa una lu ga." 
Hebrews9:23 Nahan yô lu keng u á wanger ieev mbi akaa a Sha sha iniav mbila kpa akaa a sha jim jim yô, ka sha iniav mbi hemban doon a mbila, man á wanger a ye." 
Hebrews9:24 Gadia Kristu kera nyôr ken icighanjiir u i er sha ave a ior ga, u a lu eev mbu u mimi la kpaa ga, kpa lu Sha jim jim, sha u Una ande sha ishigh ki Aôndo sha ci wase," 
Hebrews9:25 kera lu sha u Una na nagh sha iyol Na acin imôngo er zegepristi ka a nyôron ken icighanjiir hanma inyom a awambe a a lu a na ga la nahan ga. 
Hebrews9:26 Luun nahan yô, ma A ye ican acin imôngo hii sha igbetar je. Kpa hegen yô, A ande kwa môm sha mkur u ashighe sha u Una tôô asorabo kera sha nagh ku sha iyol Na la." 
Hebrews9:27 Er i ver ior u kpen kwa môm man á mase ôron ijir yô," 
Hebrews9:28 kape Kristu kpaa i na nagh sha a Na kwa môm sha u tôôn asorabo a ior kpishi kera, u sha kwa har yô Una ande, á lu sha kwagh u isholibo ga, kpa á lu sha u yiman mba ve lu keghen Un yô." 
Hebrews10:1 Gadia tindi hira ngu di a mure u akaa a doon a a lu van la tsô, kera ka eev mbu akaa la jim ga. Mayange una fatyô u geman mba ve kporom la vea hingir vough sha iniav mbi shonov i môm i môm mbi i lu van a mi gbem la ga." 
Hebrews10:2 A lu nahan ga yô, ma i mem u van a mbi gaa? Mba ve lu civir Aôndo la kpaa, aluer i wanger ve kwa môm kera yô, ma ve kera lu kaven asorabo a ve heregh ga." 
Hebrews10:3 Kpa ken iniav mbila yô i lu umbur asorabo sha anyom anyom. 
Hebrews10:4 Gadia awambe a anomabua man ivo aa fatyô u tôôn asorabo kera je ga. 
Hebrews10:5 Ka nahan man Kristu er A va nyôr shin tar yô, A kaa er: Nagh ku sôngon man ku nan sar U ga, kpa ka iyol je U serem ye." 
Hebrews10:6 Iniav mbi nanden jimin man mbi sha ci u asorabo yô, saan We iyol a mbi ga." 
Hebrews10:7 Tsô M kaa mer: Nenge, M va,—ken ihurenruamabera i nger kwagh Wam ne,—ka sha u eren ishima You, Aôndo." 
Hebrews10:8 A vande kaan er: Iniav mbi sôngon man mbi nan kua mbi nanden jimin man shi mbi sha ci u asorabo la sar U ga, saan We iyol a mbi kpaa ga, shin er i lu nan mbi sha tindi nahan kpaa." 
Hebrews10:9 A shi A kaa er: Nenge, M va, ka sha u eren ishima You. A bunde kwagh u hiihii sha u Una ver u sha uhar la." 
Hebrews10:10 Ka sha awashima ne man i tsegh se kwa môm bee, sha nagh ku i ne sha iyol i Yesu la ye." 
Hebrews10:11 Hanma pristi ka a tile use use u eren tom na man shi u va nan iniav mbi shonov i môm i môm mbila hanma shighe, mbi mbia fatyô u tôôn asorabo kera mayange ga." 
Hebrews10:12 Kpa Un yô, A va na nagh môm tseegh sha ci u asorabo, maa A za tema sha uwegh ku yanegh ku Aôndo gbem." 
Hebrews10:13 Ngu masen keghen zan zan á va gema mbaihomov Nav vea hingir Un kwagh u pendan angahar a Na sha mi. 
Hebrews10:14 Gadia ka sha nagh môm je A gema mba i lu tseghan ve la, ve hingir vough gbem ye." 
Hebrews10:15 Icighan Jijingi kpaa ngu eren shiada hen vese. Ken masejime u A kaa er: 
Hebrews10:16 Ngin ka ikuryan i Me ya a ve ne er ayange ne aa bee yô, Ter shi kaa er: Me na atindi a Am ken asema a ve man ka ken mbamhen vev je Me nger a ye." 
Hebrews10:17 Man asorabo a ve kua mvende u ve venda atindi la yô, Me kera umbur a je ga." 
Hebrews10:18 Yô, ape mde u asorabo angan a lu yô, kwagh kera gba a nagh ku nan sha ci u asorabo ga." 
Hebrews10:19 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, se mba vangertiôr u nyôron ken icighanjiir, ka sha awambe a Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 sha gbenda u he man u uma u A bugh se la, ka u karen ken ikondo i yisan, inja na yô, ka iyol Na je la." 
Hebrews10:21 Shi se mba a Pristi u tamen u A lu sha ya u Aôndo cii kpaa. 
Hebrews10:22 Nahan yô, se kporom nen a ishima i mimi, man a jighjigh u nan u lun a akpelan je ga er i mishi asema ase, i wanger imo i bo i ken ishima la kera, shi i ôô ayol a ase sha mngerem ma wang kpaa yô." 
Hebrews10:23 Se kôr nen ave gbang sha mpase u ishimaverenkeghen yase, i̱ de tenger ga, gadia Un u A tende zwa a vese la yô ka u jighjigh je." 
Hebrews10:24 Sé wa nen ayol a ase iko, sé taver nen ayol a ase asema u lun a dooshima man aeren a dedoo." 
Hebrews10:25 Se̱ de bundu nen mbamkohol asev mba aduaav er mbagenev ve eren nahan la ga, kpa sé taver nen asema ayol a ase, i̱ seer eren nahan er ne nenge iyange la i lu mgbôghom yô." 
Hebrews10:26 Aluer se mba eren asorabo sha apera zum u se ngohol mfe u mimi la kera yô, ma nagh sha ci u asorabo kera ku ga," 
Hebrews10:27 kpa kwagh u i lu masen keghen yô cier iyol, ka ijirôron kua igyamusu i ia hia mbahendan mbala kera yô." 
Hebrews10:28 Aluer or nana per tindi u Mose sha apera yô, ka nan kpe sha shiada u ior uhar shin utar, mhôônom ma zungwen ma kera lu ga." 
Hebrews10:29 Ne mba nengen nana? Or u nan ndyar Wan u Aôndo shin angahar a nan shi nan nenge er awambe a ikuryan a i tsegh nan sha mi la ka kwagh u hôngorough man shi nan laha Jijingi u mhôôn la yô, mtsaha u nan una kpen vihin nan sha wonoo?" 
Hebrews10:30 Gadia se fa Un u A kaa er: Ka Mo je iyev i oron i lu i Yam ye, ka Mo Me na injar ye, man shi: Ter Una ôr nongoior Na ijir je." 
Hebrews10:31 U gban sha ikev i Aôndo u uma yô, ka kwagh u cier iyol je." 
Hebrews10:32 Umbur nen ayange a karen la zum u kwagh va wanger ne la, ne nôngo ngegh sha atsan a a tser ne la." 
Hebrews10:33 Shighe ugen yô, i hee ne, i er ne ican ken igbar, shighe ugen ne nyôr nongo a mba i lu eren a ve nahan la." 
Hebrews10:34 Gadia mbakwarev kpaa, mhôônom kôr ne a ve; zum u i ya ne ishar kpaa, vihi ne ga ne lu saan saan je gadia ne ayol a en kpaa ne fa er ne lu a kwagh u hembandoon man u lun gbem yô." 
Hebrews10:35 Nahan yô, de te nen vangertiôr wen kera ga gadia ngu a injar i vesen." 
Hebrews10:36 Gadia gba u né lu a ishima i taver sha u eren ishima i Aôndo man né ngohol kwagh u i tende zwa a ven la. 
Hebrews10:37 Gadia: Shi côhin tseegh man Un u A lu van la Una va, ngôôr Na je ga." 
Hebrews10:38 Kpa or u perapera Wam nana lu uma sha jighjigh u nan, man aluer nana hide ijime yô, á kera saan uma Wam iyol a nan ga." 
Hebrews10:39 Kpa se yô, se mba mbahirenjime sha u za saan ishe ga, kpa se mba mbananjighjigh sha er uma una war yô." 
Hebrews11:1 Jighjigh u nan yô, ka u fan kwagh u ishimaverenkeghen yase i lu sha mi la dedoo a akpelan a tan ga, ka ikav i akaa a i nengen a mi ga la." 
Hebrews11:2 Gadia ka sha kwagh u jighjigh u nan man i er mbayiase shiada u dedoo ye. 
Hebrews11:3 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man se kav er i gbe tar cii sha mkaanem ma Aôndo ye, nahan akaa a i nengen a mi la kpaa, i er a sha akaa a i nengen a mi ga yô." 
Hebrews11:4 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Abel na Aôndo nagh ku hemban doon a ku Kain ye. Ka sha mi kpaa man i er un shiada er a lu or u perapera ye, Aôndo kpaa er shiada u dedoo sha uiwua nav mbala. A kpe, kpa sha jighjigh na u nan la yô, shi ngu ôron kwagh her." 
Hebrews11:5 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man i yem a Heno Sha ye nahan a kera nenge a ku ashe ga, man i kera zua a na ga, gadia Aôndo yem a na. Gadia er i lu a yem a na ga je tsô i er shiada sha a na er a doo Aôndo ishima." 
Hebrews11:6 Á fatyô u doon Aôndo ishima ga, saa sha jighjigh u nan. Gadia or u nan kporom hen Aôndo yô, ka u nana na jighjigh keng er ngu, man shi Un ne mba ve lu keren Un la injar." 
Hebrews11:7 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Noa kpaa, zum u Aôndo wa un kwagh sha akaa a i lu a nenge a mi ga la yô, a wa iko a gba tso sha u yiman ya na. Ka sha jighjigh u nan ne kpaa man a na tar ibo ye shi a hingir or u yan dyako u perapera u a lu sha jighjigh u nan la." 
Hebrews11:8 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Aberaham zum u i yila un yô, a wa iko a due a gba yemen hen ijiir i una va ya dyako sha mi la, a due kpa a fa ape a lu zan je ga." 
Hebrews11:9 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man a za tema ken tar u ityendezwa la ye, er ka tar na ga nahan a tsaan ken utenti vea Isaka man Yakob mba ve lu mbayandyako imôngo sha dyako shon la môm môm je." 
Hebrews11:10 Gadia a lu keghen gar u a lu a imagh, u Aôndo A lu Orkaren man Ormaan un la." 
Hebrews11:11 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Sara iyol na kpaa a ngohol agee a jilen iyol ye, shin er shighe na kar nahan je kpaa, gadia a fa ken ishima er Un u A tende zwa la A lu u jighjigh yô." 
Hebrews11:12 Nahan yô or môm u a lu je er ka orkpen nahan la a mar ônov ngee er asan a sha kwavaôndo nahan man er waarawa u hen kpezegemnger nahan, gande u ôron." 
Hebrews11:13 Ka ken jighjigh u nan man mban cii ve kpe ye, ve lu a ngohol uityendezwa ga, kpa ve nenge a ve ken ica, ve ember ve, ve pase gbar gbar er ve lu mbavannya man ushirmbaiorov shin tar yô." 
Hebrews11:14 Gadia ve mba ve ôr anza akaa ne yô mba tesen er mba keren tar ve," 
Hebrews11:15 gadia aluer vea lu umbur tar ve, u ve undu la yô, ma ve lu a ian i hiden je." 
Hebrews11:16 Kpa hegen yô, ka u u hembe doon la u sar ve ye, inja na yô, ka u Sha je la. Ka nahan man Aôndo kpaa kunya u ker Un u i̱ yila Un er Aôndo ve ga ye, gadia A sôr ve gar." 
Hebrews11:17 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man zum u i kar Aberaham yô, a na nagh sha Isaka ye, man un u a ngohol uityendezwa la yô, a na nagh sha wan na u môm môm la." 
Hebrews11:18 Ka un u i kaa a na er: Ka sha Isaka man á ii tsombor wou iti ye. 
Hebrews11:19 A fa ken ishima er Aôndo ngu a agee a nderen un shin mbakpenev je kpaa; ka shimi je man a shi a zua a na er ka ikav i tesen nahan kpaa ye. 
Hebrews11:20 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Isaka ver Yakob kua Isou doo doo sha akaa a a lu van ken hemen la ye. 
Hebrews11:21 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Yakob zum u a lu nôngon ku la yô, a ver hanma wan u Yosev doo doo man a ngurum sha ityough ki gboough a er msen ye." 
Hebrews11:22 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Yosev zum u uma na a bee yô, a ter mdugh a ônov mba Iserael vea va due la man a wa ve kwagh sha akuhe a na kpaa ye." 
Hebrews11:23 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Mose zum u i mar un la, mbamaren un yer un kuma iwer itiar ye, gadia ve nenge er wan la doo ashe yô, tindi u tor kpaa ve kera cia ga." 
Hebrews11:24 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Mose er a vese a kera rumun u i̱ yila un er wan u Wanfarao ga ye. 
Hebrews11:25 Lu un guda u i̱ er a na dang a nongoior u Aôndo imôngo a u una lu ken mdoom ma isholibo ma ma lu sha anyangem kpeghee la. 
Hebrews11:26 A nenge iheen i Kristu hemba lun un a inja a akaa a injaagh a Igipiti cii, gadia a ver ashe sha injar." 
Hebrews11:27 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man a undu Igipiti ye, iyugh i tor kpaa, a kera cia ga, gadia a taver ishima er ngu nengen a u i nengen a Na ga la nahan." 
Hebrews11:28 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man a ver Paseka kua awambe a mishin la ye, sha u ortimin ônov mba iundav la a̱ de benden ve ave ga yô." 
Hebrews11:29 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man ve per Zegemnger u Nyian er ka tareghnyaagh nahan ye, kpa Mbaigipiti mba nenge u ve kpaa vea er nahan yô, ve saa mnger." 
Hebrews11:30 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man zum u i ningir ugilmbaagarev mba Yeriko ayange ataankarahar yô, ve gba ye." 
Hebrews11:31 Ka sha jighjigh u nan man Rahabi agbagakwase la tim a mbahembanato imôngo ga ye, gadia a nyôr a mbamkerev mbala bem bem." 
Hebrews11:32 Tsô me shi me kaa nana? Ian ia va yinam u me ôr kwagh u mba Gidion man Baraki man Samson man Yefeta man Davidi kua Samuel man uprofeti kpaa. 
Hebrews11:33 Mban yô, ve hemba ityartor ityav sha jighjigh u nan, ve er perapera, ve ngohol uityendezwa, ve cir ubegha ijô," 
Hebrews11:34 ve pir usu agee a u, ve war akur a sanker, i taver ve agee ken isheer, ve hingir mbataveryol ken utya, ve zenda akumautya a akuraior agen, yevese." 
Hebrews11:35 Kasev ngohol mbakpenev vev sha mnder u shin ku. Mbagenev yô, i er ve ican sha apera, ve kera rumun u waren ga, sha u ma ve zough a mnder u hemban doon." 
Hebrews11:36 Mbagenev yô, i kar ve sha aheen man akpa u gbidyen, shi i seer ahye man gaadi sha mi kpaa." 
Hebrews11:37 I ta ve awen, i mee ve, i tôndo ve atôôn ahar sha jerto, i wua ve sha sanker, ve zenden ve cir akôv a iyôngo man a ivo iyol, ibanave kohol ve, ican kpaa i tser ve, i er a ve dang dang je—" 
Hebrews11:38 Ve yô, tar kuma sha ve kpaa ga—ve zenden ken taaikôngo man sha iwo man ken ubar kua ken avur." 
Hebrews11:39 Mban cii ka sha jighjigh u nan man lu i er ve shiada u dedoo ye, nahan kpaa ve lu a ngohol kwagh u i tende zwa sha mi la ga," 
Hebrews11:40 gadia Aôndo vande veren kwagh u hemban doon sha ci wase, sha er vea gba hingir vough ga saa se kpaa sé lu a ve imôngo." 
Hebrews12:1 Nahan yô, se kpaa er ikpela i mbashiada i vesen ve kase se yô, sé shir nen hanma ikav kua isholibo i ka i tseren se abur abur la, sé gba nen ayem sha ishima i taver tsung sha gesa u ayemegh u i ver se sha ishi la." 
Hebrews12:2 Sé veren nen ashe sha Yesu Orhemen man Orkuren u jighjigh wase u nan, Un u A taver ishima a terankon, a kera wa kunya iko ga sha ci u iember i i ver Un sha ishi la, A za tema sha uwegh ku yanegh ku ikônough ki Aôndo ki torough." 
Hebrews12:3 Ver nen ishima sha Un u A taver ishima sha imbaanyiman i mbaasorabo sha iyol Na la, sha u uma wen u ken ishima la a̱ de kera vôron ga, ishima kpaa, i̱ de yen ne ga." 
Hebrews12:4 Er ne lu nôngon ityav a isholibo yô, ne mba a hendan a i, i ar ken ku ga." 
Hebrews12:5 Shi kwaghwan hungul ne u i we ne er ka ônov nahan la er: Wan Wam, de lahan mkôôm u Ter ga, ishima i̱ de kera yinan we zum u A lu tsahan we la ga." 
Hebrews12:6 Gadia or u nan doo Ter ishima yô, ka nan man A kôôm nan ye, man shi gbidi hanma wan u A rumun nan yô." 
Hebrews12:7 Taver nen ishima sha mkôôm u i lu kôôm ne la. Aôndo ngu eren a ven er ka ônov nahan, gadia ka hanma wan man Ter A de kôôm nana?" 
Hebrews12:8 Aluer mba kôôm ne er mbagenev ve nyer sha mi cii nahan ga yô, ka umaramôndo ne lu ye kera ka ônov jim ga." 
Hebrews12:9 Kwagh ugen yô, se lu a uter asev mba ken iyol, ve lu kôôm se, se lu ungwan imo ve man hire Ter u ujijingi la, se kera hemba ungwan imo Na man se lu uma ye gaa?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ve yô, ve lu kôôm se sha anyangem kpeghee er ve nenge i doo yô, kpa Un yô, ka sha u ma i kpe se iyol sha u ma se lu a kwar sha mtsegh Na." 
Hebrews12:11 Hanma mkôôm yô, sha shighe la ka i bee er ka kwagh u iember ga, kpa i lu kwagh u ijungwen, kpa ken masejime yô, ka a ume atam a perapera bem bem sha ci u mba i tsaase ve a tsaase sha mi la i var ve yô." 
Hebrews12:12 Nahan yô, taver nen ave a a shir la kua anu a a kpe la kpaa." 
Hebrews12:13 Dugh nen ihyange i nôô sha ci u angahar a en sha u kwagh u a keer la yô, a̱ de ndivir ga, kpa guda yô, a̱ hingir dedoo." 
Hebrews12:14 Nôngo nen ngegh u lun bem a ior cii shi nôngo nen sha u lun a icighanmlu kpaa, u ma or u nana ban a mi yô, nana nenge a ter ga la." 
Hebrews12:15 Shi kura nen sha er mhôônom ma Aôndo ma de bundu ma or ga yô, ma mise u yuan kpaa u̱ de menden u̱ ne anzughul man ior kpishi ve̱ zua a hôngor sha mi ga." 
Hebrews12:16 Ma or nana̱ de luun or u idya shin dangor er Isou u a tee tamen na sha ankwaghyan ityô i môm tseegh nahan la ga. 
Hebrews12:17 Gadia ne fa zum u i mase saren un pe yan dyako sha iveren i dedoo yô, i venda un gadia a kera zua a ian i geman ishima ga shin er a ker i ngegh, a mliam ashe je kpaa." 
Hebrews12:18 Gadia ne kera mgbôghom a kwagh u i fetyô u benden un ave la ga, man a usu u yeghen, man ime, man dimii, man ijeverahumbe," 
Hebrews12:19 man ikpamkor i kaan, man imo i ôron kwagh i mba ve ungwa i yô, ve zamber er i̱ de kera shi seer ôron ve kwagh ga la kpaa ga." 
Hebrews12:20 Gadia ve kera fatyô u taver ishima a icin i i ta ve la ga, er: Aluer ma zendenya tsô kpaa una bende sha uwo la yô, a ta un awen." 
Hebrews12:21 Ivandeikaa la cier iyol je Mose kpaa kaa er, cier mo iyol yum, ikarikase gbidyem iyol." 
Hebrews12:22 Kpa ne mgbôghom a uwo u Shion man hen gar u Aôndo u uma, ka Yerusalem u Sha je la man ikpela i mbatyomov mba Shaav ngee gande u ôron, mba ve lu eren iniongo," 
Hebrews12:23 man mkohol u mbaiundav mba i nger ve ati Sha, man Aôndo, Orjir u akaa cii, man ujijingi mba mbaperapera mba i gema ve ve hingir vough la," 
Hebrews12:24 man shi Yesu, Orhimen u ikuryan i he, man awambe a mishin a a hembe ôron kwagh u doon a a Abel la." 
Hebrews12:25 Ver nen ishima, de vende nen Un u A lu ôron kwagh la ga. Gadia aluer mbala mba ve vende Un zum u A wa ve kwagh shin tar la ve war ga yô, man hire se mba se vende Un hegen er A lu ôron kwagh a vese Sha yee?" 
Hebrews12:26 Sha shighe la imo Na tenger tar, kpa hegen yô, a tôndo zwa er: I shi kwa môm u Me tenger á kera lu tar tseegh ga, á kua Usha kpaa." 
Hebrews12:27 U kaan er, “shi kwa môm” yô, tese sha mkar u á va kar a akaa a a fetyô u tenger la kera, ka akaa a i gbe a je la, sha u akaa a a fetyô u tenger ga la yô, a̱ lu her." 
Hebrews12:28 Nahan yô, se ember nen er se ngohol tartor u u lu u tenger ga yô, ka nahan man sé er Aôndo tom u u doo Un ye, sha mcieaôndo man iyol i sulen." 
Hebrews12:29 Gadia Aôndo wase ka usu u hian kwagh kera. 
Hebrews13:1 Dooshima u anmgbianev ve doo ayol a ve la a̱ lu her. 
Hebrews13:2 De hundu nen ishima u eren dedoo a mbavannya ga gadia ka sha u eren nahan man mbagenev nyôr a mbatyomov mba Shaav ken ya ve abu ye. 
Hebrews13:3 Umbur nen mbakwarev, er ne kpaa ne mba mbakwarev a ve imôngo nahan, shi umbur nen mba i lu eren a ve dang dang la, gadia ne kpaa ne mba a iyol." 
Hebrews13:4 Ivaa i̱ lu kwagh u icivirigh hen ior cii, gambe u ivaagh kpaa a̱ de lu a acôghol ga, gadia Aôndo Una ôr mbaerenijimba man mbavihin ivaa sha idya la ijir." 
Hebrews13:5 Inyaregh ki saren ki̱ de luun ken uma wen ga. Kwagh u ne lu a mi yô, a̱ kuma ne, gadia A kaa er: Mayange Me undu u ga, Me kende u kpaa ga." 
Hebrews13:6 Nahan yô, se fatyô u kaan vangertiôr ser: Ter ka Orwasen mo, me kera cia ga, ka nyi je or á ereme?" 
Hebrews13:7 Umbur nen mbahemenev enev, ve mba ve ôr ne mkaanem ma Aôndo, ver nen ishima sha mkur u zende ve man shi kav nen jighjigh ve u nan kpaa." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristu ngu inja i môm tsô, nyen kua nyian zan zan gbem sha won." 
Hebrews13:9 I̱ de kera daase a ven sha atesen a he anza kposo kposo ga, gadia u taver ishima sha mrumun u sha mhôôn yô, hemba doon a akaa a yan a ya a, mba ve za sha mi la, ve kera zua a iwasen sha mi ga." 
Hebrews13:10 Se mba a atse a nanden nagh sha mi a mba eren tom sha tabernakel la, ve lu a ian i yan kwagh sha mi ga yô." 
Hebrews13:11 Gadia ilev mbi zegepristi a lu nyôron a awambe a mbi ken icighanjiir sha u nan nagh sha ci u asorabo yô, agundu a mbi yô, i nanden a kera ken akôngo a afoogh." 
Hebrews13:12 Ka nahan man Yesu kpaa, a kpe hen hundagar ken won ye, ka sha ci u Una tsegha nongoior sha awambe a Na iyol Na yô." 
Hebrews13:13 Nahan se kpaa se due nen se za kohol Un ken akôngo a afoogh, iheen Na la kpaa se tôô nen i." 
Hebrews13:14 Gadia se mba a ma gar u tsôron heen je ga, kpa se mba keren u a lu van la." 
Hebrews13:15 Nahan se naan nen Aôndo nagh ku iwuese gbem sha a Na, ka atam a ityumbujôôgh i pasen iti Na ken igbar je la." 
Hebrews13:16 Kpa u eren dedoo man shi u panden karen ior a̱ de hungul ne ga gadia anza a iniav mbin ne doo Aôndo. 
Hebrews13:17 Ungwan nen imo i mbahemenev enev, hide nen a ayol a en ijime hen ve gadia mba kuran uuma enev er ka ior mba vea za pase kwagh u ve er la keng nahan. Ve̱ er nahan saan saan i̱ de lu sha ishima i vihin ga, gayô, á lu ne a inja ga." 
Hebrews13:18 Eren nen msen sha ci wase, gadia se fa dedoo ser, se mba a imo i dedoo ken ishima, sar se u zenden tsembelee sha akaa cii." 
Hebrews13:19 M ngu hemban taver ne ishima u eren nahan, sha u ma i hembe hiren a mo fefa her a ven." 
Hebrews13:20 Aôndo u bem u A nder Ter wase Yesu Orkuranilev u tamen shin mbakpenev sha awambe a ikuryan i tsôron," 
Hebrews13:21 A̱ na ne sha u né lu vough sha hanma kwagh u doon cii sha u eren ishima Na, gadia ngu eren kwagh u a doo Un la ken a vese sha Yesu Kristu u A lu a icivir gbem sha won yô. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Anmgbianev, m ngu wan ne kwagh mer, wa nen iko sha kwaghôron u taver ne asema ne gadia m nger ne tiônôô tsô." 
Hebrews13:23 Fa nen, i pase anmgbian wase Timoteu, i tuhwa. Aluer una va fefa yô, mo sea na sé zua ishigh a ven." 
Hebrews13:24 Sugh nen mbahemenev enev cii kua uicighanmbaiorov cii kpaa, nam nen. Mba ve lu Mbaitalia la mba sughun ne." 
Hebrews13:25 Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven cii. 
James1:1 Yakobu, kpan u Aôndo man u Ter Yesu Kristu ngu sughun ikwe i pue kar ihiar i i sambe la." 
James1:2 Anmgbianev av, i̱ lu ne kwagh u iember tseegh shighe u ameen atô kposo kposo aa va tser ne yô," 
James1:3 gadia ne fa, mkar u i lu karen jighjigh wen u nan la ka a na ishima i taver." 
James1:4 Ishima i taver yô, i̱ kure tom u i vough sha u né lu vough man jimin, né kera yina sha kwagh môm môm ga yô." 
James1:5 Aluer kwaghfan una yina mô wen yô, nana̱ sôn Aôndo u ka A na ior cii wuee, A kera kôhôn ashe ga la, tsô á na nan di je." 
James1:6 Kpa nana̱ sôn sha jighjigh u nan, nana̱ de te akpelan sha ma kwagh ga, gadia or u tan akpelan yô, nan bee igôndomnger i ahumbe a mough a mi a yemen a mi yô." 
James1:7 Imbaor la yô, nana̱ de kera henen er nana zua a ma kwagh hen Ter ga," 
James1:8 ka or u asema ahar, nan ngu ta ta ta sha igbenda i nan cii." 
James1:9 Anmgbian u lun a icivir ga yô, nana̱ ta ihagh sha indi i nan," 
James1:10 u nan lu ornyar yô, nana̱ ta ihagh sha mlu u nan u icivirigh ga la gadia nana va kar kera er ikparentoho nahan." 
James1:11 Gadia iyange ka i due i tsee, toho u use, ikparen u u kpaa a ndoor, mdoom ma mluashe na la kpaa ka ma kar kera. Kape ornyar nana use kua ityom i nan eren la cii kpaa." 
James1:12 Or u nan taver ishima ken imeen yô, saan nan iyol, gadia zum u nana kar ikaren i i lu karen nan la yô, nana ngohol tsar u uma u A tende zwa sha mi a mba A doo ve ishima yô." 
James1:13 Aluer á va mee ma or yô, nana̱ de kera kaan er ka Aôndo A meem ga, gadia á fatyô u meen Aôndo sha kwagh u ifer ga, man Un yô meen ma or ga." 
James1:14 Kpa hanma or ka i mee nan zum u asaren a nan iyol i nan ka a urugh nan a hôn nan la. 
James1:15 Zum u isharen ka i a jile iyol kera yô, i gema i mar isholibo. Isholibo di ia va vese yô i gema i dugh ku." 
James1:16 De tsumen nen ga, anmgbianev av mba doon mo ishima." 
James1:17 Hanma nagh ku dedoo man hanma iwua i vough kpaa ka Sha hen Ter u iwanger ve dugh, ve senen ye. Un yô, ma mgem ngu ken a Na ga, shin mure u mgem tsô kpaa ga." 
James1:18 Ka sha awashima Na A mar se sha kwaghôron u mimi la ye. Ka sha u se̱ lu er ka iyiav mbi tsutswav nahan ken akaa a Un gbe la. 
James1:19 Anmgbianev av mba doon mo ishima, fa nen kwagh. Hanma or nana̱ lu tsev tsev sha u ungwan kwagh kpa nana̱ gema a̱ ngôôr a kwaghôron, nana̱ ngôôr a iyugh kpaa." 
James1:20 Gadia iyugh i or yô, ngi ve a perapera sha ishigh ki Aôndo ga." 
James1:21 Nahan yô, gbihi nen hanma kwagh u hôngorough man shi ifer i i dumbur la kera, ngohol nen kwaghôron u i môôr un ken a ven la sha ishima i legh legh, u una fatyô u yiman uuma enev." 
James1:22 Hingir nen mbaeren a er sha kwaghôron la, i̱ de lu mbaungwan a ungwa tseegh, tsughun ayol a en ga." 
James1:23 Gadia aluer ma or ngu ungwan kwaghôron la, kpa nan ngu eren sha mi ga yô, nan ngu inja er or u nan nenge ishigh ki nan ki marami la ken ijingi nahan." 
James1:24 Gadia ka nan nenge iyol i nan, kpa nan yemen kera yô, fese je i hungul nan er nan lu yô." 
James1:25 Kpa or u nan kenger sha tindi u vough u a pasen se a toho la shi nan veren ishima yô, á saan nan iyol ken aeren a nan cii, gadia u ungwan kwagh yô, nan ngu or u kwagh hungul nan fefa ga, kpa nan ngu or u eren tom je." 
James1:26 Aluer ma or ngu henen er nan cie Aôndo, kpa nan ker nombor u nan tsaha ga nan tsughun ishima i nan iyol i nan yô, mcieaôndo u nan la, ka gbilin tsô." 
James1:27 Mcieaôndo u wang u a lu a acôghol iyol sha ishigh ki Aôndo ga yô, ka un ne: ka u za sôron ancôgholov kua kasev mba côgholov ken ican ve, man shi u kuran iyol you wang sha kwagh u taregh." 
James2:1 Anmgbianev av, de lu nen a jighjigh u nan u hen Ter wase Yesu Kristu Ter u iengem la, a msange u sha dooshima imôngo ga." 
James2:2 Gadia aluer or u nan we ikunya i zenaria sha ave kua riga u icivirigh nana va nyôr ken mkohol wen, man shi icanor nana va nyôr a ajav iyol yô," 
James2:3 ne gema ne kenger or u nan hee riga u icivirigh la ne kaa a nan ner: We yô, ikagh ki teman ki dedoo kin, kpa ne gema ne kaa a icanor la ner: We, tile keela, shin: Va tema shin ankwagh wam u pendan angahar sha mi ne—" 
James2:4 kera ka mpav ne nyer a mi ken atô wen gaa? Man shi ne kera hingir mbaajiriv mba ve henen aferakaa gaa? 
James2:5 Ver nen ato, anmgbianev av mba doon mo ishima, Aôndo kera tsuwa mbaatsanev mba ken tar ne sha u ve̱ lu mbanyarev ken jighjigh u nan man shi mbayandyako u tartor u A tende zwa a mba Un doo ve ishima la gaa?" 
James2:6 Kpa ne yô, ne hee a hee icanor je. Kera ka mbanyarev man ve lu eren a ven sha apera ve tul ne, ve yemen a ven ken ijir ye gaa?" 
James2:7 Kera ka ve je ve lu tuhwan iti i doon i i yer ne a mi la ye gaa? 
James2:8 Kpa aluer nea wa tindi u tartor iko mimi er i nger ken icighanruamabera nahan er: Or u nan we ndor a we, nana̱ doo u ishima er we iyol you nahan yô, ne er doo." 
James2:9 Kpa aluer ne sange sha dooshima yô, ka isholibo ne eren ye, tindi una na ne ibo er, ne mba mbaperenatindi." 
James2:10 Gadia or u nan we atindi cii iko kpa nana nôngo gbev sha ankwagh môm tsô yô, nan hingir u lun a ibo sha mi cii kera ve." 
James2:11 Gadia Un u A kaa er: De eren idya ga, la, shi A kaa er: De woo or ga kpaa. Nahan yô, aluer u er idya ga, kpa u gema u wua or yô, u hingir or u peren tindi je ve." 
James2:12 Ôron nen kwagh shi eren nen kwagh er ka mba á va ôr ve ijir sha tindi u a pase a toho la nahan. 
James2:13 Gadia or u nan zungu mhôônom ga yô, ijir kpaa ia zungwe nan mhôônom ga, gadia mhôônom ma zungwen ma hemba ijir agee." 
James2:14 Anmgbianev av, aluer ma or nana kaa er nan ngu a jighjigh u nan je, kpa nan lu a aeren ga yô, ka a inja sha nyi? Jighjigh u nan la una fatyô u yiman nan je kpa?" 
James2:15 Aluer ma anmgbian u nomso shin u kwase idyelegh á kôr nan, nan kera lu a kwaghyan u nana ya ayange ayange ga," 
James2:16 man mô wen nana kaa a ve er: Yem nen bem bem, i̱ tsee ne iyol, ide nen, kpa ne kera na ve kwagh sha ugbayol vev ga yô, ka a inja sha nyi?" 
James2:17 Kape jighjigh u nan kpaa, aluer ngu a aeren ga yô, un iyol na una lu kpenegh je la." 
James2:18 Orgen nana kaa er: We yô, u ngu a jighjigh u nan, kpa mo yô, m ngu a aeren. Tesem jighjigh wou u nan u aeren a lu sha mi ga la, man mo di me tese u jighjigh wam u nan sha aeren a am." 
James2:19 U na jighjigh wer, Aôndo ngu môm zee? U er doo. Ujijingi mba bov je kpaa mba ne kwagh la jighjigh, ikarikase gem gbidi ve iyol." 
James2:20 We orlanenkwagh ne, sar u ka fan er jighjigh u nan u lun a aeren ga la a lu kpenegh kpa?" 
James2:21 Kera ka sha aeren man i na Aberaham ter wase ishô zum u a na nagh sha wan na Isaka sha atse a nanden nagh sha mi la ye gaa? 
James2:22 U nenge er jighjigh u nan a lu eren tom a aeren a na imôngo, nahan jighjigh u nan hingir vough sha aeren la." 
James2:23 Nahan icighanruamabera kure sha mi vough u a kaa er: Aberaham na Aôndo jighjigh nahan A gema kwagh la hingir perapera na je la, man shi er: I yila un er ikar u Aôndo la." 
James2:24 Ne nenge, ka sha aeren ka i na or ishô ye, ka sha jighjigh u nan tseegh ga." 
James2:25 Rahabi, agbagakwase la kpaa, kape i na un ishô sha aeren je la gadia a nyôr a mbatyomov man a due a ve sha gbenda ugen kposo." 
James2:26 Gadia er iyol i lun a jijingi ga i lu kpenegh yô, kape jighjigh u nan u lun a aeren ga di kpaa, a lu kpenegh nahan la." 
James3:1 Anmgbianev av, de kera hingir nen mbatesen wuee ga, gadia ne fa er ijir i á ôr se ia hemba taver cii yô." 
James3:2 Gadia se cii se mba nenge gbev sha akaa kpishi. Aluer or nana nôngo gbev sha kwaghôron ga yô, nan ngu or u vough je, iyol cii kpaa nana fatyô u kôron i tsaha." 
James3:3 Aluer se wa anyinya ulijam ken ijô sha u a̱ ungwa se yô, se kôôm a iyol cii." 
James3:4 Nenge, utso kpaa shin er ve kehe man ahumbe a vesen ka a mgbeghan ve nahan kpaa ka i kôôm ve sha annaha kpeghee hanpe ornahan la nan soo cii." 
James3:5 Kape nombor kpaa u lu anlyegh u kpeghee kpa u hagher sha uzegembaakaav je la. Nenge anusu kpeghee kpaa ka a nande ingbaikon yô. 
James3:6 Nombor kpaa ka usu je, ka ifer i sha won cii. I ver nombor ken alegh a ase, ngu gem ngu hôngor iyol cii, ka u keer usu sha uma wase jimin cii, man u yô, ka shin gehena i tsar u u ker usu ye." 
James3:7 Gadia hanma inja i inyamtoho man shi inyon man akaa a kpelan iyav inya man akaa a uma a shin zegemnger cii a fatyô u koso a, aa var ken ya, man i vande koson a nahan sha ishima i or kpaa." 
James3:8 Kpa nombor yô, ma or u umace môm nan fatyô u kôôm u ga, ka ifer i memen mayange ga, u iv a megh ku bogh." 
James3:9 Ka sha u je ka se wuese Ter, man Aôndo ye, shi ka sha u kpaa ka se wa ior mba i gbe ve sha mlu u Aôndo la ifan ye." 
James3:10 Ka ken zwa shon môm môm man iwuese ka i due kua shi ifan i wan kpaa ye. Anmgbianev av, doo u kwagh ne a̱ lu nahan ga." 
James3:11 Imbormnger i dugh a mngerem ma dedoo man shi mngerem ma barem shin ihura i môm kpa? 
James3:12 Anmgbianev av, kon u tur ua fatyô u umen atam a olev shinii, itine i wain ia fatyô u umen atam a turu? Kape mngerem ma barem kpaa, maa fatyô u duen mngerem ma dedoo ga." 
James3:13 Ka an ken a ven nan lu or u fan kwagh man or u kaven kwagha? Yô, nana̱ pase ase aeren a nan a sha ishima i legh legh i i lu a kwaghfan la sha zende u nan u dedoo." 
James3:14 Kpa aluer nea lu a iwuhe i yuan ken ishima shin u wan kwagh wen ayol a en iko tseegh yô, de te nen ihagh ga, shi de eren nen aie sha kwagh u mimi kpaa ga." 
James3:15 Heera yô, ka kwaghfan u a dugh Sha la ga, kpa ka u taregh shi ka u iyolough shi ka u ujijingi mba bov tsô." 
James3:16 Gadia her ape iwuhe i lu kua u wan kwagh wou iko tseegh yô, anzughul ban ga, kua shi hanma ieren i dang kpaa." 
James3:17 Kpa kwaghfan u a dugh Sha yô, hiihii ka u wang, shi ka u bem kpaa, man u sar sar, man u norom ikaa ga, a iv a mhôônom ma zungwen kua atam a dedoo, ka u sangen sha dooshima ga man shi u imangeregh kpaa ga." 
James3:18 Ityamegh ki perapera yô, ka i lôô ki sha bem sha ci u mba ve ker num la." 
James4:1 Ka han man ityav mbi dugh ken a vene? Man shi ka han man iniumsuwen kpaa i dugh hen a vene? Kera ka sha asaren a en a a lu nôngon num ken alegh a en la gaa? 
James4:2 Kwagh ka a sar ne, kpa ne mba a kwagh ga. Ne mba tômon ior ku, ne mba gban iwuhe, kpa ne mba fan ityô u zuan a kwagh ga; ne mba nôngon num kua ityav." 
James4:3 Ne mba a kwagh ga, sha ci u ne eren msen vough ga yô, ka sha u za vihin sha asaren a en je la." 
James4:4 Ne mbadyarev, ne fa er u yan ikar a tar i lu u lun ihom a Aôndo gaa? Nahan yô, or u i sar nan ka lun ikar a tar yô, nan hingir orihom u Aôndo je ve." 
James4:5 Shin ne mba henen ner, ka gbilin tsô icighanruamabera a kaa er: A penda ishima sha jijingi u A na er a̱ tema ken vese la je zan zan iwuhe i gban kpaa yee?" 
James4:6 Kpa ka A na mrumun u sha mhôôn a ngee je a hemba a hemba. Ka nahan man A kaa er: Aôndo hendan kwagh a mba ve gengese ayol, kpa mba ve hir ayol a ve ijime la yô, ne ve mrumun u sha mhôôn." 
James4:7 Gema nen ayol a en, na nen sha ikev i Aôndo man hendan nen a diabolo tsô una yevese ne." 
James4:8 Kporom nen hen Aôndo, Un kpaa, Una kporom her a ven. Wanger nen ave a en, ne mbaasorabo, man shi kile nen asema a en, ne mba asema a lu ne ahar ne." 
James4:9 Lu nen kususu, zungwe nen, vaa nen. Ahan a en la a̱ gema a̱ hingir ijungwen, iember yen kpaa, i̱ hingir iuren." 
James4:10 Hire nen ayol a en ijime sha ishigh ki Ter man Una kende ne sha ye. 
James4:11 Anmgbianev, de er nen kwagh dang sha ayol a en ga. U nan er kwagh dang sha anmgbian shin nan gbe nan anmgbian u nan ibo tsô yô, ka atindiakaa nan lu ôron sha mi dang ye, shi ka atindiakaa man nan gbe nan a ibo tsô kpaa ye. Aluer u ngu nan tindi ibo yô, u kera ngu or u eren sha tindi ga, kpa u hingir or u ôron tindi ijir." 
James4:12 Un u A we atindi, man shi Un u A lu Orjir ngu môm tsô, ka Un u A lu a tahav mbu yiman man shi tahav mbu timin kpaa ye. Kpa we yô, u ngu di nyi ve u gbe nan or u nan we ndor a we la ibo tsôô?" 
James4:13 Man ne mba ne kaan ner, nyian shin kper sé za ken gar ngula, sé za tema heera inyom i môm sé er kasua sé zua a mtsera;" 
James4:14 ne mba kper tsô kpaa ne kera fe er uma wen una lu ga ne. Gadia ne mba tulugh u ka a due i nenge a mi sha ashe kpeghee maa a shi a sambe kera ne. 
James4:15 Ma ne kaa ner: Aluer Ter Una rumun yô, se lu uma, sé er nahan, shin nahan." 
James4:16 Kpa hegen yô, ne mba tan ihagh sha imbwase yen i kaan. Imbaihagh ne cii ka ifer je." 
James4:17 Nahan yô, or u nan fe u eren dedoo kpa nan kera er nahan ga yô, hingir isholibo je nan er ye." 
James5:1 Man ne mbanyarev yô, vaa nen, ngor nen kwelegh sha akaa a vihin a aa va tser ne la." 
James5:2 Inyarev yenev hôô ve, akondo a en kpaa ivina ndiar a ve." 
James5:3 Zenaria wen kua azurfa wen ta nduran ve, man nduran ve la ua er ne shiada u bo ua hia ayol a en er ka usu nahan je. Ne mba ombon akaa, man ka ayange a masetyô je." 
James5:4 Nenge mba ve yar sunda ken ishule yen yô, injar ve i ne ya la ngi genger imo. Ivaa i mbasundan kpaa i nyôr ken ato a Ter u akum a Sha." 
James5:5 Ishar haa ne iyol sha won, ne mba gbe yan akaa sha asaren a en tsô, ne koso asema a en je a kehe er ka sha ci u iyange i i ver sha u sôngon la." 
James5:6 Ne gba kuren kwagh u orperapera dang tsô ne wua un je, kera ngu hendan a ven ga." 
James5:7 Nahan anmgbianev, wa nen ishima zan zan m-ande u Ter. Nenge orsule ka nan kegh iyiagh ki taregh ki injaagh, nan wa ishima a mi zan zan ura u he man shi u masetyô u nôô sha mi." 
James5:8 Ne kpaa, wa nen ishima nahan, taver nen asema a en gadia m-ande u Ter mgbôghom ikua ikua je." 
James5:9 Anmgbianev, de gbe nen ahon ayol a en ga sha u i̱ de ne ne ibo ga yô. Nenge, Orjir va, ngu tilen sha hunda." 
James5:10 Uprofeti mba ve lu ôron kwagh ken iti i Ter yô, ve̱ lu ne ikav sha ican i yan man ishima i wan kpaa." 
James5:11 Mba ve taver ishima yô, ka se yila ve ser, mba i saan ve iyol. Ne ungwa er Yobu a taver ishima yô, man shi ne nenge mkur u Ter kure kwagh na yô, mhôônom ma ker Ter man shi zungu mhôônom kpaa." 
James5:12 Kpa kwagh u a hembe cii yô, anmgbianev av, de bumun nen ga, shin a lu sha kwavaôndo shin a lu sha tar shin mbum ugen kpaa ga, kpa “een” wen yô, a̱ lu “een” man “ei” wen kpaa shi a̱ lu di “ei” je, sha u né va gba ken ibo i yan ga yô." 
James5:13 Ican i tser ma orgen ken a vene? Yô, nana̱ er msen. Orgen nan ngu saan saana? Yô, nana̱ wa icam i iember." 
James5:14 Orgen ken a ven nan ngu uangea? Nana̱ yila mbatamen mba nongo u Kristu, ve̱ er msen sha ci u nan, ve̱ shighe nan mkurem ken iti i Ter." 
James5:15 Msen u sha jighjigh u nan la una yima oruange la man Ter Una mough a nan sha. Aluer nan er isholibo je kpaa, á de nan." 
James5:16 Pase nen akaabo a en ayol a en, shi er nen msen sha ci u ayol a en sha u angev mbu̱ bee ne yô. Msen u eren tsung u orperapera ngu a agee kpishi je." 
James5:17 Eliya lu or di inja i môm a vese tsô, a er msen tsung er ura u̱ de nee ga, man ura kera nôô shin tar ga, kuma anyom atar man iwer ataratar." 
James5:18 Man a shi a er msen, nahan Aôndo nôô ura, inya hire mende iyiav mbi i." 
James5:19 Anmgbianev av, aluer mô wen nana kaha á undu mimi man orgen nana za hide a nan yô," 
James5:20 fa nen, or u nan ker orsholibo sha gbenda u mtsum u nan la nan hidi a nan yô, nan dugh uma u nan ken ku kera shi nana cir asorabo kpishi." 
1Peter1:1 Peteru apostoli u Yesu Kristu ngu sughun ushirmbaiorov mba ve sambe ve lu ken Pontu man Galatia man Kapadoshia man Ashia man shi Bitinia la, ka mba i tsough ve" 
1Peter1:2 sha mtsengefan u Aôndo, sha mtsegh u sha Jijingi, u zan ken iko i wan man awambe a mishin a Yesu Kristu. I̱ seer ne mrumun u sha mhôôn kua bem wuee." 
1Peter1:3 I̱ wuese Aôndo, Ter u Ter wase Yesu Kristu u A mar ne hegh sha mhôônom Nam ma zungwen ma vesen er se̱ lu a ishimaverenkeghen i i lu uma sha mnder u Yesu Kristu shin mbakpenev la," 
1Peter1:4 se̱ lu a dyako u hôôn ga, u fisee kpaa ga, u usen tsô kpaa ga, u i koso un Sha sha ci wen," 
1Peter1:5 ne mba i kor ne sha agee a Aôndo sha jighjigh u nan, sha u ngohol myom u i kegh iyol i ver a ver u pasen un sha iyange i masetyô yô." 
1Peter1:6 Sha kwagh ne yô, ne mba ember kpishi shin er hegen, aluer a gba nahan yô, ameen atô kposo kposo nga vihin ne asema sha anyangem kpeghee." 
1Peter1:7 Zenaria u a lu kwagh u saan ishe kpaa ka i kar un sha usu je, nahan mkar u i kar jighjigh wen u nan u a hemba zenaria inja ica la, ka sha u una kuma iwuese man icivir man iengem sha m-ande u Yesu Kristu." 
1Peter1:8 A doo ne ishima shin er ne lu a nenge a Na ga je kpaa; ne mba nengen a Na ga nahan kpaa ne mba nan Un jighjigh man ne mba ember tsung sha iember i i gande u ôron i i doo je i hemba. 
1Peter1:9 Man ne mba zuan a mkur u jighjigh wen u nan, ka myom u uuma enev je la." 
1Peter1:10 Sha kwagh u myom ne yô, uprofeti mba ve tsengaôron kwagh u mrumun u sha mhôôn u i ver sha ci wen yô, ve tôv un ve time vighe vighe je." 
1Peter1:11 Ve lu timen er shin ka hanma shighe shin ka shighe u nanou man Jijingi u Kristu u A lu ken a ve la, A lu tesen sha mi zum u A tsengapasen atsan a Kristu man iengem i ia dondo sha mi la." 
1Peter1:12 I pase ve er, ve lu eren tom sha akaa ne, nahan kpaa lu sha ci ve ayol a ve ga, lu sha ci wen; ka akaa a i lu pasen ne hegen sha ikev i mbala mba ve lu pasen ne Loho u Dedoo sha Icighan Jijingi u i tindi Un A due Sha la. Akaa ne yô, mbatyomov mba Shaav je kpaa, ka saren ve pe gbirin ashe ker." 
1Peter1:13 Nahan yô, nyôôso nen mfe wen, shi lu nen geng ge geng, ishimaverenkeghen yen i̱ lu sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u i lu van ne a mi sha m-ande u Yesu Kristu la vough." 
1Peter1:14 De kera geman nen ayol a en sha inja i asaren a tsuaa a ken mlan wen la ga, lu nen er ônov mba wan iko nahan." 
1Peter1:15 Kpa ne yô, lu nen uicighanmbaiorov ken mlu wen cii, er Un u A yer ne la A lu icighan nahan." 
1Peter1:16 Gadia i nger er: Lu nen uicighanmbaiorov, gadia Mo M ngu u Icighan je." 
1Peter1:17 Man aluer ne yilan Un er Ter yô, Un u A er ijir i lu sha msange u sha dooshima ga kpa i lu sha ieren i hanma or yô, lu nen a mciem sha ayange a shir wen." 
1Peter1:18 Gadia ne fa i paa ne sha mlu wen u gbilinigh u ne ngohol hen uter la; lu sha akaa a saan ishe, er azurfa shin zenaria nahan, ga," 
1Peter1:19 kpa lu sha awambe a injaa a Kristu er ka a waniyôngo u lun a acôghol iyol ga, ihogholough kpaa ga nahan." 
1Peter1:20 I vande fan Un je er i lu a gba tar ga yô, kpa i pase Un ken shighe u masetyô ne sha ci wen." 
1Peter1:21 Ka sha a Na man ne lu mbanan Aôndo jighjigh u A nder Un shin mbakpenev shi A na Un icivir kpaa, sha er jighjigh wen u nan man ishimaverenkeghen yen ve lu sha Aôndo." 
1Peter1:22 Er ne vande wanger asema a en kera sha iko i ne wan mimi iko la u zan ken dooshima u mimi u hen anmgbianev yô, doo nen ayol a en ken ishima tsung je." 
1Peter1:23 Gadia i mar ne hegh lu sha vor u hôôn la ga, kpa lu sha u hôôn ga la, lu sha mkaanem ma Aôndo ma ma lu uma man ma lu ma tsôron kpaa." 
1Peter1:24 Gadia: Uumace cii mba er toho nahan man icivir ve cii ngi er ikparen u toho nahan; toho ka u use man ikparen u u a ndoor a gba inya," 
1Peter1:25 kpa kwaghôron u Ter yô, ngu tsôron gbem zan zan. Man ngun ka kwaghôron u Loho u Dedoo u i ôr ne u je ne." 
1Peter2:1 Nahan undu nen hanma ifer man hanma icugh man imanger man iwuhe man angereke cii kpaa," 
1Peter2:2 man atumba a man a mimi a sha kwaghôron u Aôndo la a̱ sar ne tsung er anikundanev mba forototo nahan, sha er né vese sha mi u zan ken myom yô," 
1Peter2:3 aluer ne kav er Ter A doo je yô. 
1Peter2:4 Va nen hen a Na, Wen u A lu iwen i i lu uma i ior yô, ve venda i, kpa hen Aôndo yô, gema ka icuwan man shi i injaa kpaa." 
1Peter2:5 Ne kpaa, i̱ maa ne er ka awen a lun uma nahan, ne̱ lu iyou i ken jijingi, ne̱ hingir icighannongo u upristi sha u né naan nagh ku ken jijingi, ku ku doon Aôndo sha ci u Yesu Kristu yô." 
1Peter2:6 Gadia i nger ken icighanruamabera er: Nenge, m ngu veren icuwaniwen i injaa i sha zongo ken Shion. Or u nan ne Un jighjigh yô, nana va ahenge ga." 
1Peter2:7 Kape A lu a inja her a ven ne, ne mba ne ne jighjigh ne. Kpa hen mbanan jighjigh ga yô, kwaghôron ugen ngu er: Iwen i mbamaan ve vende i la, ka i je i hingir i sha zongo ye," 
1Peter2:8 man shi: Ka iwen i keman nguhar sha mi man vande u nôngon gbev sha mi. Ka ve mba ve nôngo gbev sha ci u ve we kwaghôron u Aôndo iko ga la, man ka sha kwagh la je i vande veren ve kpaa ye." 
1Peter2:9 Kpa ne yô, ne mba icuwannongo, nongo u upristi mba sha inja i tor, icighanikurior, nongoior u Aôndo jim, ka sha u né yôô aeren a Na a ageegh, Un u A yila ne ken ime, A va a ven ken iwanger Na i kpiligh iyol la." 
1Peter2:10 Ngise ne lu nongoior ga, kpa hegen ne gema ne hingir nongoior u Aôndo, i zungwen ne mhôônom ga, kpa hegen yô, mba zungwen ne mhôônom." 
1Peter2:11 Ne mbadoon mo ishima, ne mba ne lu ushirmbaiorov man iorvannya kpaa, m ngu zamber a ven mer: Nyagh nen asaren a iyolough a a nenge ityav a uma u ken ishima la." 
1Peter2:12 Zende wen u hen atôatyev u̱ lu wanger wanger, sha u aluer mba lamen sha a ven er ka mbaaferev yô, ve̱ nengen aeren a en a dedoo man ve̱ civir Aôndo sha iyange i Una va sôron ne la." 
1Peter2:13 Waan nen hanma tindi u ior ve we la iko sha ci u Ter—shin a lu tor u a hembe cii," 
1Peter2:14 shin a lu ugomna mba tor a tindi ve sha u ve̱ tsahan mbaerenafer kpa ve̱ gema ve̱ wuese mba ve eren sha mi la. 
1Peter2:15 Gadia ishima i Aôndo yô, kape i lu ne, ka u né eren dedoo man né cir abumeaior zwa sha lanegh vegh ye." 
1Peter2:16 Lu nen er mba ve lu ken uikangen ga nahan, kpa mlu wen u ken uikangen ga la a̱ de gem a̱ hingir ne kwagh u yisan ifer a mi ga; lu nen ikpan i Aôndo." 
1Peter2:17 Waan nen ior cii iko, anmgbianev ve̱ doo ne ishima, cian nen Aôndo, waan nen tor iko." 
1Peter2:18 Ne mbayev kpaa, ungwan nen imo i uter enev sha mcie, i̱ de kera luun mbadedoo man mba ve lu saan saan tseegh ga, kpa i̱ kua mba ve lu jighilii ga kpaa." 
1Peter2:19 Ka kwagh u doon je aluer or nana umbur Aôndo nana wa ishima ken ican zum u ican i tser nan sha apera la yô. 
1Peter2:20 Gadia aluer ne er isholibo man á gbidye ne man né wa ishima yô, iwuese ngi hana? Kpa aluer ne mba eren sha mi man né gema né ya ican kpa né wa ishima yô, ka kwagh u doon hen Aôndo je la." 
1Peter2:21 Gadia ka sha kwagh ne je i yer ne ye, gadia Kristu kpaa ya ican sha ci wen, A ver ne ikav je sha u né dondo Un ijime yô." 
1Peter2:22 A er ma isholibo ga, icugh kpaa i zua a mi sha zwa Na ga." 
1Peter2:23 Zum u i laha Un kpaa mayange A or iyev sha mlaha la ga, er A ya ican kpaa A ta hwa ga, kpa A gema A wa sha ikev i Un u A er ijir sha mimi la." 
1Peter2:24 Ka Un jim kpaa A tôô asorabo ase ken iyol Na je sha terankon sha er ma se kpe kera sha kwagh u isholibo, kpa se̱ gema se̱ lu uma sha ci u perapera. Ka sha agbir a Na man se zough a mkpeyol ye." 
1Peter2:25 Gadia ngise ne tsumen er iyôngo nahan kpa hegen yô, ne hide ken Orkuranilev man Orkuran u uuma enev." 
1Peter3:1 Nahan yô, ne kasev di kpaa ungwan nen imo i noov enev sha er aluer mbagenev ken ve, vea lu mbawan kwaghôron u Aôndo iko ga je kpa, á urugh ve sha mlu u kasev vev la, á kera lu sha kwaghôron kpee ga," 
1Peter3:2 er ve nengen mlu wen u wang u cian Aôndo la yô. 
1Peter3:3 Hwe wen a̱ de luun u ken won tsô ga, er gbatyou u gban nahan, shin u wan akaa a hweegh a zenaria shin akondo a zeren ga." 
1Peter3:4 Kpa i̱ lu or u ken myer u ken ishima la, a hwe u saan ishe ga, u ishima i legh legh man u lun ving la; ka kwagh u hemban sha mnenge u Aôndo je la." 
1Peter3:5 Gadia kape uicighanmbaukase mba tsuaa mba ishimaverenkeghen ve i lu sha Aôndo la kpaa, ve eren hwe je la, ve ungwan imo i noov vev." 
1Peter3:6 Kape Sara kpaa lu ungwan imo i Aberaham la, je a yila un er ter; man ne hingir ônov nav aluer ne eren doo doo man ne rumun er ma kwagh a̱ de te ne mciem iyol ga yô." 
1Peter3:7 Nahan ne nomso kpaa, lu nen a kasev enev imôngo sha kwaghfan, waan nen kasev iko er ve hembe yinan agee yô, gadia ve kpaa, ka mbayandyako u sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u uma a ven imôngo, sha u i̱ de vende mbamsen enev ga yô." 
1Peter3:8 Ken masetyô yô, ne cii lu nen ishima i môm, shi lu nen mbazungwen mhôônom; doo nen ayol a en er ka anmgbianev nahan, lu nen mba mhôônom ma ker ve; shi hide nen a ayol a en ijime kpaa." 
1Peter3:9 De kera oron iyev sha ifer ga shi de kera oron iyev sha ityuhwan kpaa ga, kpa gema veren nen a ver ior dedoo, gadia ka sha kwagh ne je i yer ne ye, sha u né ya dyako u iveren i dedoo yô." 
1Peter3:10 Gadia: Or u i sar nan pe uma a̱ doo nan ishima man shi sar nan pe nengen ayange a dedoo kpaa yô, nana̱ kura nombor u nan sha u ôron kwagh u ifer, man zwa u nan u̱ de er kwagh u icughugh ga," 
1Peter3:11 nana̱ nyagh ifer nana̱ gema nana̱ er kwagh u dedoo, nana̱ ker bem nana̱ zenda un ityô kpaa." 
1Peter3:12 Gadia ashe a Ter yô, nga sha mbaperapera shi veren ato sha zamber ve kpaa. Kpa Ter gem tsuhur ishigh sha mba ve eren ifer yô." 
1Peter3:13 Aluer ne mba nôngon kpogholoo sha kwagh u dedoo yô, ka an je nana gema á er ne kwagh u ifer ase?" 
1Peter3:14 Kpa aluer nea yan ican sha ci u kwagh u perapera kpaa, á saan ne iyol je; de cie nen m-ange ve ga, man ishima i̱ de te ne kwe kpaa ga." 
1Peter3:15 Kpa gema tsegha nen Kristu ken asema a en, A̱ lu Ter, waan nen ago iyol veren nen a ver sha u né na imo sha mpin u hanma or u nana pine ne ityôikaa i ishimaverenkeghen i i lu ken a ven la, kpa i̱ lu sha ishima i legh legh man sha mcie kpaa." 
1Peter3:16 Shi lu nen a imo i wang ken ishima sha er kwagh u i lu lamen sha a ven dang dang la je kpaa, ve̱ va ahenge yô, ka ve mba ve lu teren mlu wen u dedoo u ken Kristu sha dang la." 
1Peter3:17 Gadia aluer ka ishima i Aôndo u ú ya ican sha shighe u u eren kwagh u dedoo yô, hemba doon a u ú ya ican sha shighe u u eren ifer la." 
1Peter3:18 Gadia Kristu kpaa kpe sha ci u asorabo kwa môm, Un Orperapera sha ci u mbaaferev sha u Una va a vese hen Aôndo yô. Iyol Na yô, i wua i kpa i shi i na Un uma sha Jijingi." 
1Peter3:19 Lu sha Jijingi kpaa man A za A za ôr ujijingi mba ve lu ken uikangen la kwaghaôndo ye. 
1Peter3:20 Ka ve mba ngise ve lu hemban ato zum u Aôndo lu wan ishima sha ayange a Noa zum u i lu gban tsô la, ka ker man ior kpeghee, ka uuma mba iorov anigheni tsô ve war sha mnger ye." 
1Peter3:21 Ma tese ikav sha batisema u ne kpaa ne lu waren sha mi hegen yô; batisema ka u wanger hôngor u sha iyol kera ga, kpa ka msen u sônon Aôndo imo i wanger wanger i ken ishima sha mnder u Yesu Kristu shin ku." 
1Peter3:22 A yem Sha, ngu ken uwegh ku yanegh ku Aôndo, i gema mbatyomov mba Shaav man tahav kua agee i wa Un sha ikev." 
1Peter4:1 Er Kristu A ye ican ken iyol yô, ne kpaa, kange nen ishima sha mhen ne, gadia u nan ye ican ken iyol yô, nan de isholibo ve," 
1Peter4:2 sha u ayange a ken iyol a a shi ne her yô, né kera eren sha asaren a ior ga, kpa i̱ lu sha ishima i Aôndo." 
1Peter4:3 Gadia ayange a a kar la zum u i lu eren er atôatyev a eren nahan la, kuma ve, er ve lu zenden ken ijimba i eren man asaren a bo man msôrom ma hunden man iniongo i gbilinigh man mbamkohol mba man msôrom man shi kwaghsôron u dang kpaa." 
1Peter4:4 Gema ka kpiligh ve iyol er ne kera nyer nongo a ve ken ijimba i eren i ganden ikaa inya la, ga yô; mba gbe lamen sha a ven dang tsô." 
1Peter4:5 Kpa vea va ôr kwagh ve sha ishigh ki Un u A kegh iyol u ôron mbaumav man mbakpenev ijir la. 
1Peter4:6 Gadia ka nahan man mbakpenev kpaa i ôr ve Loho u Dedoo sha u á ôr ve ijir ken iyol sha inja i mlu u ior la, kpa ve̱ gema ve̱ lu uma sha inja i mlu u Aôndo la." 
1Peter4:7 Kpa mkur u akaa cii mgbôghom ve; nahan kundu nen ishima shi lu nen geng ge geng kpaa, sha u né fatyô u eren msen yô." 
1Peter4:8 Kwagh u a hembe cii yô, doo nen ayol a en sha gbashima je gadia dooshima cirin asorabo kpishi." 
1Peter4:9 Yôron nen ayol a en, kpa de gban nen ahon sha mi ga." 
1Peter4:10 Er hanma or nan ngohol iwua i sha mrumun u sha mhôôn nahan yô, eren nen ayol a en tom a mi er mbatomov mba mimi mba sha mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo sha igbenda kposo kposo la nahan." 
1Peter4:11 Aluer hanma or nana ôr kwagh yô, i̱ lu er ka kwaghôron u Aôndo nahan, aluer hanma or nana er tom yô, i̱ lu er ka sha agee a Aôndo A ne yô, sha u á civir Aôndo ken akaa cii sha Yesu Kristu, ka Un A lu a iengem man tahav zan zan gbem sha won ye. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Ne mbadoon mo ishima, bocan u a ve sha a ven sha u karen ne a kar la, a̱ de kpiligh ne iyol er ka kwagh u cier iyol man a va tser ne ga." 
1Peter4:13 Kpa her ape ne nyôr nongo a Kristu ken atsan a Na yô, ember nen, sha er shighe u m-ande u iengem Na la kpaa né va ember tsung." 
1Peter4:14 Aluer a hee ne sha ci u iti i Kristu yô, á kpe ne iyol je sha ci u Jijingi u iengem man u Aôndo A tem sha a ven yô." 
1Peter4:15 Kpa mô wen nana̱ de yaan ican er ka orwuanor shin ormbaiv, shin or u eren ifer shin or u amber sha akaa nahan ga." 
1Peter4:16 Kpa aluer orgen nana ya ican er Orkristu yô, kunya u̱ de ker nan ga, kpa nana̱ civir Aôndo ken Iti ne." 
1Peter4:17 Gadia shighe kuma u ijir ia ngurum sha ya u Aôndo je ve. Man á lu ken ian yase ia hii yô, mkur u mbahemban Loho u Dedoo u Aôndo ato la yô, una lu nana?" 
1Peter4:18 Man aluer a shi zor zor u or u perapera nana war ga yô, or u nan vende Aôndo man orisholibo yô, vea za hana?" 
1Peter4:19 Nahan yô, mba ve ye ican sha ishima i Aôndo la, ve̱ wa ayol a ve sha ikev i Ujighjigh u A gbe akaa cii la, ve̱ eren akaa a dedoo." 
1Peter5:1 Nahan yô, m ngu taver mbatamen mba ken ven asema, mo u m lu ortamen a ve imôngo man shi orshiada u atsan a Kristu kpaa. Mo kpaa m ngu a kwar sha iengem i á va pase i la." 
1Peter5:2 Kura nen ikumuile i Aôndo i i lu hen ven la, er ka sha ci u Aôndo nahan, i̱ de lu er i kighir ne a kighir ga, kpa i̱ lu sha asema a en; i̱ de lu sha ci u mtsera u dang ga, kpa i̱ lu sha gbashima je;" 
1Peter5:3 i̱ de lu er ne mba eren tahav sha kwagh u i we ne sha ikev ga, kpa lu nen ikumuile la ikav." 
1Peter5:4 Zum u Orkuranilev u tamen Una ande yô, né ngohol tsar u engem u sha ityou u usen mayange ga." 
1Peter5:5 Nahan yô, ne mbayev kpaa ungwan nen imo i mbatamen, man ne cii, haa nen ityough ki taver ga iyol, hen ayol a en, gadia Aôndo hendan kwagh a mbagengeseyol, kpa ne mba ve hir ayol a ve ijime la mrumun u sha mhôôn." 
1Peter5:6 Hide nen a ayol a en ijime er uwegh ku Aôndo ku ageegh ku lu sha a ven nahan, sha er shighe á va kuma vough yô Una kende ne sha." 
1Peter5:7 Gema nen ishima i nyian yen la cii, haa nen sha a Na, gadia ka Un A lu koson ne ye." 
1Peter5:8 Lu nen geng ge geng shi kuran nen kpaa, orihom wen diabolo ngu zenden er begha u tan kume nahan, keren or u una ya yô." 
1Peter5:9 Hendan nen a na, tile nen dông sha jighjigh u nan gadia ne fa anmgbianev enev sha won cii kpaa i ver ve ican shon i môm i môm i ne lu yan i ne vough." 
1Peter5:10 Zum u ne ya ican sha anyangem kpeghee kera yô, Aôndo u mhôôn cii u A yila ne u zan ken iengem i tsôron ken Kristu, Un iyol Na Una sôr mlu wen Una suwe ne, Una taver ne man shi Una tim ne né lu dông kpaa." 
1Peter5:11 Ka Un je A lu a tahav gbem sha won ye. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 M nger ne ankwagh ne kpuaa sha ikev i Siluanu u a lu ne anmgbian u jighjigh sha mnenge wam yô. M ngu taver ne ishima man m ngu eren shiada mer, ngun ka mrumun u sha mhôôn u mimi u Aôndo je ne. Tile nen sha mi dông." 
1Peter5:13 Un u a lu ken Babilon u i tsough un di er ne nahan la, ngu sughun ne; wan wam Marku kpaa nahan." 
1Peter5:13 Un u a lu ken Babilon u i tsough un di er ne nahan la, ngu sughun ne; wan wam Marku kpaa nahan." 
1Peter5:14 Sugh nen ayol a en sha zwasusen u sha dooshima. Bem a̱ lu sha a ven cii, ne mba ne lu ken Kristu yô." 
2Peter1:1 Shimeon Peteru, kpan man apostoli u Yesu Kristu, ngu sughun mba ve zough a jighjigh u nan u injaa di er u wase nahan, sha perapera u Yesu Kristu u A lu Aôndo wase man Oryiman wase la." 
2Peter1:2 I̱ seer ne mrumun u sha mhôôn kua bem wuee, sha kwaghfan u ne fe Aôndo la man shi Yesu Ter wase kpaa." 
2Peter1:3 Gayô agee a Na a sha inja i Aôndo la na se akaa cii a a lu a inja sha uma wase man u civir Aôndo, ka sha mfe u fan Un u a yer se sha iengem Na man agee a Na a hemban la." 
2Peter1:4 Ka sha ve kpaa man a na se uityendezwa Nav mba injaav mba tamen mba tamen ye, sha u né gema né nyôr nongo ken mlu u Aôndo sha uityendezwa mbala, né war hôngor u u lu shin tar sha isharen i bo la kera yô." 
2Peter1:5 Sha ci u kwagh ne jim yô, nôngo nen ngeegh je, sha jighjigh wen u nan la, seer nen aeren a dedoo, sha aeren a dedoo la, seer nen kwaghfan;" 
2Peter1:6 sha kwaghfan la, seer nen u kôron iyol tsaha; sha tsaha u kôron la, seer nen ishima i taver; sha ishima i taver la, seer nen mcivir u civir Aôndo;" 
2Peter1:7 sha mcivir u civir Aôndo la seer nen u doon a anmgbianev man sha u doon a anmgbianev la yô, seer nen dooshima." 
2Peter1:8 Gadia aluer akaa ne aa lu ken a ven man á ngee je, á dumbur yô, aa na er ken mfe u ne fe Ter wase Yesu Kristu la né kera lu gbilin shin mbaumen atam ga, ze." 
2Peter1:9 Gadia u nan ban a akaa ne yô, nan ngu ashe pir, nan nengen hen ikum ikum tsô, mwanger u i wanger asorabo a nan a ngise la hungul nan kera je." 
2Peter1:10 Nahan yô, anmgbianev, shi seer nôngon nen u taver a taver myila u i yila ne la man mtsough u i tsough ne la, gadia aluer ne er nahan yô, né kera nôngo gbev mayange ga." 
2Peter1:11 Gadia ka nahan man á hemba nan ne u nyôron tartor u tsôron u Yesu Kristu, Ter wase man Oryiman wase enger enger ye." 
2Peter1:12 Nahan yô, me ver ishima u umbur ne akaa ne gbem shin er ne fe a nahan kpaa man shi kera je kpaa, ne lu taver ken mimi u a lu ken a ven la." 
2Peter1:13 Sha mnenge wam yô, ka vough u me umbur ne akaa me nder ne sha ayange a m hira lu shir ken tenti ne." 
2Peter1:14 Gadia m fa myôhôr u tenti wam una va yôhôl ne, kera shi ica ga je, er Ter wase Yesu Kristu kpaa A pasem nahan." 
2Peter1:15 Me nôngo tsung sha u me va kar kera yô, hanma shighe né fatyô u umbur akaa ne." 
2Peter1:16 Gadia zum u se va pase ne agee man m-ande u Ter wase Yesu Kristu la yô, kera lu sha gbenda u ukwaghhir mba i dugh a dugh sha kwaghfan la se lu zan ga, kpa se lu mba se nenge a nenge iengem Na sha ashe je." 
2Peter1:17 Gadia A ngohol icivir man iengem hen Aôndo Ter zum u imo due ken iengem i hemban la, ôr kwagh A Na er: Ngun ka Wan Wam u ishima ishima u ishima i doom a Na yum yô." 
2Peter1:18 Man imo la se ayol ase kpaa se ungwa, lu Sha i due ye, zum u se lu a Na imôngo sha icighanwo la." 
2Peter1:19 Se mba a kwaghôron u profeti u a til dông je. Doo u né wa iko sha mi er ka imenger i i wanger ken ijiir i wan ime nahan, zan zan sev mbu kar aven man ishan i sha use kpaa ia due ia kôndo sha ken asema a en yô." 
2Peter1:20 Kwagh u hiihii yô, fa nen kwagh ne, ma kwaghôron u profeti u ken icighanruamabera ka kwagh u or nana gba pasen iyol i nan tsô ga." 
2Peter1:21 Gadia mayange ma kwaghôron u profeti due sha awashima u or ga, kpa Icighan Jijingi mgbegha ior man ve ôr kwagh u Aôndo ye." 
2Peter2:1 Kpa mbaprofeti mba aiev iyange ve due hen nongoior la di er ken a ven kpaa mbatesen mba aiev vea va lu nahan. Vea nyôr a ityesen i kahan i dang myer, Ter u A paa ve la je kpaa vea nyiman Un, mba van a mtim sha ayol a ve fefa je." 
2Peter2:2 Ior kpishi je, vea dondo aeren a ve a sha ijimba la; ka sha ci ve je man á teren gbenda u mimi ne sha dang ye." 
2Peter2:3 Sha hua ve u eren la, vea zua a mtser sha a ven sha akaaôron a sha atseregh. Ibo i i na ve ngise la, ngi gbilin ga, man mtim ve kpaa ngu mnya ga." 
2Peter2:4 Gadia mbatyomov mba Shaav mba ve er isholibo la kpaa Aôndo tange ve ga, A gbihi ve ken Tartaru ken ahungwa a imegh sha u kuran ve zan zan shighe u ijir ia kuma yô." 
2Peter2:5 Man tar u tsuaa la kpaa A tange u ga, kpa A yima Noa u a lu yôôn kwagh u perapera la, kua ior mbagenev utaankaruhar zum u A va a mngerem deemee sha tar u mba ve vende Aôndo la." 
2Peter2:6 Man A nande agar a Sodom man Gomora a hingir mtwem, A na ve ibo, i tim ve kera, A gema ve ve hingir ikav hen mba vea va venda Aôndo la cii." 
2Peter2:7 Man A yima Loti or u perapera u a ya ican ken ishima tsung sha ci u ijimba i eren i mbaaferev mbala. 
2Peter2:8 Gadia or u perapera la tema ker atô ve, a nenge shi a ungwa akaa la, ishima na i perapera la lu vihin un use use sha aeren a ve a ifer la." 
2Peter2:9 Nahan mba ve civir Aôndo la Ter fa u yiman ve ken imeen, shi A fa u kuran mbaaferev zan zan á ar sha iyange i ijirigh la, sha u tsahan ve." 
2Peter2:10 Man jim je yô, ka mba ve zenden sha inja i iyolough sha isharen i hôngorough, ve lahan mba i ver ve ve lu a tahav la cii. Ve cihi kwagh, ve wa apera, u tuhwan mba ve engem mbala kpaa ka cier ve iyol ga." 
2Peter2:11 Mbatyomov mba Shaav yô, shin er ve hembe ve iyoltaver man agee nahan kpaa, mba za senden ve ityough a Ter sha ilyahan ga." 
2Peter2:12 Kpa mban yô, er ve toho kwagh u ve fe un ga yô, vea tim sha mvihi ve er inyamtoho i kaven kwagh ga nahan, i mar i sha inja i iyolough sha u á gba kôron, wuan tsô yô." 
2Peter2:13 Vea zua a injar i ifer sha ifer i ve er la. Ishar i haan iyol atetan doo ve; ve yô, mba kwagh u côv côv man kwagh u lun afesan afesan; maa ve iyol a atseregh a ve zum u ka vea yan iniongo a ven imôngo la." 
2Peter2:14 Ashe a ve iv a idya, nga memen u eren isholibo ga; mba meen ior mba ve lu a ishima i pee pee la. Ve via ishima sha hua u eren, ka ônov mba ifanev je." 
2Peter2:15 Ve undu gbenda u mimi ve tsume, ve za sha gbenda u Balaam wan u Beor u injar i ifer i eren i doo un ishima yum la." 
2Peter2:16 Kpa i yange un tindi u peren la, zendenya u lamen ga gema ôr kwagh sha imo i or, yange ihundugh ki profeti la." 
2Peter2:17 Mban yô, ka ihwembe i lun a mngerem ga, ka irkpiigh i ijeverahumbe a purugh a mi kera. I ver ve angôghime." 
2Peter2:18 Gadia ka sha u ôron ugbilinmbaakaav sha iyolgengese man sha asaren a iyolough man ijimba i eren ve meen ior mba ve sember duen ken mba ve lu ken mtsum la, ye." 
2Peter2:19 Ka ve tôndo zwa a mbala er vea kera lu ken uikangen ga, kpa ve ayol a ve gema ka ikpan i hôngorough; gadia kwagh u a hembe or yô, ka un je ka a gbihi nan ken kpan ye." 
2Peter2:20 Gadia aluer vea osough vea war ihôngor i tar kera sha mfe u ve fe Yesu Kristu, Ter wase man Oryiman wase la, kpa akaa ne á shi á kôr ve á hemba ve yô, mkur ve u masejime la hemba vihin a mlu ve u hiihii la." 
2Peter2:21 Gadia guda her a ve u ma ve fe gbenda u perapera ga a u ve vande fan u kera man ve gem ve undu icighantindi u i na ve la. 
2Peter2:22 Injakwaghôron i mimi ne kuma sha a ve vough er: Iwa suwa, shi hide ya, man shi: Ngôigo ôô iyol kpa shi hide vingir shin angbiôr." 
2Peter3:1 Ne mbadoon mo ishima, ka washika u sha uhar u m lu ngeren ne je ne. Ken ve uhar cii sarem pe umbur ne akaa, nderen ishima yen i wang." 
2Peter3:2 Ka sha er né umbur akaaôron a uicighanmbaprofeti ngise lu ôron la man shi tindi u Ter Oryiman la, u mbaapostoli enev ve ôr la." 
2Peter3:3 Kwagh u hiihii yô, fa nen er ken ayange a masejime mbanahantar vea due a tarnahan, vea zende sha asaren a ve ayol a ve." 
2Peter3:4 Vea kaa er ityendezwa i m-ande Na ngi hana? Gadia hii sha shighe u uter kpe kera la akaa cii nga her di er a lu sha mhii u igbetar la nahan. 
2Peter3:5 Kwagh ne hungul ve sha apera er sha imo i Aôndo yô, Usha lu tsuaa je kua tar kpaa u u dugh shin mnger man i er u sha mnger kpaa." 
2Peter3:6 Ka sha ve kpaa man tar u u lu hen shighe la, mngerem uve u, u tim kera ye." 
2Peter3:7 Kpa Usha mba ve lu hegen kua tar cii, ka sha imo la i môm i môm man i ver shi i kuran ve sha ci u usu, zan zan á va kuma sha iyange i ijirigh man mtim u mba ve vende Aôndo la ye." 
2Peter3:8 Kpa ne mbadoon mo ishima, kwagh môm ne tsô yô, a̱ de hungul ne ga, hen Ter yô, iyange i môm ngi er anyom dubu nahan, anyom dubu di gema nga er iyange i môm nahan." 
2Peter3:9 Ter ngu eren negh negh sha ityendezwa Na la er mbagenev ve nenge er ngu eren negh negh nahan ga, kpa we ishima a ven, mayange sar Un u mbagenev ve̱ tim ga, kpa ior cii ve̱ gema asema." 
2Peter3:10 Kpa iyange i Ter ia va er ormbaiv nahan. Usha vea kar kera sha ihuran ioo, asemaakaa aa hia kera man tar kua ityom i sha u cii kpaa ia hia kera." 
2Peter3:11 Er akaa cii á va sough kera nahan yô, doo u né lu ken icighanmlu man né lu civir Aôndo nana?" 
2Peter3:12 Er ne keghen mve u iyange i Aôndo, man ne eren sha u i̱ va fefa yô; sha iyange la yô, Usha vea yegh vea saa kera man asemaakaa cii aa hia aa sough kera." 
2Peter3:13 Kpa se mba keghen Usha mba hev je man tar u he u perapera una tema ker yô, sha ityendezwa Na la." 
2Peter3:14 Ne mbadoon mo ishima, er ne lu keghen akaa ne yô, nôngo nen tsung sha u á kohol ne ken bem sha ishigh Nagh né lu wang a acôghol iyol ga yô." 
2Peter3:15 Man shi fa nen er ishima i wan i Ter wase la i lu myom yô. Kape anmgbian wase u doon se ishima Paulu kpaa, sha kwaghfan u i ne un la a nger ne je ne;" 
2Peter3:16 er a ôr akaa ne ken uwashika nav cii nahan. Akaa agen ken ve je yô, ka ican u kaven; ka a je man mbalanenkwagh kua mbalun asema pee pee la, ka ve kôr a, ve goom a mi hingir mtim sha ayol a ve; di er ve eren a uicighanmbauruamabera mbagenev kpaa nahan." 
2Peter3:17 Ne mbadoon mo ishima, er ne vande fan kwagh ne nahan yô, kuran nen i̱ de kera kôron ne i̱ urugh ne sha mtsum u mbarumun atindi ga la er né gba sha mtil wen la ga yô." 
2Peter3:18 Kpa seer vesen nen sha mrumun u sha mhôôn man sha mfe u ne fe Yesu Kristu Ter wase man Oryiman wase la. Ka Un i̱ civir Un ye, hegen zan zan sha iyange i tsôron la kpaa. Amen." 
1John1:1 Kwagh u a lu sha hiihii la je, u se ungwa, man u se nenge sha ashe ase kpaa, man u se kenger je, ave ase kpaa bende sha mi, sha kwagh u Imo i uma la—"

1John2:19 Ve due ken vese, kpa ve lu mba ken a vese ga, gadia vea lu mba ken a vese yô, ma ve lu a vese heregh, kpa ve due sha u á pase er i lu ve cii ve lu ken vese ga yô."
