Jude1:1 Yuda kpan u Yesu Kristu man anngô u Yakobu her kpaa, ngu sughun mba i yer ve, ve doo Aôndo Ter ishima shi i lu kuran ve sha ci u Yesu Kristu la." 
Jude1:2 I̱ seer ne mhôônom ma zungwen man bem man dooshima wuee. 
Jude1:3 Ne mbadoon mo ishima, er m lu nôngon sha gbashima u ngeren ne kwagh u myom wase u se zough sha mi la yô, gba u me nger ne me wa ne kwagh keng mer, nôngon nen ityav tsung sha kwagh u jighjigh u nan u i na sha ikev i uicighanmbaiorov inie i môm la." 
Jude1:4 Gadia ior mbagenev nyôr myer, ka mba i ver ve ngise je sha u á ôr ve ijir á na ve ibo ne yô, mba vende Aôndo mba gem mrumun u sha mhôôn u Aôndo wase hingir ve ijimba i eren, mba nyiman Yesu Kristu u A lu Tor wase man Ter wase, Un tswen ne." 
Jude1:5 Kpa sarem pe umbur ne shin er ne vande fan kera nahan kpaa mer, Ter yima nongoior Na ken tar u Igipiti kpa A mase timin mba ve na jighjigh ga la." 
Jude1:6 Mbatyomov mba Shaav mba ve kera wa iko sha tahav vev mbu i ver ve sha mi hiihii la ga, ve undu ijiir ve i teman jim la yô, ngu kuran ve ken uikangen ken ime i shin, gbem, sha ci u ijir i sha zegeyange la." 
Jude1:7 Kape Sodom man Gomora man agar a a kase ve la kpaa ve lu eren idya shi ve lu eren sha asaren a sha gbaaôndo ga je la, i tsaha ve sha usu u tsôron, ve hingir ikav i tesen." 
Jude1:8 Mban kpaa ka sha gbenda shon môm môm ne ve lu hôngor ayol a ve sha mnyam ma cien, ve lu vendan mbautahav, ve lu tuhwan mba ve engem la ye." 
Jude1:9 Kpa Mikael ortyom u Sha u tamen la, zum u a lu nôngon a diabolo, lu kpelan ikom i Mose la yô, a kera cihi a ôr un ijir i sha mtoho ga, kpa a kaa er: Ter A̱ tsaha u." 
Jude1:10 Ior mban gema mba tuhwan hanma kwagh u ve fe un ga yô, man akaa a ve kav a sha marami la er uzendenya mba fan kwagh ga nahan la, ka sha a je ve lu timin ye." 
Jude1:11 Kwagh á tser ve, gadia mba zenden sha gbenda u Kain, imeen i injar i Balaam la i hemba ve, ve tim sha mhendan u Koraki la." 
Jude1:12 Mban ka acan ken uiniongo enev; mba gbe yan kwagh imôngo gbar gbar tsô, mba we ayol a ve iko tseegh, ka abeen a lun a ura ga, a ahumbe a karen a mi sha yô, ka ikon i lun a atam ga sha shighe u inyom i bee la, i kpe kwa har, i wuhe i kera." 
Jude1:13 Ka agôndo a zegemnger a yemen iuuu, ka ve mbua hugh sha kunya ve ayol a ve, ka asan a tsumen gbenda, ka ior mba i ver angôghime sha ci ve gbem yô." 
Jude1:14 Heno u a lu kov u sha utaankaruhar hii sha Adam la kpaa, ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha kwagh u mban, a kaa er: Ter va a uicighan Nav udubu udubu," 
Jude1:15 sha u Una ôr ior cii ijir; mba ve vende Aôndo la cii Una na ve ibo sha aeren a ve a vendan Aôndo la cii, a ve er ve venda Aôndo la man shi sha akaaôron a vihin cii a mbaasorabo mba ve vende Aôndo la ve lu ôron sha a na yô." 
Jude1:16 Mban ka mbagbanahon mba ma kwagh a kom ve ga, mba zenden sha asaren a ve ayol a ve, ijô ve ngi hagher sha akaaôron, mba nyohon zwa sha u zuan a mtsera." 
Jude1:17 Kpa ne mbadoon mo ishima yô, umbur nen akaaôron a mbaapostoli mba Ter wase Yesu Kristu ve tsengaôron la." 
Jude1:18 Ve kaa a ven er: Sha ayange a masejime mbanahantar vea lu, vea dondo asaren a ve ayol a ve a vendan Aôndo la." 
Jude1:19 Ka mban je ve lu van a mbampav ye, ka mba ken iyol, mba a Jijingi ga." 
Jude1:20 Kpa ne mbadoon mo ishima yô, maan nen ayol a en ken icighanjighjigh wen u nan, eren nen msen ken Icighan Jijingi." 
Jude1:21 Kuran nen ayol a en, luun nen ken dooshima u Aôndo. Kegh nen mhôônom ma zungwen ma Ter wase Yesu Kristu u a lu zan ken uma u tsôron la." 
Jude1:22 Man mba ve lu tan akpelan la yô, zungwe nen ve mhôônom." 
Jude1:23 Yima nen ve, tsuwe nen ve ken usu kera, mbagenev yô zungwe nen ve mhôônom a mciem iyol. Ikondo i i hôngor sha kwagh u iyolough la tsô kpaa nyagh nen i." 
Jude1:24 Un u A lu a agee a Una kura ne sha u né kera nôngo gbev ga shi Una ver ne né lu a acôghol iyol ga sha ishigh ki iengem Na a iember tsung je," 
Jude1:25 Aôndo u mtswen, Oryiman wase ken Yesu Kristu Ter wase ne, iengem i̱ lu i Na kua shagba man agee man tahav, je er kwagh lu a vande lun ga man hegen kpaa zan zan gbem sha won. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Mpase u Yesu Kristu u Aôndo na Un sha u A̱ tese mbatomov Nav akaa a aa er fefa keng la, man A pase a sha mtindi u A tindi ortyom Na hen Yohane wanakiriki Na la;" 
Revelation1:2 ka un a er shiada sha mkaanem ma Aôndo, man sha kwagh u shiada u Yesu Kristu la sha akaa a a nenge cii ye." 
Revelation1:3 Saan or u ôron akaaôron a profeti ne iyol kua mba ve ongo ve we iko sha akaa a i nger keregh la kpaa, gadia shighe mgbôghom." 
Revelation1:4 Yohane ngu sughun iniongo i Kristu i itiankarihiar i ken Ashia la. Mrumun u sha mhôôn a̱ lu sha a ven kua bem mba ve dugh hen Un u A lu hegen, ngise kpaa lu, shi A lu van kpaa la, man shi hen Ujijingi mba utaankaruhar mba ve lu sha ishigh ki ikônough Nagh ki torough la," 
Revelation1:5 man shi hen Yesu Kristu, Orshiada u jighjigh, ka Waniunda u ken mbakpenev man ka Tor u tamen sha utor mba sha won kpaa. Un u se doo Un ishima man A sagh se A due a vese ken asorabo ase kera sha awambe a Na" 
Revelation1:6 man A gema se er se̱ hingir tartor, se̱ hingir upristi sha ci u Aôndo Na man Ter Na her kpaa. Un yô, iengem i̱ lu i Na kua tahav kpaa gbem sha won. Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Nenge, ngu van sha abeen man hanma ashe aa nenge a Na, kua ve mba ve kuma Un la kpaa. Akuraior a sha won cii aa vaa sha ci Na. Kape i lu je la. Amen." 
Revelation1:8 Mo M ngu Alefa man Omega, kape Ter Aôndo A kaa la, Un u A lu hegen, ngise kpaa lu, shi A lu van kpaa la, Uhembanagee." 
Revelation1:9 Mo Yohane, anmgbian wen u m lu a kwar a ven imôngo sha atsan a yan man sha tartor man sha ishima i taver ken Yesu, m lu ken icile i i yer er Patemo la, sha ci u mkaanem ma Aôndo man sha ci u shiada u Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 M lu ken Jijingi sha iyange i Ter, tsô m ungwa zegeimo ken ijime yam er ka ikpamkor nahan," 
Revelation1:11 i lu kaan er: Kwagh u u nenge a mi yô, nger ken takerada, tindi a mi hen iniongo i Kristu i itiankarihiar, hen Efese man Semurna man Peregamu man Tiatire man Sardisu man Filadelfia man Laodishia." 
Revelation1:12 Tsô m gema sha u me nenge imo i i lu ôron kwagh a mo la. M gem yô, m nenge udaarmbaamengerev mba zenaria utaankaruhar," 
Revelation1:13 man ker atô u udaarmbaamengerev mbala yô, m nenge a Or er ka Wan u or nahan, haa riga gba shin angahar gema kange kwange u zenaria sha vanger." 
Revelation1:14 Ityough Nagh man ice Na kungu segh segh er aiveiyôngo nahan, kungu er senou nahan; ashe a Na lu er nomborusu nahan," 
Revelation1:15 angahar a Na lu er dela u engem u i ser un ken usuiwaagh nahan. Imo Na lu er imo i mngerem ma vesen nahan," 
Revelation1:16 lu a asan ataankarahar ken uwegh Nagh ku yanegh, sanker u esen akur ahar tsor tsor lu duen ken zwa Na, ishigh Nagh yô, lu er iyange ka ia ta taveraa nahan." 
Revelation1:17 M nengen a Na yô, m gba hen angahar a Na er orkpen nahan, kpa A penda uwegh Nagh ku yanegh sha mo, A kaa er: De cie ga. Mo M ngu u hiihii man u masetyô kpaa," 
Revelation1:18 shi M ngu uma; lu M kpe, kpa nenge, shi M ngu uma gbem sha won, man M ngu a ishindan i kuugh man i Hade kpaa." 
Revelation1:19 Nahan nger akaa a u nenge a mi yô, a a lu hegen man a aa va er ken hemen la kpaa." 
Revelation1:20 Kwaghmyer u asan a ataankarahar a u nenge a mi ken uwegh Agh ku yanegh man udaarmbaamengerev mba utaankaruhar mba zenaria la yô, ka nahan asan a ataankarahar la, ka mbaityomov mba iniongo i Kristu: itiankarihiar la man udaarmbaamengerev mba utaankaruhar la ka iniongo i Kristu i itiankarihiar je la." 
Revelation2:1 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u ken Efese wer: Un u A ker asan ataankarahar ken uwegh Nagh ku yanegh shi A lu zenden ker atô u udaarmbaamengerev mba zenaria mba utaankaruhar la, ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er:" 
Revelation2:2 M fa aeren a ou man tom wou u sha ican kua ishima i taver you, man shi er u fetyô u rumun aferaior ga, kpa u kar mba ve yer ayol a ve er mbaapostoli, kpa i lu nahan ga la, u nenge ka mbaaiev." 
Revelation2:3 U ngu a ishima i taver, u rumun ican sha ci u iti Yam kpaa, u vôr ga." 
Revelation2:4 Kpa kwagh shim a we, ka er u undu dooshima wou u hiihii la yô." 
Revelation2:5 Umbur hen ape u gbe yô, gema ishima, er aeren a hiihii la. Gayô, Me va hen we, Me tôô daarimenger wou ken ijiir na kera, aluer wea gema ishima ga yô." 
Revelation2:6 Kpa kwagh ne yô, u ngu a mi, u kôr aeren a Mbanikolai la ihom a Mo kpaa M ker a ihom la." 
Revelation2:7 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô. Or u nan hembe yô, Me na nan, nana ya kon u uma u u lu ken Paradiso u Aôndo la." 
Revelation2:8 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u hen Semurna wer: Un u A lu u hiihii man u masetyô u a kpe kpa shi A lu uma la, ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er:" 
Revelation2:9 M fa ican you i yan man shi ibanave you, nahan kpaa u ngee a akaa; man ityuhwanev mbi ior mba ve yer ayol a ve er Mbayuda kpa i lu nahan ga, i lu shinagoge u Satan la." 
Revelation2:10 De cie akaa a aa va tser u la ga. Nenge diabolo ngu veren iyol u una kende ior enev mbagenev ken gaadi, sha u á kar ne yô; man ican ia er ne á kuma ayange pue je. Lu jighjigh, ar ken ku je man Me na u tsar u uma ye." 
Revelation2:11 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô. Or u nan hembe yô, ku u sha uhar la ua er nan kwagh ga." 
Revelation2:12 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u hen Peregamu wer: Un u A lu a sanker u esen akur ahar tsor tsor la ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er: 
Revelation2:13 M fa henpe u tem ka henpe ikônough ki torough ki Satan ki lu je la, nahan kpaa u kusu iti Yam gbang gbang, u nyiman jighjigh u nan Mo la ga, shin sha ayange a Antipa orshiada Wam u jighjigh la kpaa, un u i wua un hen ven, henpe Satan a tem la." 
Revelation2:14 Kpa akaa shim a we kpeghee, ka er u lu a mbagenev hen a we mba ve kusu ityesen i Balaam u a tese Balaki er a̱ gbihi kwaghhônon sha ishigh ki ônov mba Iserael la; ka u yan inyamakombo man shi u eren idya je la." 
Revelation2:15 We kpaa, u ngu a mbagenev mba ve kusu ityesen i Mbanikolai la nahan vough. Nahan yô, gema ishima," 
Revelation2:16 gayô, Me va hen we fefa, Me va nôngo ityav a we sha sanker u ken zwa Wam ne." 
Revelation2:17 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô. Or u nan hembe yô, Me na nan mana u ken myer la, shi Me na nan iwen i pupuu, man sha iwen la yô, i nger iti i he sha mi, i ma or nan fe i ga, saa or u nana ngohol i la." 
Revelation2:18 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u hen Tiatire wer: Wan u Aôndo u A lu a ashe er nomborusu nahan man shi angahar a Na a lu er dela u engem la, ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er:" 
Revelation2:19 M fa aeren a ou man dooshima wou man jighjigh u nan wou man tom wou man ishima i taver you, man er aeren a ou a masetyô la hemba ngeen a a hiihii la." 
Revelation2:20 Kpa kwagh u a shim a we yô, ka er u gbe den Yesebel kwase u a yer iyol na er profeti la, ngu tesen man ngu tsughun mbatomov Av er ve̱ er idya shi ve̱ ya inyamakombo kpaa." 
Revelation2:21 M na un ian Mer, a̱ gema ishima, kpa sar un pe geman ishima den idya na la ga." 
Revelation2:22 Nenge, Me kende un inya sha gambe; mba ve er idya a na la kpaa Me kende ve ken zegecan, aluer vea gema asema vea de aeren a na la ga yô," 
Revelation2:23 man Me wua ônov nav sha ku. Iniongo i Kristu cii ia fa er i lu Mo je M tim ahi man asema ye; man Me na ne injar sha inja i aeren a en ser ser. 
Revelation2:24 Kpa ne mbagenev mba ken Tiatire mba ne lu a ityesen ne ga shi ne fe akaa a cimin a Satan er ve kaan nahan la ga yô, M ngu kaan ne mer: M kera ngu seer ne ma ikav mbigenev ga." 
Revelation2:25 Kpa kwagh u ne lu a mi la yô, kusu nen un gbang gbang zan zan Me kar van." 
Revelation2:26 Or u nan hembe shi nana ver ishima sha aeren a Am zan zan mkur yô, Me na nan tahav sha akuraior," 
Revelation2:27 nana tema tor sha a sha tôgh ku iyôôgh er ka i hembe ityegh avur avur nahan, er Mo kpaa M ngohol tahav hen Terem nahan," 
Revelation2:28 man Me na nan ishan i sha use. 
Revelation2:29 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô." 
Revelation3:1 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u Sardisu wer: Un u A lu a ujijingi mba utaankaruhar mba Aôndo man asan ataankarahar la, ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er: M fa aeren a ou, u ngu a iti i i kaan er u ngu uma, kpa u gema u ngu kpenegh je." 
Revelation3:2 Lu per, taver akaa a a shi her a a sôôn u kpen la. M kar aeren a ou sha ishigh ki Aôndo Wam a iv kuma ga." 
Revelation3:3 Nahan yô, umbur akaa a u ngohol shi u ongo a la, kusu a, gema ishima. Aluer u lu per ga yô, Me va er ormbaiv nahan, ú fa shighe u Me va hen a we ga." 
Revelation3:4 Nahan kpaa u ngu a ati agen ken Sardisu her kpeghee, ka ior mba ve hôngor akondo a ve ga yô. Vea zende a Mo a akondo a pupuu iyol, gadia ve kuma." 
Revelation3:5 Or u nan hembe yô, kape á haa nan akondo a pupuu iyol je la, man Me ese iti i nan ken ruamabera u uma kera je ga, kpa Me pase iti i nan sha ishigh ki Terem man sha ishigh ki mbatyomov Nav kpaa." 
Revelation3:6 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô." 
Revelation3:7 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u hen Filadelfia wer: Un u A lu icighan, A lu u mimi, u A lu a ishindan i Davidi la, Una bugh yô, ma or nana kera senda ga, Una senda yô, ma or nana kera bugh ga la, ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er:" 
Revelation3:8 M fa aeren a ou. Nenge, M ver hunda ivegher sha ishigh you, ma or nana fatyô u sendan u ga. Gadia u ngu a anagee kpeghee, kpa u kusu kwaghôron Wam, u kera nyiman iti Yam ga." 
Revelation3:9 Nenge, Me na, mba ken shinagoge u Satan mba ve yer ayol a ve er Mbayuda kpa i lu nahan ga i lu aie tsô ve eren la, Me na, vea va gure inya hen angahar a ou, vea va rumun er u doom ishima yô." 
Revelation3:10 Er u kor kwaghôron u ishimawan Yam yô, Mo kpaa Me kura u shighe u imeen i i lu van sha tar cii sha u karen mba ve tem sha tar yô." 
Revelation3:11 M ngu van fefa. Kusu kwagh u u lu a mi la gbang gbang sha u ma or nana̱ de ngohol we tsar ga yô. 
Revelation3:12 Or u nan hembe yô, Me gema nan nana hingir ityughunugh ken tempel u Aôndo Wam, nana kera due ker mayange ga, shi Me nger iti i Aôndo Wam sha a nan man shi iti i gar u Aôndo Wam, ka Yerusalem u he u a lu senen Sha, a dugh hen Aôndo Wam la, kua shi iti Yam i he kpaa." 
Revelation3:13 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô." 
Revelation3:14 Nger hen ortyom u nongo u Kristu u hen Laodishia wer: Un u a lu Amen, Orshiada u jighjigh man u mimi, mhii u igbetar i Aôndo ngu ôron akaa ne nahan er:" 
Revelation3:15 M fa aeren a ou, u ndôhôr ga, u tsee kpaa ga. Ma u ndôhôr, gayô, ma u tsee!" 
Revelation3:16 Nahan yô, er u sagh a sagh yô, u tsee ga, u ndôhôr kpaa ga yô, Me haa u ken zwa Wam kera er ijer nahan." 
Revelation3:17 Gadia u ngu kaan wer, m ngee a akaa, m hingir u lun a kwagh ave kpishi, ma kwagh kera banem ga, kpa u kera fa er u gbe kera, u lu mhôônom mhôônom, u kungu ican, u pir ashe, u lu idyelegh kpaa ga." 
Revelation3:18 M ngu wasen we henen Mer, yam kwagh a Mo, yam zenaria u i ser sha usu sha er ú ngee a kwagh yô, man shi akondo a pupuu sha er ú haa a iyol, kunya u idyelegh wou u̱ de dugh ken igbar ga yô, man shi icigh ki shighen sha ashe a ou sha er ú nenge kera yô." 
Revelation3:19 Mo yô, mba ve doom cii ka M tsaha ve shi M kôôm ve kpaa, nahan yô, ver ishima, gema ishima." 
Revelation3:20 Nenge, M ngu tilen sha hunda, M ngu manden uwegh. Aluer or nana ungwa imo Yam nana bugh hunda yô, Me nyôr hen a nan, Me ya kwaghyan a nan imôngo, nan di kpaa, a Mo imôngo." 
Revelation3:21 Or u nan hembe yô, Me na nana tema a Mo imôngo sha ikônough Yagh ki torough di er Mo kpaa M hembe man M tem a Terem imôngo sha ikônough Nagh ki torough nahan." 
Revelation3:22 Or u nan lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa kwagh u Jijingi A lu ôron a iniongo i Kristu yô." 
Revelation4:1 Ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, m ver ashe, yô, nenge, hunda lu Sha, lu ivegher. Man imo i hiihii i m ungwa er ka ikpamkor nahan la yô, i ôr kwagh a mo i kaa er: Kôndo sha heen, me tese u akaa a aa er ken masetyô u angan keng yô." 
Revelation4:2 Fese nahan m lu ken Jijingi, man nenge, i ver ikônough ki torough Sha man i tema sha ikônough ki torough kila." 
Revelation4:3 Un u A tema sha mi la, mluashe Na lu er iwen i yasepi man i sardiu nahan, ikume i sha aôndo kase ikônough ki torough kila wa atô, mluashe u i lu er emeraldi nahan." 
Revelation4:4 Man mkônom ma torom magenem ikundu kar m nyiin kase ikônough ki torough kila wa atô. Mbatamen ikundu kar unyiin tema sha mkônom ma torom mara, ve lu a akondo a pupuu iyol man atsar a zenaria lu ve sha ityou." 
Revelation4:5 Ken ikônough ki torough kila yô, inyiar due ker man shi imo man idyuran kpaa. Amenger ataankarahar lu yeghen usu bong sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough kila, ka ujijingi mba utaankaruhar mba Aôndo je la." 
Revelation4:6 Sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough kila lu er ka zegemnger u lun er gelase nahan, bee krusetalu. Man ker atô u ikônough ki torough kila man ken ikasen i ki akaauma lu her anyiin, a lu a ashe iyol kpulughuu sha ishi man ken ijime kpaa." 
Revelation4:7 Kwaghuma u hiihii la lu er begha nahan, kwaghuma u sha uhar la lu er bua nahan, kwaghuma u sha utar la lu a ishigh er ka ki orough nahan, man kwaghuma u sha unyiin la lu er gafa u purugh nahan." 
Revelation4:8 Akaauma a anyiin la cii hanmô ve lu a akper ataratar, ve cir ashe iyol kpulughuu ken won man kimi kpaa. Tugh man tetan cii ve memen ga, ve kaan er: Icighan, Icighan, Icighan, Ter Aôndo Uhembanagee, u ngise lu shi A lu hegen shi A lu van kpaa la." 
Revelation4:9 Man hanma shighe u akaauma la a na iengem man icivir man iwuese hen Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough A lu uma gbem sha won la yô," 
Revelation4:10 mbatamen mba ikundu kar unyiin la ve gba inya sha ishigh ki Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la ve civir Un u A lu uma gbem sha won la. Ve haa atsar a ve sha ishigh ki Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la ve kaa er: 
Revelation4:11 We, Ter Aôndo wase, U kuma u ngohol iengem man icivir man agee gadia U gba akaa cii man ka sha ishima You kpaa a lu, shi i gbe a kpaa ye." 
Revelation5:1 Man ken uwegh ku yanegh ku Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la m nenge a ihurenruamabera, i nger un kimi kua ken ijime kpaa i cir un i var un akav ataankarahar." 
Revelation5:2 Tsô m nenge ortyom u Sha u ageegh lu yôôn sha zegeimo er: Ka an nan kom u bughun ruamabera ne saghen akav a na? 
Revelation5:3 Kpa ma or môm u Sha shin u shin tar shin u shin atô u taregh kpaa fatyô u bughun ruamabera ne shin u nengen ker kpaa ga. 
Revelation5:4 Nahan m vaa mimi, gadia i zua a ma or u nan kom u bughun ruamabera ne shin u nengen ker kpaa ga." 
Revelation5:5 Kpa or môm u ken mbatamen la kaa a mo er: De vaan ga. Nenge, Begha u ken kwe u Yuda, Mise u Davidi la, A hemba; nahan Una bugh ruamabera ne kua akav a na a ataankarahar la kpaa." 
Revelation5:6 M nenge ken atô u ikônough ki torough man hen atô u akaauma a anyiin la, man ken atô u mbatamen la, Waniyôngo tile, lu er i sôngo Un nahan, lu a akor ataankarahar man ashe kpaa ataankarahar, ka ujijingi mba utaankaruhar mba Aôndo mba i tindin ve shin tar cii la." 
Revelation5:7 A va A va ngohol ruamabera la ken uwegh ku yanegh ku Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la. 
Revelation5:8 Ngohol ruamabera la yô, akaauma a anyiin la man mbatamen mba ikundu kar unyiin mbala gba inya sha ishigh ki Waniyôngo, ve lu a mbaadiguve sha ave ser ser kua agbande a zenaria kpaa iv a kwaghhumandoon, ka mbamsen mba uicighanmbaiorov je la." 
Revelation5:9 Ve wa icam i he ve kaa er: We, U kuma u ngohol ruamabera la, bughun akav a na, gadia i sôngo U man U yam Aôndo ior sha awambe a Ou ken hanma nongo man hanma zwa man hanma nongoior man hanma ikurior," 
Revelation5:10 U er ve, ve hingir tartor man upristi sha ci u Aôndo wase, vea tema tor sha tar." 
Revelation5:11 Tsô m nenge, nahan m ungwa imo i mbatyomov mba Shaav kpishi ve kase ikônough ki torough kila man akaauma la man mbatamen mbala. Iyenge ve lu dubu pue kwa dubu pue man udubu kwa dubu;" 
Revelation5:12 ve lu kaan sha imo i taver er: Waniyôngo u i senge Un la kuma u ngohol agee man akaa a ngeen wuee man kwaghfan man mtaver man icivir man iengem man iwuese. 
Revelation5:13 Shi m ungwa akaa a i gbe a cii, a Sha man a shin tar man a shin atô u taregh man a shin zegemnger kpaa lu kaan er: Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la man Waniyôngo kpaa, ve̱ lu a iwuese man icivir man iengem man tahav gbem sha won." 
Revelation5:14 Akaauma a anyiin la kaa er: Amen; mbatamen kpaa gba inya civir. 
Revelation6:1 Man m nenge zum u Waniyôngo bugh ikav i môm ken akav ataankarahar la, m ungwa u môm u ken akaauma a anyiin la lu ôron kwagh er ka imo i idyuran nahan er: Va yôô!" 
Revelation6:2 M veren ashe yô, nenge, nyinya u pupuu lu. Un u a tema sha mi la, lu a ada; shi i na un tsar u sha ityou kpaa. A due, lu hemban, man lu sha u una hemba kpaa." 
Revelation6:3 Zum u A bugh ikav i sha uhar yô, m ungwa kwaghuma u sha uhar kaa er: Va yôô!" 
Revelation6:4 Tsô nyinya ugen due nyian bong; man un u a tema sha mi la, i na un sha u a̱ kura bem shin tar kera, ior ve̱ wua ayol a ve; i na un zegesanker." 
Revelation6:5 Zum u A bugh ikav i sha utar yô, m ungwa kwaghuma u sha utar kaa er: Va yôô! Tsô m veren ashe yô, nenge, nyinya u il lu, man un u a tema sha mi la lu a iyôgh ki karen kwagh a mi sha uwe." 
Revelation6:6 Man m ungwa kwagh er ka imo nahan ken atô u akaauma a anyiin la lu kaan er: Ikaren i alakema ka gbengersule, uikaren mba shair utar kpaa ka gbengersule, man mkurem kua wain yô, de vihin ve kera ga." 
Revelation6:7 Zum u A bugh ikav i sha unyiin yô, m ungwa kwaghuma u sha unyiin la kaa er: Va yôô!" 
Revelation6:8 Tsô nenge, nyinya u fung lu, un u a tema sha mi la, iti na er ku, hade lu zan a na ityô, man i na ve tahav sha tiôn môm u ken atôôn anyiin a taregh, sha u ve̱ wua sha sanker man sha ijen man sha bouange man sha inyamikume i shin tar." 
Revelation6:9 Zum u A bugh ikav i sha utaan la m nenge a uuma mba ior mba i wua ve sha ci u kwaghôron u Aôndo man shi sha ci u shiada u ve lu eren la, ve lu shin atô a atse a nanden nagh sha mi la." 
Revelation6:10 Ve genger imo ve kaa er: We Ter, icighan man u mimi kpaa, shi nan je man U ôr ijir U or iyev sha awambe ase sha mba ve lu shin tar laa?" 
Revelation6:11 Tsô i na hanmô ve riga u pupuu man i kaa a ve er, ve̱ hira tile kpuaa zan zan i iv iyenge i mba ve lu akar a ve a tom man anmgbianev vev kpaa mba á va wua ve er lu i wua ve nahan la." 
Revelation6:12 Man zum u A bugh ikav i sha ataratar la, m ver ashe yô, nenge, tar tenger kpen kpen, iyange hingir il er ibashôhô u lun shuwa shuwa nahan, uwer jimin cii hingir er ka awambe nahan." 
Revelation6:13 Asan a sha aôndo osough haa shin tar er tur ka a ndoor atam a na a kô zum u ahumbe a taveraa ka a va tenger un nahan," 
Revelation6:14 kwavaôndo kpaa pav gba huren er ka i hure ihurenruamabera nahan, hanma uwo man hanma icile kpaa i mough a ve sha ajiir a ve kera." 
Revelation6:15 Utor mba sha won kua ashagbaior man utormbautyav mba tamen man mbanyarev man mbaageev man hanma or cii, shin kpan shin wan kpaa, ve yer ken ubar man ken awen a sha iwo." 
Revelation6:16 Ve kaa a iwo man a awen er, gba kighir nen se, yisa nen se sha ishigh ki Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la man shi sha iyugh i Waniyôngo kpaa," 
Revelation6:17 gadia zegeiyange u iyugh Na kuma ve, ka an je nana fatyô u tilen sha?" 
Revelation7:1 Ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, m nenge mbatyomov mba Shaav unyiin tile sha azongo a tar a anyiin la, ve kôr ahumbe a anyiin a sha tar la sha u ma ahumbe a̱ de pever shin tar ga, shin sha zegemnger kpaa ga, shin sha ma kon kpaa ga." 
Revelation7:2 Shi m nenge ortyom u Sha ugen lu kôndon pe iyange i dugh la, kôr kwagh u veren ikav a mi u Aôndo u uma la ken uwegh nagh, a ôr kwagh genger genger a mbatyomov mba Shaav mba unyiin mbala, mba i ne ve tahav mbu ve̱ vihi tar kua zegemnger kpaa la," 
Revelation7:3 a kaa er: De vihin tar shin zegemnger shin ikon kpaa ga saa sé ver mbatomov mba Aôndo wase ikav sha atsul ve. 
Revelation7:4 Tsô m ungwa iyenge i mba i ver ve ikav la, ka ior dubu deri môm man dubu akunduahar kar unyiin i ver ve ikav ken ikwe i ônov mba Iserael la cii ye." 
Revelation7:5 Ken kwe u Yuda mba i ver ve ikav yô, ve lu dubu pue kar uhar. Ken kwe u Ruben lu dubu pue kar uhar. Ken kwe u Gadi lu dubu pue kar uhar," 
Revelation7:6 ken kwe u Asher lu dubu pue kar uhar, ken kwe u Nafetali lu dubu pue kar uhar, ken kwe u Manase lu dubu pue kar uhar," 
Revelation7:7 ken kwe u Shimeon lu dubu pue kar uhar. Ken kwe u Levi lu dubu pue kar uhar, ken kwe u Isakar lu dubu pue kar uhar," 
Revelation7:8 ken kwe u Sebulon lu dubu pue kar uhar, ken kwe u Yosev lu dubu pue kar uhar man ken kwe u Benyamin kpaa mba i ver ve ikav yô, ve lu dubu pue kar uhar." 
Revelation7:9 Ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, m ver ashe, yô, nenge, zegeikpelaior lu, ma or fatyô u ôron i iyenge ga, ve due ken hanma ikurior man hanma nongo man hanma nongoior man hanma zwa kpaa. Ve tile sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough kila man sha ishigh ki Waniyôngo ve haa akondo a pupuu iyol shi ve lu a andar a avilegh sha ave." 
Revelation7:10 Ve lu genger imo kaan er: Myom ka u Aôndo wase u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la man shi Waniyôngo kpaa. 
Revelation7:11 Mbatyomov mba Shaav cii tile kase ikônough ki torough man shi mbatamen man akaauma a anyiin la kpaa, ve gba inya ve cir ishiv inya sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough kila ve civir Aôndo," 
Revelation7:12 ve kaa er: Amen, iwuese man iengem man kwaghfan man ishughun man icivir man agee man mtaver cii ve̱ lu mba Aôndo wase gbem sha won. Amen." 
Revelation7:13 Ugen ken mbatamen ôr kwagh a mo kaa er: Mba ve hee akondo a pupuu la, ka unô, man shi ka han ve dughu?" 
Revelation7:14 M gema m kaa a na mer: Terem, we u fa. Tsô a kaa a mo er: Mban ka mba ve dugh ken zegecan la yô; ve ôô uriga vev ken awambe a Waniyôngo, ve kungu ve." 
Revelation7:15 Ka sha ci u nahan man ve lu sha ishigh ki ikônough ki Aôndo ki torough, ve lu eren Un tom ken tempel Na tugh man tetan kpaa ye. Un u A tem sha ikônough ki torough la Una samber tenti Na sha a ve." 
Revelation7:16 Ijen ia kera kôr ve mayange ga, imura kpaa ga, oo ua kera ta ve ga shin ma mtsee kpaa ga," 
Revelation7:17 gadia Waniyôngo u A lu ker atô u ikônough ki torough la Una hemen ve, Una za a ve hen ambor a mngerem ma umam, Aôndo Una ese ve mliam sha ashe kera cii." 
Revelation8:1 Zum u A bugh ikav i sha utaankaruhar la yô, huan Sha ving, kuma er a lu vegherihwa nahan." 
Revelation8:2 Tsô m nenge mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utaankaruhar mba ve til sha ishigh ki Aôndo la, i na ve ikor i tôngon itiankarihiar." 
Revelation8:3 Ortyom u Sha ugen va tile hen atse a nanden nagh sha mi la, lu a gbande u zenaria. I na un kwaghhumandoon ngee er a̱ nungwa sha mbamsen mba uicighanmbaiorov cii, sha atse a zenaria a a lu sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough la." 
Revelation8:4 Tsô mnyim ma kwaghhumandoon la kôndo a mbamsen mba uicighanmbaiorov imôngo ken uwegh ku ortyom u Sha u a lu sha ishigh ki Aôndo la. 
Revelation8:5 Tsô ortyom u Sha la tôô gbande la, a iv un a usu u sha atse la, haa shin tar. Tsô idyuran gba kua imo man inyiar man tar kpaa tenger." 
Revelation8:6 Nahan mbatyomov mba utaankaruhar mba ve lu a ikor i tôngon la wa iyol u tôngon. 
Revelation8:7 Tsô u hiihii la tôngo nahan awombo man usu haa shin tar i nungwa awambe sha mi, tsô tiôn môm u taregh u ken atôôn atar, hia kera, ikon kpaa, tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar hia kera, toho u ndor cii kpaa hia kera." 
Revelation8:8 Tsô ortyom u Sha, u sha uhar kpaa tôngo nahan i kende kwagh shin zegemnger lu er ka zegewo u hian nahan," 
Revelation8:9 tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a zegemnger hingir awambe, maa tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a akaauma a shin zegemnger kpe man shi tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a utso kpaa vihi." 
Revelation8:10 Ortyom u Sha u sha utar kpaa tôngo tsô zegeshan osough Sha gba, lu yeghen er ka ikaghusu nahan. A gba sha tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a uifi man amboramnger kpaa." 
Revelation8:11 Iti i ishan la yô, er Kon u yuan, tsô tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a mngerem kpaa gema yua er kon u yuan la nahan. Ior kpishi kpe sha mngerem mara sha ci u ma you yô." 
Revelation8:12 Ortyom u Sha u sha unyiin la kpaa tôngo tsô i vihi tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a iyange, man shi tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a a uweregh man shi tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a asan kpaa, nahan tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar iwanger ve la gema wa ime, tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a sev kera wanger ga, tugh kpaa nahan." 
Revelation8:13 Tsô m nenge, m ungwa gafa lu purugh sha kwavaôndo je, lu kaan sha zegeimo er: Kwagh á tser, kwagh á tser, kwagh á tser mba ve tem shin tar cii sha ci u mtenge u ikor i i shi her i mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utar mba ve sôôn u tôngon la." 
Revelation9:1 Ortyom u Sha u sha utaan kpaa tôngo, tsô m nenge ishan i i osough Sha i gbe shin tar la, man i na un ishindan u ihungwa i i ze kweng la." 
Revelation9:2 Nahan a bugh ihungwa i i ze kweng la maa mnyim gba duen shin ihungwa la er ka mnyim ma zegeusu u iwaagh nahan, iyange man kwavaôndo wa ime sha ci u mnyim ma ihungwa mara." 
Revelation9:3 Ken mnyim mara yô, mbaahungwa due kimi va sha tar man i na ve tahav er ayese a sha tar a lu a tahav nahan." 
Revelation9:4 I ta ve icin er ve̱ de vihin toho u sha tar ga, shin ma kwagh u menden shin ma kon kpaa ga, saa di ior mba ve lu a ikav i Aôndo sha atsul a ve ga la." 
Revelation9:5 I na ve ian i wuan ve ga, kpa ve̱ er ve ican zan zan iwer itian, man ican ve la lu er ka mnyoonom ma iyese nahan zum u ka ia ta or yô." 
Revelation9:6 Sha ayange la yô, ior vea ker ku kpa vea zua a mi ga, vea tôm u ma ve kpe kpa ku ua yevese ve." 
Revelation9:7 Mluashe u mbaahungwa mbala yô, lu er ka anyinya a i ser a iyol sha ci u utya nahan. Sha ityouv vev yô, kwagh lu er ka atsar a a bee zenaria yô. Ishiv vev yô, lu er ka ishiv mbi iorov nahan." 
Revelation9:8 Ice ve lu er ice i ukase, anyi a ve lu er anyi a begha nahan." 
Revelation9:9 Ve har iper i utya, i lu er iper i iyôô nahan, iov i akper a ve lu er ihuran i akeke a utya kpishi nahan, zum u anyinya ka a zaan ayem ken utya la." 
Revelation9:10 Ve lu a ica er ayese nahan man ishoho kpaa; tahav vev mbu eren ior ican zan zan iwer itian la, mbu lu ken ica ve." 
Revelation9:11 Ve lu a tor ve, ka ortyom u ihungwa la, iti na ken zwa Heberu er Abadon man ken zwa Grika yô, iti na er Apolion." 
Revelation9:12 Kwaghtseren u hiihii la kar kera ve, nenge, mase shin u akaatseren ahar aa va yô." 
Revelation9:13 Ortyom u Sha u sha ataratar la kpaa tôngo. Tsô m ungwa imo due ken akor anyiin a atse a zenaria a nanden nagh sha mi a sha ishigh ki Aôndo la," 
Revelation9:14 i kaa a ortyom u Sha u sha ataratar u a lu a ikpamkor la er: Sagh mbatyomov mba unyiin mba i zer ve hen zegeifi u Uferati," 
Revelation9:15 nahan i sagh mbatyomov mba shaav mba unyiin mbala, mba i ver ve a ver je sha ci u ihwa shon la man iyange la man uwer la man inyom la sha u ve̱ wua tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a ior kera." 
Revelation9:16 Iyenge i mbautyav mba sha anyinya lu dubu pue kwa dubu pue zan zan kwa har je, m ungwa iyenge ve la." 
Revelation9:17 M nenge anyinya ken mpase u sha mnenge man mba ve lu hendan a la kpaa, ve lu nahan: ve har iper i utya i nyian er usu nahan man i kwel kwel er hiakinto nahan man shi i ayaikure er sulfur nahan. Ityouv mbi anyinyav lu er ityouv mbi ubegha nahan, ken ijô ve yô, usu lu duen kua mnyim man sulfur kpaa." 
Revelation9:18 Sha atsan shon atar ne yô, i wua tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a ior, lu sha usu man mnyim man sulfur mba ve lu duen ken ijô ve la." 
Revelation9:19 Gadia tahav mbu anyinya la mbu ken ijô ve man shi ken ica ve kpaa, gadia ica ve lu er iyô nahan, lu a ityouv sha mi, lu sha mbi je man ve vihin akaa ye." 
Revelation9:20 Ior mba ve shi her mba i wua ve sha atsan la ga yô, ve kera gema ishima ve undu aeren a sha ave ve la ga, ve de u civir ujijingi mba Satan kpaa ga, shin u civir ieev kpaa ga, mbi sha zenaria man azurfa man dela man iwen man kon, ka mbi mbi fetyô u nengen ga, shin u ungwan ga, shin u zenden kpaa ga yô." 
Revelation9:21 Ve kera gema asema a ve, ve undu iwooor ve, shin ahir a ve a eren shin idya ve i eren, shin iv vev la kpaa ga." 
Revelation10:1 M shi m nenge ortyom u Sha ugen, u ageegh, lu senen Sha, a cir ibeenegh iyol, ikume i sha aôndo kpaa lu sha ityough nagh, ishigh nagh lu er iyange nahan, angahar a na lu er mtôm ma usum nahan." 
Revelation10:2 Lu a wantakerada sha uwe ivegher. A ndyar nguhar ku iyan sha zegemnger man shi a ndyar nguhar ku imese sha tar. 
Revelation10:3 A genger imo er ka kume u begha nahan. Er a genger imo yô, idyuran i itiankarihiar dura." 
Revelation10:4 Er idyuran i itiankarihiar la dura yô, m wa iyol u ngeren, kpa m ungwa imo due Sha kaa er: Cir kwagh u idyuran i itiankarihiar la i kaa la, ver ikav sha mi, de ngeren ga." 
Revelation10:5 Ortyom u Sha u m nenge a tile sha zegemnger man sha tar kpaa la a kende uwegh nagh ku yanegh sha je," 
Revelation10:6 a bum Un u A lu uma gbem sha won u A gbe Sha kua akaa a a lu ker cii man tar kua akaa a a lu sha mi cii man zegemnger kua akaa a a lu shimi cii, a kaa er, mayange á kera ngôôr je ga" 
Revelation10:7 kpa sha ayange a ortyom u Sha u sha utaankaruhar la, zum u una tôngo yô, kwaghmyer u Aôndo la una kure er A lu pasen uprofeti, mbatomov Nav la nahan." 
Revelation10:8 Tsô imo i m vande ungwan Sha la, shi ôr kwagh a mo kaa er: Za, za tôô takerada u a lu ivegher ken uwegh ku ortyom u Sha u a til sha zegemnger man sha tar la." 
Revelation10:9 Nahan m za hen ortyom u Sha la, m kaa a na mer, a̱ nam wantakerada la. Tsô a kaa a mo er: Ngohol, ya, una yua u shin uya, kpa ken zwa yô, una nyoho er ka iyough nahan." 
Revelation10:10 Nahan m ngohol wantakerada la ken uwegh ku ortyom u Sha la, m ya, nyohom ken zwa er iyough nahan. M ye kera yô, gema yuam shin uya." 
Revelation10:11 Shi i kaa a mo er: Ka u shi ú ôr kwaghôron u profeti sha kwagh u iniongo i ior kpishi man akuraior kpishi man ijô kpishi man utor kpishi keng. 
Revelation11:1 Nahan i nam iyiagh ki karen kwagh a mi, ki lu er ka gbough nahan. I kaa a mo er: Mough sha, kar tempel u Aôndo man atse a nanden nagh sha mi, man mba ve lu civir Aôndo kimi la kpaa." 
Revelation11:2 Kpa tembe u ken kungur u tempel la yô, gba den u tsô, u̱ lu ken won, de karen u ga, gadia i na u sha ikev i akuraior, aa ndyar icighangar shin angahar á kuma iwer akunduahar kar ihiar." 
Revelation11:3 Me na mbashiada Av mba uhar tahav vea ôr kwaghôron u profeti á kuma ayange dubu man deri uhar man akunduatar, vea haa abaasôhô iyol." 
Revelation11:4 Mban yô, ka ikon i olev ihiar man shi udaarmbaamenger uhar mba ve til sha ishigh ki Ter u taregh." 
Revelation11:5 Ka a sar or pe eren ve kwagh u vihin yô, usu u due ken zwa ve u hia mbaihomov vev. Man shi ka a sar or pe eren ve kwagh u vihin yô, kape á wua nan keng je la." 
Revelation11:6 Ve yô, mba a tahav mbu cirin Sha sha er ma ura u̱ de nee sha ayange a ve lu ôron kwaghôron u profeti la ga yô, shi mba a tahav sha mnger sha u geman ma ma hingir awambe, man shi u haan hanma injacan sha tar, hanma shighe u i sar ve cii." 
Revelation11:7 Zum u vea kure shiada ve u eren yô, inyam i i dugh ken ihungwa i i ze kweng la ia nôngo ityav a ve ia hemba ve ia wua ve kpaa." 
Revelation11:8 Akom a ve aa lu sha gbenda ken zegegar u i yer un sha inja i jijingi er Sodom man Igipiti her ape Ter ve kpaa, i mande Un sha terankon la." 
Revelation11:9 Ior mba ken iniongo i ior man ikwe man ijô man akuraior vea kenger akom a ve á kuma ayange atar man tiôn vea rumun er i̱ ii a shin uwar ga; 
Revelation11:10 mba ve tem sha tar cii vea ember sha ci u kwagh u a er ve la, á saan ve iyol, vea tindi uiwua hen ayol a ve, sha ci u uprofeti mba uhar mban ve er mba shin tar ican yum yô." 
Revelation11:11 Kpa ayange nga kar atar man tiôn yô, iôôn i uma i Aôndo nyôr ken ve, maa ve mough ve tile sha sha angahar a ve, zegemcie gba sha mba ve nenge a ve la." 
Revelation11:12 Tsô ve ungwa imo i vesen due Sha kaa a ve er: Kôndo nen shaan! Nahan ve kôndo ve yem Sha ken ibeen, mbaihomov vev mbala lu kenger ve je." 
Revelation11:13 Hen shighe la je tar tenger kpen kpen, tiôn môm u ken atôôn pue a gar yôhôl, i wua ior dubu utaankaruhar sha mtenger u tar la, mba ve shi her yô, cier ve iyol, ve gba civir Aôndo u Sha." 
Revelation11:14 Kwaghtseren u sha uhar kar ve, nenge, kwaghtseren u sha utar la ngu van fefa." 
Revelation11:15 Ortyom u Sha u sha utaankaruhar kpaa tôngo, tsô i ungwa uzegembaamoov Sha, ve kaa er: Tartor u shin tar hingir u Ter wase man u Kristu Na ve, Una tema tor gbem sha won." 
Revelation11:16 Tsô mbatamen mba ikundu kar unyiin mba ve tema sha mkônom vem ma torom sha ishigh ki Aôndo la gba inya ve cir ishiv vev inya, ve civir Aôndo," 
Revelation11:17 ve kaa er: We Ter, Aôndo, Uhembanagee, We u U lu her, ngise kpaa U lu la, se mba wuese We sha ci u U ngohol agee a vesen a Ou la shi u tem tor yô." 
Revelation11:18 Akuraior yuwe kpa iyugh You gema va man shi shighe u á ôr mbakpenev ijir, man shighe u á na mbatomov Ou injar, ka uprofeti man uicighanmbaiorov, man mba ve cie iti You, mbavesen kua mbakiriki la, man shi shighe u á tim mba ve lu vihin tar la kpaa." 
Revelation11:19 Tsô i bugh tempel u Aôndo Sha, nahan i nenge a areki u ikuryan na ken tempel Na, man inyiar lu man imo man idyuran man tar tenger man awombo a vesen kpaa." 
Revelation12:1 Tsô i nenge a zegeivande Sha. Kwase cir iyange iyol, uwer lu shin angahar a na, lu a tsar u sha asan pue kar ahar sha ityough nagh," 
Revelation12:2 gema lu iyav, lu ngoron sha ican i mar, lu toghor mar." 
Revelation12:3 Shi i nenge a ivande igen Sha, nenge, zegedarakon u nyian lu, lu a ityouv itiankarihiar man akor pue man sha ityouv itiankarihiar la yô, lu a ader a tor ataankarahar." 
Revelation12:4 Tsa na kombor tiôn môm u ken atôôn atar a asan a sha aôndo haa shin inya. Tsô darakon la va tile sha ishigh ki kwase u a sôôn u maren la, sha u zum u una mar yô, maa un una mena wan la." 
Revelation12:5 Nahan a mar wan u nomso u una tema tor sha akuraior sha tôgh ku iyôôgh; i tsuwe wan na la kera, i yem a mi sha Aôndo man sha ikônough Nagh ki torough." 
Revelation12:6 Kwase la gema yevese yem ken ikôngo ape a lu a ijiir i Aôndo vande sôron sha ci na sha u á koso un her, á kuma ayange dubu man deri uhar man akunduatar." 
Revelation12:7 Tsô ityav gba Sha, Mikael kua mbatyomov nav lu nôngon a darakon. Darakon a mbatyomov nav kpaa lu nôngon," 
Revelation12:8 kpa a hemba ga, ian kera lu sha ci ve Sha kpaa ga." 
Revelation12:9 I gbihi zegedarakon la shin inya, ka tseiyô je la, u i yer un er Diabolo man shi Satan la, u a lu tsughun tar cii la, i gbihi un shin tar shi i gbihi mbatyomov nav a na imôngo kpaa." 
Revelation12:10 Tsô m ungwa zegeimo Sha, lu kaan er: Hegen yô, myom man agee man tartor u Aôndo wase man shi tahav mbu Kristu Na kpaa va ve, gadia or u senden anmgbianev asev la yô, i gbihi un kera, un u a senden ve sha ishigh ki Aôndo atetan kpaa, tugh kpaa la." 
Revelation12:11 Ve yô, ve hemba un sha awambe a Waniyôngo man shi sha kwaghôron u shiada ve man uma ve kpaa doo ve ishima ga zan zan ar ken ku je." 
Revelation12:12 Nahan yô, ember nen ne Usha, man shi ne mba ne tem ker kpaa. Kpa kwagh á gema á tser tar man zegemnger gadia diabolo sen shin ven, ishima vihi un tsung gadia a fa er shighe na a kera vese ga yô." 
Revelation12:13 Zum u darakon la nenge er i gbihi un shin tar yô, a zenda kwase u a mar wannomso la." 
Revelation12:14 Kpa i na kwase la akper a zegegafa er a̱ purugh a̱ kar sha ishigh ki iyô la kera a̱ yem ken ikôngo hen ijiir na ape á koso un á kuma shighe man ashighe man veghershighe. 
Revelation12:15 Tsô iyô la suwa mngerem ma ken zwa u i ken ijime i kwase la er ka ifi nahan sha u ia er ma kuwa a na kera yô. 
Revelation12:16 Kpa tar gema wase kwase la, tar aver zwa u u, mena ifi u darakon suwa ken zwa na kera la." 
Revelation12:17 Nahan ishima vihi darakon a kwase la, a yem sha u za nôngon ityav a tsombor na u u shi her u kor atindi a Aôndo shi u lu eren shiada sha kwagh u Yesu kpaa yô." 
Revelation12:18 Nahan darakon tile hen kpezegemnger. 
Revelation13:1 Tsô m nenge inyam due shin zegemnger lu a akor pue man ityouv itiankarihiar. Sha akor a i yô, ader a tor lu pue, sha ityouv mbi i yô, ati a uityuhwan lu." 
Revelation13:2 Inyam shon i m nenge a mi la yô, i lu er ka anyam nahan, angahar a i lu er a dwem nahan, man zwa u i lu er zwa u begha nahan. Darakon gema na i agee a na man shi ikônough nagh ki torough man shi tahav mbu vesen kpaa." 
Revelation13:3 Ityough ki mômough ken ityouv mbi i yô, lu er i gber ki, er kia kpe nahan; kpa ivav i i mgbôghom a ku la i bee. Tar cii dondo inyam la, kpiligh ior iyol a i," 
Revelation13:4 ve civir darakon sha ci u a gem tahav nav a ne inyam la yô, shi ve civir inyam la kpaa, ve kaa er: Ka an nan lu er inyam ne nahana, man shi ka an nana fatyô u nôngon ityav a ii?" 
Revelation13:5 Shi i na inyam la zwa sha u ôron uzegembaakaav kua ityuhwanev kpaa, shi i na i ian er i̱ eren tahav zan zan iwer akunduahar kar ihiar." 
Revelation13:6 Tsô i bugh zwa u i, i gba tuhwan Aôndo, shi i tuhwa iti Na kpaa man shi tabernakel Na kpaa, ka mba ve tem Sha je la." 
Revelation13:7 Shi i na i ian sha u i̱ nôngo ityav a uicighanmbaiorov i̱ hemba ve kpaa, shi i na i tahav sha hanma nongo man hanma nongoior man hanma zwa man hanma ikurior kpaa." 
Revelation13:8 Mba ve tem shin tar cii vea civir i, ka ve mba i nger ati a ve ken ruamabera u uma u Waniyôngo ga la, Un u i senge Un hii sha igbetar je la." 
Revelation13:9 Aluer or nana lu a ato yô, nana̱ ungwa." 
Revelation13:10 Aluer i ver or sha ci u uikangen yô, ka ken uikangen je nana za keng ye. Aluer or nana wua sha sanker yô, nan di kpaa á wua nan sha sanker keng. Ka sha kwagh ne man ishima i taver i uicighanmbaiorov man jighjigh ve u nan a lu ye." 
Revelation13:11 Shi m nenge inyam igen due shin tar, lu a akor ahar er waniyôngo nahan, kpa i gema i lu ôron kwagh er darakon nahan." 
Revelation13:12 I lu eren tahav mbu inyam i hiihii la cii sha ishigh ki i hiihii la, shi i lu eren er tar kua mba ve tem ken u yô, ve̱ civir inyam i hiihii i ivav i i, i mgbôghom ken ku kpa i war la." 
Revelation13:13 I er uivande mba vesen, i er usu je kpaa due Sha sen shin tar sha ashe a ior." 
Revelation13:14 I lu tsughun ior mba ve tem shin tar sha uivande mba i ne i u eren sha ishigh ki inyam i hiihii la, i kaa a ve er ve̱ er eev mbu inyam i i gber i sha sanker kpa i lu uma her la." 
Revelation13:15 Man i na i ian sha u i̱ na iôôn ken eev mbu inyam la nahan eev mbu inyam mbula gba lamen je, shi i na er mba ve civir eev mbu inyam la ga yô, i̱ wua ve kera." 
Revelation13:16 Shi i lu eren er i̱ na ior cii ikav sha uwegh vegh ku yanegh shin icul ve, mbakiriki man mbavesen kpaa, mbanyarev man mbaatsanev kpaa, ônov man ikpan kpaa," 
Revelation13:17 sha u ma or nana̱ de fetyô u yamen kwagh ga shin u teen kwagh kpaa ga, saa di or u nan lu a ikav la, ka iti i inyam la je la, shin iyenge i iti i i." 
Revelation13:18 Heen yô, kwaghfan ngu. Or u nan lu a mfe yô, nana̱ ôr iyenge i inyam la, gadia ka iyenge i or je. Iyenge i i yô, ka deri ataratar man akunduatar kar ataratar." 
Revelation14:1 M shi m ver ashe, tsô nenge Waniyôngo tile sha uwo u Shion. Ior lu a Na imôngo ve kuma dubu deri man akunduahar kar unyiin, i nger iti Na man shi iti i Ter Na sha atsul a ve." 
Revelation14:2 Tsô m ungwa imo due Sha lu er ihuran i mngerem ma vesen nahan, shi lu er kume u idyuran i baveraa nahan. Imo i m ungwa la lu er mbakuhwan adiguve mba kuhwan mbaadiguve vev nahan." 
Revelation14:3 Ve lu wan icam i he sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough kila man sha ishigh ki akaauma a anyiin la man mbatamen kpaa. Ma orgen fatyô u rumun icam la ga, saa di mba dubu deri man akunduahar kar unyiin mbala mba i paa ve shin tar la tseegh." 
Revelation14:4 Mban ka mba ve hôngor ayol a ve sha ukase ga la, mba wang er ka anuunaukase nahan. Ka ve ve lu dondon Waniyôngo hen ape A ze cii ye, ka mba i paa ve ken ior, ve lu iyiagh ki tsutswagh sha ci u Aôndo man sha ci u Waniyôngo kpaa ye." 
Revelation14:5 Ken zwa ve kpaa i zua a aie ga; mba a acôghol iyol ga. 
Revelation14:6 M shi m nenge ortyom u Sha ugen lu purugh sha kwavaôndo lu a Icôronloho u Dedoo u yôôn hen mba ve tem shin tar cii, hen hanma ikurior man hanma nongo man hanma zwa man hanma nongoior." 
Revelation14:7 Lu kaan sha zegeimo er: Cia nen Aôndo, na nen Un icivir gadia shighe Na u ôron ijir kuma ve, civir nen Un u A er Sha man tar man zegemnger man amboramnger kpaa la." 
Revelation14:8 Ortyom u Sha ugen u sha uhar kpaa dondo, lu kaan er: A yôhôl ve, Zegebabilon u a er akuraior cii a me wain u asaren a na a ijimbagh la, yôhôl ve." 
Revelation14:9 Shi ortyom u Sha ugen u sha utar dondo sha a ve, lu kaan sha zegeimo er: Aluer anti or nana civir inyam man eev mbu i shi nana ngohol ikav sha icul shin sha uwegh ku nan yô," 
Revelation14:10 nan kpaa nana ma wain u iyugh i Aôndo u i nongo kwagh sha mi ga i hee ken iyongo i iyugh Na la. Á er nan ican sha usu man sha sulfur sha ishigh ki uicighanmbatyomov mba Shaav man sha ishigh ki Waniyôngo kpaa. 
Revelation14:11 Mnyim ma ican ve la maa kôndon sha gbem sha won. Mba a mmem ga, tugh kpaa tetan kpaa; ka mba ve civir inyam man shi eev mbu i man shi anti or u nan ngohol ikav i iti i i je la." 
Revelation14:12 Ka heen man ishima i taver i uicighanmbaiorov i lu ye, ka ve mba ve we atindi a Aôndo iko man shi jighjigh u nan Yesu la kpaa." 
Revelation14:13 Shi m ungwa imo due Sha, kaa er: Nger wer: Hii hegen je zan zan mbakpenev mba ve kpe ken Ter yô, á saan ve iyol. Jijingi kaa er: Kape i lu je la, ka sha u vea mem ityom ve gadia aeren a ve nga zan a ve ityô." 
Revelation14:14 M shi m ver ashe, nenge, ibeenegh ki pupuu lu, or tema sha mi lu inja er wan u or nahan, lu a tsar u zenaria sha ityou shi lu a louji u esen tsor tsor sha uwe." 
Revelation14:15 Ortyom u Sha ugen due ken tempel, yila u a tema sha ibeen la sha zegeimo er: Naregh louji wou, sunda, gadia shighe u sunda kuma ve, sunda u shin tar kpaa via tsembelee." 
Revelation14:16 Tsô un u a tema sha ibeen la vishigh louji na shin tar, maa i sunda tar je." 
Revelation14:17 Shi ortyom u Sha ugen due ken tempel u a lu Sha. Un kpaa, lu a louji u esen tsor tsor." 
Revelation14:18 Ortyom u Sha ugen kpaa shi due ken atse a nanden nagh sha mi la; ka u a lu a tahav sha usu je la. A ôr kwagh sha zegeimo a u a lu a louji u esen tsor tsor la, a kaa er, naregh louji wou u esen tsor tsor la sunda asume a wain u shin tar gadia asume a na via ve." 
Revelation14:19 Tsô ortyom u Sha la vishigh louji na shin tar, a sunda wain u shin tar, a haa shin zegeihungwa u shoghol wain u iyugh i Aôndo la." 
Revelation14:20 Nahan i shoghol wain shin ihungwa i shoghol wain la, ken won gar. Awambe due shin ihungwa la zan zan ar sha ulagema mba anyinyav, zan zan mail deri uhar je." 
Revelation15:1 M shi m nenge ivande igen Sha, i vesen i kpiligh iyol kpaa. Mbatyomov mba Shaav utaankaruhar, lu a atsan a ataankarahar, ka a masetyô je la, gadia ka sha a je iyugh i Aôndo ia kure ye." 
Revelation15:2 Shi m nenge kwagh er zegemnger u lun er gelase nahan u i nongo usu sha mi yô. Mba ve hembe inyam la man shi eev mbu i man shi iyenge i iti i i yô, ve tile ken kpezegemnger u lun er gelase nahan la, ve lu a mbaadiguve mba Aôndo." 
Revelation15:3 Ve lu wan icam i Mose wanakiriki u Aôndo man shi icam i Waniyôngo kpaa, ve lu kaan er: We Ter, Aôndo, Uhembanagee, ityom You i vese, i kpiligh iyol kpaa. Igbenda You ka jighjigh man shi mimi kpaa, We, Tor u akuraior cii." 
Revelation15:4 We, Tere, ka an je nana cia U ga, man shi ka an nana civir iti You kpaa ga? Gadia ka We tseegh U lu wang ye, akuraior cii aa va aa va gure sha ishigh You gadia i pase ajir a ôron a Ou a jighjigh la ken igbar ve." 
Revelation15:5 Ken masetyô u akaa ne m nenge i bugh tempel u tenti u shiada Sha. 
Revelation15:6 Tsô mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utaankaruhar mba ve lu a atsan a ataankarahar la due ken tempel. Ve haa akondo iyol a wang a engem, shi ve zer ikwange i zenaria sha vanger." 
Revelation15:7 U môm ken akaauma anyiin la gema na mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utaankaruhar mbala agbande a zenaria ataankarahar iv a iyugh i Aôndo u A lu uma gbem sha won la. 
Revelation15:8 Tsô tempel iv a mnyim ma iengem i Aôndo man shi mnyim ma agee a Na kpaa, ma or môm kera fatyô u tilen ken tempel ga, saa atsan a ataankarahar a mbatyomov mba utaankaruhar mbala aa bee kera ve." 
Revelation16:1 M shi m ungwa zegeimo due ken tempel, i kaa a mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utaankaruhar mbala er: Za nen za haa nen agbande a ataankarahar a iyugh i Aôndo i lu shimi la shin tar." 
Revelation16:2 Tsô ortyom u Sha u hiihii la za za haa gbande na shin tar, maa ior mba ve lu a ikav i inyam shi ve lu civir eev mbu i kpaa la, ve gba avav a bo a vihin." 
Revelation16:3 U sha uhar gema haa gbande na shin zegemnger maa hingir er ka awambe a orkpen nahan, hanma kwagh u uma u shin zegemnger cii kpe." 
Revelation16:4 Ortyom u Sha u sha utar haa gbande na shin uifi man amboramnger maa ve hingir awambe. 
Revelation16:5 Shi m ungwa ortyom u mnger lu kaan er: We, U ngu u perapera, We u U lu hegen, ngise kpaa U lu la, U ngu wang sha ajir a ôron a Ou ne." 
Revelation16:6 Gadia ve haa awambe a uicighanmbaiorov man uprofeti kpaa, nahan U na ve awambe Wer, ve̱ ma. Kwagh ne kuma sha a ve je." 
Revelation16:7 Shi m ungwa atse a nanden nagh sha mi la kpaa lu kaan er: Kape i lu je la Tere, Aôndo Uhembanagee, ajir a Ou a ôron ka sha mimi man sha jighjigh kpaa." 
Revelation16:8 Ortyom u Sha u sha unyiin la haa gbande na sha iyange maa i na iyange ian sha u i̱ hia ior sha usu yô. 
Revelation16:9 Tsô ior hia sha mtsee u taveraa la, ve gba tuhwan iti i Aôndo u A lu a tahav sha atsan angan, ve kera gema asema, ve na Un icivir ga." 
Revelation16:10 Ortyom u Sha u sha utaan la haa gbande na sha ikônough ki torough ki inyam la, maa tartor u i wa ime, ior gba nyuman iniombor ve sha ci u mnyoon." 
Revelation16:11 Ve tuhwa Aôndo u Sha sha ci u mnyoonom vem man shi avav a ve la kpaa, ve kera gema asema a ve sha aeren a ve la kera ga." 
Revelation16:12 Ortyom u Sha u sha ataratar la haa gbande na shin zegeifi u Uferati, maa mngerem nam uma sha u sôron gbenda sha ci u utor mba sha ityoughkitaregh la." 
Revelation16:13 M shi m nenge ujijingi mba hwangerev utar er asôhô nahan due ken zwa u darakon la man shi ken zwa u inyam la man shi ken zwa u profeti u aiegh la. 
Revelation16:14 Gadia ka ujijingi mba diabolo mba ve eren uivande la, mba duen zan hen utor mba sha tar sha won cii sha u kohol ve ijiir i môm sha ci u ityav mbi iyange i vesen i Aôndo, Uhembanagee la." 
Revelation16:15 Nenge, M ngu van er ormbaiv nahan. Or u nan lu per shi nan kor riga u nan sha u nana kera zende idyelegh er á nengen kunya u nan ga yô, i saan nan iyol." 
Revelation16:16 Tsô ve kohol ve imôngo hen ijiir i i yer ken zwa u Heberu er Armagedon la. 
Revelation16:17 Ortyom u Sha u sha utaankaruhar la haa gbande na sha ahumbe, nahan zegeimo due ken tempel, ken ikônough ki torough kila, lu kaan er: I kure ve!" 
Revelation16:18 Maa inyiar lu kpishi kua imo man idyuran kpaa, tar kpaa tenger sha agee, imba i u lu a vande tenger mayange ga, hii sha shighe u or hii teman shin tar la je, kape mtenger u tar ne a lu sha agee ne." 
Revelation16:19 Nahan zegegar la pav ikwe itiar, agar a akuraior kpaa yôhôl kera. Aôndo umbur Zegebabilon sha u nan un iyongo i wain u iyugh Na la." 
Revelation16:20 Nahan acile cii yevese, i kera zua a iwo kpaa ga." 
Revelation16:21 Uzegembaawombov osough Sha haa shin tar, iwombo i môm yuhwa kuma er talenti môm nahan (pams deri môm). Ior gba tuhwan Aôndo sha ican i awomboogh la, gadia ican i a la cier iyol yum." 
Revelation17:1 Nahan u môm ken mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utaankaruhar mba ve lu a agbande la va va ôr kwagh a mo, kaa er: Va heen, m̱ tese u ijirôron i zegeidyakwase u a tem sha mngerem ma kpishim la." 
Revelation17:2 Ka un man utor mba shin tar ve er idya a na, mba ve tem shin tar kpaa ve hunde wain u idya na la." 
Revelation17:3 Nahan a kua a mo ken Jijingi a yem a mo ken taaikôngo. Tsô m nenge a kwase tema sha inyam i nyian bong, i lu a ati a uityuhwan iyol wue wue, lu a ityouv itiankarihiar man akor pue." 
Revelation17:4 Kwase la yô, haa akondo a nyian dindee man a nyian bong iyol, lu a zenaria iyol wue wue man shi awen a injaa man utagbede kpaa, lu a iyongo i zenaria ken uwegh nagh, iv a akaa a ndôhôr ishima man akaa a hôngorough a idya na la." 
Revelation17:5 Sha icul na yô, i nger iti sha mi lu kwaghmyer je. I nger er: ZEGEBABILON, NGÔ U UDYAMBAKASEV MAN SHI AKAA A NDÔHÔR ISHIMA A SHIN TAR KPAA." 
Revelation17:6 M shi m nenge kwase la lu hunden sha awambe a uicighanmbaiorov man shi sha awambe a mbashiada mba Yesu kpaa. M nenge a na nahan kpiligh mo iyol je gande. 
Revelation17:7 Tsô ortyom u Sha la kaa a mo er: Ka nyi kwagh ne a kpiligh we iyol nahana? Me pase u kwaghmyer u kwase ne man shi inyam i a hende, i lu a ityouv itiankarihiar man akor pue la." 
Revelation17:8 Inyam i u nenge a mi la ngise lu kpa hegen kera ngi ga, ngi sôôn u duen shin ihungwa i i ze kweng la karen zan ken mtim. Mba ve tem shin tar, mba hii sha igbetar la je i nger ati a ve ken ruamabera u uma ga la, á kpiligh ve iyol a inyam la er ngise i lu kpa hegen i kera lu ga, kpa shi ia va lu la." 
Revelation17:9 Ka sha kwagh ne man mkav u lun a mfe la a lu ye. Ityouv itiankarihiar la ka iwo itiankarihiar i kwase la a tem sha mi je la. Shi ka utor utaankaruhar kpaa. 
Revelation17:10 Ken ve yô, mba utaan ve gba, u môm ngu her, ugen la yô, ngu a va ga. Zum u una va yô, una tema keng kpa á lu anshighe kpeghee tsô." 
Revelation17:11 Sha kwagh u inyam i ngise i lu kpa hegen i lu ga la yô, ka i je i lu i sha anigheni ye, kpa ngi ken mba utaankaruhar la, shi ngi zan ken mtim." 
Revelation17:12 Akor pue a u nenge a mi la yô, ka utor pue je la. Mba a ngohol tahav mbu tor ga, kpa vea ngohol tahav er utor nahan a inyam la imôngo á kuma ihwa i môm." 
Revelation17:13 Mban yô, ishima ve ngi môm, mba geman agee ve man tahav vev nan inyam la." 
Revelation17:14 Vea nôngo ityav a Waniyôngo kpa Waniyôngo Una hemba ve kua mba ve lu a Na imôngo la, ka mba i yer ve, i tsough ve, ve lu jighjigh la, gadia Un ka Ter u uter man Tor u utor kpaa." 
Revelation17:15 Shi a kaa a mo er: Mngerem ma u nenge a mi ma idyakwase a tem sha mi la yô, ka iniongo i ior man akumaior man akuraior man ijô." 
Revelation17:16 Man shi akor pue a u nenge a mi la kua inyam yô, vea kôr idyakwase la ihom, vea ngohol un akaa, una hingir aveve una hungwa idyelegh, vea ya inyam na vea nande un sha usu." 
Revelation17:17 Gadia Aôndo na ve ken asema a ve sha u ve̱ er sha awashima Na, ve̱ er a ishima i môm je, ve̱ gema tor ve, ve̱ na inyam la zan zan akaaôron a Aôndo aa kure vough yô." 
Revelation17:18 Kwase u u nenge a mi la yô, ka zegegar u a lu a tahav sha utor mba shin tar yô." 
Revelation18:1 Ken masetyô u akaa ne yô, m nenge ortyom u Sha ugen lu senen Sha, lu a tahav mbu vesen, tar kpaa wanger sha iengem na la." 
Revelation18:2 A yila sha imo i genger genger a kaa er: A yôhôl ve, Zegebabilon yôhôl ve, hingir ijiir i ujijingi mba bov tsan her, shi hingir ya u hanma jijingi u hwangeregh man shi ya u inyon i hwangerev man i ndôhôr ishima kpaa." 
Revelation18:3 Gadia akuraior cii ma wain u isharen na i ijimbagh la. Utor mba shin tar kpaa er idya a na. Mbakasuav mba shin tar hingir mbanyarev sha agee a ishar na i i haa ve iyol la. 
Revelation18:4 Shi m ungwa imo igen due Sha kaa er: Nongoior Wam, due nen ken a na kera sha er né nyôr nongo sha asorabo a na ga, shi né ngohol atsan a tseren un la kpaa ga yô." 
Revelation18:5 Gadia asorabo a na hingir tihi tav je ar Sha, Aôndo kpaa umbur afer a na." 
Revelation18:6 Er nen a na vough er un kpaa a eren nahan la; or nen un iyev kwa har sha aeren a na la; nungwa nen un kwaghman kwa har shin iyongo i a lu nungwan la. 
Revelation18:7 Er a lu civir iyol na shi ishar i lu haan un iyol nahan yô, kape na nen un ican man ijungwen vough la. Gadia ken ishima na yô, a lu kaan nahan er: M tema tor je, m ngu kwasecôghol ga, ijungwen kpaa me nenge a mi ashe ga." 
Revelation18:8 Sha ci u nahan yô, atsan a na aa va shire sha a na iyange i môm je. Ka ku man ijungwen man ijen kpaa, á nande un sha usu kpaa. Gadia Ter Aôndo u A lu ôron un ijir la ka u ageegh je." 
Revelation18:9 Utor mba ve er idya a na shi ishar i hee ve iyol a na imôngo la, vea vaa, vea zungwe un zum u vea nenge mnyim ma mhie na la." 
Revelation18:10 Vea tile ken ica vea cia atsan a na la vea kaa er: Kwagh tser u ve! Kwagh tser u ve! We, zegegar ne, Babilon u taver ne, ijir you kure ken ihwa i môm tsô." 
Revelation18:11 Mbakasuav mba shin tar mba vaan mba zungwen un, gadia or môm kera ngu yamen ikav vev ga." 
Revelation18:12 Ka ikav mbi sha zenaria man azurfa man awen a injaa man utagbede man akondo a pupuu a dedoo man akondo a nyian dindee man akondo a shiliti man akondo a nyian bong man shi hanma inja i kon u human doon man hanma anzaakaa a i er a sha anyi a nortar man shi hanma anzaakaa a i er a sha ikon i injaa man sha dela man sha iyôgh ki iligh man sha awen a mabel 
Revelation18:13 man shinamon man amomo man akaa a human doon man mkurem ma human doon man libano man wain man mkurem man mwem ma kengese man alakema man ibua man iyôngo man anyinya man akeke a zeren sha anyinya man ikpan man uuma mba iorov kpaa. 
Revelation18:14 Atam a ou a a lu saren uma wou yum la kpaa a due ken a we kera, hanma kwagh u injaa man hanma kwagh u engem saa u ishe ve, á kera zua a mi mayange ga." 
Revelation18:15 Mbaeren kasua sha akaa ne mba ve zough a mtsera ken a na, vea tile ken ica vea cia atsan a na la, vea vaa vea zungwe kpaa." 
Revelation18:16 Vea kaa er: Kwagh tser un ve, kwagh tser un ve, zegegar ne u a hee akondo a pupuu a dedoo iyol man akondo a nyian dindee man akondo a nyian bong kpaa, shi a er hwe iyol sha zenaria man awen a injaa man utagbede kpaa ne," 
Revelation18:17 gadia sha ihwa i môm tseegh tsô i vihi imbaikpelainyar ne cii. Mbakôômutso cii man mbaperen zegemnger man mbaerentom sha utso man mbazenden shin zegemnger cii, ve tile ken ica." 
Revelation18:18 Mba nengen mnyim ma mhie na yô, ve genger imo ve kaa er: Ka hanma gar a kom sha zegegar nee?" 
Revelation18:19 Tsô ve haa vuulevu sha ityouv vev, ve vaa, ve zungwe, ve kaa er: Kwagh tser un ve, kwagh tser un ve, zegegar ne, mba ve lu a utso shin zegemnger cii ve hingir mbanyarev sha akaa a na a injaa la. Gadia ken ihwa i môm tseegh tsô i yôhôl un kera cii." 
Revelation18:20 We Sha, man ne uicighanmbaiorov man mbaapostoli man uprofeti, ember nen sha kwagh na ne, gadia Aôndo kure ijir yen a na ve." 
Revelation18:21 Tsô ortyom u Sha ugen u taver iyol tôô iwen er zegenase nahan kende shin zegemnger, kaa er: Kape á mgbegha zegegar u Babilon kera sha agee, á kera zua a na ga je ne." 
Revelation18:22 Á kera ungwa imo i mbakuhwan adiguve ken we ga, shin mbawanatsam shin mbatôngonamar shin mbatôngonikor kpaa ga. Man á kera zua a ma or u fan eev u eren ma tom u sha kwaghfan ken we kpaa ga, á kera ungwa iov i nase ken a we kpaa ga." 
Revelation18:23 Ma imenger ia kera ta iwanger ken a we kpaa ga, á kera ungwa imo i orkwasehe man shi kwasehe ken a we kpaa ga. Gadia mbakasuav ou lu ashagbaior shin tar, akuraior cii tsume sha ahir a ou la." 
Revelation18:24 Ka ken a na man i zua a awambe a uprofeti kua a uicighanmbaiorov man mba i wua ve shin tar cii la ye. 
Revelation19:1 Ken masetyô u akaa ne m ungwa er ka zegeimo u zegeikpelaior Sha lu kaan er: Haleluya! Myom man iengem man agee ka a Aôndo wase," 
Revelation19:2 gadia ajir a Na a ôron ka a mimi, nga jighjigh kpaa; gadia A kure ijir i zegeidyakwase u a lu vihin tar sha idya na ne, A or un iyev sha ci u awambe a mbatomov Nav la." 
Revelation19:3 Shi ve kimbir u kaan er: Haleluya! Mnyim nam ma kôndon sha gbem sha won. 
Revelation19:4 Tsô mbatamen mba ikundu kar unyiin la man akaauma a anyiin la gba inya ve cir ishigh inya ve civir Aôndo u A tem sha ikônough ki torough kila, ve kaa er. Amen, Haleluya!" 
Revelation19:5 Imo kpaa due ken ikônough ki torough kila kaa er: Wuese nen Aôndo wase, ne mbatomov Nav cii, ne mba ne cie Un ne, mbakiriki kua mbavesen cii." 
Revelation19:6 Tsô m ungwa ihuran er ka zegeikpelaior nahan, shi lu er ihuran i mngerem ma vesen nahan, shi lu er ihuran i idyuran i taver taver nahan, i lu kaan er: Haleluya! Ter wase Aôndo, Uhembanagee, tema tor ve." 
Revelation19:7 Se lu nen saan saan, se ember nen, se civir nen Un, gadia ivaa i zuan i Waniyôngo kuma ve, kwase Na kpaa kohol iyol ve." 
Revelation19:8 I rumun un er a̱ wuha iyol sha akondo a pupuu a dedoo a engem ashe man a wang kpaa— gadia akondo a pupuu a dedoo la yô, ka aeren a perapera a uicighanmbaiorov." 
Revelation19:9 Tsô ortyom u Sha kaa a mo er: Nger wer: Mba i lehe ve iniongo i kwasehe i Waniyôngo yô, saan ve iyol. Shi a kaa a mo er: Angan ka akaaôron a Aôndo a mimi." 
Revelation19:10 Nahan m gba inya, m cir ishigh inya hen angahar a na, sha u me civir un. Kpa a kaa a mo er: De eren nahan ga! M ngu ortom a we imôngo kua anmgbianev ou mba ve lu a shiada sha kwagh u Yesu la kpaa. Civir Aôndo. Gadia ka shiada u sha kwagh u Yesu a lu jijingi u akaaôron a profeti ye." 
Revelation19:11 Tsô m nenge Sha lu ivegher, nenge, nyinya u pupuu lu. Un u A tema sha mi la i yilan Un er Jighjigh man Mimi. Un er ijir sha perapera, shi nenge ityav kpaa." 
Revelation19:12 Ashe a Na ka nomborusu; sha ityough Nagh yô, ader a tor lu imôngo. I nger Un iti i ma or nan fe i ga, saa Un iyol Na tsô." 
Revelation19:13 Ngu a riga iyol u i we un shin awambe yô, mba yer iti Na er, Imo i Aôndo." 
Revelation19:14 Akumautya a Sha dondo sha a Na, ve lu sha anyinya a pupuu, ve haa akondo a pupuu a dedoo a kungun a wang iyol." 
Revelation19:15 Sanker u esen tsor tsor due ken zwa Na sha u Una gber akuraior yô. Ka Un Una tema tor sha a sha tôgh ku iyôôgh ye. Shi ka Un kpaa Una shoghol ihungwa i wain i iyugh i sha ishima i vihin i Aôndo Uhembanagee la ye. 
Revelation19:16 I nger iti sha riga Na man sha namegh Nagh er: Tor u utor man Ter u uter. 
Revelation19:17 Shi m nenge ortyom u Sha tile sha iyange, lu yilan inyon i purugh sha kwavaôndo cii sha zegeimo er: Va kohol nen hen zegeiniongo u Aôndo ne," 
Revelation19:18 va ya nen inyam i utor man inyam i anyinya kua mba ve hende a yô, man inyam i ior cii, ônov man ikpan, mbakiriki kua mbavesen cii." 
Revelation19:19 Shi m nenge inyam la man utor mba shin tar man akumautya a ve, ve kohol sha u nôngon ityav a Un u A tem sha nyinya la man shi akumautya a Na." 
Revelation19:20 Tsô i kôr inyam la man shi profeti u aie la kpaa, un u a lu eren uivande sha ishigh ki inyam, a lu tsughun ior mba ve ngohol ikav i inyam la man shi mba ve civir eev mbu i la kpaa, i gbihi ve uhar cii uma ken berusu u a lu yeghen sha sulfur la." 
Revelation19:21 Mbagenev mba ve shi her yô, i wua ve sha sanker u Un u a tem sha nyinya la, ka sanker u a lu duen ken zwa Na la, inyon cii kpaa ide sha inyam ve la." 
Revelation20:1 Shi m nenge ortyom u Sha lu senen Sha, lu a ishindan u ihungwa i i ze kweng la shi lu a ishiligh ku vesen ken uwegh nagh kpaa." 
Revelation20:2 Tsô a kôr darakon, ka tseiyô u a lu diabolo man Satan kpaa la, a kange un, una lu uikangen zan zan anyom dubu," 
Revelation20:3 a kende un shin ihungwa i i ze kweng la a cir i a ver ikav sha mi sha u a̱ de kera tsughun akuraior ga, saa anyom dubu aa kuma ve. Ken masejime yô, á shi á pase un anshighe kpeghee keng." 
Revelation20:4 Tsô m nenge mkônom ma torom, ior tema sha mi, i na ve ijir i ôron sha ikev. Shi m nenge uuma mba ior mba i gber ve ityough sha ci u shiada u Yesu man sha ci u mkaanem ma Aôndo la, ka mba ve civir inyam la ga shin eev mbu i kpaa ga, ve ngohol ikav i i sha atsul a ve ga, shin sha ave a ve kpaa ga. Ve nder ve tema tor a Kristu imôngo kuma anyom dubu je." 
Revelation20:5 Mbakpenev mbagenev mba ve shi her yô, ve nder ga saa anyom dubu la aa kuma ve. Ka mnder u hiihii je ne." 
Revelation20:6 Or u nan lu a ci sha mnder u hiihii ne yô, saan nan iyol, nan ngu icighanor kpaa. Mban yô, ku u sha uhar la ngu a tahav sha a ve ga, vea gema vea lu upristi mba Aôndo man mba Kristu kpaa, vea tema tor a na imôngo sha anyom dubu la." 
Revelation20:7 Zum u anyom dubu la aa bee yô, á sagh Satan ken gaadi na kera." 
Revelation20:8 Una due sha u tsughun akuraior a ken azongo a tar anyiin la, ka Gogi man Magogi je la, ka sha u una kohol ve sha ci u utya. Ingeegh vegh kuma er waarawa u shin zegemnger nahan." 
Revelation20:9 Ve tange van sha tar ioo, ve va kase afo a uicighanmbaiorov man shi gar u doon ishima la kpaa. Tsô usu sen Sha hia ve kera cii." 
Revelation20:10 Diabolo u a lu tsughun ve la kpaa i kende un ken ber u usu man sulfur ape inyam man profeti u aie ve lu la; á eren ve ican atetan kpaa tugh kpaa gbem sha won. 
Revelation20:11 Shi m nenge zegeikôn u pupuu u tor. Un u A tema sha mi la yô, tar man Sha yevese sha ishigh Nagh kera, ian kera lu sha ci ve mape ga." 
Revelation20:12 Tsô m nenge mbakpenev tile sha ishigh ki ikônough ki torough kila, mbavesen kua mbakiriki cii. Nahan i bugh uruamabera. I shi i bugh ruamabera ugen kpaa, ka ruamabera u uma je la. Tsô i ôr mbakpenev ijir sha akaa a i nger ken uruamabera mbala, sha aeren a ve." 
Revelation20:13 Zegemnger na mbakpenev mba ve lu shin a na la. Ku man Hade kpaa na mbakpenev mba ve lu shin ve la. I ôr hanma or ijir sha aeren a nan ser ser. 
Revelation20:14 Ku man Hade yô, i kende ve ken berusu. Ka ku u sha uhar, ka berusu je la." 
Revelation20:15 Man aluer i nenge i nger or ken ruamabera u uma la ga yô, i kende nan ken berusu je." 
Revelation21:1 Tsô m nenge Sha u he man tar u he kpaa, gadia Sha u hiihii man tar u hiihii la kar kera, zegemnger kpaa kera lu ga." 
Revelation21:2 Shi m nenge icighangar, ka Yerusalem u he je la, lu senen Sha, a due her Aôndo, i sôr un er kwasehe u i er un hwe iyol sha ci u nom na yô." 
Revelation21:3 Shi m ungwa zegeimo due ken ikônough ki torough kila kaa er: Nenge, tenti u Aôndo ngu hen ior, Una tema a ve, vea lu nongoior Na, Aôndo iyol Na Una lu a ve." 
Revelation21:4 Una ese ve mliam sha ashe kera cii, ku ua kera lu ga, shin ijungwen shin mliam shin ican kpaa ia kera lu je ga, gadia akaa a tse la kar kera." 
Revelation21:5 Un u A tema sha ikônough ki torough la kaa er: Nenge M ngu geman akaa cii hingir a he. Shi A kaa er: Nger, gadia akaaôron ne ka a jighjigh man ka a mimi kpaa." 
Revelation21:6 Shi A kaa a mo er: I kure ve! Mo M ngu Alefa man Omega, mhii man mkur. Or u imura i ker nan yô, Mo Me na nan mngerem ma imbormnger i uma la gbilin." 
Revelation21:7 Or u nan hembe yô, nana ya dyako sha akaa ne, Me lu Aôndo u nan, nan di kpaa nana lu wan Wam." 
Revelation21:8 Kpa mbaciankwagh man mbanan jighjigh ga, man mba kwagh ve a ndôhôr ishima la man mbawuanior man mbadyarev man mbaahiriv man mbacivirakombo man mbaerenaie cii, kwar ve ngu ken ber u a lu hian sha usu man sulfur, ka ku u sha uhar je la." 
Revelation21:9 Tsô u môm ken mbatyomov mba Shaav mba utaankaruhar mba ve lu a agbande ataankarahar a a iv a atsan a ataankarahar a masetyô la, a va ôr kwagh a mo, a kaa er: Va heen, m̱ tese u kwasehe, ka kwase u Waniyôngo je la." 
Revelation21:10 Tsô a yem a mo ken Jijingi a za a mo sha zegewo u taven Sha, a tesem icighangar, ka Yerusalem u he je la, lu senen Sha; a due her Aôndo," 
Revelation21:11 lu a iengem i Aôndo je, iwanger na lu er ka iwen i injaa kpishi nahan, lu er iwen i yasepi i wanger er krusetalu nahan." 
Revelation21:12 Lu a zegegilgar u taven sha, shi lu a ihinda pue kar ihiar kpaa, mbatyomov mba Shaav pue kar uhar kpaa lu sha ihinda la. I nger ati sha mi, ka ikwe i Iserael pue kar ihiar je la." 
Revelation21:13 Vegher u sha ityoughkitaregh ihinda lu itiar, ken imbusutarimese ihinda lu itiar, ken imbusutariyan ihinda lu itiar man shin ityôtar kpaa ihinda lu itiar." 
Revelation21:14 Gilgar u gar la lu a amagh pue kar uhar, i nger ati pue kar ahar a mbaapostoli mba pue kar uhar mba Waniyôngo sha mi." 
Revelation21:15 Un u a lu ôron kwagh a mo la lu a iyiagh ki karen kwagh a mi ki sha zenaria, sha u una kar gar man ihinda na man ugilmbaagarev nav kpaa." 
Revelation21:16 Gar la lu akuku, iniembe na man igbanger na lu kwagh môm. Tsô a kar gar la sha iyiagh nagh ki karen kwagh a mi la, lu mail dubu môm man deri utaan. Iniembe na man igbanger na man ityaven na lu kwagh môm." 
Revelation21:17 Shi a kar gilgar na kpaa, lu aseva deri man akunduahar kar anyiin sha ikaren i or, ka u ortyom u Sha je la." 
Revelation21:18 I maa gilgar la sha awen a yasepi. Gar la lu zenaria eng er gelase u lun wang nahan. 
Revelation21:19 Amagh a gilgar u gar la i er hwe sha mi sha awen a injaa anza kposo kposo. Imagh ki hiihii lu yasepi, ki sha uhar lu safir, ki sha utar lu kalekido, ki sha unyiin lu semaragidu," 
Revelation21:20 ki sha utaan lu sardoniku, ki sha ataratar lu sardiu, ki sha itiankarihiar lu krusetalu, ki sha anigheni lu beril, ki sha itiankarinyiin lu topashi, ki sha pue lu krusoperasu, ki sha pue kar môm lu hiakinto, ki sha pue kar uhar lu ametise." 
Revelation21:21 Ihinda pue kar ihiar la lu utagbede pue kar uhar. Hanma hunda tagbede môm jimin, igbenda i gar la lu zenaria eng, er gelase u ananene nahan." 
Revelation21:22 Tempel yô, m nenge a mi ker ga, gadia ka Ter Aôndo Uhembanagee la A lu tempel na ye, man shi Waniyôngo kpaa ka imenger na." 
Revelation21:23 Kwagh gba gar la a iyange shin uwer sha u ve̱ ta ker ga, gadia iengem i Aôndo ngi wanger ker, Waniyôngo kpaa ka imenger na." 
Revelation21:24 Akuraior aa zenden ken iwanger na, utor mba shin tar kpaa ve nyôr a iengem ve ker." 
Revelation21:25 Ihinda na kpaa á wuhen i atetan ga, gadia tugh mbua kera ile ker je ga." 
Revelation21:26 Shi á va nyôr a iengem man icivir i akuraior ker kpaa. 
Revelation21:27 Ma kwagh u lun wang ga shin ma or u eren akaa a ndôhôr ishima shin u eren aie vea nyôr ker ga, saa mba i nger ve ken ruamabera u uma u Waniyôngo la vea nyôr ker ye." 
Revelation22:1 Tsô a tesem ifi u mngerem ma umam, lu wang er krusetalu nahan, lu duen ken ikônough ki torough ki Aôndo man ki waniyôngo la." 
Revelation22:2 Ken atô u gbenda u ken gar la man shi ifi yande ne kua yande la kpaa kon u uma lu umen atam kwa pue kar uhar, hanma uwer u umen atam. Ika i kon la kpaa lu sha u been akuraior angev." 
Revelation22:3 Ma kwagh u i we un ifan una kera lu ga, kpa ikônough ki torough ki Aôndo man ki Waniyôngo kia lu ker, mbatomov Nav vea civir Un." 
Revelation22:4 Vea nenge a ishigh Nagh, iti Na kpaa ia lu sha atsul a ve." 
Revelation22:5 Tugh mbua kera ile ga, kwagh una kera gba ve a iwanger i imenger shin iyange kpaa ga, gadia Ter Aôndo Una ta iwanger sha a ve, vea tema tor gbem sha won." 
Revelation22:6 A shi A kaa a mo er: Akaaôron angan ka a jighjigh, ka a mimi kpaa. Ter Aôndo u ujijingi mba uprofeti tindi ortyom Na sha u a̱ va tese mbatomov Nav akaa a aa er fefa keng la." 
Revelation22:7 Nenge, M ngu van fefa. Or u nan we akaaôron a profeti a ken ruamabera ne iko yô, saan nan iyol." 
Revelation22:8 Mo Yohane ne, ka mo m ongo shi m nenge akaa ne kpaa ye. Zum u m ungwa shi m nenge a yô, m gba inya m cir ishigh inya hen angahar a ortyom u Sha u a lu tesen mo akaa ne." 
Revelation22:9 Kpa a kaa a mo er: De eren nahan ga. M ngu ortom a we imôngo kua anmgbianev ou kpaa, ka uprofeti je la, man shi mbala mba ve we akaaôron a ken takerada ne iko yô. Civir Aôndo." 
Revelation22:10 Shi a kaa a mo er: De cirin akaaôron a profeti a ken ruamabera veren ikav sha mi ga, gadia shighe mgbôghom." 
Revelation22:11 Or u eren ifer yô, nana̱ seer a seer eren ifer, or u nan we ibinga yô, nana̱ seer ibinga, or u perapera yô, nana̱ seer a seer eren perapera, u nan lu icighanor yô, nana̱ seer a seer lun icighanor." 
Revelation22:12 Nenge, M ngu van fefa, injar Yam kpaa ngi a Mo, sha u Me na hanma or er tom u nan u lu yô." 
Revelation22:13 M ngu Alefa man Omega, u hiihii man u masetyô, mhii man mkur kpaa." 
Revelation22:14 Mba ve ee akondo sha u vea lu a ian sha kon u uma man shi u nyôron ken ihinda i gar la yô, saan ve iyol." 
Revelation22:15 Ken won yô, ka iwa man mbaahiriv man mbadyarev man mbawuanior man mbacivirakombo man mba aie a doo ve ishima shi ve eren un kpaa la." 
Revelation22:16 Mo Yesu, M tindi ortyom Wam sha u a̱ er ne shiada sha akaa ne ken iniongo i Kristu. Mo M ngu mise man tsombor u Davidi man shi Ishan i sha use i engem la." 
Revelation22:17 Jijingi man kwasehe mba kaan er: Va! Or u nan lu ungwan kpaa nana̱ kaa er: Va! Or u imura i ker nan yô, nana̱ va. Or u i sar nan kpaa, nana̱ va, nana̱ va ngohol mngerem ma umam gbilin." 
Revelation22:18 Hanma or u nan ongo kwaghôron u profeti u ken ruamabera ne yô, m ngu eren nan shiada je mer: Aluer or nana seer kwagh sha mi yô, Aôndo Una seer nan atsan a i nger a ken ruamabera ne." 
Revelation22:19 Aluer or nana pande kwagh ken ruamabera u profeti ne kera yô, Aôndo Una pande kwar u nan u sha kon u uma la kera man shi sha icighangar kpaa er i nger kwagh ve ken ruamabera ne nahan." 
Revelation22:20 Un u A er shiada sha akaa ne ngu kaan er: Een, M ngu van fefa. Amen, va, Ter Yesu."
